1.1: Eneshi Ersa Mexihani xienrenlai niereni jilasan shu wo. Hheshi Iburaheimu , Dawude ni houdei wo.
1.2: Iburaheimu de Isaghei ni oluwo. Isaghei de Yagebu ni oluwo. Yagebu de Yuda , gaijiulaini oluwo.
1.3: Tama Yuda de Falesi , Xiela ghualai oluwo. Falesi de Xisilun ni oluwo. Xisilun de Lan ni oluwo.
1.4: Lan de Yaminada ni oluwo. Yaminada de Nashun ni oluwo. Nashun de Samen ni oluwo.
1.5: Lahe Samen de Boasi ni oluwo. Lude Boasi de Ebeide ni oluwo. Ebeide de Yexi ni oluwo.
1.6: Yexi de Dawude honshanni oluwo. Uliya ni bierei Dawude de Sulumane ni oluwo.
1.7: Sulumane de Loboan ni oluwo. Loboan de Yabiya ni oluwo. Yabiya de Yasa ni oluwo.
1.8: Yasa de Yeshafa ni oluwo. Yeshafa de Yelan ni oluwo. Yelan de Uxiya ni oluwo.
1.9: Uxiya de Yetan ni oluwo. Yetan de Yahasi ni oluwo. Yahasi de Xixijia ni oluwo.
1.10: Xixijia de Manaxi ni oluwo. Manaxi de Yamen ni oluwo. Yamen de Yexiya ni oluwo.
1.11: Bexinlai Babilun de touzhi echikude Yexiya de Yegeniya , gaijiulani oluwo.
1.12: Touzhi Babilun de echidene Yegeniya de Salaqie ni oluwo. Salaqie de Solobabo ni oluwo.
1.13: Solobabo de Yabii ni oluwo. Yabii de Iliyajin ni oluwo. Iliyajin de Yaso ni oluwo.
1.14: Yaso de Sadu ni oluwo. Sadu de Yajin ni oluwo. Yajin de Ili ni oluwo.
1.15: Ili de Iliyasa ni oluwo. Iliyasa de Madan ni oluwo. Madan de Yagebu ni oluwo.
1.16: Yagebu de Yusufu ni oluwo. Yusufu shi Mereiyen ni zhanguiji wo. Mereiyen Mexiha giesan Ersa i oluwo.
1.17: Ingiese Iburaheimu se Dawude shi 14 dai wo. Dawude se bexinlai touzhi Babilun de echikude 14 dai wo. Touzhi Babilun de echidene Mexihashi 14 dai wo. Ersa Mexihani Oluzho (Luj 2:1-7)
1.18: Ersa Mexihai olusan shiqinshi imutui wo. Hhei anai Mereiyen ni Yusufu de boluzho. Dou ese agikude Mereiyen Shenlinghala kewosi laiwo.
1.19: Hhei zhanguijini Yusufu shi nie gou kun wo. Hhei minminji shizheghaku duran uwo. Qioqioji siraghane giezho.
1.20: Hhe zhen ene shiqinni sumulakude Ezhanni qienxien zhoujindei xienjighazhi kieliewo, " Dawude ni houdei Yusufu , chi bu ayidene Mereiyen ni agizhi ire. Hhe Shenlinghala kewosi laiwo.
1.21: Hhe nie kewon olune. Niereini Ersa giezhi ogi. Hhe bexinlane zui dundase jiuine."
1.22: Ene shiqinla man fashen giekushi Ezhan xienzhini tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho,
1.23: "Nie ese dafalasan oqin kewon laizhi olune. Niereini Imaneili giene." Imaneili ni isishi Huda matanre hhantu wo.
1.24: Yusufu xiereidene Ezhanni qienxien fenfulasan mutun biereii agizhi irewoma,
1.25: kewosi ese olutula ghuala hhantu ese kijiezho. Kewonni oludene hhende Ersa giezhi niere ogiwo.

2.1: Hherode honshan danlakude Ersa i Yudaya ni Bolihen de oluwo. Dunbangiese aghelitu kunla Yelusalende ire asawo,
2.2: "Olusan hhe nie Yutai kunni honshan khala wine? Bijien dunbangiese hodunyini chanladene hhei beiile irewo."
2.3: Hherode honshan enei sonosudene zhughedeni nanran uwo. Nie Yelusalen ni kunladeye nanran uwo.
2.4: Ingie honshan bexinlai fugie buwa, jinwun hanjialai man uruzhi hhantulagha asazho, "Mexihani khala olune?"
2.5: Hhela kieliewo, " Yudaya ni Bolihen de olune. Xienzhini shu jiere huaizho,
2.6: ' Yuda oronni Bolihen ya, chi Yuda ni chenshi dundase zui gani pusho. Mii bexin Isilie yi uduruchen nie lindao chii hhense khizhene.'"
2.7: Ingie Hherode aghelitu kunlai ghulazhi uru iredene hodun yan xienzide khizhesei xianxide asazho.
2.8: Ingiedene hhelai Bolihen de peizhi echigha kieliewo, "Ta echidene xianxide hhe kewonni daqinla. Ereizhi oludene made kieliele ire. Biye hhei beiile echine."
2.9: Hhela honshanyi kielienyi chenliedene echiwo. Dunbangiese chanlasan hhe hodun hhelai melie yozho. Izhi hhe kewonyi qiorun qiende yozhi echi beiwo.
2.10: Hhela hodunni chanladene hende bayasuzho.
2.11: Giedoura orose kewonni, anaini Mereiyen yi chanlawo, papaladene hhe kewonni beiiwo. Boubei xiaxiane keighadene antan, xian, guizhuntu caoyeni mure ogiwo.
2.12: Huda aghelitu kunlai zhoujinde Hherode i ochirale bu echi giezhi mejieghase psedu mose goya orondene echiwo. Aijide Piile Echizho
2.13: Hhela echidene Ezhanni qienxien Yusufu i zhoujinde xienjizhi kieliewo, "Chi bosizhedene kewon, anaini uduruzhi Aiji de piile echi. Bi fenfulatula hhende sou. Ene kewonni Hherode ereizhi alane giezho!"
2.14: Ingie Yusufu xienidei bosizhedene kewon, anaini uduruzhi Aiji de echi
2.15: Hherode fugutula hhende souwo. Ingiekushi Ezhan xienzhii tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho, "Bi kewonne Aiji se uruzhi khizhewo." Ga Kewonlani Man Alazho
2.16: Aghelitu kunla piendasei Hherode mejiedene hende hokuzho. Ingiedene aghelitu kunlase hodun kaishi giezhi khizhesan shijienni mejiedene kun peizhi Bolihen chenshi pse zhouwidedu ghuase meilani kewonlai man alawo.
2.17: Ingiese Ezhan Yelimi xienzhii tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholuwo,
2.18: " Rama de nango giezhi hende wilasan shenqini sonosuwo. Lajie kesiladene oluzhi wilazho. Kesilani man widase sidaghazhi kieliesei ese chenliewo." Aijise Nasalede Khareiwo
2.19: Hherode fugudene Ezhanyi qienxien Aiji de Yusufu ni zhoujinde xienjighazhi kieliewo,
2.20: "Chi bosizhedene kewosi, anaini uduruzhi Isilie oronde echi. Kewonni alane giesan kunla ijin fuguwo."
2.21: Ingie Yusufu bosizhedene kewosi, anaini uduruzhi Isilie oronde khareizhi irewo.
2.22: Yajilao Hherode adane oronde Yudaya ni honshan danlasei Yusufu sonosudene hhende echikuse ayizho. Ingie zhoujindeni Ezhan mejieghase Jialili oronde echidene
2.23: Nasale giesan chenshide souwo. Ingiekushi Ezhan xienzhilai tungo giezhi, "Hhei Nasale kun giezhi urune." giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho.

3.1: Hhe xienzide xili gieghasan Yaheiya Yudaya ni hontande khizhedene chonjizhi kieliewo,
3.2: "Ta geizhen giendu, asiman gojia chadashiwo!"
3.3: Eneshi Isaiya xienzhi kieliesan hhe kun wo. "Hontande nie kun waradazho. 'Ezhanni moni zhunbei gie! Hhei moni zhidagha!'"
3.4: Yaheiya loto noghosunghala giesan jienyi musizhi arasunni pixie pixieliezho. Hhe ijiesanshi machazi, shimei wo.
3.5: Yelusalen , Yudaya ni go oron, Yedanhe ni idou oronlade sousan kunla man Yaheiya i hhende echidene
3.6: zuine renjizhi Yedanhe de Yaheiya se xili jienliezho.
3.7: Yaheiya olon Falisai kun, Sadugai kunla xili jienliele iresei chanladene kieliewo, "Du mogheini zhunzhughala, kien tande jianlai ireku Hudai hokukuse anda shidane giezhi kieliewo?
3.8: Ta geizhen giesanne giekughala zhenmin gie.
3.9: Iburaheimu shi bijienyi xienren wo giezhi ta zhughedene bu sumula. Bi tande kielieye, Huda ene tashilani Iburaheimu ni houdei gholugha shidane!
3.10: Ede sugiei mutun genzide teiwo. Gou alima ulie souku mutunlani man chizhidene khande teine.
3.11: Bi tai geizhen gieghane giezhi usughala xili gieghazhoma, mase khuina iresan kun mase nenli fugie wo. Bi hhende maheini qilaseye pei dane. Hhe Shenlin, khanghala tai xili gieghane.
3.12: Hhe khadene baqi bareizhi tughonni boudeii baqiliezhi agidene cankude zhonlone. Arasunlai ulie xinieku khande teine." Ersa Xilini Jienliezho (Mak 1:9-11; Luj 3:21-22)
3.13: Hhe shihoude Ersa Jialili se Yedanhe de irezhi Yaheiya se xili jienliene giezho.
3.14: Yaheiya hhei danlazhi kieliewo, "Bi indan chase xilii jienliese oluzho. Chi matugie mase jienliele irewo?"
3.15: Ersa kieliewo, "Chi dain gie. Matan ingiezhi giedene gounilai man chenjighakui wo." Ingiese Yaheiya dain giewo.
3.16: Ersa xilii jienliedene dei ususe khizhekude asiman menzhali keizhi Hudai Ruhher ghoghochen mutun bouzhezhi goyai jiere luisei chanlawo.
3.17: Pse asiman jierese shenqi irezhi kieliewo, "Eneshi bi oresan kewon wo. Bi hhende xiqi wo."

4.1: Ingiedene Shenlin Ersa i udurusenu hontande echise Ibilisi hhei shiizho.
4.2: Ersa 40 qiende xieni udu orozo bareidene oliesuzho.
4.3: Shiichen iredene Ersa de kieliewo, "Chi Hudai kewon enbese enezighan tashii fenfulazhi ginan gholugha."
4.4: Ersa kieliewo, "Jinwun jiere huaizho, 'Kun amitushi zinie ginande ulie kouine. Hudai amanse khizhesan soyuji kieliende kouine.'"
4.5: Ingie Ibilisi Ersa i uduruzhi zhiguitu chenshi Yelusalen de echi mechii zui undu oronde beigha
4.6: kieliewo, "Chi Hudai kewon enbese jiuli bou. Jinwun jiere, 'Hhe chade oluzhi qienxienladene fenfulazhi khaghalani chii feizhi konnichii tashi jiere ulie mughughane.' giezhi huaizho."
4.7: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "'Ezhan Hudane bu shii.' giezhi jinwun jiereye huaizho."
4.8: Ibilisi pse hhei uduruzhi tebie undu ula jiere khireidene duyani soyuji gojia, pse gojialani henni man uzheghazhi
4.9: kieliewo, "Chi papalazhi mii beiise enelai man chade ogiye."
4.10: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Ibilisi, chi yola! Jinwun jiere huaizho, 'Zinie Ezhan Hudane beiizhi hhei shunji.'"
4.11: Ingie Ibilisi Ersa se likai gie, qienxienla irezhi hhei ushilazho. Ersa Chonjizhi Qiiwo (Mak 1:14-15; Luj 4:14-15)
4.12: Ersa Yaheiya i barei echisei mejiedene Jialili de khareiwo.
4.13: Khuinashi Jialili ni Nasale se likai gie Jiabainun de echi souwo. Eneshi Xibulun , Nafutali dedu Jialilihai ni kouisan oron wo.
4.14: Ingiekushi Ezhan Isaiya xienzhini tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho,
4.15: " Xibulun , Nafutali dedu kunla, haibienzini mo jiere, Yedanhe ni hhemiende niman kunlai Jialili de sousan kunla,
4.16: Hhe khara oronde sousan bexinla fugie gonni chanlawo. Fugusan oronde sousan kunlade gon zhouiwo."
4.17: Hhe shihouse kaishi giezhi Ersa chonjizhi kieliewo, "Ta geizhen giendu. Asiman gojia chadashiwo." Tujilani Uruzho (Mak 1:16-20; Luj 5:1-11)
4.18: Ersa Jialilihai bienzide yokude Beduru giesan Ximun , jiuni Andelie ghuala haide on xiaisei chanlawo. Hhelashi zhaghasun bareisan kun wo.
4.19: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ta iredene mii dagha. Bi tai zhaghasun bareiku mutun kun bareichen gholughane."
4.20: Hhela onni deigo jiedene hhei daghawo.
4.21: Ersa hhense melie yodene pse gaijiu ghualai chanlawo. Hhelashi Xibitai ni kewon Yagebu , Yagebu i jiuni Yaheiya wo. Hhela adarene hhantu chon jiere on huduzho. Ersa hhelai uruse
4.22: hhela deigo chon, adasene likai gie hhei daghawo. Olon Kunlade Gouxioxi Chonjizho (Luj 6:17-19)
4.23: Ersa Jialili ni gochude man yozhi hhelai huitanlade sughazhi Hudai gojiai gouxioxini chonjizhi bexinlai yanyanji gien nouzhi giemeresanlai goudaghazho.
4.24: Ersa i minshen Xiliya de man chonji kuruwo. Kunla yanyanji gientulai uduruzhi irese Ersa goudaghawo. Yanyanji giemerezhi tendun shouisan, sheitan heisan, yanjiofen nousan, tanhon giesanlai man ireghazho.
4.25: Tebieji olon kunla Jialili , Jijiapoli , Yelusalen , Yudaya , Yedanhe ni dunmiense hhei daghawo.

5.1: Ersa olon kunlai chujieghedene ulade khirei souwo. Tujilani melie irese
5.2: hhelade sughazhi kielie qiiwo. Fuqi Winetu Kun (Luj 6:20-23)
5.3: "Zhughede nanxin kunlade fuqi wine, asiman gojiashi hhelanughun wo.
5.4: Nango giechen kunlade fuqi wine, hhelai sidaghazhi kieliene.
5.5: Goyane meilade uzhechen kunlade fuqi wine, hhela ghazhai jienliene.
5.6: Gundanni giene giezhi oliesuzhi undasuchen kunlade fuqi wine, hhelade kurughane.
5.7: Ubali xiichen kunlade fuqi wine, hhelade ubali xiine.
5.8: Zhughe ganjintu kunlade fuqi wine, hhela Hudai chujieghene.
5.9: Heqishighachen kunlade fuqi wine, hhelai Hudai kewosi giezhi urune.
5.10: Gundannide oluzhi heikui shouisan kunlade fuqi wine, asiman gojiashi hhelanughun wo."
5.11: "Mii yenyinghala kunla tai shizheghazhi, heizhi, shiheni doghunnighala ghudan kieliezhi tai sugiese tande fuqi wine.
5.12: Ta hende bayasundu, asiman jiere tande ogiku jianli fugie wo. Tanse melieshiku xienzhilaiye ingiezhi biizhi daozho." Duyani Dansunji Gon (Mak 9:50; Luj 14:34-35)
5.13: "Tashi duyai dansun wo. Dansunde widao widase matugie koudaghane? Yamade inji dadene bendase kunla taine."
5.14: "Tashi duyai gon wo. Ula jiere beighasan chenshini niuigha dane.
5.15: Kun zhulai jienjise ighaghala ulie komorone, zhula teiku teizi jiere jiene. Ingiese nie gie kunlade gieghan wo.
5.16: Ingiezhi ta gonne kunlai melie zhouidene kunla ta goude giesei chanlazhi asiman jieredu adadene kuaikui ogigha." Guijinni Kieliezho
5.17: "Bi irese guijin, xienzhilai shuni widaghane giekui ta bu sumula. Bi guijinni widaghale ese irezho, chengun olughale irezho.
5.18: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, asiman zemin widatula guijin jieredu nie jienjien nie bihuada ulie widazhi man chengun olune.
5.19: Ingiese kienliuzhe enezighan minlin jieredu zui ganii ulie zunjizhi kunlade ulie zunjise olune giezhi sughase asiman gojiade zui gani giezhi urune. Kienliuzhe minlinyi zunjizhi kunlade sughase asiman gojiade fugieni giezhi urune.
5.20: Bi tande kielieye, tai gouni jinwun hanjia, Falisai kunlase ulie daose jiedui asiman gojiade oro dane." Ho Kuruku
5.21: "'Kun bu ala! Kun alase panjine.' giezhi eqighanku kunlade kieliesei ta chenliezhi daozhoma,
5.22: bi tande kielieye, gaijiudene hokuse panjine. Gaijiune, 'Guazi' giese zui fugie fayende lai echine. 'Yanhunzi' giezhi sugiese dozoheini khande orone.
5.23: Ingiese chi sidagha gieku teizi jiere mure ogikude gaijiuchii chade hokusei sumula irese
5.24: mureni sidagha gieku teizi konde jiesenu gaijiughalane xien goudadene mure ogile ire.
5.25: Chi duitoughalane zhale echikude mo jiere ghujighan hheghala gouda. Pse duitou chii panjiku noyende jiuise panjiku noyen chii gunnande jiuizhi bafanzide khane.
5.26: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, chi 1 fen baerniliuzhe honjizhi ulie qindaghase bafanzise khizhe dane." Piofen Gieku
5.27: "'Piofen bu gie.' giesan kielienyi ta chenliezhi daozhoma,
5.28: bi tande kielieye, biereini uzhezhi hu sumulase ijin zhughedeni piofen giewo.
5.29: Chii borun nudun chii zui fanjighase waidene benda. Chii beyese iyanzi widazhi beyechii man dozode orokuse gou wo!
5.30: Chii borun kha chii zui fanjighase chizhidene benda. Chii beyese iyanzi widazhi beyechii man dozode orokuse gou wo!" Lihun Gieku (Mat 19:9; Mak 10:11-12; Luj 16:18)
5.31: "Pse, 'Biereine ulie kerese hhende lihun qiuzi ogikuni wo.' giezhi kieliezhoma,
5.32: bi tande kielieye, biereini lon kijieku yenyinse chugo lihun giese biereini piofen gieghazho. Pse lihun giesan biereini agisan kunye piofen giezho." Fayen Gieku
5.33: "Pse, 'Fayen giesanne bu fura. Ezhande fayen giesanne zunji.' giezhi eqighanku kunlade kieliesei ta chenliezhi daozhoma,
5.34: bi tande kielieye, yama fayen bu gie. Asimanyi zhiizhi fayen bu gie. Hheshi Hudai baozo wo.
5.35: Zeminyi zhiizhi fayen bu gie. Hheshi Ezhan kon teiku bandou wo. Yelusalen yi zhiizhi fayen bu gie. Hheshi fugie honshanni chenshi wo.
5.36: Qiorunne zhiizhi fayen bu gie. Chi qiorun jieredu nie ganzi usunne chighashigha dazhi kharalagha dane.
5.37: Tai kielien enbeneshi enbene gie, pushoshi pusho gie. Enense olon kieliese Ibilisinughun wo." Bouchou Gieku (Luj 6:29-30)
5.38: "'Nudunde nudun honji, shidunde shidun honji.' giesan kielienyi ta chenliezhi daozhoma,
5.39: bi tande kielieye, doghun kunlare zodui bu gie. Kunla borun khizhaichii eghise soghei khizhaneye eghigha.
5.40: Kunla chii zhazhi chii lizii jienni kerene giese mienzine jienniye ogi.
5.41: Kunla chii biizhi 1 li mo yoghase hhere hhantu 2 li mo yo.
5.42: Chii xiahua giezhi kerese ogi. Chase dunxi ghuise uwo giezhi bu kielie." Duitoudene Ore (Luj 6:27-28, 32-36)
5.43: "'Ta giebeidene ore, duitoune henji.' giesan kielienyi chenliezhi daozhoma,
5.44: bi tande kielieye, duitoudene ore, tai heisanlade oluzhi onxian gie.
5.45: Ingiezhi giese ta asimanni Adadene kewosi danlane. Hhe naranne doghun kun, gou kunni jiere man zhouighazho. Ghurani gou kun, gou witu kunde man bouzheghazho.
5.46: Ta zinie tande oresan kunlade orese tande yan jianli ogine? Lien shui shanjisan kunlaye ingiezhi giene.
5.47: Ta zinie gaijiudene zhaohu daise kunlase giedun gou wo? Lien niman kunlaye ingiezhi giene.
5.48: Ingiese asiman jieredu Adatai onqien biku mutun taye onqienshi."

6.1: "Ta gouni giekude xioxin giezhi kunlai melie uzheghane giezhi bu gie. Qingiezhi giese asiman jieredu tai Adase yama jianli jienlie dane.
6.2: Chi nanxin kunlade ogikude jiazhon giesan kunla mutun bu gie. Hhela goyane kuaighane giezhi huitan, geidoude fugiede tunguliene. Bi tande shuhua kielieye, hhelade jianli ijin ogiwo.
6.3: Chi nanxin kunlade ogikude borun kha giesei soghei khade bu mejiegha.
6.4: Chi ogisanne kunlade bu mejiegha. Beichazide uzhesan Adachii tande jianli ogine." Onxian Gieku
6.5: "Ta onxian giekude jiazhon giesan kunla mutun bu gie. Hhela kunlade uzheghane giezhi huitan, shizilukoude beidene onxian giekude xiqi wo. Bi tande shuhua kielieye, hhelade jianli ijin ogiwo.
6.6: Ta onxian giekude giedera orodene wijienyi khadene beichazide bisan Adasene onxian gie. Beichazide uzhesan Adachii jianli ogine.
6.7: Ta onxian giekude niman kunla mutun touchan erchanji yama isi witu kielienyi bu kielie. Hhela sumulase ologhan kieliese chenliemu giezho.
6.8: Ta hhela mutun bu gie. Ta xiahua gieku melie ta yan keresei Adatai mejiene." Ezhan Sughasan Onxian (Luj 11:2-4)
6.9: "Ingiese ta ingiezhi onxian gie, 'Asiman jieredu mai Ada, chi nierene zhiguishigha.
6.10: Chii gojiai iregha. Chi isine asiman jiere mutun zemin jiere chenjigha.
6.12: Bijiende codasan kunlai bijien rouliesan mutun bijien codasei roulie.
6.13: Bijienyi shiikude bu echighazhi Ibilisii khase khizhegha. Gojia, qienli, famashi chanqi chinughun wo. Amine!'
6.14: Kunla codasei ta rouliese asiman jieredu Adataiye tai rouliene.
6.15: Kunla codasei ta ulie rouliese asiman jieredu Adataiye tai ulie rouliene." Orozo Bareiku
6.16: "Ta orozo bareikude jiazhon giesan kunla mutun uxinne bu bougha. Hhela orozo bareisei kunlade mejieghane giezhi guyide ghuniraku yanzi khizheghane. Bi tande shuhua kielieye, hhelade jianli ijin ogiwo.
6.17: Chi orozo bareikude qiorunne sanlazhi nune waghadene
6.18: orozo bareisei kunlade bu chujiegheghazhi beichazide bisan Adadene uzhegha. Ingiese beichazide uzhesan Adachii chade jianli ogine." Boubeini Asiman Jiere Sunji (Luj 12:33-34)
6.19: "Goyadene oluzhi boubeini zemin jiere bu sunji. Zemin jiere ghughei ghazhazhi xiuqirane. Ghughei nudurun waizhi ghulane.
6.20: Boubeini asiman jiere sunji. Asiman jiere ghughei ghazha dane, ulie xiuqirane. Ghughei nudurun waizhi ghula dane.
6.21: Chii boubei khalashi zhughechiiye khala wo." Beyeni Zhula (Luj 11:34-36)
6.22: "Nudunchiishi beyeni zhula wo. Nudunchii goushi beyechii man gieghan wo.
6.23: Nudunchii gou wise beyechii man khara wo. Chii sudorodu gon kharashi hhe kharani zhengiejia fugie wo.
6.24: Kienliuzhe ghua ezhanni shunji dane. Ene niede henjise hhe niede orene. Ene niede gundushi hhe niede gongien wo. Ta Huda baer ghualai hhantu shunji dane." Munan Bu Gie (Luj 12:22-31)
6.25: "Ingiese bi tande kielieye, ta amindene oluzhi yan ijiene, ochine giezhi munan bu gie. Beyedene oluzhi yan musine giezhi munan bu gie. Amin ijiekuse zhunyo uwonu? Beye musikuse zhunyo uwonu?
6.26: Ta asiman jieredu bunzhulai nie sumula, hhela ulie tareine, ulie ghurane, cankude ulie sunjine, tai asiman jieredu ada hhelai qiezhene. Ta bunzhulase zhunyo uwonu?
6.27: Tani dunda kien zhughe chilakughala aminne niecha fududagha shidane?
6.28: Musikude yangiezhi munan giezho? Ta banche jieredu baihe chizhe matugie osisei nie sumula, hhela ulie khishilane, bosiye ulie giene.
6.29: Bi tande kielieye, Sulumane honshan zui henni xienzide musisanla ene nie chizhede ulie kurune.
6.30: Ta goude xianxin ulie giechen kunla, banche jieredu osun enedu wine, maghashijie luzide teiliuzhe Huda dou ingiezhi dabalaghazho. Tai qingie ulie gienu?
6.31: Ingiese, 'Ta yan ijiene? Yan ochine? Yan musine?' giezhi zhughe bu chila.
6.32: Enelashi man niman kunla xiahua giekuni wo. Asiman jieredu Adatai tande enezighan chaisanlai man mejiene.
6.33: Ta xien Hudai gojia, hhei gundanni xiahua gie, ingiese enelai man tande ogine.
6.34: Ingiese ta maghashijiekude munan bu gie. Maghashijiekude maghashijie munan giekui wine. Niuduku chijiani niudushi kuruzho."

7.1: "Ta kunlai bu kielie, pse taiye kieliene.
7.2: Ta kunlai matui kieliese taiye qingiezhi kieliene. Ta yanghala nanjizhi ogise tandeye yanghala nanjizhi ogine.
7.3: Chi yangiezhi gaijiune nudundedu osun zhazhai chanlane, goya nudundedu lianni chanla dane?
7.4: Chii nudunde lian bidene matui gaijiudene, 'Bi chini nudundedu osun zhazhai agiye.' giezhi kieliene?
7.5: Chi ene jiazhon giesan kun, xien goya nudundedu lianni agidene uzhezhi qinchu olusenu gaijiune nudundedu osun zhazhai agi."
7.6: "Zhiguitu dunxini nogheide bu ogi. Ochira daozhese tai zhoune. Manouni khigheini melie bu tei. Khigheila manouni taine." Xiahua Giese Tande Ogine (Luj 11:9-13)
7.7: "Ta xiahua gie, tande ogine. Erei, ereizhi olune. Wijienni eghi, tande niene.
7.8: Xiahua giechen kunlade ogine. Ereichen kunla ereizhi olune. Wijienni eghichen kunlade niene.
7.9: Tai dunda yan kunyi kewon ginan kerese tashi ogine?
7.11: Ta gou wiliuzhe kesiladene gouni ogikuni mejiene, asiman jieredu Adatai xiahua giechen kunlade gou dunxini genjia ulie oginu?
7.12: Ingiese ta kunlai goyadene matugie gieghaku duranshi taye kunlade qingiezhi gie. Eneshi guijin, xienzhilai shu wo." Witan Wijiense Oro (Luj 13:24)
7.13: "Ta witan wijiense oro. Fugughakude uduruku wijien fugie wo. Mo aghui wo. Orochen kun olon wo.
7.14: Aminde uduruku wijien witan wo. Mo yozhi chijia wo. Ereizhi oluchen kun choghon wo." Alimaghala Mutunni Mejiene (Luj 6:43-44)
7.15: "Ta jia xienzhilai fangula. Hhela ghoni arasunyi zhozhi tai enende irene, sudoroni wizha zhanghei wo.
7.16: Hhelai alimaghala hhelai tanine. Eghesun jierese putou zhei shidanu? Osun jierese uhuago zhei shidanu?
7.17: Jien gou mutun jiere gou alima soune. Langan mutun jiere langan alima soune.
7.18: Gou mutun jiere langan alima sou dane. Langan mutun jiere gou alima sou dane.
7.19: Jien gou alima ulie souku mutunlai chizhidene khande teine.
7.21: "Mii, 'Ezhan, Ezhan!' giezhi waradachen kunla man asiman gojiade orokui pusho. Zinie asimandedu Adaimi kielien mutun giechen kunla orone.
7.22: Hhe zuihouku udude olon kunla made kieliene, 'Ezhan, Ezhan, bijien chini niereghala chonjiwola? Chini niereghala sheitanlai touwola? Chini niereghala olon nenlitu shiqin giewola?'
7.23: Hhe shihoude bi mindaminji hhelade kieliene, 'Bi tai tani dane. Ta enezighan uhun kunla, mase likai gie!'" Tashi, Shazi Jiere Beighasan Gie (Luj 6:47-49)
7.24: "Ingiese mii enezighan kielienyi chenliedene giesan kunshi jienzha kun wo. Hoxian gieni fugie tashi jiere giesanghala niekielien wo.
7.25: Ghura bou, fugie usu chunji, kei hende feiliezhi eghiliuzhe gieni ulie enbereine. Gieni jigunni fugie tashi jiere giezho.
7.26: Mii enezighan kielienyi chenliedene ulie giesan kunshi men kun wo. Hoxian gieni shazi jiere giesanghala niekielien wo.
7.27: Ghura bou, fugie usu chunji, kei hende feiliezhi eghise gie enbereine. Da enbereisan fugie wo."
7.28: Ersa enezighan kielienyi jianji baraghase olon kunla hhe sughasande ghanirazho.
7.29: Ersa hhelade sughadan hhelai jinwun hanjialai buxian wo, nie qienlitu kunni xianli.

8.1: Ersa ula jierese bouzhi irese tebieji olon kunla hhei daghawo.
8.2: Ingiekude nie pifugientu Ersa i melie ire papaladene kieliewo, "Ezhan, chi duran bise mini ganjinragha shidane."
8.3: Ersa khane zhighazhi hhei maqizhi kieliewo, "Bi duran wine. Chi ganjinra!" Ingiese hhei pifugienni deigo ganjinrawo.
8.4: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Chi kiemade bu kieliedene echizhi beyene buwade uzhegha. Musa i shu jiere fenfulasan mutun Hudade mure ogizhi kunlade ganzhen bei." Baifuzhanni Hojini Goudaghazho (Luj 7:1-10)
8.5: Ersa Jiabainun de orose nie baifuzhan melieni irezhi Ersa i xiahua giezhi kieliewo,
8.6: "Ezhan, hojimi tanhon giesenu giede kijiedene tendun shouizho."
8.7: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Bi hhei goudaghale yoye."
8.8: Baifuzhan kieliewo, "Ezhan, chi mii giede irese bi pei dane. Chii nie aman kielienshi hojimi goudane.
8.9: Biye kunlai kha doura wo, buduila mii kha doura wo. Bi buduiladene, 'Echi!' giese echine, 'Ire!' giese irene, 'Enei gie!' giese hhe giene."
8.10: Ersa chenliedene ghanirazhi daghasan kunlade kieliewo, "Bi tande shuhua kielieye, bi intu xianxin giekui Isilie de uzhezhi uye daozho.
8.11: Bi tande kielieye, dunmien ximiense olon niman kunla irezhi asiman gojiade Iburaheimu , Isaghei , Yagebu re hhantu xi soune.
8.12: Kharei Isilie kunlai tousenu ghadanedu kharanide echighase hhela hhende shidunne zhouzhi wilane."
8.13: Ingie Ersa baifuzhande kieliewo, "Chi kharei. Chi xianxin giesan mutun gholu gie." Hhe shihoude hojini goudawo. Olon Kunlani Goudaghazho (Mak 1:29-34; Luj 4:38-41)
8.14: Ersa Beduru i giede echise Beduru i ghadunmekieni fashao giedene kijiesei chanlawo.
8.15: Ersa hhei khani nie maqise fashao giesan daodene hhe bosizhe Ersa i ushilawo.
8.16: Khara oluse kunla sheitan heisan olon kunlai Ersa i shida uduru irewo. Ersa nie aman kielienghala sheitanlai tou khighawo. Pse gien wineku kunlai man goudaghawo.
8.17: Ingiekushi Ezhan Isaiya xienzhii tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho, "Hhe matanyi bixinni deilawo. Matanyi gienlai danjiwo." Ersani Daghaku (Luj 9:57-62)
8.18: Ersa olon kunla hhei wiqisei chujieghedene, "Hai duimiende daoye!" giezhi fenfulawo.
8.19: Nie jinwun hanjia melie ire hhende kieliewo, "Loushi, chi khala echise bi chii daghane."
8.20: Ersa kieliewo, "Funieghede dun wine, asiman jieredu bunzhude ho wine, Kunnikewonde nie zhentou teiku oronda uwo."
8.21: Pse nie tuji iredene Ersa de kieliewo, "Ezhan, bi xien adane bulale echiye."
8.22: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Fugusan kun fugusan kunlane bulale echi gie. Chi mii dagha." Keini Beighazho (Mak 4:35-41; Luj 8:22-25)
8.23: Ersa chon jiere khireise tujilani hhei daghazho.
8.24: Menzhali hai jiere fugie kei bosiwo. Lan chabudu chonni unaghane. Ersa da hhunturazho.
8.25: Tujilani echizhi Ersa i uru xiereigha kieliewo, "Ezhan, bijienyi jiui! Bijienyi amin widane giezho!"
8.26: Ersa kieliewo, "Ta ene Hudai gou xianxin ulie giechen kunla, yangiezhi ayizho?" Ingie bosizhedene kei, haini nie sugiese nanranghane gholuwo.
8.27: Kunla ghaniradene kieliewo, "Eneshi yan kun wo? Kei, haiye kielienyini chenliene." Ghua Sheitan Heisan Kunni Goudaghazho (Mak 5:1-20; Luj 8:26-39)
8.28: Ersa hai duimiende daosenu Jiadala kunyi oronde irewo. Ghua sheitan heisan kun mezase khizhedene hhei shida texien wizhashi kiemada hhe mose yo dazho.
8.29: Hhela deigo warada qiiwo, "Hudai kewon, chi bijienyi jiohoro bu gie. Shihou da uye kuruzho, chi enende irezhi bijienyi zayalanu?"
8.30: Hhelase gouji gholode idaban khighei ijiezhi souzho.
8.31: Sheitanla Ersa i xiahua giezhi chi bijienyi tou khighane giese bijienyi khighei jiere echigha giewo.
8.32: Ingie Ersa echi giese sheitanla khizhedene khigheilai jiere khiwo. Menzhali khigheila egheide chunji bou, haide yenji alawo.
8.33: Khighei adulasan kunla holudene chenshide echi sheitan heisan ene kunlai shiqinyi kunlade man kieliewo.
8.34: Ingiese nie chenshini kunla man Ersa i ochirale khizhewo. Hhei uzhedene, "Enense likai gie." giezhi xiahua giewo.

9.1: Ersa chon jiere khirei hai hhemiende daozhi goya chenshidene irewo.
9.2: Ingiekude kunla nie tanhon giesan gientui ruzide qienlie Ersa i shida irewo. Ersa hhelai xianxin giekui uzhedene tanhon giesan gientude kieliewo, "Gaijiu, zhughene tei, chii zuini mienliewo."
9.3: Ingiekude giedun jinwun hanjiala zhughedene kieliezho, "Ene kun kufurei fanjizho!"
9.4: Ersa hhela yan sumulasei mejiedene kieliewo, "Ta zhughedene yale doghunni sumulane?
9.5: 'Chii zuini mienliewo.' giese sunfan onu, 'Bosizhe yo.' giese sunfan wo?
9.6: Kunnikewon duyade zuini mienlieku qienli bikui tande mejieghane giezho." Ingiedene tanhon giesan gientude kieliewo, "Bosidene ruzine agi, giedene echi!"
9.8: Kunla chanladene man ayizho. Imutu fugie qienlini kunlade ogiwo giezhi Hudai kuaizho. Mataini Uruzho (Mak 2:13-17; Luj 5:27-32)
9.9: Ersa hhense melie yose Matai giesan nie kun shui shanjisan oronde sousei chanlawo. Hhende kieliewo, "Chi mii dagha." Ingie hhe bosizhedene Ersa i daghawo.
9.10: Ersa giedera ijiekude olon shui shanjisan kun, zuirenla Ersa , Ersa i tujilare man hhantu soudene ijienduzho.
9.11: Falisai kunla chanladene Ersa i tujilade kieliezho, "Tai loushi yale shui shanjisan kun, zuirenlare hhantu ijiene?"
9.12: Ersa sonosudene kieliewo, "Gien witu kunla deifu ulie kerene, gientula deifu kerene.
9.13: Ta echidene, 'Bi ubali xiikude xiqi wo, murede xiqi uwo.' giesan jinwun jieredu ene kielienyi isii suru. Bi gou kunlai ereile ese irezho. Zuirenlai ereile irezho." Orozoni Shiqin (Mak 2:18-22; Luj 5:33-39)
9.14: Ingiekude Yaheiya ni tujila Ersa i ochirale ire kieliewo, "Bijien, pse Falisai kunla chan orozo bareizho, chii tujila yale orozo ulie bareine?"
9.15: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ghurunde iresan zhochenla shini khughon bikude matugie nango giene? Shini khughonni kunla lai echiku udu kuzhene. Hhe shihoude hhela orozo bareine.
9.16: Shini popui khuichen jien jiere huduchen kun uwo. Qingiese hudusan oron jienni qida olughane, tanturasan pse fugiedane.
9.17: Shini jiuni khuichen tulunde zhonlochen kun uwo. Qingie zhonlose tulun ghaluzhi jiu usuru khizhese tulunye qida olune. Shini jiuni shini tulunde zhonlose ghuala gou wo." Noyenni Oqinji Chusun Usurusan Biereini Goudaghazho (Mak 5:21-43; Luj 8:40-56)
9.18: Ersa hhelade zhen ene kielienyi kieliekude nie huitan gonjisan kun ire papalazhi kieliewo, "Mii oqin jian duya ijiewo. Chi yodene hhei jiere khane teizhi onxian giema, hhe aminne olune."
9.19: Ersa bosizhedene tujilarene hhantu hhei daghazhi echiwo.
9.20: Zhen qingiekude nie chusun usuruzhi 12 nien olusan bierei Ersa i khuina iredene jien ghizhaseni nie maqiwo.
9.21: Hhe " Ersa i jienni nie maqise gienni goudane." giezhi zhughedene sumulazho.
9.22: Ersa ochira daozhe hhei uzhezhi kieliewo, "Funi, zhughene tei! Chii xianxin gieku chii jiuiwo." Hhe shihoude bierei goudawo.
9.23: Ersa gonjisan kunni giede kuruse kunla fugusan kunde xiu feiliezhi lon chouisei chanlawo.
9.24: Ingie kieliewo, "Daodu. Oqin ese duya ijiezho, hhunturazho." Ingiese hhela Ersa i uzhezhi xiniezho.
9.25: Kunlai khighadene Ersa oro echi oqinni khase nie laise oqin bosizhewo.
9.26: Ene xioxi hhe oronde man chonji kuruwo. Ghua Sughoi Goudaghazho
9.27: Ersa hhense melie yose ghua sugho hhei daghadene waradazho, " Dawude ni houdei, bijiende ubali nie xii!"
9.28: Ersa giedera orose sughola hhei melie irewo. Ersa kieliewo, "Bi ene shiqinyi gie shidakui ta xianxin gienu?" Hhela kieliewo, "Ezhan, bijien xianxin giene!"
9.29: Ersa hhelai nudunyi moizhi kieliewo, "Ta xianxin giesan mutun gholu gie."
9.30: Ingiese hhelai nudun goudawo. Ersa hhelade hende fenfulazhi, "Ta ene shiqinyi kunlade bu mejiegha." giewo.
9.31: Ingieliuzhe hhela khizhi echidene Ersa i xioxii hhe oronde man chonji kurughawo. Yabani Goudaghazho
9.32: Hhela khizhi echikude kunla nie sheitan heisan yabai Ersa i shida uduru irewo.
9.33: Sheitanni touzhi khighase yaba kielien kielie qiiwo. Kunla man ghanirazhi kieliewo, " Isilie de intu shiqin uzhezhi ese daowo!"
9.34: Falisai kunla kieliezho, "Hhe sheitanni touzii kouizhi sheitan touzho." Olon Kunlade Ubali Xiizho
9.35: Ersa go chenshi, aghinlai yo baraghazhi hhelai huitanlade kunlade sughazhi asiman gojiani gouxioxini chonjizho. Yanyanji gien nouzhi giemeresanlai goudaghazho.
9.36: Olon kunlai chanladene ubali xiizho. Hhela kunnan wo, banman giechen uwo. Ghonide asuchi uwokughala niekielien wo.
9.37: Ingie tujiladene kieliewo, "Zhonjia olon wo, wiliechi choghon wo.
9.38: Ta zhonjiani ezhanyi xiahua giezhi wiliechilai peidene zhonjiane ghuragha gie."

10.1: Ersa 12 gie tujine uruzhi iresenu hhelade zannan ruhher touzhi yanyanji gien nouzhi giemeresanlai goudaghaku qienli ogiwo.
10.2: 12 gie shituni tou 1 gieni niereshi, Beduru giezhi urusan Ximun , hhei jiu Andelie , Xibitai ni kewon Yagebu , Yagebu ni gaijiu Yaheiya ,
10.3: Feili , Badolomai , Doma , shui shanjisan Matai , Yalefei ni kewon Yagebu , Datai ,
10.4: Rexinpaini Ximun , pse Ersa i ghudandusan Jialie kun Yuda wo. 12 Gie Shituni Peizhi Echighazho (Mak 6:7-13; Luj 9:1-6)
10.5: Ersa ene 12 gie kunni peizhi echighakude fenfulazhi kieliewo, "Ta niman kunlai oronde bu echi. Samaliya kunlai chenshide bu oro.
10.6: Zinie Isilie kunla dunda echi. Hhela miisan ghoni niekielien wo.
10.7: Xien yo xien chonjizhi kielie, 'Asiman gojia chadashiwo!'
10.8: Giemeresan kunlai goudaghazhi fugusan kunlai aminne olugha. Pifugientulai ganjinraghazhi sheitanlani tou khigha. Ta belien jienliewoma, belien ogi.
10.9: Kakadene antan, miengu, baer bu barei.
10.10: Mo yose kuabao, ghua jien, mahei, zhugun bu barei. Wilie giechen kunla ijiuni indan jienliekuni wo.
10.11: Ta alinie chenshi, aghinde echise gou kun khala bikui daqinladene likai gietula hhei giede sou.
10.13: Hhe giei kunla tai pei shidase ta onxian giesan pinnan hhelai jiere wo. Pei dase ta onxian giesan pinnan yen tai jiere irene.
10.14: Kien tai ulie jienliezhi kielienyi ulie chenliese hhei gie, hhe chenshise likai giekude kon jieredu turane kui bougha.
10.15: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, panjiku udude hhe chenshi shouiku zeinan Sodoma , Emola oronse da fugie wo!" Kunla Tujilani Heine (Mak 13:9-13; Luj 21:12-19)
10.16: "Uzhe, bi tai peizhi echighase ghonilai zhanghei dunda echighasan niekielien wo. Ingiese ta moghei mutun jienzharazhi ghoghochen mutun ganjinra.
10.17: Ta kunlai xioxin gie. Kunla tai zui fugie fayende jiuine. Hhelai huitanlade mabienzighala eghine.
10.18: Mii yenyinghala tai shenzhan, honshanlai melie lai echine. Ta hhelai melie, niman kunlai melie made ganzhen beine.
10.19: Kunla tai jiuikude ta matui, yan kieliekui munan bu gie. Hhe shihoude yan kieliekui tande mejieghane.
10.20: Kieliesanshi ta pusho, Adaitai Ruhher tai sudoro kieliezho.
10.21: Gaijiu gaijiune, ada kewosine ghudanduzhi fugughakude jiuine. Kesila ada, anane zodui giezhi fugughakude kune.
10.22: Mii yenyinghala soyuji kunla tai henjine. Ingieliuzhe rennai giezhi zuihou kusanlai jiuine.
10.23: Kunla tai ene chenshide heise da nie chenshide holu. Bi tande shuhua kielieye, Isilie ni chenshilai ta yozhi baraghatula Kunnikewon irene."
10.24: "Xieshen loushise fugie uwo, hoji ezhanse fugie uwo.
10.25: Xieshen loushighala niekielien, hoji ezhanghala niekielien gholuse kuruwo. Kunla gieni zhanguijini, 'Sheitanni touzi.' giezhi sugiese gieni kunlai genjia ulie sugienu?" Bu Ayi (Luj 12:2-7)
10.26: "Ingiese ta hhelase bu ayi. Khaghasanlai ulie khizheghakui uwo. Niuighasanlai ulie mejieghakui uwo.
10.27: Bi tande beichazide kieliesei ta mindamin kielie. Ta chighindene chenliesei gie jierese fugiede kielie.
10.28: Beyeni alane, ruhherni ala dachen hhelase bu ayi. Zinie beye, ruhher ghualai widaghadene dozoheide echigha shidachen hhense ayi.
10.29: Ghua bunzhui 1 mao baer huinela? Ingieliuzhe asimanni adatai dain ulie giese nieda andazhi bouzhe dane.
10.30: Tai kieliese tai qiorun jieredu usunniliuzhe toulazhi agizho.
10.31: Ingiese ta bu ayi, ta olon bunzhulase zhunyo wo." Kunlani Melie Mexihani Renji (Luj 12:8-9)
10.32: "Kien kunlai melie mini renjise biye asiman jieredu adane melie hhei renjine.
10.33: Kien kunlai melie mini ulie renjise biye asiman jieredu adane melie hhei ulie renjine." Tuji Danlaku Daijia (Luj 12:51-53; 14:26-27)
10.34: "Bi irekushi zemin jiere pinnan deilazhi iresei ta bu sumula. Bi irekushi pinnan deilazhi ese iredene khudogho deilazhi irezho.
10.35: Bi irekushi, 'Kun adarene, oqin anarene, konbierei ghadunmekierene zodui gieghale irezho.
10.37: Ada anadene mase olon orese mii pei dane. Kesiladene mase olon orese mii pei dane.
10.38: Kien shizijiane beiliezhi mii ulie daghase mii pei dane.
10.39: Aminne ulie widaghane giese aminne widaghane. Made oluzhi aminne widaghase aminne ulie widaghane." Jianli Ogiku (Mak 9:41)
10.40: "Kun tai jienliese mii jienliezho. Mii jienliese mii peizhi ireghasan hhei jienliezho.
10.41: Kien xienzhini xienzhi danlaghazhi jienliese xienzhini jianlini linlane. Kien gou kunni gou kun danlaghazhi jienliese gou kunni jianlini linlane.
10.42: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, kien mii tujila dundadu zui ganide mii tuji danlaghazhi nie beizi usu ogiliuzhe hhende jianli kenjin ogine."

11.1: Ersa 12 gie tujidene fenfulazhi baludene hhense likai gie hhelai go chenshilade echizhi kunlade sughazhi chonjizho. Yaheiya Tujilane Ersai Uzheghale Echizho (Luj 7:18-35)
11.2: Yaheiya bafanzise Mexiha giesan shiqinyi sonosudene tujilane peizhi echighawo.
11.3: Hhela Ersa de asawo, "Hhe irene giesanshi chi onu, bijien pse niei saghei?"
11.4: Ersa kieliewo, "Ta echidene sonosusanyi, chanlasanyi Yaheiya de kielie.
11.5: Sugho chanlasanyi, dogholon yosanyi, pifugientui goudaghasanyi, dulei sonosusanyi, fugusan kun aminne olusanyi, pse nanxin kunlade gouxioxi chonjikui kielie.
11.6: Mii inxin ulie giechen kunde fuqi wine."
11.7: Yaheiya i tujila yoladene Ersa kunlade Yaheiya i kieliezho, "Ta hontande yan kunyi uzhele echiwo? Kei feiliezhi gojiolusan ghulusun mutun zholien kunyi uzhele echiwu? Pusho!
11.8: Ta yan kunyi uzhele echiwo? Seighan jien musisan kunyi uzhele echiwu? Seighan jien musisan kunla hongunde wo!
11.9: Ta jiujin yan kunyi uzhele echiwo? Xienzhii uzhele echiwu? Enbene! Bi tande kielieye, hheshi xienzhise da fugieni wo.
11.10: Jinwun jiere, 'Uzhe, bi qinsi kunne chii melie peizhi chii moni zhunbei gieghane.' giezhi huaisanshi ene kun wo.
11.11: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, biereila olusan kun dunda xili gieghasan Yaheiya se fugieni nieda uwoma, asiman gojiade zui meila kun hhense fugie wo.
11.12: Yaheiya ni hhe xienzise eli kutula asiman gojiani hende eghizho, lihaitu kun hhei qianlazho.
11.13: Soyuji xienzhishu, guijinshu jiere melie kieliesanlashi man Yaheiya se jieshu oluwo.
11.14: Kieliesanlai ta xianxin giene giese Yaheiya shi irene giesan Iliya enbene.
11.16: "Bi ene idai kunlai yanghala bilane? Hoxian geidoude souzhi nadusan kesilai xianli. Hhela nieniedene waradazhi kieliene,
11.17: 'Bijien tande bierei agiku xiu feiliese ta ulie jiuline. Kun fuguwo giezhi wilase ta ulie wilane.'
11.18: Yaheiya iredene ulie ijiezhi ulie ochise kunla hhei jiere sheitan wine giezhi kieliene.
11.19: Kunnikewon iredene ijiezhi ochise kunla ene kun jin ijiezhi ochikure wo. Shui shanjisan kun, zuirenlani zhanlien wo giezhi kieliene. Ingieliuzhe aghelishi giekughala olusan bikuni zhenmin giene." Geizhen Ese Giesan Kunlade Jingao Giezho (Luj 10:13-15)
11.20: Hhe xienzide Ersa nenlitu shiqin olon giese chenshii kunla geizhen ese giese hhelade jingao giezhi kieliewo,
11.21: " Gelaxin , Bosaida , tande gou widawo! Tai dunda giesan nenlitu shiqinni Tuilo , Xidun de giewoshi hhela eqighanse madei zhodene jierene funiesun teizhi geizhen giewo.
11.22: Bi tande kielieye, panjiku udude ta shouiku zeinan Tuilo , Xidun se da fugie wo!
11.23: Jiabainun , chii undudaghazhi asiman jiere khireighanu? Chii dozoheide anda boughane. Chii hhende giesan nenlitu shiqinni Sodoma de giezhoshi hhe chenshi eli kutula wine.
11.24: Bi tande kielieye, panjiku udude ta shouiku zeinan Sodoma se da fugie wo!" Mini Shida Iredene Hhamura (Luj 10:21-22)
11.25: Hhe xienzide Ersa kieliewo, "Asiman zeminni Ezhan, Ada, chii mafan gieghawo. Chi ene shiqinlani agheli, erlintu kunlade niuighazhi ga kewosi mutun kunlade mejieghawo.
11.26: Ada, enbene, eneshi chi duranghalane giesanwo.
11.27: Yanniliuzhe Adami made ogiwo. Adase chugo kiema kewonni mejie dane. Kewon, pse kewon yenyi mejieghasan kunse chugo kiema Adai mejie dane.
11.28: Jien khishulazhi gunduni beiliesan kunla man mii shida ire. Bi tai hhamuraghaye.
11.29: Ta mii jiabanyi jierene zhozhi mase suru. Mii zhughede renyi, meilade uzhekui wine. Tai zhughe hhamura shidane.
11.30: Mii jiaban sunfan wo. Mii danzi gongien wo."

12.1: Hhe xienzide Ersa hhamuraku udude boudei ghazhaghun yozhi daozho. Tujilani oliesuse boudei qiorunni sidazhi ijiezho.
12.2: Falisai kunla chanladene Ersa de kieliewo, "Uzhe, chii tujila hhamuraku udude ulie giekui giezho!"
12.3: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, " Dawude , hhantuku kunlarene oliesukude giesan shiqinyi ta onshizhi ese daowu?
12.4: Hhe mechide orodene Hudade ogiku ginanyi ijiewo. Ene ginanyi hhe, pse hhantuku kunlai ijiezhi ulie olune. Zinie buwa ijiese olune.
12.5: Pse buwala hhamuraku udude mechide hhamuraku udui guijinni fanjiliuzhe zui ulie sanakui ta guijinshu jiere onshizhi ese daowu?
12.6: Bi tande kielieye, enende nie kun mechise da fugie wo.
12.7: 'Bi ubali xiikude xiqi wo. Murede xiqi uwo.' giesan ene kielienyi isii ta mejiese zui witude zui ulie soughane.
12.8: Kunnikewonshi hhamuraku uduni Ezhan wo." Khani Goudaghazho (Mak 3:1-6; Luj 6:6-11)
12.9: Ersa hhe oronse likai gie huitande orowo.
12.10: Hhende nie khani ghosan kun wine. Kunla Ersa i zhane giezhi, "Hhamuraku udude goudaghase olunulie?" giezhi asawo.
12.11: Ersa kieliewo, "Tai dunda kien hhamuraku udude ghoni nokiende anda bouse laizhi ulie khizhenu?
12.12: Kun ghonise giedughon zhigui wo. Ingiese hhamuraku udude gouni giese oluzho."
12.13: Ingie, "Hhe kunde khane khizhegha." giezhi kieliewo. Hhe khane khizheghase khani goudazhi da nie khaghalai niekielien gholuwo.
12.14: Falisai kunla khizhi echidene "Ersa i matugie widaghane?" giezhi shanlian giewo. Huda Sunghusan Hoji
12.15: Ersa mejiedene hhense likai giewo. Tebieji olon kunla hhei daghazho. Hhe gientulai man goudaghadene
12.16: hhelade, "Hheshi kien bikui bu kielie!" giezhi minlin xiaiwo.
12.17: Ingiekushi Ezhan Isaiya xienzhini tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho,
12.18: "Uzhe, eneshi bi sunghusan mii hoji wo. Bi hhende orezhi xiqi hen wo. Bi ruhherne hhende ogine. Ingiedene hhe gundanni minzulade chonjine.
12.19: Hhe ulie zhenjindune, ulie onghonone. Geidoude hhei shenqini kiema sonosu dane.
12.20: Ghurane giesan ghulusunyi hhe ulie ghuraghane. Xiniene giesan zhulai ulie xinieghane. Izhi gundanni injitula giene.
12.21: Minzula hhei nierei xiwon giene." Ersa Biexibughala (Mak 3:20-30; Luj 11:14-23; 12:10)
12.22: Ingiekude kunla nie sheitan heisan sugho, yabai Ersa i shida uduru irewo. Ersa hheni goudaghase hhe kielien kieliezhi chanlawo.
12.23: Kunla man ghanirazhi kieliewo, "Eneshi Dawude ni houdei enbeneba?"
12.24: Falisai kunla chenliedene kieliewo, "Ene kun sheitanni touzi Biexibu i ulie kouise sheitan tou dane."
12.25: Ersa hhela yan sumulasei mejiedene kieliewo, "Alinie gojia goyalane eghinduse hontan gholune. Alinie chenshiwonu, alinie giei kunla goyalane eghinduse bei dane.
12.26: Ibilisi Ibilisine touse goyalane eghinduzho, hhei gojia matugie beine?
12.27: Bi Biexibu ni kouizhi sheitan touse tai tujila kienyi kouizhi sheitan touzho? Ingiese tai tujila zhenmin giese tanughun codazho.
12.28: Bi Hudai Ruhherghala sheitan touse Hudai gojia tande irezho.
12.29: Pse kun liliantu kunyi giede orozhi dunxilai qianlane giese xien liliantu kunyi ulie banlase matugie man qianla echine?
12.30: Mii miende ulie beise mii duitou wo. Mare ulie hhantulachen kunshi sandachen kun wo.
12.31: Ingiese bi tande kielieye, yanyanji zui, hu kieliesanlai man roulienema, Shenlinni hu kieliese ulie rouliene.
12.32: Kunnikewonni fandui giezhi kieliese roulienema, Shenlinni fandui giezhi kieliese duyade ulie rouliene, houshideye ulie rouliene." Alimaghala Mutunni Mejiene (Luj 6:43-45)
12.33: "Mutun goushi alima gou wo. Mutun bixinshi alimaye bixin wo. Alimaghala mutunni mejiene.
12.34: Ta ene du mogheini zhunzhughala, ta doghunshi matugie gou kielien kieliezhi khizheghane? Zhughede durusei amande kielie khizheghane.
12.35: Gou kunlai zhughede gounishi yen gouni khizheghane. Doghun kunlai zhughede doghunnishi yen doghunni khizheghane.
12.36: Bi tande kielieye, xienhua kieliechen kunlai panjiku udude nie aman nie amanji renjighane.
12.37: Tai kielienghala tai gounii sanane. Tai kielienghala tai zuini jinjine." Yunusini Ghudureqi (Mak 8:11-12; Luj 11:29-32)
12.38: Ingiekude giedun jinwun hanjia, Falisai kun Ersa de kieliewo, "Loushi, chi gieku ghudureqini bijien uzhene giezho."
12.39: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ene idaini kunla doghun nefuxin giezho, ta dou ghudureqi kerezhoma, xienzhi Yunusi i ghudureqise chugo uzheghaku ghudureqi uwo.
12.40: Yunusi ghurudu ghuran xii fugie zhaghasunyi kielide wo. Kunnikewonye ghurudu ghuran xii zemin jizide beine.
12.41: Panjiku udude Niniwi kunla bosizhezhi ene idai kunlai zuini jinjine. Ingiekushi Niniwi kunla Yunusi chonjisei chenliedene geizhen giewo. Uzhe, enende Yunusi se pse fugieni wine!
12.42: Panjiku udude nanfanni bierei honshan bosizhedene ene idai kunlai zuini jinjine. Ingiekushi hhe gholose Sulumane ni aghelini chenliele irewo. Uzhe, enende Sulumane se pse fugieni wine!" Zannan Ruhher Kharei Irewo (Luj 11:24-26)
12.43: "Nie zannan ruhher kunni jierese likai giedene usu witu oronde izhigie yozhi hhamuraku oron ereizho. Ereizhi olu dadene
12.44: kieliewo, 'Bi yen khizhesan hhe giedene echine.' Khareizhi echi nie uzhese kunkunji shuzhi goudagha jiezho.
12.45: Ingie khizhi echi goyasene dolon doghun ruhheryi uduruzhi ire souwo. Ingiese hhe kunni qinkon melieshidakude pse ese kuruwo. Ene idaini doghun kunlaye eneghala niekielien gholune." Ersani Nie Gie Kun (Mak 3:31-35; Luj 8:19-21)
12.46: Ersa kunlade kieliekude ana, gaijiulani iredene ghadane beizhi hhere kielien kieliene giezho.
12.47: Nie kun hhende kieliewo, "Uzhe, anachii, gaijiulachii ghadane sagheizhi chare kielien kieliene giezho."
12.48: Ersa khareizhi hhe kieliesan kunde kieliewo, "Kienshi mii ana wo? Kienshi mii gaijiula wo?"
12.49: Ingie tujilane zhiizhi kieliewo, "Uzhe, mii ana, mii gaijiula wo.
12.50: Asiman jieredu adaimi isii zunjizhi giesan kunlashi mii gaijiu, eghechijiu, ana wo."

13.1: Yen hhe udude Ersa giederase khizhedene haibienzide souwo.
13.2: Tebieji olon kunla hhei shida irezhi hhantulase hhe chon jiere khirei souwo. Kunla man haibienzide beizho.
13.3: Ersa kunlade bilazhi olon kieliewo, "Nie kun shizhile echiwo.
13.4: Shizhikudeni niezhanla mo jiere luise bunzhula ire ijie agiwo.
13.5: Niezhanla tura olon witu tashitu oronde luise tura ninkienshi niazi faizhi ghujin woma,
13.6: genzi uwoshi naran khizhe nie xiese ghowo.
13.7: Pse niezhanla eghesun dunda luise eghesun khizhezhi hhei jigheidawo.
13.8: Da niezhanla gou ghazhade luise 100 pei, 60 pei, 30 pei zhonjia souwo.
13.9: Chighin bitu kunla chenliendu!" Bilaku Muji (Mak 4:10-12; Luj 8:9-10)
13.10: Tujilani Ersa i shida ire asawo, "Kunlade yale bilazhi kieliene?"
13.11: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Hudai gojiai mimii zinie tande mejieghawoma, hhelade ese mejieghawo.
13.12: Bichen kunde pse olon ogizhi feilieghane. Wichen kunse bisanlainiye agi echine.
13.13: Bi hhelade bilazhi kieliekushi hhela uzhese qinchu olu dane, chenliese sonosu dazhi minbai olu dane.
13.14: Isaiya melie kieliesan kielien mutun hhelai jiere shuhua gholuwo, 'Ta izhi chenliezhoma, dunjire dane. Ta izhi uzhezhoma, minbai olu dane.
13.15: Ene bexinlai zhughe khiduzhezhi chighin beidazhi nudunne hameizho. Pse nudunni chanlazhi chighinni sonosuzhi zhughedeni minbai oludene kharei daorese Bi hhelai goudaghakuse ayizho.'
13.16: Ingieliuzhe tande fuqi wine. Tai nudunde chanlazhi chighinde sonosuzho.
13.17: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, olon xienzhi, gou kunla ta uzhesei uzhene giezhoma, uzhe dazho. Ta chenliesei chenliene giezhoma, chenlie dazho." Bilasanni Mejieghazho (Mak 4:13-20; Luj 8:11-15)
13.18: "Ingiese ta ene fure shizhisan kunni bilasei chenlie.
13.19: Kienliuzhe asiman gojiani kielienyi chenliedene dunjire dase Ibilisi iredene zhughedeni shizhisei agi echine. Eneshi mo jiere luisan fure wo.
13.20: Tashitu oronde luisanshi kielienyi chenliedene bayasuzhi deigo jienliewoma,
13.21: zhughedeni genzi wise niechaku wo. Kielienyi yenyinghala zeinan onu heiku kuzhese deigo furawo.
13.22: Eghesun dunda luisanshi kielienyi chenliewoma, duyai munan gieku, baer miise kielienyi jigheidazhi yama sou dawo.
13.23: Gou ghazhade luisanshi kielienyi chenliezhi dunjiresan kun wo. 100 pei, 60 pei, 30 pei zhonjia souwo." Yemeini Bilazho
13.24: Ersa hhelade pse bilazhi kieliewo, "Asiman gojia hoxian kun ghazhadene boudei fure shizhisei xianli.
13.25: Ashighala hhunturakude duitouni iredene yemeini boudei dundani shizhi yolawo.
13.26: Boudei osizhi qiorun khise yemeiye khizhewo.
13.27: Hojilani iredene ezhandene kieliewo, 'Ezhan, chi boudei fureni ghazhade ese tareiwu? Khalase iresan yemei wo?'
13.28: Ezhan hhelade kieliewo, 'Eneshi duitou giesan wo.' Hojilani kieliewo, 'Bijien echidene xi agimu?'
13.29: Ezhanni kieliewo, 'Bu echi, yemeini xise boudeiniye xi khizhene.
13.30: Ghuala hhantu osi gie. Sagheizhi xiku shihoude bi ghurachen kunlade kielieye, "Xien yemeii xisenu chouladene khan tei. Boudeini yanchidene cankude ghura." giezhi.'" Caizi Fureji Kuniegheni Bilazho (Mak 4:30-32; Luj 13:18-21)
13.31: Ersa hhelade pse bilazhi kieliewo, "Asiman gojia nie caizi furei xianli. Kun agizhi echi ghazhadene tareiwo.
13.32: Eneshi fure dundase zui gani woma, osizhi khizhese yan caiseliuzhe fugie wo. Mutun gholudene bunzhula chala jiereni holiene."
13.33: Pse hhelade bilazhi kieliewo, "Asiman gojia hoxian kuniegheni xianli. Nie bierei agizhi echidene nie deizi ghurunde teizhi man faighawo." Bilasanni Muji (Mak 4:33-34)
13.34: Enelashi man Ersa olon kunlade bilazhi kieliesan wo. Bilazhi ulie kieliese hhelade ulie kieliene.
13.35: Ingiekushi Ezhan xienzhini tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho, "Bi bilazhi kielieye. Duyai zhayaghasanse niuighasan shiqinlai kieliezhi khizheghaye." Yemeini Bilasei Mejieghazho
13.36: Ingiedene Ersa kunlase likai gie giedera orowo. Tujila shidani ire kieliewo, "Ghazha jieredu yemeini bilasei bijiende mejiegha."
13.37: Hhe kieliewo, "Boudei furei shizhisanshi Kunnikewon wo.
13.38: Ghazhashi duya wo. Boudei fureshi asiman gojiai kunla wo. Yemeishi hhe doghunnii kunla wo.
13.39: Yemei shizhisan duitoushi Ibilisi wo. Ghuraku shihoushi duya baraku shihou wo. Ghurachenshi qienxienla wo.
13.40: Yemeini xi agidene khande sideraghaku mutun duya barakudeye ingiene.
13.41: Kunnikewon qienxienlane peizhi zui fanjighasanlai, uhunni giesanlai man asiman gojiasene zhiizhi khizhedene
13.42: fugie khantu nokiende benda oroghase hhende shidunne zhouzhi wilane.
13.43: Ingiekude gou kunla adane gojiade naran nudun mutun gieran faine. Chighin bitu kunla chenliendu!" Boubeini Bilazho
13.44: "Asiman gojia hoxian ghazhade niuighasan boubeini xianli. Nie kun hhei chanladene niuighawo. Bayasuzhi echidene goyane dunxilai man huisenu ene ghazhai agiwo." Manoui Bilazho
13.45: "Pse asiman gojia hoxian nie meimei kun zhiguitu manou ereisei xianli.
13.46: Nie fugie jiagetu manoui penjise echidene goya dunxilane man huisenu ene manoui agiwo." Zhaghasun Bareiku Onni Bilazho
13.47: "Pse asiman gojia hoxian haide xiaisan onni xianli. Yanyanji zhaghasunlai bareizhi
13.48: on duruse usu bienzide laizhi khizhedene sousenu gounilai sunghuzhi tunzide teine. Bixinnilai bendane.
13.49: Duya barakudeye ingiene. Qienxienla irese doghun kunni gou kun dundase sunghu khizhedene
13.50: fugie khantu nokiende bendase hhende shidunne zhouzhi wilane." Shini Khuichen Dunxi
13.51: Ersa kieliewo, "Enezighan kielienyi ta man dunjirewoye?" Hhela huida giewo, "Bijien dunjirewo."
13.52: Ersa kieliewo, "Jien asiman gojiade tuji danlasan jinwun hanjiala hoxian gieni zhanguijii xianli. Hhe kufansene shini, khuichen dunxilai agi khizhene." Ersai Nasalede Ese Jienliezho (Mak 6:1-6; Luj 4:16-30)
13.53: Ersa enezighan bilasei kielie baraghadene hhense likai giewo.
13.54: Ingiedene hhe goya orondene irezhi hhelai huitande kunlade sughase hhela man ghanirazhi kieliewo, "Ene kunde imutu agheli, fugie shiqin khalase irezho?
13.55: Eneshi mujianyi kewon pushonu? Hhei ananishi Mereiyen pushonu? Gaijiulanishi Yagebu , Yusufu , Ximun , Yuda pushonu?
13.56: Hhei oqinjiulani mai enende uwonu? Ene kunde khalase iresan benshi wo?"
13.57: Hhela Ersa de hokuzho. Ingiese Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Xienzhini goyai oron, goyai giese chugo khalaliuzhe zunjine."
13.58: Hhela Ersa i xianxin ese giese Ersa hhende famatu shiqin olon ese giezho.

14.1: Hhe xienzide Hherode on Ersa i shiqinyi sonosudene
14.2: kha dourashiku kunlade kieliewo, "Eneshi xili gieghasan Yaheiya wo. Hhe fugudene aminne oluwo. Ingiese ene nenlitu shiqinla hhei jierese khizhezho."
14.3: Eneshi Hherode jiu biereine Xiloji ni yenyinghala Yaheiya i bareidene banlasenu bafanzide khazho. Hherode i jiushi Feili wo.
14.4: Yaheiya Hherode de, "Chi hhei agise ese oluzho." giezhi kieliezho.
14.5: Ingiese Hherode Yaheiya ni alane giezhoma, bexinla hhei xienzhi wo giese hhelase ayizho.
14.6: Hherode ni olusan udu kuzhese xi beilazhi Xiloji ni oqin kunlai melie wu jiulizho. Hherode hende bayasuzho,
14.7: ingiese fayen giezhi oqinde yan kerese yan ogiye giezhi dain giewo.
14.8: Anani oqinne, "Xili gieghasan Yaheiya ni qiorunyi hhamusade teidene made iregha." giezhi kielieghase oqin kieliewo.
14.9: Hherode hende munan giezho. Ingieliuzhe olon kunlai melie fayen giese fenfulazhi hhende ogine giewo.
14.10: Ingie kun peidene bafanzide Yaheiya i qiorunyi chizhighawo.
14.11: Qiorunyini hhamusade agi ire oqinde ogiwo. Oqin pse anadene ogiwo.
14.12: Yaheiya i tujila iredene beyeini linlasenu buladene Ersa de echi kieliewo. 5000 Kunde Chudughazho (Mak 6:30-44; Luj 9:10-17; Yah 6:1-14)
14.13: Ersa enei mejiedene chon souzhi hhense likai gie niezheghan hontande echiwo. Olon kunla Ersa yolasei mejiedene chenshilase yozhi hhei daghazho.
14.14: Ersa chon jierese bouzhese tebieji olon kunlai chanladene ubali xiiwo. Hhelai giemeresan kunlai goudaghawo.
14.15: Khara olukude tujilani hhei shida ire kieliewo, "Eneshi hontan wo. Shihou eqie widawo. Kunlai sandaghazhi hhela goyalane aghinlade agizhi ijiele echigieba."
14.16: Ersa kieliewo, "Hhelai echighaku biyo uwo. Ta hhelade ogizhi ijiegha."
14.17: Tujilani kieliewo, "Matai enende zi tawun ginanji ghua zhaghasun wo."
14.19: Ingie olon kunlai fenfulazhi osuntu oronde soughawo. Pse tawun ginan, ghua zhaghasunyi barei, asimanyi uzhe Hudade mafan kieliedene ghulusenu tujilade ogise tujila kunlade ogiwo.
14.20: Dajiala man ijiedene chuduwo. Tujila feiliesan zhazhai hhantulaghase 12 gie lanzi zhonlowo.
14.21: Ijiesan kun dunda bierei kewosilai ulie sanase chabudu 5000 ere kun wo. Hai Jiere Yozho (Mak 6:45-52; Yah 6:15-21)
14.22: Ersa deigo tujilai biizhi chon jiere khighadene xien hai duimiende daogha goyane olon kunlai sandaghawo.
14.23: Kunlai sandaghadene ulade niezheghan onxian giele echiwo. Khara oluse hhende niezheghan wo.
14.24: Qingiekude chon haibienzise gholo wo. Kei shun wise lan chonni eghizhi yuqighazho.
14.25: Xieni 3 jiense 6 jienni shihoude Ersa tujilai hhende echine giezhi haini usu jiere yozho.
14.26: Tujila hai jiere hhe yosei chanladene jindazhi ayidene waradawo, "Perei wo!"
14.27: Ersa deigo hhelade kieliewo, "Ta zhughelane tei. Bi wo. Bu ayi!"
14.28: Beduru kieliewo, "Ezhan, chi enbese minlin xiaizhi mii hai jiereghun goyane hhende yozhi echigha."
14.29: Ersa , "Chi ire." giezhi kieliese Beduru chon jierese boudene Ersa i hhende echine giezhi hai jiereghun yo qiiwo.
14.30: Kei fugiede feiliesei chanla ayidene haide anda boune giese waradazhi kieliewo, "Ezhan, mii jiui!"
14.31: Ersa deigo khaghalane laidene kieliezho, "Chi ene xianxin gieku zhughe gajitu kun. Yangiezhi inxin giezho?"
14.32: Ersa Beduru ghala chon jiere khise kei beiwo.
14.33: Chon jieredu kunla Ersa i beiizhi kieliewo, "Chishi shuhua Hudai kewon enbene!" Genisalededu Gientui Goudaghazho (Mak 6:53-56)
14.34: Hhela haini daodene Genisale oronde irewo.
14.35: Hhendedu kunla Ersa i tanidene hhe iresan xioxini go oronlade chonjizhi giemeresan kunlai man udurudene Ersa i hhende irewo.
14.36: Hhela Ersa i xiahua giezhi jien ghizhane nie maqigha giezho. Maqisan kunla man goudawo.

15.1: Ingiekude Falisai kun, jinwun hanjiala Yelusalen se Ersa i hhende ire asawo,
15.2: "Chii tujila yangiezhi xienrenla sughasan xigonni ulie zunjine? Hhela ijiekude khane ulie wagha ijiezho."
15.3: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ta yangiezhi goya xigonghalane Hudai minlinni ulie zunjine?
15.4: Huda, 'Ada anane zunji', 'Ada anane sugiesan kunni ala.' giezhi kieliezho.
15.5: Ingieliuzhe ta kieliene, 'Kien ada anadene bi tande ogi shidakui Hudade ogiwo.' giezhi kieliese
15.6: hhe kun adane ulie zunjise olune giezho. Ingiezhi ta goya xigonghalane Hudai kielienyi widaghazho.
15.7: Jiazhon giesan kunlaya, Isaiya tai zhiizhi melieshida kieliesan ese codazho. Hhe kieliezho,
15.8: 'Ene bexinla amanghalane mii zunjine. Zhugheni mase gholo wo.
15.9: Hhela kunni guijinyi zhenzhenji daoli mutun kunlade sughazho. Ingiese mii beiise yama oronde uwo.'"
15.10: Ersa kunlai uruzhi ire hhelade kieliewo, "Ta chenliezhi minbai olu,
15.11: amanse orosan kunyi ulie zannanshighanema, amanse khizhesan kunyi zannanshighane."
15.12: Ingie tujila hhei melie ire kieliewo, "Falisai kun ene kielienyi chenliese hokusanni chi mejielie?"
15.13: Ersa kieliewo, "Asiman jieredu adami zeilasan pushoshi man xi khizhene.
15.14: Hhelai bu gonji. Hhelashi sughoi uduruchen sugho wo. Sugho sughone uduruse ghuala nokiende anda boune."
15.15: Beduru Ersa de kieliewo, "Ene bilazhi kieliesei bijiende kieliezhi minbai olugha."
15.16: Ersa kieliewo, "Ta dou minbai olu dawu?
15.17: Amande orosan kielighun mekiende echisei ta ulie mejienu?
15.18: Amanse khizhesanshi zhughese khizhesanwo. Ene caigie kunni zannanshighane.
15.19: Zhughese khizhesanshi doghunde sumulaku, alaku, piofen gieku, lon kijieku, ghulaku, jia ganzhen beiku, sugieku wo.
15.20: Enela man kunni zannanshighane. Khane ulie wagha ijiese kunni ulie zannanshighane." Nie Niman Kunni Biereini Xianxin Gieku (Mak 7:24-30)
15.21: Ersa hhense likai giedene Tuilo , Xidun ni oronde echiwo.
15.22: Nie niman kunyi bierei hhe oronse khizhedene waradazhi kieliewo, "Ezhan, Dawude ni houdei, made ubali nie xii! Mii oqinyi sheitan heisan hen wo."
15.23: Ingieliuzhe Ersa yama huida ese giezho. Tujilani melie ire xiahua giezhi kieliewo, "Hhei khareighaba. Ene bierei mai khuinase waradazho."
15.24: Ersa kieliewo, "Mii peizhi zinie Isilie ni kunlai dundadu miisan ghonilade oluzhi ireghazho."
15.25: Hhe bierei ire Ersa i beiizhi kieliewo, "Ezhan, made banman nie gie!"
15.26: Ersa kieliewo, "Kesilai ginanyi ga nogheide bendazhi ogise ese oluzho."
15.27: Hhe bierei kieliewo, "Ezhan, oluzhoma, nogheiye ezhanne shire doura bousan zhazhai ijiene."
15.28: Ingiese Ersa kieliewo, "Funi, chii xianxin gieku fugie wo. Chi keresan mutun chade gholu gie." Hhe shihoude oqinni goudawo. Olon Gientulai Goudaghazho
15.29: Ersa hhense likai giezhi Jialilihai bienzide iredene ulade khirei souwo.
15.30: Tebieji olon kunla hhei hhende iredene dogholon, sugho, sanfei, yaba, pse olon gientulai hhei konshida jiese hhe goudaghawo.
15.31: Yaba kielien kielie, sanfei gouda, dogholon yo, sugho chanlasei olon kunla uzhedene ghanirazhi Isilie ni Hudai kuaiwo. 4000 Kunde Chudughazho (Mak 8:1-10)
15.32: Ersa tujilane uruzhi ire kieliewo, "Ene kunla mare hhantu ghurudu oluzho, hhelade ijiekui widazho. Bi hhelade ubali xiizho. Bi hhelai oliesuzhi echighaku duran uwo. Mo jiere echise injirekuse ayizho."
15.33: Tujila hhende kieliewo, "Ene hontande imeghei kunlade ijie chudughaku ginan bijiende khalase irene?"
15.34: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Tande ginan giedughon wo?" Hhela kieliewo, "Dolon wo, pse giedun ga zhaghasun wo."
15.35: Ersa olon kunlai fenfulazhi zemin jiere soughadene
15.36: dolon ginan, giedun zhaghasunyi barei mafan kieliedene ghulu tujilade ogise tujila olon kunlade ogiwo.
15.37: Dajiala man ijiezhi chududene feiliesan zhazhai dolon lanzi zhonlowo.
15.38: Ijiesan kun dunda bierei kewosilai ulie sanase 4000 ere kun wo.
15.39: Ersa kunlai sandaghadene chon jiere khirei Majiadan oronde echiwo.

16.1: Falisai kun, Sadugai kunla Ersa i shida iredene hhei shiizhi asiman jierese iresan ghudureqi uzhegha giezhi yoqiu giezho.
16.2: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Khara olukude olien shouizhi daose, 'Maghashijie arulune.' giezhi ta kieliene.
16.3: Eqiemagha olien shouizhi dao dase, 'Enedu kei feiliezhi ghura boune.' giezhi kieliene. Ta asimanni qinkonyi fenjine, ene shidaini ghudureqini fenji dane.
16.4: Ene idaini kunla, doghun nefuxin giezho, ta dou ghudureqi kerezhoma, Yunusi i ghudureqise chugo uzheghaku ghudureqi uwo." Ingiedene hhelase likai giewo. Falisai Kun, Sadugai Kunlani Fangula (Mak 8:14-21)
16.5: Tujila hai duimiende daose ginan bareikui matazho.
16.6: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ta Falisai kun, Sadugai kunlai kuniegheni jinxin giezhi fangula."
16.7: Tujila nieniedene kielienduzho, "Matan ginan ese bareise ingiezhi kieliezhoba."
16.8: Ersa mejiedene kieliewo, "Ta ene xianxin gieku zhughe gajitu kunla, ta yangiezhi ginan wikui kielienduzho?
16.9: Ta dou minbai olu dazhou? Tawun ginanyi 5000 kunde ogizhi giedun lanzi zhonlosei jila danu?
16.10: Pse dolon ginanyi 4000 kunde ogizhi giedun lanzi zhonlosei jila danu?
16.11: Bi kieliesanshi ginanyi ese kieliesei ta matugie mejie dane? Ta jinxin giezhi Falisai kun, Sadugai kunlai kuniegheni fangula."
16.12: Ingiekude tujila Ersa ginan kuniegheni ese kieliezhi Falisai kun, Sadugai kunla surughasei fangula giesei mejiewo. Ersashi Mexiha Wo Giezhi Beduru Chenren Giezho (Mak 8:27-30; Luj 9:18-21)
16.13: Ersa Kaisaliya-Feilibi oronde iredene tujiladene asazho, "Kunla kieliese Kunnikewonshi kien wo giezho?"
16.14: Hhela kieliewo, "Kunla kieliese xili gieghasan Yaheiya wo giezho. Niezhan kunla kieliese Iliya wo giezho. Pse niezhan kunla kieliese Yelimi onu, xienzhi dundadu nie wo giezho."
16.15: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ta kieliese bishi kien wo?"
16.16: Ximun-Beduru kieliewo, "Chishi Mexiha wo. Chanqiku Hudai kewon wo."
16.17: Ersa hhende kieliewo, " Ximun-Bayena , chade fuqi wine! Enei chade mejieghasanshi kun pusho, asiman jieredu adami wo.
16.18: Bi pse chade kielieye, chishi Beduru wo. Bi jiohuine ene tashi jiere giene. Dozoni lilian hhense inji dane.
16.19: Bi asiman gojiani yeshii chade ogiye. Chi zemin jiere yan banlase asiman jiereye yan banlane. Chi zemin jiere yan andaghase asiman jiereye yan andaghane."
16.20: Ingiedene Ersa , "Goyaneshi Mexiha bikui kiemade bu kielie!" giezhi tujilade fenfulawo. Ersa Goyane Shouku Giekui Kieliezho (Mak 8:31-9:1; Luj 9:22-27)
16.21: Hhe shihouse Ersa matugieseda Yelusalen de echidene zhanlao, fugie buwa, jinwun hanjialase hende shouku giezhi goyai aladene ghurudude aminne olukui tujiladene kielie qiiwo.
16.22: Beduru Ersa i laidene kheila qiiwo, "Ezhan, ulie olune! Intui chii jiere ulie irene."
16.23: Ersa ochira daore Beduru de kieliewo, "Ibilisi, mii khuina dao! Chi mii unaghane. Chi Hudai isii ulie sumulazhi kunni isii sumulane."
16.24: Ersa tujiladene kieliewo, "Kien mii daghane giese goyane sheidene shizijiane beiliezhi mii daghakuni wo.
16.25: Kien aminne jiuine giese aminne widaghane. Made oluzhi aminne widaghase aminne ulie widaghane.
16.26: Kun duyani man zhenjidene goya aminne widaghase yande gou wo? Kun pse yanghala aminne arunzhane?
16.27: Kunnikewon qienxienlarene hhantu hhei adani fama dunda irene. Ingiekude zhao kunni giekughala jien kunde kharulune.
16.28: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, enende beisan kun dunda niezhanla Kunnikewon qienline bareizhi irekui ulie chanlatula ulie fugune."

17.1: Zhighudu daose Ersa Beduru , Yagebu , Yagebu i jiuni Yaheiya i danxin uduru undu ulade khireidene
17.2: hhelai melie bienjiwo. Ungieni naran mutun gieghan wo, jienni chighande gon niekielien wo.
17.3: Menzhali Musa , Iliya ghala Ersa re kielien kieliesei hhela chujieghewo.
17.4: Beduru Ersa de kieliezho, "Ezhan, matan enende gou wo. Chi duran bise bi enende ghuran zhanfan daiye. Niei chade, niei Musa de, niei Iliya de."
17.5: Beduru kieliekude menzhali niegieda gon faisan olien iredene hhelai khawo. Oliense shenqi irezhi kieliewo, "Eneshi bi oresan mii kewon wo. Bi hhende xiqi wo. Ta hhei kielienyi chenlie!"
17.6: Tujila sonosudene hende ayizhi zemin jiere papalawo.
17.7: Ersa melie iredene hhelai maqizhi kieliewo, "Bosizhe, bu ayi."
17.8: Hhela qiorunne qila uzhese Ersa se chugo kiemai ese chanlawo.
17.9: Ulase boukude Ersa hhelade fenfulazhi kieliewo, "Kunnikewon fugusan kun dundase aminne ulie olutula ta chanlasei kiemade bu kielie."
17.10: Tujila Ersa de asawo, "Qinse jinwun hanjiala yangiezhi Iliya ijinyo xien irene giezhi kieliezho?"
17.11: Ersa kieliewo, " Iliya irezhi man erchan gie goudaghanema,
17.12: bi tande kielieye, hhe ijin irezhoma, kunla hhei tani dazhi shimatu giezho. Kunnikewonniye niekielienji zayalane."
17.13: Ersa xili gieghasan Yaheiya i zhiizhi kieliesei tujila caigie minbai oluzho. Sheitan Heisan Kewonni Goudaghazho (Mak 9:14-29; Luj 9:37-43)
17.14: Ersa tujilarene iban kunlai shida irese nie kun Ersa i melie ire xiutuliezhi kieliewo,
17.15: "Ezhan, mii kewonde ubali nie xii! Hhende kharalaku gien kurudene tendun fugie wo. Haojihui khande usude anda bouzho.
17.16: Bi udurudene tujila shidachii echise hhela goudagha dane."
17.17: Ersa kieliewo, "Ai, ta ene xianxin gieku witu, xiemecha yochen kunla, bi tanse rennai giezhi giedoghoncha beine? Kewonni uduruzhi mii enende ire!"
17.18: Ersa sheitanyi nie sugiese sheitan khizhewo. Hhe shihoude kewon goudawo.
17.19: Ingiekude tujila Ersa i shida konkonji ire asawo, "Bijien yangiezhi ene sheitanyi khigha dane?"
17.20: Ersa kieliewo, "Tai xianxin gieku texien gaji wo. Bi tande shuhua kielieye, tande caizi fure chigei xianxin gieku bise ta ene ulade enense noidene hhende dao giezhi kieliese daone, ingiese ta yama gie dakui uwo." Ersa Duya Ijiezhi Aminne Olukui 2 Hui Kieliezho (Mak 9:30-32; Luj 9:43b-45)
17.22: Hhela Jialili de hhantulakude Ersa tujilade kieliewo, "Kunnikewonni kunlai khade jiuidene
17.23: hhela alase ghurudude aminne olune." Ingiese tujila hende yuchou giezho. Mechide Shui Shanjikui Kieliezho
17.24: Hhela Jiabainun de irese mechide shui shanjisan kunla Beduru i melie ire kieliewo, "Tai loushi shui ulie jiuinu?"
17.25: Beduru kieliewo, "Jiuine." Beduru giedoura orose Ersa xien hhende asawo, " Ximun , chii isi matugiezho? Duyani honshanla kiense shui, baer ghurazho? Goya kunlase onu, niman kunlase wo?"
17.26: Beduru kieliezho, "Niman kunlase wo." Ersa kieliezho, "Qingiese goya kunlanughunne mienlienema,
17.27: matan reikusene ayine, chi haibienzide echisenu zhaghasun barei. Touchan bareisan amanyini keighama, nie miengui chanlane. Chi agizhi echidene matan ghualanughunyi jiui."

18.1: Hhe shihoude tujilani Ersa i shida ire asawo, "Asiman gojiade kien zui fugie wo?"
18.2: Ersa nie kewosii uruzhi ire hhelai dunda beighadene kieliewo,
18.3: "Bi tande shuhua kielieye, ta geizhen giezhi kewosi mutun ulie gholuse asiman gojiade oro dane.
18.4: Ingiese kien ene kewosi mutun goyane meilade uzhese asiman gojiade zui fugie wo.
18.5: Kien mii niereghala intu kewosii jienliese mii jienliezho." Zui Fanjighaku (Mak 9:42-48; Luj 17:1-2)
18.6: "Kien mii xianxin giesan enezighan ga kun dundadu niei zui fanjighase ghuzhundeni qiemanshai banladene haini gunde boughase da gou wo.
18.7: Zui fanjiku yenyinghala ene duyade gou widawo. Zui fanjighaku shiqin chan winema, kunlai zui fanjighasan hhe kunde gou widawo!
18.8: Chii nie kha onu nie kon chii zui fanjighase chizhidene benda! Ghua kha ghua kon bidene chanqiku khande bendatula nie kha onu nie kon feiliedene chanqi amitukude orose da gou wo.
18.9: Chii nie nudun chii zui fanjighase waidene benda! Ghua nudun bidene dozoheini khande bendatula nie nudun feiliedene chanqi amitukude orose da gou wo." Miisan Ghonii Bilazho (Luj 15:3-7)
18.10: "Ta xioxin giezhi enezighan ga kun dundase nieiliuzhe meilade bu uzhe. Bi tande kielieye, hhelai qienxienla asiman jieredu adaimi shida chanqi wine.
18.12: Nie kunde 100 gie ghoni wo. Nieni yo widase ta sumulase matugiene? 99 gieni ulade jiesenu widasan ghonii ereile ulie echinu?
18.13: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, hhe ereizhi oluse uye widasan 99 giese da olon bayasune.
18.14: Tai asiman jieredu adaye niekielien wo. Enezighan ga kun dundadu nieiliuzhe widaghaku duran uwo." Zui Fanjisan Gaijiude Matugie Giene
18.15: "Gaijiuchii zui fanjise hhei hhende echizhi zinie ta ghuala bikude codaseini kielie. Hhe chii kielienyi chenliese chade nie gaijiu olodowo.
18.16: Hhe ulie chenliese kun nie ghua urudene tanghala echi. Ingiese 'jien zhasan shiqinlai ghua, ghuran kunni ganzhenghala shidaghane.'
18.17: Hhe pse ulie chenliese jiohuide kielie. Jiohuini kunlanughunyiye ulie chenliese niman kun, shui shanjisan kun mutun uzhe.
18.18: Bi tande shuhua kielieye, ta zemin jiere yan banlase, asiman jiereye yan banlane. Ta zemin jiere yan andaghase asiman jiereye yan andaghane.
18.19: Bi pse tande kielieye, tai dunda ghuala hhantulazhi nie zhugheghala zemin jiere onxian giesanlai asiman jiereshiku adami man chenjighane.
18.20: Ghua ghuran kun mii niereghala khala hhantulase bi hhelai dunda wine." Ubali Ulie Xiichen Hoji
18.21: Ingiekude Beduru shidani ire kieliewo, "Ezhan, jiumi made gieduifa zui fanjise bi gieduifa hhei rouliene? Doleifashi kurulie?"
18.22: Ersa kieliewo, "Bi chade kielieye, doleifa ulie kurune, 70 gie doleifa wo.
18.23: Ingiese asiman gojiashi hoxian honshan hojilarene zhan sanaku niekielien wo.
18.24: Sanazhi qiikude 50 on antan chaisan kunyi uduruzhi irewo.
18.25: Hhende yama honjikui uwo, ezhanni minlin xiaizhi hhei, biereiini, kesilaini, pse bisanlaini man huidene honji giezho.
18.26: Hhe hoji papaladene, 'Made shijien pse gouji ogi, bi man honjine.' giezhi kieliezho.
18.27: Ezhanni hhende ubali xiidene andaghazhi chaisan baerni man rouliewo."
18.28: "Ene hoji khizhedene hhende hharan miengu chaisan hhantuku kunyi penjidene bareizhi ghuzhunsei nieqidene, 'Chaisan baerni iregha.' giezho.
18.29: Hhantuku kunni papaladene 'Shijien gouji ogima, bi honjiye.' giezhi xiahua giezho.
18.30: Hhe kun ulie olune giedene chaisan baerni honjitula bafanzide khazho.
18.31: Pseshiku hojila enei chanladene hende nango giedene echi ene shiqinyi man ezhandene huibao giewo.
18.32: Ingie ezhanni hhe kunyi uru iredene kieliewo, 'Chi ene doghun hoji! Chi mii xiahua giese bi chi chaisanlai man rouliewo.
18.33: Bi chade ubali xiizho giezhi chi hhantuku kundene qingiezhi indan ubali xiise ulie olunu?'
18.34: Ezhanni hende hokudene chaisan baerni man honjitula bafanzi sagheisan kunlade jiuizhi eghighazho.
18.35: Ta gaijiune zhughesene ingiezhi ulie rouliese asiman jieredu adamiye tande ingiezhi giene."

19.1: Ersa ene kielienlai kielie baraghadene Jialili se likai giezhi Yedanhe duimienni Yudaya oronde irewo.
19.2: Tebieji olon kunla hhei daghazho, Ersa hhende kunlai goudaghawo.
19.3: Falisai kunla ire Ersa i shiizhi asazho, "Kun yan yenyinghalaliuzhe biereine lihun gieghase olunulie?"
19.4: Ersa kieliewo, "Kunyi zhayaghasan Huda dei qiikude ere kun, eme kunyi zhayaghawo giezho.
19.5: Pse, 'Ingiese kun ada anasene likai giedene biereighalane hhantulazhi ghuala nie beye gholune.' giezhi kieliesan jinwunni ta onshizhi ese daowu?
19.6: Hhela ghua pusho, nie wo. Ingiese Huda hhantulaghasei kun fenkai gieghase ulie olune."
19.7: Falisai kunla asawo, "Qinse Musa yangiezhi lihun qiuzi ogidene lihun gie giezhi fenfulawo?"
19.8: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Tai zhughe khidunshi Musa ta biereine lihun gieghase olune giezhoma, dei qiikude ingie ese giezho.
19.9: Bi tande kielieye, kien lon kijieku yenyinse chugo biereighalane lihun giedene pse agise piofen giezho."
19.10: Tujilani Ersa de kieliewo, "Ere kun bierei kunyi gonxi imutuishi jiehun ulie giese da gou wo."
19.11: Ersa kieliewo, "Ene kielienyi kienliuzhe man jienlie shidaku pusho, kiende nengou ogise kien jienliene.
19.12: Niezhan kunla olusanse jiehun gie dane. Niezhan kunlai kunla ataladene jiehun gie dane. Pse niezhan kunla asiman gojiade oluzhi goyane jiehun ulie giene. Ene kielienyi kien jienlie shidase jienliedu." Ersa Kesilade Oluzhi Onxian Giezho (Mak 10:13-16; Luj 18:15-17)
19.13: Ingiekude kunla kesilane uduruzhi Ersa i melie ire hhelai jiere kha teizhi onxian gieghane giese tujila hhelai sugiezho.
19.14: Ingiese Ersa kieliezho, "Kesilai bu dui, mii shida ire gie. Asiman gojiashi imutu kunlanughun wo."
19.15: Ersa hhelai jiere khane teidene hhense likai giewo. Nasuchighan Baertu Kun (Mak 10:17-31; Luj 18:18-30)
19.16: Nie kun Ersa i melie iredene kieliewo, "Loushi, bi yan gouni giese chanqiku amin wine?"
19.17: Ersa kieliewo, "Chi made yangiezhi gouni asane? Zi niekozishi gouni wo. Chi chanqiku aminyi jienliene giese minlinni zunji."
19.18: Hhe asawo, "Yan minlin wo?" Ersa kieliewo, "Kun bu ala, piofen bu gie, bu ghula, jia ganzhen bu bei,
19.19: ada anane zunji, goyadene mutun giebeidene ore."
19.20: Nasuchighan kun kieliewo, "Enelai bi man zunjiwo, pse yan chaizho?"
19.21: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Chi man qiendaghaku duran bise echidene bisanlane man huizhi nanxin kunlade ogi. Ingiese chii boubei asiman jiere wo. Ingiedene irezhi mii dagha."
19.22: Nasuchighan kunde caichan olonshi ene kielienyi chenliedene yuchourazhi yolawo.
19.23: Ersa tujiladene kieliewo, "Bi tande shuhua kielieye, bayan kun asiman gojiade oroku chijia wo.
19.24: Bi tande pse kielieye, loto zhun boghose daoku bayan kun Hudai gojiade orokuse da sunfan wo."
19.25: Tujila enei chenliedene ghanirazhi kieliewo, "Ingiese kienyi jiui shidane?"
19.26: Ersa hhelai uzhedene kieliewo, "Kun enei gie danema, Huda yanniliuzhe giene."
19.27: Ingiekude Beduru kieliewo, "Uzhe, bijien man bendadene chii daghazho. Jianlai bijiende yan wine?"
19.28: Ersa kieliewo, "Bi tande shuhua kielieye, shini duyade Kunnikewon goyane famatu baozo jiere soukude, ta enezighan mii daghasan kunlaye 12 gie baozo jiere souzhi Isilie ni 12 gie paini gonjine.
19.29: Kien mii nierede oluzhi gie, gaijiu, eghechijiu, ada, ana, kesila, ghazhane bendase 100 pei ogine, da chanqiku aminni jienliene.
19.30: Ingiese olon melieshikula khuinashilane, khuinashikula melieshilane."

20.1: "Asiman gojia hoxian nie gieni zhanguijii xianli. Eqiemagha eqie khizhi echizhi kun guidene putou yenzidene wilie gieghane giezho.
20.2: Wiliechilaghala niudu nie miengu ogikui kielie goudaghadene hhelai putou yenzide echighawo.
20.3: Eqiemagha 9 jien olukude zhanguiji khizhi echise jide xien beisan kunyi chanladene
20.4: hhelade kieliewo, 'Taye putou yenzide ire, tande heshide baer ogine.'
20.5: Ingie hhela echiwo. Xiawu 12 jien, pse 3 jien olukude zhanguiji khizhi echidene ye ingiezhi giewo.
20.6: Hhe xiawu 5 jien olukude pse khizhi echise dou xien beisan kunni chanladene hhelade asawo, 'Ta niudu enende beizhi wilie giele yale ese echizho?'
20.7: Hhela kieliewo, 'Bijienyi kieme ese guizho.' Hhe kieliewo, 'Taye putou yenzide ire.'
20.8: Khara oluse putou yenzii zhanguiji duizhande kieliewo, 'Wilie giesan kunlai uruzhedene zui khuina iresanse baerlaini ogizhi zui melie kuru.'
20.9: Xiawu 5 jien olukude iresan kunla nie kun nie miengu linlawo.
20.10: Zui melie iresan kun iredene olon ogimu giezhoma, yen nie kun nie miengu linlawo.
20.11: Hhela linladene zhanguijide boxin giezhi kieliezho,
20.12: 'Bijien khara naran doura niudu khishilazho. Enezighan khuina iredene nie zhuntou wilie giesan kunlai bijienre niekielien uzhezho.'
20.13: Ingiese zhanguiji hhelai dundashiku nie kunde kieliewo, 'Zhanlien, bi chii ese kuighazho. Matan ghuala kieliesanshi nie miengu wola?
20.14: Goyanughunne agidene echi. Zui khuina iresan hhe kunde chade ogisanghala niekielien ogise bi yenyi wo.
20.15: Bi duranghalane baerne injise ulie olunu? Bi gou kun danlase chi dubilienu?'
20.16: Ingiese khuinashikula melieshilane, melieshikula khuinashilane." Ersa Ku Shouizhi Aminne Olukui Ji 3 Hui Kieliezho (Mak 10:32-34; Luj 18:31-34)
20.17: Ersa Yelusalen de khireikude mo jiere 12 gie tujine uruzhi ire hhelade kieliewo,
20.18: "Uzhe, matan Yelusalen de khireine. Kunnikewonyi fugie buwa, jinwun hanjialade jiuise hhela hhei sixin panjidene
20.19: niman kunlade jiuine. Hhela hhei xilun giene, mabienzighala eghine, shizijia jiere ghada alane. Ingie ghurudude aminne olune." Ghua Tujini Anani Ersai Xiahua Giezho (Mak 10:35-45)
20.20: Ingiekude Xibitai ni bierei ghua kewonne uduruzhi Ersa i melie ire xiutuliezhi xiahua giezho.
20.21: Ersa kieliewo, "Chi yan kerene?" Hhe kieliewo, "Mii onxianshi ghua kewonyimi chii gojiade niei chii borun miende niei soghei miende sougha."
20.22: Ersa kieliewo, "Ta ghuala yan keresanne ulie mejiene. Bi shouiku kuni ta shoui shidanu?" Hhela kieliewo, "Shouine."
20.23: Ersa kieliewo, "Bi shouiku kuni ta shouinema, mii lianmien kanzide soughakui bi ogiku pusho. Adami kiende zhunbei giezhoshi kiende ogine."
20.24: Psedu hharan tujini sonosudene hhe gaijiughalade hokuzho.
20.25: Ersa hhelai uruzhi ire kieliewo, "Niman kunlai dunda lindao, noyenla qienli bareizhi kunlai gonjisei ta mejiene.
20.26: Ta niekielien pusho, tai dunda kien fugieni danlane giese tande ushilachen kun danlakuni wo.
20.27: Tai dunda kien laoda danlane giese tande hoji danlakuni wo.
20.28: Kunnikewon irekushi kunlai ushilaghale ese irezho. Kharei kunlai ushilazhi aminne sheidene olon kunlade shuiku Jiage danlale irezho." Ghua Sughoi Goudaghazho (Mak 10:46-52; Luj 18:35-43)
20.29: Hhela Yelige se likai giekude tebieji olon kunla Ersa i daghazho.
20.30: Ghua sugho mo bienzide souzho. Ersa daosei sonosudene waradazho, "Ezhan, Dawude ni houdei, bijiende ubali nie xii!"
20.31: Kunla jiebalazhi shenqi bu khizhe giese hhela genjia fugiede waradazhi kieliezho, "Ezhan, Dawude ni houdei, bijiende ubali nie xii!"
20.32: Ersa beidene hhelai uruzhi ire kieliezho, "Bi tande yan giene?"
20.34: Ersa i zhugheni zholieredene hhelai nudunyi nie moise hhela deigo chanladene Ersa i daghawo.

21.1: Hhela Yelusalen se chadashizhi Ganlanshan ni Bofaqi de irekude Ersa ghua tujine peizhi
21.2: hhelade kieliewo, "Ta duimienni aghinde echi. Hhende nie huiyasan enzheghei deigo chanlane, shidai da nie unaghan wo. Ta andaghadene mii shida lai ire.
21.3: Kunla tande asase, 'Ezhan hhelai injine.' giezhi kieliema, hhe kun deigo laighane."
21.4: Ene shiqin fashen giekushi Ezhan xienzhini tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien mutun gholughane giezho,
21.5: " Xiwun ni kunlade kielie. Uzhe, tai honshan tai hhende irewo. Hhe goyane meilade uzhezhi enzheghe unuzho. Unusanshi ga enzheghe wo."
21.6: Tujila echidene Ersa fenfulasan mutun giewo.
21.7: Hhela enzheghe, ga enzheghei lai ire goya jienlane enzheghe jiere daidene Ersa i unughawo.
21.8: Olon kunla jienlane mo jiere peizho. Psedu kunla mutun chalai chizhidene mo jiere peizho.
21.9: Melie khuinadu olon kunla waradazhi kieliezho, "Hesanna! Dawude ni houdeii doulandu! Ezhanni niereghala iresan hhei doulandu! Zui undudedu Hudai doulandu!"
21.10: Ersa Yelusalen de orose kunla man hunnerei daghazhi eneshi kien wo giezho.
21.11: Olon kunla kieliezho, "Eneshi Jialili yi Nasale ni xienzhi Ersa wo." Mechini Arughazho (Mak 11:15-19; Luj 19:45-48; Yah 2:13-22)
21.12: Ersa mechide orodene meimei giesan kunlai man tou khighawo. Baer arunzhasan kunlai shire, ghoghochen huisan kunlai bandoulai tungu unaghawo.
21.13: Hhelade kieliewo, "Mii giei onxian gieku gie giezhi urune giezhi jinwun jiere huaizho. Ta ghughei ho gholughazho!"
21.14: Mechi sudoro sugho, dogholonla Ersa i shida irese hhelai goudaghawo.
21.15: Fugie buwa, jinwun hanjiala Ersa ghaniraku shiqin giesei chanladene pse kesila mechi doura Hesanna! Dawude ni houdeii doulandu giezhi onghonosei sonosudene hende hokuzhi
21.16: Ersa de asawo, "Enezighan kesila kieliesei chi sonosuwoye?" Ersa kieliewo, "Sonosuwo. Jinwun jiere chi yeliwa, ga kesilai amanghala goyane doulaghawo giesei ta onshizhi ese daowu?"
21.17: Ingie hhelase likai giezhi chenshise khidene Bodani de echi nie xii souwo. Uhuago Mutunni Kharazho (Mak 11:12-14, 20-24)
21.19: Mo bienzide nie uhuago mutunyi chanlawo. Shidani echi nie uzhese mutun jiere lachen wine, alima uwo. Ersa mutunde, "Enedu khuinase chii jiere ibeizi alima ulie soune." giezhi kieliese uhuago mutun deigo gho fuguwo.
21.20: Tujila uzhedene ghudurezhi, "Uhuago mutun matugie deigo gho fuguwo." giezhi kieliezho.
21.21: Ersa kieliewo, "Bi tande shuhua kielieye, tande xianxin gieku bizhi inxin ulie giese bi uhuago mutun jiere giesei taye gie shidane, da ene ulade oronsene noidene haide bou giezhi kieliese boune.
21.22: Ta xianxin giedene xiahua giezhi onxian giese man ogine." Ersani Qienlini Asazho (Mak 11:27-33; Luj 20:1-8)
21.23: Ersa mechide orodene kunlade sughakude fugie buwa, bexinlai zhanlaola hhei shida ire kieliezho, "Chi yan qienlighala ene shiqinlai giezho? Kien chade ene qienlii ogizho?"
21.24: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Biye tande nie unqi asaye. Ta made kieliese biye yan qienlighala ene shiqinlai giesei tande kieliene.
21.25: Yaheiya i xili gieghaku qienli khalase irezho? Asimanse onu, kunlase wo?" Hhela goyalane shanlian giezhi kieliewo, "Matan asimanse wo giese, 'Ta yale hhei xianxin ulie giene.' giezhi hhe matande kieliene.
21.26: Kunlase wo giese matan bexinlase ayizho, hhela man Yaheiya shi xienzhi wo giezho."
21.27: Ingie Ersa de kieliewo, "Bijien ulie mejiene." Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Biye tande yan qienlighala ene shiqinlai giesei ulie kieliene." Ghua Kewonni Bilazho
