20.15: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Funi, chi yangiezhi wilazho? Kienyi ereizho?" Mereiyen Ersa i yenzi sagheisan kun wo giezhi asawo, "Gujiu, chi hhei noighazhi khala jiezhoshi made kielie. Bi agile echiye."
20.16: Ersa kieliewo, " Mereiyen !" Mereiyen ochiradene Xibolai kielienghala hhende kieliewo, "Laboni!" Labonii isishi 'loushi' wo.
20.17: Ersa kieliewo, "Chi mii bu barei. Bi da adane hhende ese khireizho. Chi echidene mii gaijiulade bi adane hhende khireine giezhi kielie. Hheshi tai adaye enbene, mii Huda wo, tai Hudaye enbene."
20.18: Modala ni Mereiyen echidene tujilade kieliewo, "Bi Ezhanyi chujieghewo!" Pse Ezhan hhende kieliesan kielienlai hhelade kieliewo. Tujiladene Chujiegheghazho (Mat 28:16-20; Mak 16:14-18; Luj 24:36-49)
20.19: Xinqini yen hhe uduni xienidei tujila hhantulasan oronde Yutai kunlase ayise wijienlane khazho. Ersa hhelai dunda ire beizhi kieliewo, "Ta pinnan onu?"
20.20: Ene kielienyi kieliesenu hhelade kha, leibane uzheghawo. Tujila Ezhanyi chanladene bayasuzho.
20.21: Ingie Ersa pse hhelade kieliewo, "Ta pinnan onu? Adami mii peisan mutun biye tai peine."
20.22: Ene kielienyi kieliedene hhelade nie feiliesenu kieliewo, "Ta Shenlinyi jienliendu.
20.23: Ta kienyi zuini mienliese kienyi zui widane, kienyi zuini ulie mienliese kienyi zui ulie widane." Domade Chujiegheghazho
20.24: 12 gie tuji dundadu Shongo giezhi urusan Doma Ersa irekudeni hhelare hhantu uwo.
20.25: Psedu tujila hhende kieliewo, "Bijien Ezhanyi chujieghewo!" Doma kieliewo, "Bi hhei kha jieredu ghadasan oronyini, leibade chujisan oronyini ulie uzhetula xianxin ulie giene."
20.26: Neimudu daodene hhei tujilani pse giedera hhantulazho. Doma ye hhelare hhantu wo. Wijienlai man khazhoma, Ersa iredene hhelai dunda beizhi kieliewo, "Ta pinnan onu?"
20.27: Ingie Doma de kieliewo, "Khaghurunne enende teizhi mii khai uzhe. Khane khizheghazhi mii leibai moizhi uzhe. Inxin bu gie, xianxin gie."
20.29: Ersa kieliewo, "Chi mii uzhedene xianxin gienu? Ese uzhedene xianxin giesan kunlade fuqi wine." Ene Shuni Muji
20.30: Ersa tujilai melie ene shu jiere uye jilasan ghudureqi da olon xienjighawoma,
20.31: enende jilasanlashi Ersa shi Hudai Kewon Mexiha bikui tai xianxin gieghane giezhi pse xianxin giedene hhei niereghala tande amin ireghane giezhi huaizho.

21.1: Ene shiqinse khuinashi Ersa Qibiliyahai bienzide tujiladene pse chujiegheghawo. Hhe matugie chujiegheghasei doura huaizho.
21.2: Ximun-Beduru , Shongo giezhi urusan Doma , Jialili ni Jiana kun Nadanye , Xibitai ni kewonla, pse ghua tuji enela man hhantu wo.
21.3: Ximun-Beduru hhelade kieliewo, "Bi zhaghasun bareile echine." Hhela kieliewo. "Bijienye chare hhantu yoye." Hhela khizhi echisenu chon jiere khiwo. Hhe xii hhela yama barei dazho.
21.4: Ogheine giekude Ersa haibienzide beizho. Tujila hheshi Ersa bikui ulie mejiene.
21.5: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Zhanlienla, ta zhaghasun bareiwoye?" Hhela kieliewo, "Uye."
21.6: Ersa kieliewo, "Ta onni chonni borun miende teima, zhaghasun barei shidane." Ingiese hhela onni chonyi borun miende teiwo. Zhaghasun texien olon, laizhi khizhe dazho.
21.7: Ersa oresan hhe nie tuji Beduru de kieliewo, "Hheshi Ezhan wo!" Hhe shihoude Beduru jien ese musizho. Ezhan wo giezhi nie sonosuse jienne pixilie hude jiuli bouwo.
21.8: Psedu tujila haibienzise gholo uwo, chabudu 100 mi wine. Chon jiere soudene nie on zhaghasunyi laizhi daozhewo.
21.9: Hhela bienzide khisenu nie duizi mutan khan chujieghewo. Khan jiere zhaghasun teizho, ginanye wine.
21.10: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ta jian bareisan zhaghasunsene giedun agi daozhe."
21.11: Ximun-Beduru chon shida echidene onni laizhi bienzide khizheghawo. Onde fugie zhaghasun duruzho, 153 gie wine. Ingieliuzhe on ese tanturazho.
21.12: Ersa kieliewo, "Ta yushe ijiele irendu." Tujila hheshi Ezhan bikui mejiedene chishi kien wo giezhi kiema asa dazho.
21.13: Ersa ginanyi bareizhi hhelade ogiwo. Zhaghasunyiye ingiezhi hhelade ogiwo.
21.14: Eneshi Ersa fugusan kun dundase aminne olusenu tujiladene 3 hui chujiegheghasan wo. Bedurude Asazho
21.15: Hhela yushe ijiedene Ersa Ximun-Beduru de asawo, " Yaheiya ni kewon Ximun , chi made oresan enelase hen onu?" Beduru kieliewo, "Ezhan, bi chade oresei chi mejiene." Ersa kieliewo, "Chi mii ga ghonilai chezhe."
21.16: Ersa 2 hui hhende asawo, " Yaheiya ni kewon Ximun , chi made orezhoye?" Beduru kieliewo, "Ezhan, bi chade oresei chi mejiene." Ersa kieliewo, "Chi mii ghonilai adula."
21.17: Ersa hhende 3 hui asawo, " Yaheiya ni kewon Ximun , chi made orezhoye?" Ersa Beduru de 3 hui orezhoye giezhi asase Beduru nango giezhi Ersa de kieliewo, "Ezhan, chi yanniliuzhe mejiene. Bi chade oresei chi mejiene." Ersa kieliewo, "Chi mii ghonilai chezhe.
21.18: Bi chade shuhuajia kielieye, chi nasuchighan bikude yodaine banlazhi khalabi khala echinema, oqioluse kunla chii khai banlazhi chi duran wiku oronde deila echine."
21.19: Ersa ene kielienyi kieliekushi Beduru matugie fuguzhi Hudai kuaikui kieliezho. Ene kielienyi kieliesenu hhende kieliewo, "Chi mii dagha." Ersa Oresan Tujighalane
21.20: Beduru ochira daozhese Ersa oresan hhe tuji daghasei chujieghewo. Ene tujishi heifan ijiekude Ersa i kanzii shighazhi, "Ezhan, chii ghudandukushi kien wo?" giezhi asasan hhe wo.
21.21: Beduru hhei chujieghedene Ersa de asawo, "Ezhan, ene kun jianlai matui gholune?"
21.22: Ersa hhende kieliewo, "Bi hhei ulie fugughazhi bi pse ireku shihou oluliuzhe chare yan xiangan wo? Chi mini dagha."
21.23: Ene kielien gaijiulai chighinde echizhi "Hhe tuji ulie fugune." giezhi kieliezho. Shijishan Ersa "Hhe ulie fugune." giezhi ese kieliezho. "Bi hhei ulie fugughazhi bi pse ireku shihou oluliuzhe chare yan xiangan wo." giezhi kieliezho.
21.24: Ene kunshi ene shiqinlade ganzhen beizhi jilasan hhe tuji wo. Hhe beisan ganzhenshi zhenni bikui bijien mejiene.
21.25: Ersa giesan shiqinla da olon hen wo. Bi sumulase nienieji jilane giese huaisan shu olonde, duyadeliuzhe teizhi pudagha dane.

1.1: -2 Qiafeilo noyen, bi melieshiku shu jiere Ersa wilie giezhi qiisanse sunghusan shitulade Shenlinghala fenfulasenu asiman jiere khireiku hhe udu kurutula hhe giesan, surughasanlai man huaiwo.
1.3: Ersa ku shouidene olon zhenjighala goya aminne oluwo giezhi shitulade uzheghawo. 40 qien dunda shitulade xienjighazhi Hudai gojiai shiqinyi jianjizho.
1.4: Ersa hhelare hhantulakude fenfulazhi kieliewo, "Ta Yelusalen se likai bu giezhi bi tande kieliesan mutun Ada dain giesei saghei.
1.5: Yaheiya usughala xili gieghawoma, giedudu ulie beizhi tai Shenlinghala xili gieghane." Ersa Asiman Jiere Khireiwo
1.6: Hhela man hhantu bikude Ersa de asawo, "Ezhan, chi ene shihoude Isilie gojiani yen goudaghanu?"
1.7: Ersa hhelade kieliewo, "Ada qienlighalane jinjisan shihou, uduni ta mejiekuni pushoma,
1.8: Shenlin tai jiere bouzhese tande nenli irezhi ta Yelusalen , Yudaya , Samaliya , pse duyai uzhude kutula made ganzhen beine."
1.9: Ene kielienyi kielie baraghadene hhela uzheku shihoude asiman jiere khireiwo. Niegieda olien hhei jienlie echise chanla dawo.
1.10: Hhe khireikude hhela asiman jiere xianxide uzhese menzhali ghua chighan jien musisan kun hhelai kanzide beizhi kieliewo,
1.11: " Jialili kunla, ta yale beizhi asimanyi uzhene? Tanse likai giezhi asiman jiere khireisan Ersa , ta matugie uzhezhi khireighazhoshi yen qingiezhi irene." Maqiyani Shitu Sunghuwo
1.12: Ingiedene hhela Ganlanshan se Yelusalen de khareiwo. Ganlanshan Yelusalen se chada wo, hhamuraku udude yose olune.
1.13: Hhela chenshide orodene sousan lou jierene khireiwo. Hhende Beduru , Yaheiya , Yagebu , Andelie , Feili , Doma , Badolomai , Matai , Yalefei ni kewon Yagebu , Rexinpaini Ximun , Yagebu ni kewon Yuda enela wine.
1.14: Enezighan kunla, giedun bierei, Ersa ni anani Mereiyen , gaijiulareni hhantu hende onxian giezho.
1.15: Hhe oloncha chabudu 120 gie gaijiula hhantulakude Beduru bosizhedene kieliewo,
1.16: "Gaijiula, jinwun jiere Shenlin Dawude i amanghala melieshi kieliesan mutun Yuda kunlai uduruzhi Ersa i bareiku shiqin zhao hhe mutun gholuse indanji wo.
1.17: Hhe yenlaishi matanyi dundashiku nie wo. Shitula gieku wiliese ibufen zhanjizho.
1.18: Ene nie kun gou wiku baerghala nie ghazha agiwo. Ingie ghazhadene fura bou, kielini gha oluzhi khizhesunlani usuru khizhezho.
1.19: Yelusalen de sousan kunla ene shiqinni man mejiewo. Ingie goyalane kielienghala ghazhaini Yagedama giewo. Isishi chusun ghazha wo.
1.20: Enei Zeburei jiere ingiezhi kieliezho, 'Hhei sousan oronni honji gholuzhi kiemai ulie soughasejiu.' Pse kieliezho, 'Danie kunyi hhei oronde jinjighasejiu.'
1.21: -22 Ingiese Ezhan Ersa matanyi dunda giekude Yaheiya xili gieghasanse Ezhan matanse likai giezhi asiman jiere khitula matanre chan hhantu bisan kun dundase nie sunghuzhi Ersa fuho giesande ganzhen beighakui wo."
1.23: Ingiedene hhela sunghune giezhi ghua kunyi khizheghawo. Nieshi Yusufu wo. Hhei Basaba ye giene, Yushidu giezhiye uruzho. Da nieshi Maqiya wo.
1.24: -25 Hhela onxian giezhi kieliewo, "Ezhan, chi kunlai zhughei man mejiene. Chi ene ghua kunse kienyi sunghuzhi ene shituni wiliei giekui bijiende mejiegha. Yuda ene wiliei bendadene goya orondene echiwo."
1.26: Ingie hhela fendan qiangudene Maqiya ni choui khizhewo. Hhei 11 gie shitulare hhantulaghawo.

2.1: 50 qienni jieqi kuzhese hhela man nie oronde hhantulazho.
2.2: Menzhali asiman jierese fugie kei feiliesan mutun nie xianshen bouzhezhi hhela sousan giedera duruwo.
2.3: Pse khanni hoyen mutun khizhedene jien kunyi jiere luiwo.
2.4: Ingie hhelai jiere Shenlin durudene Shenlin ogisan nenlighala psedu kielienghala kielie qiiwo.
2.5: Hhe xienzide xienliantu Yutai kunla shijieni go gojiase irezhi Yelusalen de souzho.
2.6: Ene shenqi khizhese olon kunla man hhantuladene goya oronyi kielienyi sonosuse ghudure wo giezho.
2.7: Hhela hende ghanirazhi kieliewo, "Uzhe, ene kielien kieliesanlashi Jialili kun pushonu?
2.8: Matan chenliese hhela matugie mai olusan oronyi kielienghala kieliezho?
2.9: Mai dunda Paqiya , Madai , Ilan kun wine. Pse Meisobudamiya , Yudaya , Jiapadojia , Bendu , Yaxiya ,
2.10: Fulijia , Panfeiliya , Aiji dedu kun, Gulinai ni kouisan Libiya i idou oronni kunlaye wine. Da Loma se irezhi toreisan kun dunda
2.11: Yutai kun, Yutaijioni suisan kun wine. Pse Kelite , Alabo kunye wine. Matan sonosuse hhela mai kielienghala Hudai fugie shiqinyi kieliezho."
2.12: Kunla man ghanirazhi mejie dazhi nieniedene, "Eneshi yan isi wo?" giezhi asazho.
2.13: Niezhan kunla hhelai xiniezhi hhela jiu ochi sudowo giezho. Beduru Kunlade Jianjizho
2.14: Beduru 11 gie shitulare bosi ire kunlade fugiede kieliewo, " Yutai kun, Yelusalen de sousan kunla, bi kieliesei goude chenliezhi mejiendu.
2.15: Ta sumulase enezighan kunla sudowo giezhou? Uye sudozho, eneshi eqiemaghaku 9 jien wo.
2.16: Eneshi zhen xienzhi Yeer kieliezhi daosan wo,
2.17: 'Huda kieliewo, Duya baraku xienzide bi Shenlinne jien kunlai jiere kiene. Tai kewon, oqinla mini kielienyi kieliene. Tai nasuchighan kunla zhoujin mutun chanlane. Tai oqio kunla zhoujin zhoujiliene.
2.18: Hhe xienzi kuzhese bi Shenlinne ere kun, bierei hojilane jiere kiese hhela mini kielienyi kunlade kieliene.
2.19: Asiman jiere bi fugie shiqin xienjighane. Zemin jiere chusun, khan, funighala ghudureqi xienjighane.
2.20: Ezhanni fugie famatu udu kuzhetula naran kharalane, sara chusun mutun hularane.
2.21: Ingiese Ezhanyi xiahua giesan kunlai man jiuine.'"
2.22: " Isilie kunla, ene kielienyi chenliendu. Huda Nasale kun Ersa i tungo giezhi tai dunda nenlitu shiqin, fugie shiqin, ghudureqi xienjighadene Ersa de ganzhen beizho. Enei ta goyalane mejiene.
2.23: Huda zhao goyane isighala melieshi jihua giesan mutun Ersa i jiuizhi ogiwo. Ta niman doghun kunlai tungo giezhi hhei shizijia jiere ghada alawo.
2.24: Ingieliuzhe Huda hhei fuguku nangoni widaghazhi aminne olughawo. Fuguku hhei hanshilie dazho.
2.25: Dawude hhei zhiizhi kieliewo, 'Bi chanlase Ezhan chan mii shida wo. Hhe mii borun miende beise bi ulie gojiolune.
2.26: Ingiese zhughedemi bayasuzhi amandemi doulakui wine. Made xiwon wine, bi hhamura shidane.
2.27: Chi mii ruhherni dozode ulie bendane. Zhiguitu kunne ulie fughane.
2.28: Chi aminni moni made uzheghawo. Chighala hhantushi bi hende bayasuzho.'"
2.29: "Gaijiula, famatu xienren Dawude ni shiqinyi bi tande minminji kielieye. Hhe duya ijiezhi bulawo. Hhei meza edeliuzhe mai enende wine.
2.30: Hheshi nie xienzhi wo. Huda hhende dadu giezhi hhei houdeise nie kun sunghudene hhei baozo jiere soughane giezhi kieliesei mejiewo.
2.31: Hhe melieshidase ene shiqinyi mejiezhi Mexiha fuho giekui kieliewo, 'Hhei dozode ese bendawo, beyeini ese fughawo.'
2.32: Ene nie Ersa i Huda aminne olughawo. Bijien man ene shiqinde ganzhen beine.
2.33: Huda hhei undudaghazhi borun miendene soughawo. Ada dain giesan Shenlinni hhe jienliedene kie bouzheghawo. Eneshi ta chujieghezhi sonosusan wo.
2.34: -35 Dawude asiman jiere ese khireiwoma, goyane kieliezho, 'Ezhan mii Ezhande kieliewo, "Bi duitoulaichii kon dourachii teitula chi mini borun miende sou."'
2.36: Ingiese Isilie kunla, man mejiendu. Ta shizijia jiere ghadasan ene Ersa ni Huda Ezhan, yeshijiu Mexiha gholughawo."
2.37: Kunla ene kielienyi chenliedene zhughedeni hende jindazhi Beduru de, psedu shitulade asazho, "Gaijiula, bijien matugiene?"
2.38: Beduru kieliewo, "Ta man geizhen giendu. Ersa Mexihai niereghala xilii jienliedene tai zuini mienlie gie. Ingiese Huda ogine giesan Shenlinni ta jienliene.
2.39: Ene dainshi tande, tai kesilade, pse Ezhan mai Huda gholodose uruzhi iresan kunlade man olusan wo."
2.40: Beduru pse olon kielienghala, "Ta ene idai doghun kunlai dundase goyalane jiuizhi khizhe!" giezhi ganzhen beizhi hhelade hende surughazhi kieliewo.
2.41: Hhei kielienyi xianxin giesan kunla xili jienliewo. Hhe niudude xianxin giesan kun chabudu 3000 olodowo.
2.42: Hhela zhomen shitula sughasanyi chenliezhi laiwon giezhi ginan ghuluzhi onxian gienduzho. Xianxin Giesan Kunla Laiwon Giezho
2.43: Shitula olon fugie shiqin, ghudureqi xienjighase kunla man ayizho.
2.44: Xianxin giesan kunla hhantulazhi yan dunxiiliuzhe hhantu injizho.
2.45: Hhela giene dunxi, jiachanlane huidene baer injine giesan kunlade ghughazhi ogizho.
2.46: Niudunie mechide hhantulazho. Pse gieladene ginan ghuluzhi bayasuzhi heqide ijienduzho.
2.47: Hudade doulazho. Olon kunla hhelai kuaizho. Ezhan yebeiseye kun olon jiuizho.

3.1: Niudude xiawu 3 jienni onxian gieku shihoude Beduru Yaheiya ghala mechide echiwo.
3.2: Niekozi kun olusanse dogholon wo. Niudunie kunla qienliezhi mechii wijien konde teizhi wijiense orochen kunlase xiahua giezhi baer ghuizho. Hhe wijienyi nierei Seighan wijien giene.
3.3: Hhe kun Beduru , Yaheiya ghala orokui chanladene xiahua giezhi baer kerezho.
3.4: Beduru , Yaheiya ghala hhei xianxide uzhedene Beduru kieliewo, "Chi bijienyi uzhe."
3.5: Hhe kun hhelai xianxide uzhezhi sumulase yama kerene giezho.
3.6: Beduru kieliewo, "Made antan, miengu uwoma, bikune chade ogiye. Bi Nasale kun Ersa Mexihai niereghala kielieye, 'Chi bosidene yo!'"
3.7: Ingiedene hhei borun khase feizhi bosizheghawo. Hhei gugieni, konni deigo goudazhi lilian orowo.
3.8: Jiuli bosi ire, beidene yo qiiwo. Hhelare hhantu mechide orokude yozho, jiulizho, Hudade doulazho.
3.9: Kunla hhe yozhi Hudade doulasanyi chanlawo.
3.10: Hheshi mechini Seighan wijien konde sousan ghuichen bikuni mejiedene hhe goudasan shiqinde ghaniradei uzhe beizho. Beduru Sulumaneni Zoulan Doura Jianjizho
3.11: Hhe kun Beduru , Yaheiya ghalai barei beikude olon kunla holuzhi hhende ire ghanirawo. Hheshi zhen Sulumane ni zoulan doura wo.
3.12: Beduru chanladene bexinlade kieliewo, " Isilie kunla, ta yale ene shiqinde ghanirazho? Ta bijienyi yangiezhi uzhezho? Ta sumulase bijien goya nenli, xienliantu zhugheghalane ene kunyi yoghawo giezhou?
3.13: Iburaheimu , Isaghei , Yagebu i Huda, mai xienrenlai Huda goya hoji Ersa i kuaizho. Ene Ersa shi ta Bilado de jiuizhi ogidene Bilado jiejin giezhi hhei andaghane giese ta fandui giesan hhe wo.
3.14: Ta zhiguitu, gou kunyi ulie keredene kun alasan kunyi andagha giezhi xiahua giewo.
3.15: Ta alasanshi aminni Ezhan wo. Huda hhei fugusan kun dundase aminne olughawo. Bijien ene shiqinde ganzhen beine.
3.16: Ta tanizhi chanlasan ene kunde Ersa i niere lilian oroghawo. Ersa i xianxin gieku xinyanghala ene kunyi tai melie qienbu goudaghawo.
3.17: Gaijiula, ta noyenlane mutun mejie dazhi qingiezhi giesei bi mejiene.
3.18: Huda eqighanse jien xienzhilani tungo giezhi Mexiha shouku giekui kieliewo. Ede qimutui gholuwo.
3.19: Ingiese ta geizhen giezhi Hudai miende khareizhi irendu. Tai zuini widaghane.
3.20: Ingiese futanni shihou Ezhanyi hhense irene. Huda eqighanse jinjisan Mexihai tande oluzhi ireghane. Hheshijiu Ersa wo.
3.21: Zhen Huda eqighandei zhiguitu xienzhilane tungo giezhi kieliesan mutun duyani cunxin goudaghaku shihou olutula Ersa Mexiha bixi asiman jiere feiliene.
3.22: Musa kieliezhi Ezhan Huda tai dundase bi mutun nie xienzhi khizheghane. Hhe yan kieliese ta man chenliendu.
3.23: Kien ene xienzhii kielienyi ulie chenliese Huda bexinlane dundase widaghane giezho.
3.24: Samuer se kaishi giezhi hhei khuinadedu alinie xienzhiliuzhe ene udulani shiqinyi kieliezhi daowo.
3.25: Tashi hhe xienzhilai houdei wo. Huda tai xienrenlade yenjisan kielienni taye jienliewo. Huda Iburaheimu de ingie kielie goudaghazho, 'Zemin jieredu soyuji minzulade chii houdeini yenyinzhe fuqi irene.'
3.26: Huda hojine bosizheghadene peizhi xien tande iregha, tai alinie kunniliuzhe doghunnilase likai gieghazhi tande fuqi ogiwo."

4.1: Beduru Yaheiya ghala kunlade kielien kieliekude buwala, mechii sagheisan duizhan, Sadugai kunla iredene
4.2: hhela bexinlade Ersa i tungo giezhi fugusan kun fuho giesei surughazhi chonjise hende hokuzho.
4.3: Ingie hhelai barei agi, khara oluse khadene khuichudu kuwo.
4.4: Ingieliuzhe hhela jianjisan kielienni chenliedene xianxin giesan kun olon wo. Xianxin giesan ere kun 5000 gholuwo.
4.5: Khuichudu Yutai kunni noyen, zhanlao, jinwun hanjiala man Yelusalen de hhantulawo.
4.6: Zui fugie buwa Yanasi , Gaiyafa , Yaheiya , Yalishanda , pse zui fugie buwani jiawuni kunla man hhende wine.
4.7: Hhela Beduru , Yaheiya ghalai dunda beighadene asawo, "Ta kienyi nenli, niereghala ene shiqinyi giezho?"
4.8: Qingiekude Beduru de Shenlin duruzhi hhelade kieliewo, "Bexinlai noyen, zhanlaolaya,
4.9: ta enedu ene dogholonyi jiere bijien giesan gou shiqin, pse hhe matugie goudasei bijiende asazhoshi
4.10: ta ashighala, Isilie ni bexinla man mejiendu. Tai melie beizhi goudasan ene kunshi ta shizijia jiere ghadadene Huda fugusan kun dundase aminne olughasan Nasale kun Ersa Mexihani niereghala goudaghasan wo.
4.11: Ene Ersa shi jinwunde ingiezhi kieliesan hhe wo, 'Ta jianrenla bendasan tashi ede giei zhunyo tashi gholuwo.'
4.12: Ersa se chugo pse jiuichen uwo. Qienxiade matanyi jiuiku psedu nierei ese ogizho."
4.13: Hhela Beduru , Yaheiya ghuala fugie danzighala kieliesei uzhewo. Hhelade yama unhua wikui mejiedene ghanirawo. Pse ene ghua kunshi Ersa re hhantuku wo giezho.
4.14: Hhe goudasan kun hhelare hhantu beisanyi chanladene hhelade yama kielieku kielien widawo.
4.15: Ingie Beduru Yaheiya i zui fugie fayense khireigha giezhi fenfuladene goyalane shanlian giezhi kieliewo.
4.16: "Matan ene ghua kunyi matugiene? Hhela nie ghudureqi xienjighawo, jien Yelusalen de sousan kunla man mejiene. Matan uwo giezhi kielie danema,
4.17: ene shiqin bexinlai dunda fugiedakuse ayizhi matan hhelai nie ayighaye. Ene kunyi niereghala pse bu chonji gie."
4.18: Ingie hhe ghualai uruzhi ire, Ersa ni niereghala kunlade pse bu jianji, ye bu surugha giewo.
4.19: Beduru Yaheiya ghala kieliewo, "Tai kieliei chenlie, Hudai kieliei ulie chenliese, Hudai melie heshi winu uwo? Ta goyalane sumula.
4.20: Bijien chujieghezhi sonosusanne ulie kieliezhi ulie olune."
4.21: Noyenla hhelade yama faikui jiekou ereizhi khizhe dawo. Pse bexinla ene fashen giesan shiqin jiere Hudai kuaise hhe ghualai hende nie ayigha andaghawo.
4.22: Yenlai ene ghudureqighala goudaghasan kun 40 ji olune. Tujila Danzii Fugiedagha Giezhi Onxian Giezho
4.23: Beduru Yaheiya ghalai andaghadene hhela goya kunlane hhende echiwo. Fugie buwa, zhanlaolai kieliesan kielienyi goya kunladene kieliewo.
4.24: Hhela chenliedene Hudade nie zhugheghala fugiede kieliewo, "Asiman, zemin, hai, pse hhei sudorodu shihenilai man zhayaghazhi gonjisan Ezhan,
4.25: chi Shenlinyi tungo giezhi goya hojine, bijienyi xienren Dawude ni amanghala ingiezhi kieliewo, 'Go gojiala yale nouine? Go minzula yale oronde wikui jihua giene?
4.26: Duyai honshanla bosizhewo. Noyenla hhantulazho. Ezhanse, Ezhanni Mexihase fandui giene giezho.'
4.27: Hherode , Benjiu-Bilado ghuala ene chenshide niman kun, Isilie kunlare hhantuladene chi sunghu goudaghasan zhiguitu hoji Ersa i qingiezhi fandui giezho.
4.28: Hhela giesanlashi man chii nenli, isighala eqighan jiejin giesan shiqin wo.
4.29: Ezhan, hhela ede bijienyi ayighasei chi nie uzhe. Hojiladene fugie danzi ogizhi chii kielienni kieliegha.
4.30: Chi nenline xienjighazhi gienlai goudagha. Chii zhiguitu hoji Ersa i niereghala ghudureqi, fugie shiqin xienjigha."
4.31: Hhela onxian gie baluse hhantulasan oron gojiolu qii, hhelade man Shenlin duruzhi danzine fugiedagha, Hudai kielienni kielie qiiwo. Yan Dunxiiliuzhe Hhantu Injizho
4.32: Xianxin giesan kunla zhughede, sumulasanla man nie wo. Kienliuzhe eneshi goyanughun wo ulie giene, man hhantu injizho.
4.33: Shitula fugie nenlighala Ezhan Ersa fuho giesande ganzhen beizho. Ingiese kunlade Hudai fugie nenjien irewo.
4.34: Hhelai dunda kiemade yama ese chaizho. Hhela ghazha, gielane huisan baerni agizhi iredene
4.35: shitulani melie jiese shitula zhao kunla injiku mutun ghughazhi ogiwo.
4.36: Nie Liwi kunyi nierei Yusufu giene. Saipulusi de oluzho. Shitula hhei Banaba giezhi uruzho, isishi kunlade goude sughazhi kieliechen wo.
4.37: Hhe ghazhalane huidene baerni agizhi ire shitulai melie jiewo.

5.1: Da nie kunyi nierei Yananiya giene. Biereiini Safeila giene. Ghuala ghazhane huidene
5.2: baerse ghulazhi goyadene gouji feiliegha, psedulai shitulai melie jiewo. Enei biereiniye mejiene.
5.3: Beduru kieliewo, " Yananiya , yale chii zhughede Ibilisi duruzhi Shenlinyi piendane? Ghazhane huisan baerni yale goujinie feilieghawo?
5.4: Ghazhane uye huikude ghazhashi chinughun pushonu? Ede huise baerne chi zozhu giezhola? Chi yale intui giezho? Chi kunni ese piendazho. Hudai piendazho."
5.5: Yananiya ene kielienyi chenliedene fura bou, ho sirawo. Chenliesan kunla man hende ayizho.
5.6: Giedun nasuchighan kunla bosi ire, hhei boui goudaghadene qienlie khirei bulawo.
5.7: Ghuran zhuntou daose biereini irewo. Ene shiqinni dou ulie mejiene.
5.8: Beduru hhende asawo, "Chi made kielie, ta ghazha huisan baershi enezighan onu?" "Jiu enezighan wo."
5.9: Beduru kieliewo, "Ta ghuala yale hhantulazhi Ezhanni ruhherni shiine? Zhanguijii chii bulasan kunla ede wijien konde irewo, chiiye qienlie khighane."
5.10: Ingie hhe bierei deigo Beduru i kon konde fura bou, ho sirawo. Hhe nasuchighan kunla oro ire fuguseini chanladene, qienlie echi zhanguijiini kanzide bulawo.
5.11: Jien jiohuini kunla, pse ene shiqinyi chenliesan kunla man hende ayizho. Shitula Ghudureqi Xienjighazho
5.12: Ezhan shitulai tungo giezhi bexinlai dunda ghudureqi, fugie shiqin olon giewo. Xianxin giesan kunla Sulumane zoulande heqide man hhantulazho.
5.13: Bexinla man hhelai zanchen giezhoma, kunlase ayizhi hhelare hhantula dazho.
5.14: Ezhanyi xianxin giesan ere kun, biereila yebeiseye olodozho.
5.15: Niezhan kunla da gientulai qienliezhi geidoude khirei chon, ruzi jiere jiezho. Sumulase Beduru yozhi daokude xiujieniliuzhe hhelai jiere kuse giezho.
5.16: Pse Yelusalen zhouwini xianlase olon kunla gientu, zannan ruhher heisanlai uduru ire man goudaghawo. Shitulai Biizho
5.17: Zui fugie buwa, hhei lienshoulani Sadugai kunla hende dubiliedene
5.19: Xienidei Ezhanyi qienxien bafanzi wijienyi niezhi hhelai uduru khizhegha kieliewo,
5.20: "Ta mechide echidene ene amin ogiku daolii bexinlade man kielie."
5.21: Ingiese shitula ene kielienyi chenliedene ogheikude mechide echizhi kunlade sughazho. Zui fugie buwa, lienshoularene kuzhedene zui fugie fayenni kun, Isilie ni zhanlaolai uruzhi irewo. Kun peizhi bafanzise shitulai lai iregha giezho.
5.22: Mechini sagheisan kunla bafanzide echise kun nieda uwo. Ingie khareizhi ire kieliewo,
5.23: "Bijien echise bafanzi wijien yama ese giezho. Sagheisan kun wijien ghadane wo. Wijienyi niese sudoro kun nieda uwo."
5.24: Mechini sagheisan duizhan, fugie buwa ene kielienyi chenliedene ghanirazhi matugie imutui gholuwo giezho.
5.25: Nie kun iredene kieliewo, "Ta bafanzide bareisan kunla ede mechide beidene bexinlade sughazho."
5.26: Ingie duizhan mechini sagheisan kunlai uduruzhi shitulai barei irewo. Bexinla hhelai tashighala eghikuse ayizhi khidunde ese giezho.
5.27: Hhela shitulai barei ire zui fugie fayen sudoro beigha zui fugie buwa hhelade asazho,
5.28: "Bijien tande hende jingao giezhi ene kunyi niereghala kunlai bu surugha giezhi kieliewo. Ta daoline nie Yelusalen de kielie kurughadene dou alasan ene kunni chusunni zhanni bijienyi jiere beilieghane."
5.29: Beduru , pse shitula kieliewo, "Hudai shunjizhi kunyi ulie shunjise indanji wo.
5.30: Mai xienrenni Huda ta mutun jiere guaidene alasan Ersa i aminne olughawo.
5.31: Huda hhei undudaghazhi borun miendene khighawo. Hhei honshan, jiuichen danlaghazhi Isilie kunni geizhen gieghazhi zuini mienliene giezho.
5.32: Bijien ene shiqinlade ganzhen beine. Hudai shunjisan kunlade ogisan Shenlinye ganzhen beine."
5.33: Zui fugie fayenni kunla enei chenliedene hende hokuzhi hhelai alane giezho.
5.34: Nie Falisai kunyi niereini Jiamalie giene. Hheshi nie jinwun loushi wo, kunla man hhei zunjine. Zui fugie fayende bosi ire kunlade fenfulazhi shitulai ghadane niecha khireigha giewo.
5.35: Ingie kunlade kieliewo, " Isilie kunla, ta ene kunlai xioxin giezhi chuli gie.
5.36: Eqighandei Duda bosi ire goyane fugie wo giezho. Hhei daghasan kun 400 wine. Hhei alasenu daghasan kunlai man sanda widazhi yama widawo.
5.37: Hhense khuinashi hukou denji giekude Jialili ni Yuda bexinlai yela giezhi goyane daghaghawoma, hhe fuguse daghasan kunla man sanda widawo.
5.38: Ede bi tande kielieye, ta ene kunlase gholodo. Hhelai bu gonji. Hhelai jihua, giesanlashi kunse irese widane.
5.39: Hudase iresan enbese ta hhelai widagha dane. Ta kenen Hudare duitou gholune." Zui fugie fayenni kunla hhei kieliei shunjidene
5.40: shitulai uru ire idun eghidene Ersa i niereghala bu kielie gie andaghawo.
5.41: Shitula Ersa i nierede oluzhi jiuren giese pei shidane giezhi hende bayasudene zui fugie fayense likai giewo.
5.42: Hhela niudunie mechide, go gielade ese beidene Ersa shi Mexiha wo giezhi kunlade sughazhi gouxioxini chonjizho.

6.1: Hhe oloncha tuji niudunie olodozho. Niudunieku shenhofei ogiku shiqin jiere Xila kielien kieliechen Yutai i guafulai jiezho. Ingiese hhela Xibolai kielien kieliechen Yutai kunlade boxin kieliezho.
6.2: Ingie 12 gie shitu olon tujilai uru ire kieliewo, "Matan Hudai kielienyi chonjikui bendazhi jiedene ijiekui gonjise heshi uwo.
6.3: Gaijiula, tai dundase gou minshentu, Shenlin duruzhi agheli olontu dolon ere kunyi sunghuzhi ene shiqinlai gonjighaye.
6.4: Ingiese matan zhomen onxian giezhi pse Hudai kieliende giene."
6.5: Kunla man ene kielienyi zanchen giedene Siqifan , Feili , Bologelo , Nijiano , Qimun , Bamina , pse Yutaijiode suisan Anqiya kun Nigela i sunghuwo. Siqifan xianxin giesan gou wo, Shenlinye duruzho.
6.6: Enelai shitulai melie beighase shitula onxian giezhi hhelai jiere khane teiwo.
6.7: Hudai kielien ondazhi Yelusalen de tujila zhenzhen olodozho. Tebie olon buwalaye ene xinyanni shunjizho. Siqifanni Bareizho
6.8: Siqifan de Hudai nenjien, nenli olonshi kunlai dunda fugie shiqin, ghudureqi giezho.
6.9: Ingiese Ziyutu kunla giezhi urusan huitanni giedun kun bosi ire Siqifan ghala jianjinduwo. Enelashi Gulinai , Yalishanda , Jilijia , Yaxiya gochuse irezho.
6.10: Siqifan agheli, Shenlinyi kouizhi kielien kieliese hhela dui dane.
6.11: Ingie kunlai baerghala agidene kielieghawo, "Bijien chenliese Siqifan Musa , Hudaghalai sugiezho."
6.12: Hhela bexin, zhanlao, jinwun hanjialai shanjizhi Siqifan yi hhende echighase barei zui fugie fayende irewo.
6.13: Hhela pse jia ganzhen beisan kunlai uru ire kielieghawo, "Ene kun zhiguitu oronji Musa ni guijinni sugiezhi ese beizho.
6.14: Bijien chenliese hhe kieliezhi Nasale kun Ersa mechii furaghane, pse Musa matande ogisan guijinni geighane giezho."
6.15: Zui fugie fayende sousan kunla man Siqifan ni xianxide uzhese ungieni qienxienni ungiei xianli.

7.1: Zui fugie buwa Siqifan de asawo, "Intu shiqin winu?"
7.2: Siqifan kieliewo, "Oqio kun, gaijiula, ta chenliendu. Matai xienren Iburaheimu Halan de soutula Meisobudamiya de bikude famatu Huda hhende xienjighadene kieliewo,
7.3: 'Chi goya oron, jiawusene likai giezhi bi chade uzheghaku oronde echi.'"
7.4: "Ingie hhe Jialeji kunlai oronse likai giedene Halan de souwo. Hhei adani fugudene Huda hhei banjighazhi ta ede sousan ene oronde ireghawo.
7.5: Ene oronde Huda hhende yama jiachan, lien beiku oronye uye ogiwoma, Huda kielien yenjizhi ene oronyi hhende, hhei houdeide ogizhi caichan gie giewo. Hhe shihoude hhende kewosi uwo.
7.6: Ingiese Huda kieliewo, 'Houdeichii kunlai oronde souzhi hoji danlazhi 400 nien zayalane.'
7.7: Pse kieliewo, 'Hhelai hoji danlaghasan gojiani bi panjine. Khuinashi hhela khizhedene ene oronde mii shunjine.'
7.8: Ingiedene Huda Iburaheimu de hetoune giekughala kielien yenjiwo. Iburaheimu de Isaghei ni oluzhi neimudude hetoune giewo. Isaghei de Yagebu ni oluwo, Yagebu de mai 12 gie famatu xienrenlai oluwo."
7.9: "Ene famatu xienrenla Yusufu jiuni dubiliedene Aiji de huiwo. Ingieliuzhe Huda hheghala hhantushi
7.10: hhei yan kunnanseliuzhe khizheghawo. Huda hhende nenjien, agheli ogise Aiji ni Falao honshan hhei uzhedan gou wo. Falao hhei Aiji de zui fugie noyen danlaghazhi giene man gonjighawo."
7.11: "Ingiedene Aiji , Jianan de honnien kuzhezhi zeinan irewo. Mai xienrenlade taran sirawo.
7.12: Yagebu sonosuse Aiji de taran wine. Ingie mai xienrenlani peizhi tou 1 hui hhende echighawo.
7.13: 2 huide echise Yusufu gaijiuladene tanighawo. Ingiese Falao hhei gieni qinkonyi mejiewo.
7.14: Yusufu kun peizhi adane nie gie kunyi jienlieghale echiwo. Man 75 gie kun wo.
7.15: Ingie Yagebu Aiji de bouzhewo. Khuinashi Yagebu , mai xienrenla man hhende duya ijiewo.
7.16: Hhelai laizhi Shijien de echi Iburaheimu Hamo ni houdeilase miengughala agisan mezade bulawo."
7.17: "Huda Iburaheimu de yenjisan kielien kuzhekude Aiji de Isilie kunla hende olodowo.
7.18: Khuinashi Yusufu i tani dachen nie shini honshan khizhezhi Aiji ni gonjizho.
7.19: Hhe mai kunlai heizhi xienrenlai mai zayalazho. Hhelai biizhi yeliwalai bendaghazhi aminne ese olughazho."
7.20: "Hhe shihoude Musa ni oluwo. Hudai melie hhe uzhezhi seighan wo. Hhei adaini giede ghuran sara qiezhedene
7.21: bendase Falao i oqin kewonni giedene qiezhe fugiedaghawo.
7.22: Musa Aiji kunlai unhuani man suruwo. Kielien kielie, shiqin giese nenli wine."
7.23: " Musa 40 olukude goya Isilie kunlane uzhele echine giezhi jiejin giewo.
7.24: Niefade hhe echikude nie Aiji kun nie Isilie kunyi qifulasanyi chanlasenu hhe Aiji kunyi alazhi hhe kunde bouchou giewo.
7.25: Hhe sumulase Huda hhei tungo giezhi goya kunlai jiuikui mejiemu giezhoma, hhela mejie dazho.
7.26: Khuichudu Musa chanlase Isilie kunla eghinduzho. Hhelai sidaghazhi kieliewo, 'Gujiu, tashi gaijiula wo, yale nieniene qifulane?'"
7.27: "Giebeine qifulasan kun Musa i tungu daogha kieliewo, 'Kien chii bijiende lindao, panjichen kun danlaghawo?
7.28: Chi uchughudu hhe Aiji kunyi alaku mutun mii alanu?'
7.29: Musa ene kielienyi chenliedene Aiji se ghula holu Mijien de toreisan mutun souwo. Hhe oronde hhende ghua kewon oluwo."
7.30: "40 nien daose Xinaishan hontande nie qienxien siderasan eghesun dunda Musa de chanlaghawo.
7.31: Musa zhoujin mutunyi chanladene ghanirazhi melie daozhi uzhene giekude Ezhanyi shenqii sonosuwo,
7.32: 'Bishi chii xienrenlai Huda wo. Iburaheimu , Isaghei , Yagebu ni Huda wo.' Musa chenliesenu pugharadene ayizhi uzhe dazho.
7.33: Ezhan hhende kieliewo, 'Chi kon jieredu maheine tei. Chi beisan oronshi zhiguitu oron wo.
7.34: Mii bexinlai Aiji de zayalasanyi bi qinchude chanlawo. Hhela shonholosan shenqiiye sonosuwo. Bi hhelai jiuile bouzhewo. Ede ire, bi chii peizhi Aiji de echighane.'"
7.35: "Eneshi bexinla kien chii bijiende lindao, panjichen kun danlaghawo giezhi fandui giesan Musa wo. Ingieliuzhe Huda siderasan eghesun dunda qienxienyi tungo giezhi hhei peidene bexinlade noyen, jiuichen danlaghawo.
7.36: Musa Aiji , Hunhai , hontande 40 nien olon fugie shiqin, ghudureqi giezhi bexinlai Aiji se uduru khizhewo."
7.37: "Eneshijiu Isilie kunlade 'Huda tai dundase bi mutun nie xienzhi khizheghane.' giezhi kieliesan hhe Musa wo.
7.38: Ene Musa hontandedu Isilie kunlare hhantu wo. Mai xienrenghala hhantu Xinaishan jiere hhende kielien kieliesan qienxienyi tungo giezhi amin ogiku kielienyi jienliedene matande chonjizhi ogiwo."
7.39: "Mai xienrenla hhei kielienyi ese chenliedene hhei tungu daoghazhi Aiji de khareiku duralazho.
7.40: Hhela Hharune de kieliewo, 'Bijiende mo uduruku nigiedalani gie. Bijienyi Aiji se uduru khizhesan Musa yan shiqin penji woshi bijien ulie mejiene.'
7.41: Ingie hhe shihoude hhela nie fughe giedene hhe nigiedade mure khughozhi goya khaghalane giesanlade beiizhi bayasunduzho.
7.42: Ingiese Huda hhelase likai giedene hhela asiman jieredu naran, sara, hodunlai beiise uye gonjizho. Zhen xienzhii shu jiere huaisan mutun, ' Isilie kunla, ta hontande 40 nien dunda zharusan ghoni fugheji pse ogisan mureshi made giesan pusho.
7.43: Ta qienliesanshi Molo nigiedani zhanfan wo, Lifan nigiedani hodun wo. Enelashi ta goyala beiine giezhi giesan nigiedala wo. Ingiese bi tai touzhi Babilun ghadane khighane.'"
7.44: "Mai xienrenla hontande bikude ganzhen beiku zhanfan wine. Hheshi Huda Musa de fenfuladene uzheghasan yanzi mutun gieghasan wo.
7.45: Mai xienrenla ene zhanfanyi jienliewo. Huda hhelai melie niman kunlai tou khighasan oronde hhela Yeshuya re hhantu zhanfanyi agi echizhi Dawude honshanni shihou kuruwo.
7.46: Huda Dawude de orezho. Ingiese hhe Hudai xiahua giezhi Yagebu i houdeilade Huda souku oron zhunbei giene giezhoma,
7.48: "Ingiezhoma, Zui Unduni Huda kun khaghalane giesan giede ulie soune. Xienzhi kieliesan kielien mutun wo,
7.49: Ezhan kieliewo, 'Asimanshi mii zowi wo. Zeminshi mii bandou wo. Ta made matui gie giene? Khalashi bi hhamuraku oron wo?
7.50: Enelashi man bi khaghalane giesan pushonu?'"
7.51: "Ta ene jianbanjin kunla, zhughe, chighindene hetoune ese giesan kunla. Ta xienrenlane mutun ibeizi Shenlinni fandui giezho.
7.52: Alinie xienzhilai tai xienrenla ese heiwo? Hhela nie gou kun irene giezhi melie kieliesan xienzhilai alawo. Ede ta hhe gou kunni ghudanduzhi alawo.
7.53: Ta qienxienla chonjizhi ogisan guijinni jienliedene ese zunjiwo." Siqifanni Alazho
7.54: Hhela ene kielienyi chenliedene Siqifan de hende hokuzhi shidunne zhouzho.
7.55: Siqifan de Shenlin duruzhi asimanyi xianxide uzhezhi Hudai fama, pse Ersa Hudai borun miende beisei chanladene kieliewo,
7.56: "Asiman keizhi Kunnikewon Hudai borun miende beisei bi chanlawo."
7.57: Ingiese kunla chighinne duigha fugiede onghonozhi hhei melie chunji echidene
7.58: hhei chenshi ghadane tungu khigha tashighala eghi qiiwo. Ganzhen beisan kunla jienne teidene nie Saolo giezhi urusan nasuchighan kunyi kon konde jiewo.
7.59: Hhela tashighala eghikude Siqifan onxian giezhi kieliewo, "Ezhan Ersa , mii ruhherni jienlie!"
7.60: Pse xiutuliezhi fugiede kieliewo, "Ezhan, ene zuini hhelade bu sougha!" Ene kielienyi kieliedene fuguwo.

8.1: Siqifan yi alasande Saolo tunyi giewo. Saolo Jiohuini Heizho Ene uduse Yelusalen ni jiohuii hende heizho. Shitulase chugo psedu tujila sandazhi Yudaya , Samaliya ni go oronde echiwo.
8.2: Niezhan xienliantu kunla Siqifan yi buladene hhende oluzhi fugiede wilazho.
8.3: Saolo jiohuini heizhi jien kunlai giede orodene ere kun, biereilai bafanzide lai echi khawo. Feili Samaliyade Chonjizho
8.4: Hhe sandasan kunla gochude echizhi Hudai kielienyi chonjizho.
8.5: Feili Samaliya i chenshide echizhi kunlade Mexihai chonjizho.
8.6: Olon kunla Feili kieliesan kielienyi chenliezhi giesan ghudureqii uzhedene man hhei kielienyi goude chenliezho.
8.7: Olon kunlai jierese zannan ruhherla fugiede nie onghonodene likai giewo. Pse olon tanhon giesan, dogholonlai goudaghawo.
8.8: Ingiese hhe chenshii kunla hende bayasuzho.
8.9: Hhe chenshide nie kunyi nierei Ximun giene. Eqighanse baxi shuaizhi bi hen wo giezho. Samaliya i bexinlai ghaniraghazho.
8.10: Bugon fugiei ganii man hhei daghazhi ene kunshi fugie nenlitu giezhi urusan Hudai nenli wo giezho.
8.11: Hhela hhei chenliekushi hhe oloncha baxi shuaizhi hhelai ghaniraghazho.
8.12: Ingiekude Feili hhelade Hudai gojiai gouxioxi, Ersa Mexihai nierei chonjise hhela xianxin giezhi ere kun, biereila xili jienliewo.
8.13: Lien Ximun ye xianxin giedene xili jienliewo. Hhe Feili ghala chan hhantulazhi Feili giesan ghudureqi, fugie nenlitu shiqinlai uzhedene ghanirazho.
8.14: Shitula Yelusalen de bikude chenliese Samaliya kunla Hudai kielienyi jienliewo giese Beduru Yaheiya ghalai hhelai hhende echighawo.
8.15: Hheghala boudene hhelade Shenlinyi jienlieghane giezhi onxian giezho.
8.16: Shenlin kiemai jiere ese bouzhezho. Hhela zinie Ezhan Ersa i niereghala xili jienliezho.
8.17: Beduru Yaheiya ghala hhelai jiere khane teise hhela Shenlinyi jienliewo.
8.18: Shitula khane teise Shenlin bouzhesei Ximun chanladene baerne hhelade ogizhi
8.19: kieliewo, "Ene nenlii madeye ogi. Bi kienyi jiere khane teizhi onxian giese kienye Shenlinyi jienliene."
8.20: Ingiese Beduru kieliewo, "Chi baerghalane hhantu fugule echi. Chi sumulase Huda ogiku nenjienni baerghala aginu?
8.21: Ene wiliede chade guzi uwo. Hudai melie chii zhughe donzhen uwo.
8.22: Chi ene doghunnii geizhi Ezhanni xiahua gie. Kenen chi zhughedene sumulasei mienliene.
8.23: Bi uzhese chii zhughede dubilieku olon wo, gou wini chii banlazho."
8.24: Ingiese Ximun kieliewo, "Ta made oluzhi Ezhanni xiahua gie. Ingiese ta kieliesanla mii jiere nieda ulie irene."
8.25: Beduru Yaheiya ghala Ezhanyi kielienni kieliezhi ganzhen beidene Yelusalen de khareiwo. Idou mo jiere Samaliya ni go aghinlade gouxioxii chonjizho. Feili Taijienghala
8.26: Ingiekude Ezhanni qienxien Feili de kieliewo, "Chi bosidene nanbangiede yo. Yelusalen se Jiasa de bouku mo jiere echi." Hhe mo hontande wo.
8.27: Feili bosizhedene echise mo jiere nie Aisaiebiya kunyi chanlawo. Ene kunshi Aisaiebiya bierei honshan Gandaji ni kha douradu taijien wo. Hheshi bierei honshanni baerlai man gonjisan fugie noyen wo. Yelusalen de libai giezhi irezho.
8.28: Khareiku mo jiere mache souzhi xienzhi Isaiya i shuni onshizho.
8.29: Shenlin Feili de kieliewo, "Chi gierudene chezii shigha."
8.30: Feili holuzhi echise xienzhi Isaiya i shuni onshisei sonosuwo. Ingie hhende asawo, "Chi onshisanne dunjirenu?"
8.31: Hhe kieliewo, "Mii kiema ese uduruzho, bi matugie dunjirene?" Ingie Feili i chezi jierene uru khirei hhantu souwo.
8.32: Hhe onshisan jinwun jiere kieliezho, "Hhei ghoni zharuchen kun shida echiku ghoni mutun lai echiwo. Usun ghighachen kunni kha douradu qioqioji ghoni mutun hhe amanne ese angheiwo.
8.33: Kunla hhei uru giezho, gundande ese panjiwo. Hhei aminni duyase agi echiwo. Kunlade kielieku houdeiye uwo."
8.34: Taijien Feili de kieliewo, "Bi nie asaye, xienzhi kieliesan ene kielienshi kienyi kieliezho? Goyane kieliezhou? Pse nie kunyi kieliezho?"
8.35: Feili ene jinwunse kaishi giezhi hhende Ersa i gouxioxii jianji qiiwo.
8.36: Hhela mo jiere yokude usu winetu oronde kuruwo. Taijien kieliewo, "Uzhe, enende usu wine. Bi enende xili jienliese ulie olunu?"
8.38: Ingie fenfulazhi chezii beighadene Feili taijienghala usude bouzhi Feili hhende xili gieghawo.
8.39: Ususe khizhese Ezhanyi Shenlin Feili i uduru yolawo. Taijien hhei chanla dawo. Ingiedene bayasuzhi mone yowo.
8.40: Ingie Feili i Yasodu de chanlawo. Hhe yozhi go chenshilade gouxioxii chonjizhi izhi Kaisaliya de kuruwo.

9.1: Saolo izhigie Ezhanyi tujilai alane giezhi ayighazho. Ingie zui fugie buwai hhende echidene
9.2: Damashige ni go huitande echiku xinni kerewo. Ene daolini daghasan kunyi faxien giese bugon bierei ere kun barei Yelusalen de lai echine giezho.
9.3: Saolo mo jiere yozhi Damashige de kurukude menzhali asiman jierese gonqi faizhi hhei simiende zhouizho.
9.4: Ingie hhe zemin jiere fura bouwo. Sonususe nie shenqi hhende kieliewo, " Saolo ! Saolo ! Chi mii yale heine?"
9.5: Hhe kieliewo, "Ezhan, chishi kien wo?" "Bishi chi heisan Ersa wo.
9.6: Chi bosizhedene chenshide echi. Hhende matui giekui chade kieliene."
9.7: Hhantu yosan kunla shenqii sonosuzhoma kunni chanla dase beidene kielien kielie dazho.
9.8: Saolo zemin jierese bosise nudunne niewoma, yama chanla dane. Kunla hhei khase lai Damashige de echiwo.
9.9: Ghurudu chanla dadene yama ese ijiezhi ese ochiwo.
9.10: Damashige de nie tuji wine. Niereini Yananiya giene. Ezhan zhoujin mutun xienjighazhi hhende kieliewo, " Yananiya ." Hhe kieliewo, "Ezhan, matugiewo?"
9.11: Ezhan hhende kieliewo, "Chi bosizhedene Dondonji giezhi urusan geidoude echizhi Yuda i giede nie Dashu kunyi erei. Niereini Saolo giene. Hhe zhen onxian giezho.
9.12: Hhe zhoujin mutun chanlase Yananiya giesan nie kun oro iredene hhei jiere khane teise goudawo."
9.13: Ingiese Yananiya kieliewo, "Ezhan, bi sonosuse ene kun Yelusalen de chii shentulade olon doghun shiqin giezho giezhi olon kunla kieliezho.
9.14: Hhe pse fugie buwalase chii beiisan jien kunlai bareiku qienlii kere enende irezho."
9.15: Ingiese Ezhan hhende kieliewo, "Chi echi. Hheshi niman kun, honshan, Isilie kunlade bi nierene chonjighane giezhi sunghusan rencai wo.
9.16: Hhe mii nierede bixi olon ku shoukui bi hhende mejieghane."
9.17: Ingiese Yananiya echidene hhei giede orowo. Khane Saolo i jiere teizhi kieliewo, " Saolo gaijiu, chi ireku mo jiere chade chujiegheghasan Ezhan Ersa mii ireghakushi chii pse chanlaghazhi chade Shenlin durughane giezho."
9.18: Ingiese Saolo i nudun jierese deigo zhaghasun arasun mutun nie dunxi bou irese hhe chanlawo. Ingiedene bosi ire xili jienliewo.
9.19: Ijiewuni ijiedene lilian orowo. Saolo Damashigede Chonjizho Saolo Damashige ni tujilare hhantu giedudu souzhi
9.20: deigo Ersa shi Hudai kewon wo giezhi go huitanlade chonjizho.
9.21: Jien ene kielienyi chenliesan kunla man ghaniradene kieliewo, "Ene kunshi Yelusalen de Ersa i beiisan kunlai heisan hhe kun pushonu? Hhe enende irezhi hhelai bareidene fugie buwalade ogine ese giezhou?"
9.22: Saolo de yebeiseye nenli olodozhi Ersa shi Mexiha bikui zhenmin giese Damashige ni Yutai kunlai kielie beighawo. Saolo Yutai Kunlai Khase Andawo
9.23: Ezighancha daose Yutai kunla Saolo i alane giezhi shanlian giezho.
9.24: Hhela alane gieku jihuai kunla Saolo de mejieghawo. Hhela xieni udu chenshi wijiende sagheizhi hhei alane giezho.
9.25: Nie xiidei hhei tujila nie lanlande hhei orogha chenqian jierese jiuzhilie bouzheghawo. Saolo Yelusalende Wo
9.26: Saolo Yelusalen de kuzhedene psedu tujilare hhantulane giezhoma, hhe tuji gholusei xianxin gie dase hhela man ayizho.
9.27: Ingiese Banaba hhei jienliedene uduruzhi shitulai shida echiwo. Hhe mo jiere matugiezhi Ezhanyi chanlasei, Ezhan hhende kielien kieliesei, hhe Damashige de danzine fugiedaghazhi Ersa i niereghala jianjisei man kieliewo.
9.28: Ingiedene Saolo Yelusalen de tujilare hhantulazhi ziyude yozho. Ezhanyi niereghala danzine fugiedagha kieliezho.
9.29: Hhe pse Xila kielien kieliechen Yutai kunlare kieliezhi jianjinduzho. Ingiese hhela Saolo i alane giezho.
9.30: Gaijiula enei mejiedene hhei Kaisaliya de khughozhi boughadene Dashu de echighawo.
9.31: Ingiekude Yudaya , Jialili , Samaliya i gochudedu jiohui man pinnanshizhi hendawo. Hhela Ezhanyi zunjizhi giezho. Shenlin hhelai bayasughazho. Ingiese xianxin giesan kunla yebeiseye olodozho. Iniyani Goudaghazho
9.32: Beduru gochude yokude Lida oronde sousan shentulai hhende echiwo.
9.33: Hhende Iniya giesan nie kunni chanlawo. Tanhon giezhi ruzi jiere 8 nien kijiezho.
9.34: Beduru hhende kieliewo, " Iniya , Ersa Mexiha chii goudaghawo. Bosizhedene ruzine shidolo agi!" Ingiese hhe deigo bosi irewo.
9.35: Jien Lida , Shalun de sousan kunla hhei chanladene man Ezhanyi shunjiwo. Dojia Aminne Oluzho
9.36: Yepa de nie oqitu tuji wo. Niereini Dabida giene, Xila kielienghala kieliese Dojia giene, isishi lugo wo. Hhe chanqi gounii giezhi nanxin kunlade banman giezho.
9.37: Hhe shihoude hhe giemere fuguse kunla beyeini waghadene lou jiere teiwo.
9.38: Lida Yepa ghala chada wo. Beduru Lida de bikui tujila sonosusenu ghua kunyi peizhi echighadene xiahua giezhi danwu bu giezhi bijienyi hhende ghujighan yo giezho.
9.39: Beduru qiizhi hhelare hhantu kuruse kunla uduru lou jiere khireiwo. Olon guafu biereila Beduru i kanzide beidene wilazhi Dojia hhelare hhantu bikude giesan lizii jien, mienzii jienlai uzheghawo.
9.40: Beduru kunlai man kieliezhi ghadane khighadene xiutuliezhi onxian giewo. Ingie fugusan kunyi miende ochiradene kieliewo, " Dabida , bosizhe!" Ingiese hhe nudunne nie Beduru i chanla bosi ire souwo.
9.41: Beduru khaghalane hhei fui bosighawo. Ingie shentulai, guafulai uru orozhe, Dojia i amitu hhelade jiuizhi ogiwo.
9.42: Ene shiqin Yepa de man chonji kurudene olon kunla Ezhanyi xianxin giewo.
9.43: Khuinashi Beduru Yepa ni nie arasun giesan Ximun yi giede ezighancha souwo.

10.1: Kaisaliya de nie kunyi niereini Geniliu giene. Hheshi Idali buduitonni baifuzhan wo.
10.2: Hheshi nie xienliantu kun wo. Nie gie kunlai man Hudai zunjizho. Da nanxin kunlade olon banman giezhi Hudase chan onxian giezho.
10.3: Niudude xiawu 3 jien olukude hhe zhoujin mutun qinchude chanlase Hudai nie qienxien oro ire Geniliu giezhi uruwo.
10.4: Geniliu xianxide nie uzhe ayizhi kieliewo, "Ezhan, yan shiqin wo?" Qienxien kieliewo, "Chi onxian giesan, nanxin kunlade banman giesanla Hudai melie echizhi jilawo.
10.5: Ede chi kun peizhi Yepa se Beduru giesan Ximun ni xinlazhi ire.
10.6: Hhe nie arasun jiagun giesan Ximun yi giede souzho. Gieni haibienzide wo."
10.7: Hhende kielien kieliesan qienxien yoladene Geniliu giene ghua hojini, pse hhei chan ushilasan nie xienliantu buduini uru ire
10.8: ene shiqinyi man kieliezhi ogidene peizhi Yepa de echighawo.
10.9: Khuichudu hhela yozhi hhe chenshide kurukude Beduru zhunwude gie jiere onxian giele khireiwo.
10.10: Hhe oliesuzhi ijiene giezho. Kunla ijiuni zhunbei giekude Beduru zhoujin mutun nie ghudureqi chanlase
10.11: asiman keizhi hoxian nie fugie popu mutun dunxi bouzhewo. Jieran gozii banladene zemin jiere bou irewo.
10.12: Hhe sudoro zemin jieredu yanyanji jieran zhuazhuatu chushen, ghughei, pse asiman jiere musisanla wine.
10.13: Nie shenyin irezhi hhende kieliewo, " Beduru , bosizhedene ala ijie."
10.14: Ingiese Beduru kieliewo, "Ezhan, ulie olune. Ganjin wini, zannannilai bi ijiezhi ese daozho."
10.15: 2 hui shenyin pse hhende kieliewo, "Huda ganjin wo giesanni chi ganjin uwo giezhi bu kielie."
10.16: Ingiezhi ghureifashi hhe dunxilai deigo asiman jiere agi khireiwo.
10.17: Beduru zhoujin mutun chanlasanshi yan isi wo giezhi zhughedene zhen sumulakude Geniliu peisan kunla asazhi Ximun yi gieni wijien konde beizho.
10.18: Hhela waradazhi, " Beduru giesan Ximun enende souzhoye?" giezhi asazho.
10.19: Beduru dou zhoujin mutun chanlasei sumulakude Shenlin hhende kieliewo, "Ghuran kun chii ereizho.
10.20: Bosi, boudene yama bu sumulazhi hhelare hhantu echi. Hhelashi bi ireghasan wo."
10.21: Ingiese Beduru boudene hhelade kieliewo, "Bishi ta ereisan kun wo. Ta yangiezhi irezho?"
10.22: Hhela kieliewo, "Baifuzhan Geniliu shi Hudai zunjisan nie gou kun wo. Yutai kunla man hhei zunzhun giene. Nie zhiguitu qienxien hhende kieliezhi chii xinlazhi giedene iredene chi jianjisei chenlie giezho."
10.23: Beduru hhelai uruzhi oro nie xii soughawo. Khuichudu zhunbei gie hhelare hhantu echiwo. Yepa ni giedun gaijiulaye hhantu echiwo.
10.24: Pse niudude hhela Kaisaliya de kuruwo. Geniliu qingu, gou zhanlienlane uruzhi ire hhelai sagheizho.
10.25: Beduru orone giekude Geniliu hhei jienliedene kon kondeni papalazhi beiiwo.
10.26: Beduru hhei fei bosigha kieliewo, "Bosizhe. Bishiye nie kun wo."
10.27: Beduru hheghala kielienduzhi orose olon kunla hhantulasei chanlawo.
10.28: Ingie hhelade kieliewo, "Bijien Yutai kun niman kunghala laiwon giezhi hhantulase ese olusei ta goyane mejienema, yan kunyiliuzhe ganjin uwo, zannan wo giezhi kieliese ese olusei Huda made uzheghawo.
10.29: Ingiese ta mii xinlakude bi tuichi ese giezhi irewo. Ede bi tande asaye, ta mii yan shiqinde xinlazho?"
10.30: Geniliu kieliewo, "Jierudu melie ene shihoude bi giedene onxian giezho. Xiawu 3 jiende wo. Menzhali nie rouiku jien musisan kun mii melie beidene
10.31: kieliezho, ' Geniliu , chi onxian giesan, nanxin kunlade banman giesanlai Huda chenliezhi jilawo.
10.32: Ingiese chi kun peizhi Yepa se Beduru giesan Ximun yi xinlazhi ire. Hhe haibienzini nie arasun jiagun giesan Ximun yi giede souzho.'
10.33: Ingiese bi deigo kun peizhi chii xinlaghale echiwo. Chi irese gou wo. Ede bijien Ezhan chade fenfulasan kielienlai man chenliene giezhi Hudai melie hhantulazho." Beduru Geniliui Giede Jianjizho
10.34: Ingiese Beduru kielie qiiwo, "Huda kunlade pienxin ulie giekui bi shuhua mejiewo.
10.35: Alinie gojiai kunlaliuzhe Hudai zunjizhi olusei giese Huda jienliene.
10.36: Taye mejieku mutun Huda yanyanjini Ezhan Ersa Mexihani tungo giezhi pinnantu gouxioxi daolini Isilie kunlade chonjizhi ogiwo.
10.37: Yaheiya xili giekui jianjizhi daodene ene daolii Jialili se kaishi giezhi Yudaya go oronlade chonji kuruwo.
10.38: Nasale kun Ersa de Huda Shenlin, nenlini olon ogiwo. Huda hheghala hhantushi hhe gochude yozhi gouni giezho. Ibilisi heisanlai man uzhezhi goudaghawo.
10.39: Bijien hhe kun Yutai kunni oronde, Yelusalen de giesan shiqinlade ganzhen beine. Kunla hhei mutun jiere guaidene alawo.
10.40: Ghurudude Huda hhei aminne olughazhi kunlade chanlaghawo.
10.41: Soyuji kunlade ese chanlaghazhi zinie Huda sunghuzhi hhende ganzhen beighane giesan bijiende chanlaghawo. Bijienshi hhe fugusan kun dundase aminne oludene hhere hhantu ijiezhi ochisan kun wo.
10.42: Hhe bijiende fenfulazhi kunlade ene daolii chonji giewo. "Hheshijiu Huda sunghuzhi amitu kun, fugusan kunyi panjichen wo." giezhi ganzhen bei giezho.
10.43: Xienzhila man hhende ganzhen beizhi kieliewo, 'Hhei xianxin giesan kunla hhei niereghala zuini mienliene.'" Niman Kunla Shenlinyi Jienliewo
10.44: Beduru kielien kieliekude daoli chenliesan jien kunlai jiere Shenlin bouzhewo.
10.45: Beduru ghala hhantu iresan Yutai ni Mexihai xianxin giesan kunla Shenlinni nenjien niman kunlai jiere kie bouzhese ghanirakushi
10.46: hhela pseshiku kielienyi kieliezhi Hudashi fugie wo giezhi doulasei sonosuzho. Ingiese Beduru kieliewo,
10.47: "Enezighan kunla bijien mutun Shenlinyi jienliewo. Ede usughala hhelade xili gieghase kien danla shidane?"
10.48: Ingie fenfulazhi Ersa Mexihai niereghala hhelade xili gieghawo. Hhela pse Beduru i danlazhi giedudu soughawo.

11.1: Niman kunla Hudai kielienyi jienliesei shitula, Yudaya ni gaijiula sonosuwo.
11.2: Beduru Yelusalen de echise Yutai ni Mexihai xianxin giesan kunla hhei sugiezhi kieliewo,
11.3: "Chi hetoune ese giesan kunlai giede echizhi dou hhelare hhantu ijiene?"
11.4: Ingiese Beduru ene shiqinni hhelade qiqiji kieliewo,
11.5: "Bi Yepa chenshide onxian giekude zhoujin mutun nie ghudureqi chanlase hoxian nie fugie popu mutun dunxi bouzhezhi jieran gozii banlazho. Asiman jierese bouzhe mii melie irewo.
11.6: Bi xianxide uzhese sudoro zemin jieredu jieran zhuazhuatu chushen, yewo, ghughei, pse asiman jiere musisanla wine.
11.7: Bi sonosuse nie shenyin made kieliewo, ' Beduru , bosizhedene ala ijie.'
11.8: Ingie bi kieliewo, 'Ezhan, ulie olune. Ganjin wini, zannannila mii amande orozhi ese daozho.'
11.9: 2 hui shenyin asiman jierese kieliewo, 'Huda ganjin wo giesanni chi ganjin uwo giezhi bu kielie.'
11.10: Ingiezhi ghureifashi man asiman jiere agi khireiwo.
11.11: Zhen qingiekude Kaisaliya se mii xinlaghale iresan ghuran kun bijien sousan gie konde beizho.
11.12: Shenlin made fenfulazhi yama bu sumuladene hhelare hhantu echi giewo. Ingiese ene zhighon gaijiu mare hhantu echizhi bijien Geniliu i giede orowo. Hhe bijiende kieliewo.
11.13: Geniliu matugiezhi nie qienxienyi chanladene hhei giede beizhi chi kun peizhi Yepa se Beduru giesan Ximun yi xinlazhi ire.
11.14: Hhe chii nie gie kunlai jiuiku daolii chade kieliene giesan kielienyi bijiende kieliewo.
11.15: Bi dei jianji qiise Shenlin hhelai jiere bouzhewo. Eqighandei matanyi jiere bouzhesan niekielien wo.
11.16: Ingiese Yaheiya usughala xili gieghawoma, tai Shenlinghala xili gieghane giesan Ezhanyi kielienyi bi sumula irewo.
11.17: Huda hhelade ogisan nenjien matan Ezhan Ersa Mexihai xianxin giekude matande ogisan nenjienghala niekielien wo. Bishi kien wo? Hudai duii shidanu?"
11.18: Hhela ene kielienyi chenliedene yama ese kieliezhi qinse Huda niman kunladeye geizhen giezhi amin ireku jihui ogiwo giezhi Hudai kuaizho. Anqiyani Jiohui
11.19: Ene shihoude Siqifan ni shiqin jiere biisan kunla sandazhi Feiniji , Saipulusi , Anqiya de echidene zinie Yutai kunlade Hudai kielienyi jianjizhoma,
11.20: Saipulusi , Gulinai se iresan niezhan kunla Anqiya de kurudene Xila kunladeye Ezhan Ersa i gouxioxii jianjizho.
11.21: Ezhanni nenli hhelare hhantushi Ezhanyi xianxin giezhi shunjisan kun olonnudazho.
11.22: Ene xioxi Yelusalen ni jiohuii kunlai chighinde echiwo. Ingie hhela Banaba i peizhi Anqiya de echighawo.
11.23: Hhe kurudene Hudai nenjienyi chanla bayasuzhi kunlade khidunde beidene izhi Ezhanni koui giezhi sughazhi kieliezho.
11.24: Banaba shi nie gou kun wo. Hhende Shenlin duruzhi Hudade kouiku xianxin gieku fugie wo. Ingiese olon kunla Ezhande shunjiwo.
11.25: Hhe Dashu se Saolo i ereile echi,
11.26: ereizhi oludene uduru Anqiya de echiwo. Hhe ghuala duduji niehon hhe oronni jiohuini kunlaghala hhantulazhi olon kunlade surughazho. Tujilai Anqiya se tou 1 hui Mexihani tuji giezhi uruzhi qiizho.
11.27: Hhe xienzide giedun xienzhila Yelusalen se Anqiya de bouzhi irewo.
11.28: Hhelai dundadu nie kunyi niereini Yajiabu giene. Bosi iredene duya jiere honnien kuzhene giezhi Shenlinyi tungo giezhi melie kieliewo. Ene shiqin Kelaoji gonjiku shihoude fashen giewo.
11.29: Ingiese tujila zhao goyane nenlighala Yudaya de sousan gaijiulade baer khughozhi echighane giezhi jiejin giewo.
11.30: Hhela baerni ghuradene Banaba Saolo ghualai peizhi zhanlaolai hhende khughozhi echighawo.

12.1: Hhe shihoude Hherode honshan jiohuini niezhan kunlai heiwo.
12.2: Khudoghoghala Yaheiya ni gaii Yagebu i alawo.
12.3: Hhe uzhese Yutai kunla ene shiqinde xiqishi Beduru iye bareighale echiwo. Hheshi zhen Tanmien Jieni udu wo.
12.4: Beduru i barei agi bafanzide khadene jieran duini buduilade uzheghazho. Nie duide jieran kun wo. Jiulidaosan Jie daose bexinlai melie hhei panjine giezho.
12.5: Beduru i bafanzide khase jiohuini kunla hhende oluzhi Hudase hende onxian giezho. Beduruni Jiui Khizhezho
12.6: Hherode Beduru i panjiku meliedu xii, Beduru i ghua qieshenghala sozilazhi ghua buduini dunda kijieghazho. Sagheisan kunla bafanzi wijien ghadane sagheizho.
12.7: Menzhali Ezhanyi qienxien xienjighazhi bafanzi sudoro gon zhouizho. Qienxien Beduru i lebadei peizhi xiereigha kieliewo, "Ghujighan bosizhe." Ingie qieshen hhei kha jierese anda bouwo.
12.8: Yodaine banlazhi maheine musi giezhi qienxien hhende kieliese hhe qingiezhi giewo. Qienxien pse kieliewo, "Jienne musidene mii dagha."
12.9: Beduru khizhedene hhei daghawo. Qienxien giesanshi zhenni bikui mejie dazho, zhoujin wo giezho.
12.10: Bafanzii ji 1 gon ji 2 gonyi daodene chenshide khireiku qieman shida irese hhe wijien goyane niewo. Hhela khizhedene nie moni yozhi daose qienxien deigo hhense likai giewo.
12.11: Beduru minbairedene kieliewo, "Ede bi zhenzhenji mejiewo. Ezhan qienxienne peizhi mii Hherode i khase, Yutai kunlai xiwon giesanse jiuizhi khizhewo."
12.12: Beduru nie sumuladene Mereiyen i giede echiwo. Hheshi Make giesan Yaheiya i anani wo. Hhende olon kunla hhantulazhi onxian giezho.
12.13: Beduru wijienyi nie eghise Loda giesan nie hoji oqin wijien niele irewo.
12.14: Hhe Beduru i shenqii mejiedene bayasuzhi wijienyi ese nie, holuzhi echi kunlade kieliewo, " Beduru wijien ghadane beizho!"
12.15: Hhela kieliewo, "Chi fenjiulizho!" Hoji oqin izhigie kieliezho, "Hhe enbene!" Hhela kieliezho, "Hheshi Beduru i qienxien wo."
12.16: Beduru ese beidene wijienyi eghizho. Hhela wijienyi niedene chanlase ghanirazho.
12.17: Beduru khane zhadeighazhi hhelai shenqi bu khizhe giezho. Ingie hhelade Ezhan matugiezhi hhei bafanzise uduruzhi khizheghasei kieliewo. Pse ene shiqinni Yagebu psedu gaijiulade kielie giedene khizhe, psedu oronde echiwo.
12.18: Ogheidene buduila londundunde Beduru khala echisei mejie dazho.
12.19: Hherode hhei ereizhi olu dase sagheisan kunlade asadene hhelai ala giezhi fenfulawo. Khuinashi Hherode Yudaya se likai gie Kaisaliya de bouzhi hhende souwo. Hherodeni Ghughei Zhou Alazho
12.20: Hherode honshan Tuilo kun, Xidun kunlade hokuzho. Ene ghua oronni kunla honshanni oronse taran ijiezho. Ingie honshanni giei gonjisan Bolasidu i kielie shundaghadene hhantu Hherode i ochirale echi goudane giezhi xiahua giezho.
12.21: Jinjisan udude Hherode honshan jienne musi wizi jierene souzhi kunlade jianjizho.
12.22: Ingiese bexinla waradazhi kieliezho, "Eneshi kunni shenqi pusho, hudai shenqi wo!"
12.23: Hherode kunla kuaikui Hudade ese ogise Ezhanyi qienxien deigo faizhi ghugheighala zhou alaghawo.
12.24: Hudai kielien yebeiseye ondazhi xianxin giesan kunla olodozho.
12.25: Banaba Saolo ghala renwune onchen giedene Make giesan Yaheiya i uduru Yelusalen de khareiwo.

13.1: Anqiya ni jiohuide giedun xienzhi, loushi wine. Banaba , heiren giesan Ximien , Gulinai kun Luqiu , Hherode onghala hhantu fugiedasan Manien , pse Saolo wo.
13.2: Hhela Ezhanyi beiizhi orozo bareikude Shenlin kieliewo, "Ta Banaba Saolo i sunghudene made jie. Bi hhelai uruzhi wiliene gieghane."
13.3: Ingie hhela orozo bareizhi onxian giedene hhelai jiere khane teizhi peizhi echighawo. Banaba Saolo Saipuluside Chonjizho
13.4: Hhelai Shenlin peizhi Xiliuji de boughadene hhense chon souzhi Saipulusi daode kuruwo.
13.5: Hhende Salami geidoude echi Yutai kunlai huitanlade Hudai kielienyi jianjizho. Yaheiya hhelade banman giezho.
13.6: Hhela Saipulusi nie daoni yozhi zuihoude Pafu de irewo. Hhende nie fashu shuaisan kunyi penjiwo. Hheshi nie xienzhii maochun giesan Yutai kun wo. Niereini Bayesu giene.
13.7: Hhe kun Shiqiu-Baolo giesan zunlighala jiodao daizho. Shiqiu-Baolo shi nie aghelitu kun wo, hhe Banaba Saolo ghalai xinlazhi ire Hudai kielienyi chenliene giezho.
13.8: Ilima Banaba Saolo ghalai jiohorozhi zunlii ene xinyanni ulie xianxin gieghane giezho. Ilima i isishi fashu shuaisan kun wo.
13.9: Baolo giesan Saolo de Shenlin durudene hhei aralazhi kieliewo,
13.10: "Chishi Ibilisini kewon wo. Chi yanyanji gounii fandui giezho. Chade yanyanji piendakui doghunni duruzho. Chi Ezhanni zhendaoni wirulaghakui da ulie beinu?
13.11: Ede Ezhan chii faise chi sugho gholuzhi zhanshi jiere naranyi chanla dane!" Ingiese nudunni deigo borolozhi kharaladene simiendene moqioluzhi mo uduruku kun ereizho.
13.12: Zunli ene fashen giesan shiqinyi chanladene Ezhanyi daoli ghudure wo giezhi xianxin giewo. Anqiyani Bixijide Chonjizho
13.13: Baolo tan Pafu se chon souzhi Panfeiliya ni Biejia de irewo. Yaheiya hhelase likai gie Yelusalen de echiwo.
13.14: Baolo tan Biejia se likai giedene yozhi Bixiji ni Anqiya de irewo. Hhamuraku udude huitande orozhi souwo.
13.15: Guijinshu, xienzhishui onshi baraghadene huitan gonjisan kunla kun peizhi hhelade kielieghawo, "Gaijiula, kunlade yan surughaku kielien bise kielie."
13.16: Ingie Baolo bosizhe khane nie zhadeigha kieliewo, " Isilie kunla, pse Hudai zunjisan niman kunla, chenliendu!
13.17: Ene Isilie ni Huda mai xienrenlai sunghuzho. Hhela Aiji de soukude Huda hhelai hendaghazhi fugie nenlighalane Aiji se uduruzhi khizhewo.
13.19: Jianan oronni dolon minzui widaghazhi hhe oronyi hhelade ogiwo.
13.20: Enezighan shiqinla chabudu 450 nien olune. Khuinashi Huda hhelade panjiku noyen ogizhi izhi Samuer xienzhii shihou kuruwo.
13.21: Ene shihoude hhela Hudase nie honshan kerewo. Ingie Huda Bienyamin pai dundadedu Jishi ni kewon Saolo i hhelade 40 nien honshan danlaghawo.
13.22: Ingie Saolo i widaghadene Dawude ni hhelade honshan danlagha, hhende oluzhi kieliewo, 'Bi ereisan Yexi ni kewon Dawude made talazho. Hhe mii jihuai chengun olughane.'"
13.23: "Huda dain giesan mutun Dawude ni houdeise Isilie kunlade nie jiuichen Ersa i khizheghawo.
13.24: Hhe iretula Yaheiya jien Isilie kunlade, "Geizhen giedene xilini jienlie." giezhi chonjizho.
13.25: Yaheiya renwune onchen giekude kieliewo, 'Ta sumulase bishi kien wo? Bishi hhe pusho. Hhe mii khuinase irene. Bi hhende mahei deizi andaghaseye pei dane.'"
13.26: "Gaijiula, Iburaheimu ni houdeila, pse Hudai zunjisan niman kunla, ene jiuiku daolishijiu matande ogisanwo.
13.27: Yelusalen de sousan kun, hhelai lindaola Ersa i tani dazho. Hhela niefanie hhamuraku udude onshisan xienzhii kielienyi dunjire dazhi Ersa de zui jinjise xienzhila kieliesan mutun gholuwo.
13.28: Hhende yama fuguku zui ereizhi oludawoma, hhela Bilado i xiahua giezhi hhei ala giewo.
13.29: Ingiezhi jinwun jiere hhei zhiizhi kieliesanla man gholuwo. Ingiedene hhei mutun jierese agi bouzhe mezade teiwo.
13.30: Ingieliuzhe Huda hhei fugusan kun dundase aminne olughawo.
13.31: Ersa ghala hhantu Jialili se Yelusalen de khisan kunlade Ersa ezighancha xienjighawo. Hhela ede bexinlai dunda Ersa de ganzhen beizho.
13.32: Bijienye ene gouxioxini tande chonjizhi ogine. Eneshi Huda matanyi xienrenlade dain giesanwo.
13.33: Ersa i aminne olughazhi matan houdei danlasan kunde chenjighawo. Zeburei ji 2 piende jilasan mutun, 'Chishi mii kewon wo. Enedu bi chade ada danlawo.'
13.34: Pse fugusan kun dundase Ersa i aminne olughazhi ulie fughaku shiqinde Huda ingiezhi kieliezhi daowo, 'Bi Dawude de ogisan zhigui, kekaotu nenjienni tande ogiye.'
13.35: Da nie Zeburei jiereye kieliewo, 'Chi zhiguitu kunne ulie fughane.'"
13.36: " Dawude duyade bikude Hudai isii zunjizhoma, duya ijiedene xienrenlareni hhantu bulase fuwo.
13.37: Zinie Huda aminne olughasan hhe ese fuwo."
13.38: "Ingiese gaijiula, ta mejiendu. Ene kunyi tungo giezhi zuini mienlieku daolii tande chonjizhi ogiwo.
13.39: Musa i guijinghala giese gounide sana danema, Ersa i xianxin giesan kunlai man yanseliuzhe gounide sanane.
13.40: Ingiese ta xioxin gie, pse xienzhila kieliesan tai jiere gholune.
13.41: 'Uzhe, ta uzhezhi xiniesan kunla, jindazhi fugune. Bi tai xienzide kunla tande kielieliuzhe ta xianxin gie daku fugie shiqin giene. Ingiese ta ayidene fugune.'"
13.42: Baolo Banaba ghala huitanse khizhekude kunla hhelai xinlazhi pse nie hhamuraku udude enezighan kielienyi hhelade pse jianji giezho.
13.43: Sanhui giedene olon Yutai kun, Yutaijioni suisan niman kunla Baolo , Banaba ghalai daghazho. Hheghala hhelade Hudai nenjiende chan kouizhi gie giezhi jianjizhi goude kieliewo.
13.44: Pse nie hhamuraku udude nie chenshini kunla man hhantulazhi ire Ezhanyi kielienyi chenliene giezho.
13.45: Yutai kunla imeghei kun iresei chanladene dubiliezhi Baolo kieliesan kielienyi fandui giezhi sugiezho.
13.46: Ingiese Baolo Banaba ghala danzine fugiedaghazhi kieliewo, "Hudai kielienyi xien tande kieliese indanji woma, ta ene daolii ulie jienliene. Ta goyane ene chanqiku aminni pei dane giezhi jiejin giezho. Ingiese bijien niman kunlai hhende echine.
13.47: Ezhan bijiende ingiezhi fenfulawo, 'Bi chii niman kunlade gon gholughadene jiuiku nenjienni deilazhi duyani uzhude echigha giezhi jinjiwo.'"
13.48: Niman kunla ene kielienyi chenliesenu bayasuzhi Ezhanyi kielien gou wo giezho. Chanqiku aminni ogine giezhi jinjisan kunla man xianxin giewo.
13.49: Ingiese Hudai kielienyi hhe oronde chonji kurughawo.
13.50: Yutai kunla Hudai beiisan minshentu biereilai, pse hhe chenshii zhanlaolai shanjizhi Baolo , Banaba ghalai heizhi oronsene tou khighawo.
13.51: Hheghala kunlai fandui giezhi kon jieredu turane kui boughadene Igenien de echiwo.

14.1: Xianxianji shiqin Igenien deye gholuwo. Baolo Banaba ghala Yutai kunlai huitande orozhi daolii goude jianjise olon Yutai kun, Xila kunla xianxin giewo.
14.2: Ulie shunjisan Yutai kunla niman kunlai shanjizhi gaijiulade doghunni sumulaghazho.
14.3: Ingiese hheghala hhende oloncha souzhi Ezhande oluzhi danzine fugiedagha giezhi kieliezho. Ezhan hhelade nenli ogizhi ghudureqi, fugie shiqin giedene hhela jianjisan Hudai nenjientu daolide ganzhen beizho.
14.4: Ingiese chenshini kunla lianbanzi gholudene ibanlie Yutai kunyi daghazho, pse ibanlie shitulai daghazho.
14.5: Niezhan niman kunla, Yutai kunla, noyenlarene hhantuladene ghua shitulai zayalazhi tashighala eghine giezhi jiejin giewo.
14.6: Shitula ene shiqinni mejiedene holuzhi Ligaoni ni Luside , Tebi ghua chenshide, pse zhouwini oronlade echiwo.
14.7: Hhela hhe oronlade gouxioxini chonjizho. Luside Tebi Ghua Oronde Chonjizho
14.8: Luside de ghua konde lilian witu nie canfei souzho. Zhayaghasanse mo yozhi ese daozho.
14.9: Baolo jianjisanyi hhe kun chenliezho. Baolo hhei goude uzhese hhende goudaku xianxin gieku zhughe wine.
14.10: Ingie fugiede kieliewo, "Chi ghua konne zhidaghazhi bosizhe!" Ingiese hhe kun jiuli bosi ire yo qiiwo.
14.11: Olon kunla Baolo giesan shiqinyi chanladene Ligaoni i kielienghala fugiede kieliewo, "Nigiedala kun gholudene mai dunda irewo!"
14.12: Ingie Banaba i Zhousi giezhi uruzho. Baolo zhomen jianjise Xiermi giezhi uruzho.
14.13: Chenshi ghadaneshiku Zhousi mioni buwa giedun fughe laizhi chizhe bareidene chenshi wijien melie irewo. Olon kunlare hhantu shitulade khughozhi beiine giezho.
14.14: Banaba Baolo ghala sonosudene jienne sidakeigha, olon kunlai dunda holu oro fugiede kieliewo,
14.15: "Dajiala, ta yale intu shiqin giene? Bijienshiye kun wo, tanre niekielien wo. Bijien enende irezhi gouxioxii chonjikushi tai gou witu dunxilase likai gieghazhi asiman, zemin, hai, pse hhei sudorodu shihenilai man zhayaghasan zhenzhenji chanqiku Hudade shunjighane giezho.
14.16: Eqighanku gonyinde Huda go minzulani durare teizhi yan giese gie giezho.
14.17: Ingieliuzhe Huda gou shiqin giezhi goyane chan zhenmin giezho. Asiman jierese ghura bouzheghazhi, nanshihoude yanyanji osighazhi, tai chudughadene zhughede bayasughazho."
14.18: Shitula ene kielienyi kieliedene olon kunlai danlazhi beigha dazhi ingiezhi goyane seigie ese beiighawo.
14.19: Niezhan Yutai kunla Anqiya se Igenien se ire olon kunlai kielie shundagha Baolo i tashighala eghi, hhe fuguwo giedene chenshi ghadane lai khighawo.
14.20: Tujila Baolo i kanzide wiqi beise hhe bosi ire chenshide orowo. Khuichudu hhe Banaba ghala hhantu Tebi de echiwo. Xiliyani Anqiyade Khareizho
14.21: Hhela Tebi de gouxioxii chonjidene olon kunlai tuji gholughawo. Ingiedene hhela Luside , Igenien ni jingo giezhi Anqiya de khareiwo.
14.22: Hhela tujilai zhugheini khiduzheghazhi izhi xianxin gie giezhi sughazhi kieliezho. "Matan Hudai gojiade orone giese bixi olon ku shouine."
14.23: Hhela go jiohuide zhanlaolai sunghudene ese ijiezhi onxian gie, hhelai xianxin giesan Ezhandei jiuizhi ogiwo.
14.24: Ingie ghuala Bixiji ni jingo giezhi Panfeiliya de echiwo.
14.25: Pse Biejia de Hudai kielienyi jianjidene Yadali de bouwo.
14.26: Hhense chon souzhi Anqiya de khareiwo. Anqiya shi chonjiku wiliede oluzhi ghua shitulai Hudai nenjiende jiuizhi ogisan oron wo. Ede onchen giedene khareizhi irewo.
14.27: Anqiya de kurudene jiohuini kunlai man uru ire Huda hhelai tungo giezhi matugie giesan shiqinlai, pse Huda niman kunlai xianxin gie qiighasei kieliezho.
14.28: Hhela hhende tujilare hhantu oloncha souwo.

15.1: Yudaya se bouzhesan giedun kunla gaijiulade Musa ni guijinghala hetoune ulie giese jiui dane giezhi sughazho.
15.2: Baolo Banaba ghala hhelare hende jianjiduzhi zhenjinduse jiohuini kunla Baolo , Banaba , pse giedun kunlai ene shiqinde Yelusalen ni shitu, zhanlaolade asaghale echine giezhi jiejin giewo.
15.3: Ingiese jiohuini kunla hhelai khughowo. Hhela Feiniji , Samaliya ni daokude niman kunla Ersa i xianxin giesei kieliese hhendedu gaijiula man hende bayasuzho.
15.4: Yelusalen de kuruse shitu, zhanlao, jiohuini kunla hhelai jienliewo. Huda hhelare hhantu giesan shiqinlai man jiohuini kunlade kieliewo.
15.5: Giedun Falisai paini Ersa i xianxin giesan kunla bosizhedene kieliewo, "Niman kunlai bixi hetoune gieghadene fenfulazhi Musa ni guijinni zunjighakuni wo."
15.6: Shitu, zhanlaola hhantulazhi ene shiqinni shanlian giewo.
15.7: Dajiala ene shiqinni oloncha jianjidudene Beduru bosizhe kieliewo, "Gaijiula, Huda melieshida tani dundase mii sunghuzhi niman kunla mase gouxioxini chenliedene xianxin giesei ta mejiene.
15.8: Kunyi zhugheni mejiechen Huda matande ogisan mutun niman kunladeye Shenlinni ogizhi hhelai jienliewo.
15.9: Dou xianxin giekughala hhelani zhughei ganjinraghawo. Hhelai uzheku matanre niekielien wo.
15.10: Ede ta yale Hudai shiizhi matan, matanyi xienrenla lai daku jiabanni tujilai ghuzhun jiere zhoghane?
15.11: Ulie olune, matanyi jiuikushi Ezhan Ersa i nenjienghala wo. Hhelaye niekielien wo. Bijien ingiezhi xianxin giezho."
15.12: Olon kunla man yama shenqi uye khizhezhi Huda Banaba Baolo ghalai tungo giezhi niman kunlai dunda giesan ghudureqi, fugie shiqinlai chenliezho.
15.13: Hhela kielie baludene Yagebu kieliewo, "Gaijiula, mii kielienyi chenliendu.
15.14: Huda matugiezhi niman kunlai zhaogu giezhi tou 1 hui hhelani dundase bexinlai sunghudene goyanughun gholughasei Ximien kieliewo.
15.15: Eneshi xienzhila kieliesan kielienghala niekielien wo. Jinwun jiere huaizho,
15.16: 'Enense khuinashi bi khareizhi iredene Dawude ni furasan gieni erchan bosizheghane. Tairesanni gie goudaghazhi erchan bosizheghane.
15.17: Ingiese feiliesan kunlai man Ezhanyi ereighane. Bi sunghuzhi goyanughun gholughasan niman kunlai man Ezhanyi ereighane.
15.18: Eneshi dei qiikude ene shiqinlai mejieghasan Ezhan kieliesan wo.'
15.19: Ingiese bi uzhese Hudade shunjisan niman kunlade chijia bu teidene
15.20: hhelade xin huaizhi nigiedade ogidene zannanshisan, lon kijieku, lei alasan, chusun, enelase gholodo giezhi fenfulase oluzho.
15.21: Ingiekushi eqighanse izhi go chenshide Musa ni guijinni jianjichen kun wine. Niefanie hhamuraku udude huitande onshizho." Xianxin Giesan Niman Kunlade Xin Huaizho
15.22: Ingiedene shitu, zhanlao, jiohuini kunla hhelai dundase kun sunghuzhi Baolo , Banaba re hhantu Anqiya de echighane giezhi jiejin giewo. Sunghusan kunshi Basaba giesan Yuda , pse Seila wo. Ene ghualashi jiohuini zhanlao wo.
15.23: Ingie hhelade bareighasan xin jiere kieliezho, " Ersa i sudoro gaijiu danlasan shitu, zhanlaola Anqiya , Xiliya , Jilijia dedu xianxin giesan niman gaijiulade kielien asazho."
15.24: "Bijien sonosuse bijienni enense giedun kun khizhi echi kielienghala tai jiohoro giezhi tande nanran ese ogizho. Shijishan bijien hhelade yama ese fenfulazho.
15.25: Ingie dajiala tunyigie giedun kun sunghu peizhi bijien oresan Banaba , Baolo re hhantu tai hhende echighawo.
15.26: Ene ghualashi mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihade oluzhi aminne ulie kerechen kun wo.
15.27: Ingiese bijien Yuda , Seila ghalai peizhi tande qinsi ene shiqinlai kielieghane.
15.28: Shenlin bijienre hhantu tunyi giezhi ene giedun zhunyoni shiqinse chugo psedu achanni tai jiere ulie teise gou wo giezho.
15.29: Ta nigiedade teisan, chusun, lei alasan, lon kijieku enelase gholoduse jiu oluwo. Tande salan gieye."
15.30: Hhelani peizhi Anqiya de bou, xianxin giesan kunlai uruzhi hhantulagha xinni jiuizhi ogiwo.
15.31: Xinni onshidene zhichi giesan goushi hhela bayasuzho.
15.32: Yuda , Seila ghalashiye xienzhi wo. Olon kielienghala gaijiulade surughazhi hhelai xianxin giekuni khiduzheghawo.
15.33: Hhela hhende nietan soudene gaijiula hhelai dafalazhi hhelai peizhi ireghasan Yelusalen ni jiohuide pinnande echighawo.
15.35: Baolo , Banaba ghala Anqiya de zhanshi souzhi olon kunlare hhantu kunlade sughazhi Ezhanyi kielienyi chonjizho. Baolo Banabaghala Ghaghachazho
15.36: Giedudu daodene Baolo Banaba de kieliewo, "Matan khareizhi eqighandei Ezhanni kielienyi chonjisan go chenshide gaijiulani qinkonyi uzhele yoye."
15.37: Banaba Make giesan Yaheiya ni uduruzhi echine giese
15.38: Make eqighandei Panfeiliya se likai giezhi hhelare hhantu wilie ese giewo giezhi Baolo hhei jiedui ulie udurune giezho.
15.39: Ingie ghuala hende jianjindu ghaghachawo. Banaba Make i uduru chon soudene Saipulusi de echiwo.
15.40: Baolo Seila i sunghusenu gaijiula hhelai Ezhanni nenjiende jiuizhi ogise yo qiiwo.
15.41: Baolo Xiliya ni, Jilijia ni yozhi go jiohuilani khiduzheghawo.

16.1: Baolo Tebi de echi, pse Luside de kuruse hhende nie tuji wine. Niereini Qimotai giene. Ananishi Yutai kun wo, Ezhanyi xianxin giezho. Adanishi Xila kun wo.
16.2: Luside , Igenien ni gaijiula man Qimotai ni kuaizho.
16.3: Baolo hhei uduruzhi echine giezho. Hhe oronni Yutai kunla adanishi Xila kun bikui man mejiene. Ingie hhende hetoune giewo.
16.4: Hhela go chenshilai yozhi daokude Yelusalen ni shitu, zhanlaola jinjisan guijinni xianxin giesan kunlade ogizhi zunjighazho.
16.5: Ingiese jiohuilani kunlai xianxin gieku khiduzhezhi kun niudunie olodowo. Baolo Maqidun Kunni Zhoujin Mutun Chanlazho
16.6: Shenlin hhelai danlazhi Yaxiya de Hudai kielienyi ese jianjighase hhela Fulijia , Jialatai oronlade echiwo.
16.7: Meixiya ni bienzide kurudene Bituini de echine giese Ersa i ruhher ese echighawo.
16.8: Ingiese hhela Meixiya ni jingo giezhi Teloya de bouwo.
16.9: Xienidei Baolo zhoujin mutun chanlawo. Niekozi Maqidun kun beidene hhei xiahua giezhi kieliewo, " Maqidun de daozhedene bijiende banman gie."
16.10: Baolo zhoujin mutun chanlase bijien deigo Maqidun de echine giezho. Bijien jiejin giese Huda bijienyi uruzhi hhe oronni kunlade gouxioxini chonjighane giezho. Feilibide Lijiya Ezhanni Xianxin Giezho
16.11: Ingiese bijien Teloya se chon souzhi zhijie Samotela de echidene khuichudu Niyapoli de kuruwo.
16.12: Hhense Feilibi de kuruwo. Feilibi shi Maqidun orondedu nie zhunyo chenshi wo, Loma gonjizho. Bijien ene chenshide giedudu souwo.
16.13: Hhamuraku udude bijien chenshini wijiense khirei nie moron bienzide echiwo. Sumulase hhende nie onxian gieku oron wine giezho. Bijien soudene hhantulasan biereilade daoli jianjiwo.
16.14: Chenliesan kun dunda Tuiyatuila chenshini nie zihun bosi huisan bierei wo. Niereini Lijiya giene. Hhe Hudai beiizho. Baolo jianjikude Ezhan hheni zhugheni keighase hhe goude chenliezho.
16.15: Hhe bierei, pse nie gie kunladeni man xili gieghawo. Ingie bijienyi xiahua giezhi kieliewo, "Ta bishi Ezhanni zhenzhenji xianxin giesan wo giese mii giede yodene sou." Ingie bijienyi ninguru danlawo. Baolo Seilaghalani Bareizho
16.16: Niefade bijien onxian gieku oronde echikude nie sheitan heisan hoji oqin irewo. Hhe fashu shuaizhi loubanladene baer olon ireghazho.
16.17: Ene oqin Baolo , pse bijienyi daghadene onghonozhi kieliewo, "Enezighan kunlashi Zui Undu Hudai hojila wo. Hhela tande jiuiku daolini chonjine!"
16.18: Hhe ingiezhi ezighancha onghonose Baolo pofensadene ochira daozhe sheitande kieliewo, "Bi Ersa Mexihani niereghala chii fenfulaye, hhei jierese khizhe!" Hhe sheitan danshi khizhewo.
16.19: Hoji oqinni loubanla uzhese baer ireku xiwon widase Baolo Seila ghalai bareidene geidoude khirei noyenyi shida lai echighawo.
16.20: Hhelai laidene noyenlai shida ire kieliewo, "Enezighan kunlashi Yutai kun wo, mai chenshini daolon giezho.
16.21: Hhela matan Loma kunla jienlie dazhi gie daku jiomun chonjizho."
16.22: Olon kunlaye hhantuladene hhelai fandui giezho. Panjiku noyenla fenfulazhi hhelai jienni teighadene banbanghala eghi giezho.
16.23: Hhelai hende eghidene bafanzide khawo. Sagheisan kunde goude uzhe giezhi fenfulawo.
16.24: Sagheisan kun ene minlinni jienliedene hhelani zui jizii bafanzide khazhi ghua kon jierei jieliu zhoghawo. Sagheisan Kun Nie Giechilie Xianxin Giezho
16.25: Banye olukudeni Baolo Seila ghala onxian giezhi Hudade doulazho. Fanrenlaye chenliezho.
16.26: Menzhali zemin hende gojiolu bafanzi jiziye gojioluwo. Ingie bafanzi wijienla man kei echi soyuji fanrenlani jieliu man andawo.
16.27: Sagheisan kun xiereise bafanzi wijienla man keise fanrenla man holuwo giedene khudoghone choui khizhe goyane fugune giezho.
16.28: Ingiekude Baolo fugiede waradazhi kieliewo, "Goyane bu shanji! Bijien man enende wo!"
16.29: Sagheisan kun zhulai kerezhi ire, jiuli bou, pugharazhi Baolo Seila ni melie papalawo.
16.30: Ingie hhelani uduru khizhe kieliewo, "Gujiula, bi matugiese jiuine?"
16.31: Hhela kieliewo, "Ezhan Ersa ni xianxin gie. Ingiese chi, chii nie giechiliei man jiuine."
16.32: Ingie Ezhanni kielienyi hhei nie giechiliede jianjizhi chenlieghawo.
16.33: Yen hhe xii hhe shihoude sagheisan kun hhelani uduruzhi echi shankoulaini waghazhi ogiwo. Ingiedene hhe nie giechiliede man xili gieghawo.
16.34: Ingie sagheisan kun hhelai uduruzhi giedene echi budan ijieghawo. Hhe nie giechilie Hudai xianxin giese hende bayasuzho.
16.35: Khuichudu ogheise noyenla gunnanjilai peizhi iregha "Hhe ghua kunyi andagha." giezhi kieliewo.
16.36: Ingiese sagheisan kun Baolo de kieliewo, "Panjiku noyenla tai andagha giezhi minlin xiaiwo. Ede ta khidene pinnande echi."
16.37: Baolo kieliewo, "Bijienshi Loma kun wo. Bijiende zui ese jinjidene olon kunlai melie bijienni eghizhi dou bafanzide khawo. Ede bijienni zhonmenji andaghanu? Ene ulie olune. Hhela goyalane irezhi bijienni uduzhi khireigha gie."
16.38: Gunnanjila ene kielienyi noyenlade kieliese noyenla hhelashi Loma kun wo giese ayizho.
16.39: Ingiedene ire hhelai sidaghazhi kielie, uduruzhi khizhedene, "Hhe chenshise likai gie!" giezhi xiahua giewo.
16.40: Ghuala bafanzise khizhedene Lijiya ni giede echi gaijiulai ochira, zhichi giedene yolawo.

17.1: Baolo Seila ghala Anfeipoli , Yaboloniya ni daodene Qiesalonijia de irewo. Hhende Yutai kunni nie huitan wine.
17.2: Baolo suchanku xigonghala hhende orozhi lienji ghuran hhamuraku udude kunlare jinwun kielienduzho.
17.3: Mexiha bixi shouku giedene fugusan kun dundase aminne olukui hhelade jianjizhi zhenmin giezho. Pse kieliewo, "Bi tande chonjizhi ogisan ene Ersa shijiu Mexiha wo."
17.4: Hhelai dunda ezighan kunlai kielie shundaghase Baolo Seila i daghazho. Pse Hudai beiisan olon Xila kun, minshentu biereilaye olon daghazho.
17.5: Xianxin ulie giechen Yutai kunla dubiliezhi geidouse ezighan liumanlai uruzhi hhantulagha nie chenshii kunlai shanjidene Yaso ni giede chunji oro, Baolo Seila ghualai ereizhi bexinlade jiuine giezho.
17.6: Ereizhi olu dadene Yaso , giedun gaijiulai laisenu hhe oronni noyenyi shida echi waradazhi kieliewo, "Qienxiani daolon giesan ene iban kunla enende irezho.
17.7: Yaso giedene hhelai jienliewo. Enezighan kunla man Ersa giechen da nie honshan wine giezhi Kaisa i minlinyi fanjizho."
17.8: Olon kunla hhe oronni noyenla ene kielienyi chenliedene jindazho.
17.9: Ingiedene Yaso , psedu kunlai baer faidene andaghawo. Biliyade Chonjizho
17.10: Xienidei gaijiula Baolo Seila ghalai deigo Biliya de echighawo. Ghuala kudene Yutai kunlai huitande echiwo.
17.11: Biliya ni kunla Qiesalonijia kunlase sixian keifan giezho. Daolini rexinde jienliezhi niudunie xianxide jinwunni chaizhi ene daoli oluzhou ese oluzho giezho.
17.12: Ingie hhelai dunda olon kun xianxin giewo. Xila ni minshentu bierei, ere kunlaye choghon uwo.
17.13: Qiesalonijia ni Yutai kunla Baolo Biliya de Hudai kielienyi chonjisei mejiedene hhende echizhi kunlai shanjizhi londaghazho.
17.14: Ingiese gaijiula deigo Baolo i haibienzide echighawo. Seila Qimotai ghala yen Biliya de feiliewo.
17.15: Baolo i khughosan kunla hhei khughozhi Yajien de echighawo. Hhela khareikude Seila Qimotai ghala ghujighande mii enende ire giezhi Baolo fenfulasei deila echiwo. Yajiende Chonjizho
17.16: Baolo Yajien de hhelai sagheikude nie chenshide man nigiedashi hende nango giezho.
17.17: Hhe huitan sudoro Yutai kun, Hudai beiisan niman kunlare jianjinduzho. Pse niudunie geidoude penjisan kunlare jianjiduzho.
17.18: Da niezhan Ibijiulu, Sidoya ghua paini loushilaye Baolo re jianjinduzhi kieliezho, "Ene hulihuduji yan kieliezho?" Pse niezhanla kieliezho, "Hhe hoxianshi niman kunlai nigiedani chonjizho." Ingiezhi kieliekushi Baolo hhelade Ersa fuho giesan daolii jianjizho.
