10.10: Kun zhughedene xianxin giese gounide sanane, amandene chenren giese jiuine.
10.11: Jinwun jiere kieliezho, "Jien hhei xianxin giesan kunla jiuren ulie giene."
10.12: Yutai kun, Xila kun yama chabie uwo. Soyuji kunlade niekozi Ezhan wo, hhei xiahua giesan soyuji kunlade dafande ogine.
10.13: "Jien Ezhanni nierei xiahua giesan kunlai jiuine."
10.14: Qinse kun hhei xianxin ulie giese matugie xiahua giene? Hhei chenliezhi ese daodene matugie xianxin giene? Kieme ulie chonjise matugie chenliene?
10.15: Kiemei ese peise matugie chonjine? Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Gouxioxii chonjisan kunlai koronlon zhengiejia seighan wo!"
10.16: Ingieliuzhe kunla man gouxioxini shunjisan pusho. Isaiya kieliezho, "Ezhan, bijien chonjisanyi kien xianxin giewo?"
10.17: Ingiese xianxin giekushi chenliesanse irezho. Chenliesanshi Mexihani kieliense irezho.
10.18: Bi nie asaye. Kunla ese chenliewu? Kenjin chenliezho. "Hhelai shenqi qienxiade kuruwo. Hhelai kielien duyani uzhude kuruwo."
10.19: Bi pse asaye. Isilie kun yama ulie mejienu? Mejiene! Xien Musa Hudai kielienyi ingiezhi kieliezho, "Bi minzude ulie sanaku minzuni tungo giezhi tai dubilieghane. Bi yama ulie mejiechen minzui tungo giezhi tai hokughane."
10.20: Pse Isaiya danzine fugiedaghazhi Hudai kielienyi ingiezhi kieliezho, "Mii ese ereisan kunlade bi chujiegheghane. Mii xiahua ese giesan kunlade bi xienjighane."
10.21: Isilie kunlade hhe kharei ingiezhi kieliezho, "Bi niudunie kielien ulie chenliezhi jianjinduku bexinlai jienliene giezhi khane rouizho."

11.1: Ingiese bi asaye, Huda goya bexinne bendawu? Kenjin uye! Bishiye Isilie kun, Iburaheimu ni houdei, Bienyamin jiawuse khizhesan wo.
11.2: Huda melie mejiesan bexinlane ese bendazho. Jinwun jiere Iliya i matugie kieliesei ta ulie mejienu? Hhe Hudade Isilie kunlai zhazhi kieliezho,
11.3: "Ezhan, hhela chii xienzhilai alazhi sidagha gieku chii teizii cheiwo. Jianie bi feiliezhi hhela dou mii aminyi kerene."
11.4: Ingiese Huda matugie huida giewo? Bi goyadene oluzhi Bali i ese beiisan 7000 kun feilieghawo giezho.
11.5: Edeku shihouye niekielien wo. Feiliesan kun wine. Hhelai nenjienghala sunghuzho.
11.6: Nenjienghala giese giekughala ese giezho. Qingiese nenjienshi nenjien pusho.
11.7: Ingiese matugie gholuwo? Isilie kunla goya ereisanne ereizhi olu dawo. Zinie Huda sunghusan kunla ereizhi oluwo. Psedu kunlai zhughe khiduzhewo.
11.8: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Huda hhelade sudoku zhughe ogizho nudunlani chanla dane, chighinlaiye sonosu dazhi eli kuwo."
11.9: Pse Dawude kieliewo, "Hhelai ijieku xini sa, on, banjighaku, bouin gieku gholusejiu.
11.10: Hhelai nudun borolozhi chujieghe dasejiu. Hhelai nurun ibeizi ghodeisejiu."
11.11: Ingiese bi asaye, hhela banjise bosizhe danu? Kenjin pusho! Hhela codadene jiuiku niman kunlade echise Isilie kunlai dubilieghazho.
11.12: Isilie kunlai codasan duyai kunlade haochu ireghazho, hhelai ese olusan niman kunlade gounii ireghazho. Qinse Isilie kunlai man jiuiku dunda oroghase ireku gounii genjia fugie uwonu?
11.13: Bi ta niman kunlade kielieye. Bishi niman kunlade peisan shitu wo. Ene wiliei bi fugiede uzhekushi
11.14: goya minzune dubilieghazhi ezighan jiuine giezho.
11.15: Huda hhelai bendadene duyai kunlare goudazho, hhelai jienliese zhengiejia gou uwonu? Fugusanse aminne olusan niekielien wo.
11.16: Hudade ogiku ghurun ganjinshi nieduizi ghurun man ganjin wo. Mutun genzi ganjinshi chalaye ganjin wo.
11.17: Bilase nie ganlan mutunyi giedun chalani ghigha bouzhedene yeganlan chalai chaiwo. Chishijiu chaisan chala wo. Chaisan chala mutun genzise gounii hhantu xiikude
11.18: ghighasan chalade kuai dane. Kuaine giese chi jila. Chi genzii ese qiezhezho, genzi chii qiezhezho.
11.19: Ingiese chi kieliene, 'Hhezighan chalai ghigha bouzhekushi mii chaine giezho.'
11.20: Oluzho! Hhela xianxin ulie giese ghigha bouzhezho, chi xianxin giese beizho. Ingiese ayizhi goyane undude bu uzhe.
11.21: Huda yenlaiku chalai sheise chiiye sheine.
11.22: Ingie uzhese Huda renyi, yenge wo. Hhezighan xinyan jiere banjisan kunlade yenge wo, tande renyi wo. Chi renyideni chanqi kouise beizhoma, pse chiiye ghigha widaghane.
11.23: Isilie kunla ulie guidene xianxin giese yen chaine. Hudade erchan chaiku nenli wine.
11.24: Chishi goya osisan ganlan mutun jierese ghighazhi bouzhedene zeilasan ganlan mutun jiere zhenchan wide chaisan wo. Qinse yenlaiku chalai yenlaiku mutun jiere chaise genjia zhenchan uwonu? Soyuji Isilie Kunlai Man Jiuine
11.25: Gaijiula, bi ene mimii tande mejieghaku duran wo. Pse ta goyalane jienzha wo giene. Ene mimishi niman kunlai jiuiku shuzi kurutula niezhan Isilie kunlai zhughei khiduzheghazho.
11.26: Ingiedene Isilie kunlai man jiuine. Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, " Xiwun se jiuichen khizhezhi Yagebu se xienlian wituni widaghane.
11.27: Hhe shihoude bi hhelai zuini widaghane. Eneshijiu bi hhelare yenjisan kielien wo."
11.28: Gouxioxighala kieliese Isilie kunla Hudare duitou gholudene tande haochu ireghawo. Hhelai xienrenni sunghusei uzhese hhelashi Huda oresan wo.
11.30: Ta eqighandei Hudai ulie shunjiku mutun ede hhelai ulie shunjiku yenyinghala tande kharei ubali xiizho.
11.31: Niekielien wo. Hhela ede uye shunjizhoma, tande ubali xiisan yenyinghala ede hheladeye ubali xiine.
11.32: Huda soyuji kunlai ulie shunjiku dunda oroghazhi khakushi soyuji kunlade ubali xiine giezho.
11.33: Hudai bayan, agheli, erlin matui fugie wo! Hhe panjikui kiema mejie dane! Hhe giekui kiema dunjire dane!
11.34: "Kien Ezhanyi zhughei mejiene? Kien hhende sughachen danlane?"
11.35: "Kien Hudade xien ogidene khareizhi goyadene honjighane?"
11.36: Soyujila man hhense khizhezhi hhende kouizhi hhende oluzho. Kuaikui chanqi hhende ogi! Amine!

12.1: Ingiese gaijiula, bi Hudai ubali xiikughala tai goude fenfulaye. Ta beyene amitu mure danlaghazhi Hudade ogi. Intu mureshi Huda xiqi biku wo, zhiguitu wo. Eneshijiu zhenzhenji beiiku wo.
12.2: Ene duyani bu dagha. Sumulakune arunzhazhi shinishighadene Hudai gou, bayasuku, onqien isii shiizhi mejie.
12.3: Bi made ogisan nenjienghala ta jien kunlade kielieye, goyane texien undude bu uzhe. Goude sumulazhi Huda tande ghughazhi ogisan xianxin gieku fenlianghala goyane heshide uzhe.
12.4: Matanyi nie beye jiere iyanzi olon biliuzhe zoin buxian mutun
12.5: matanye olon woma, Mexihai miende nie beye wo. Nienieji beyede lienjizhi buxiantu iyanzi gholuwo.
12.6: Huda nenjienghalane matande buxiantu nenli ogizho. Hudai kielienyi kieliekushi xianxin gieku kamaghala kielie.
12.8: Zhichi giezhi kieliechenla zhichi gie. Ogichenla dafande ogi. Gonjichenla xiacha giezhi gonji. Ubali xiichenla bayasuzhi gie.
12.9: Orekude jianii bu deila. Doghunnii henji, gounii barei.
12.10: Zhenzhenji orekughala nieniedene ore. Ranjizhi nieniene zunji.
12.11: Langan bu giedene zhughesene rexinde Ezhanni shunji.
12.12: Panjizhi bayasu, kunnan dunda rennai gie, izhi onxian gie.
12.13: Nanxintu shentulade ogi. Bayasuzhi kunlai jienlie.
12.14: Tai heisanlade oluzhi gouni kielie, bu kharadene gouni kielie.
12.15: Bayasuchen kunlare hhantu bayasu, wilachen kunlare hhantu wila.
12.16: Nieniedene heqitughan, goyane undude bu uzhezhi bixin kunlare laiwon gie. Goyane jienzha wo bu gie.
12.17: Kiemade doghunnide doghunnii bouchou bu gie, dajiala gou wo giesan shiqinni jinlianji gie.
12.18: Tande nengou bise jinlianji jien kunlare heqitu.
12.19: Mii orentula, goyane bouchou bu giedene Ezhan hhelai faikui saghei. Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Ezhan kieliezho, 'Bouchoushi bi giekui wo, bi kharulune.'"
12.20: Khareidene chii duitou oliesuse ijiegha. Undasuse ochigha. Chi ingiezhi giese shitan khanni hhei qiorun jiere teizho.
12.21: Goyasene doghunnii bu injigha, gounighala doghunnise inji.

13.1: Jien kunla qienli bareisan noyenlai shunji. Qienlishi man Hudase irezho. Soyuji qienli bareichenlashi Huda jinjisan wo.
13.2: Ingiese qienli bareichenlai fandui giese Huda jinjisanyi fandui giezho. Fandui giesanla goyadene faikui ereizho.
13.3: Noyenlashi gouni giesanlai ayighachen pusho, doghunni giesanlai ayighachen wo. Chi qienli bareichenlase ulie ayine giezhou? Gouni giema, hhela chii kuaine.
13.4: Hhelashi tai haochude olusan Hudai hoji wo. Chi doghunni giese indan ayikui wo. Hhela khudoghoi belien bareisan pusho. Hhelashi doghunni giesan kunlai faichen Hudai hoji wo.
13.5: Ingiese ta bixi shunji, zinie Hudai hokuruku yenyinghala pusho, lianxinni yenyinghala wo.
13.6: Ta shui ogikuyeshi ene yenyin wo. Hhelashi zhomen ene shiqinyi gonjisan Hudai hoji wo.
13.7: Jien kunlade indan ogikui ogi. Shui ghurasande shui ogi, baer ghurasande baer ogi. Indan zunjichenlai zunji, danren giekulai danren gie. Oreku Guijinni Chenjighawo
13.8: Nieniedene orekuse chugo kiemade zhan bu chai. Kunlade orechenla guijinni chenjighawo.
13.9: Piofen bu gie, kun bu ala, bu ghula, tanxin bu gie giesan minlin, psedu guijinla man goyadene mutun giebeidene ore giesan ene minlinde bouizho.
13.10: Orechen kun giebeidene doghunni ulie giene. Ingiese oreku guijinni chenjighawo.
13.11: Ingiekushi edeshi yan shihou bikui ta mejiene. Ta hhunturazhi xiereiku shihou wo. Matanyi jiuiku matan dei xianxin gieku shihouse ede chadashizho.
13.12: Xieni daozhi ogheine giezho. Ingiese matan kharanide giesan shiqinlai jiedene gieghantu baohu gieku majiani musiye.
13.13: Matan udude gieku mutun yan gieliuzhe donzhende gieye. Lon naduzhi sudoku, lon kijiezhi hu gieku, jianjinduzhi dubilieku enelai bu gieye.
13.14: Khareidene Ezhan Ersa Mexihai musi. Zui gieku durande jihui bu ogizhi nefuxinni bu dagha.

14.1: Xianxin gieku zholientu kunlai ta jienlie. Ijien buxianshi bu jianjindu.
14.2: Niezhan kunla yanniliuzhe ijiese olune giezhi xianxin giezho. Xianxin gieku zholientu kunla zinie cai ijiene.
14.3: Migha ijiesan kunla migha ese ijiesan kunlai meilade bu uzhe, migha ese ijiesan kunla migha ijiesan kunlai bu kielie. Huda hhelai jienliewo.
14.4: Kunlai hojii kieliezhi chishi kien wo? Hhela olu, ulie olu ezhanyini shiqin wo. Ezhande olughaku nengou wine. Ingiese hhe olu shidane.
14.5: Niezhan kunla enenie udui psedu udulase zhunyo wo giezho. Niezhan kunla niuduniei uzhedan niekielien wo giezho. Alinie kunliuzhe zhughedene oluzhou ese olusei jiejin gie gie.
14.6: Udu jilasan kunla Ezhande oluzhi udu jilazho. Ijiesan kunla Hudade mafan giedene Ezhande oluzhi ijiezho. Ese ijiesan kunlaye Hudade mafan kieliedene Ezhande oluzhi ese ijiezho.
14.7: Matan alinie kunliuzhe goyadene oluzhi ese amiturazho. Goyadene oluzhiye ulie fugune.
14.8: Matan amitushi Ezhande oluzhi amiturazho. Fuguseye Ezhande oluzhi fugune. Ingiese matan amitura, fuguliuzhe Ezhannughun wo.
14.9: Mexiha fugusan kun, amitu kunde Ezhan danlane giezhi duya ijiedene aminne oluwo.
14.10: Matan man Hudai shenpantai melie beine. Chi yale gaijiune kieliene? Chi yale gaijiune meilade uzhene?
14.11: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Ezhan kieliewo, 'Bi goyane aminghala fayen gieye. Soyuji odoula made xiutuliene. Soyuji amanla bishi Huda wo giezhi chenren giene.'"
14.12: Ingiese matan alinie kunliuzhe Hudai melie goyane shiqinyi jiodai giene. Gaijiulane Zui Bu Fanjigha
14.13: Ingiese matan nieniene bu kielieye. Jiexin xiaizhi gaijiulai melie boujia, banjighaku dunxii bu tei.
14.14: Bi Ezhan Ersa i xianxin giezhi kenjin mejiene. Yandeliuzhe benshen ganjin wituni uwo. Zinie kun ganjin uwo giese hhende ganjin uwo.
14.15: Chi ijiunighala gaijiulane munan gieghase oreku daolighala ese giezho. Mexiha hhende oluzhi duya ijiewo, chi goyane ijiunighala hhei baxi bu olugha.
14.16: Ingiese ta goya gounine kunlai bu sugiegha.
14.17: Hudai gojiashi ijieku, ochiku pusho, Shenlin ogisan gundan, heqi, bayasuku wo.
14.18: Mexihani ingiezhi shunjisan kunde Huda bayasune, kunlaye kuaine.
14.19: Ingiese matan heqituzhi nieniene hendaghakui xiacha gieye.
14.20: Ijiunighala Hudai wiliei bu qida olugha. Manshi ganjinni woma, chi ijiedene kunlai zui fanjighase ese oluzho.
14.21: Migha ijie, jiu ochi, pse yan shiqindeliuzhe gaijiulani zui fanjighakui ulie giese gou wo.
14.22: Chi xianxin giesanne Hudai melie goude barei. Kun goyane gou wo giesan shiqinyi giedene gui ulie teise fuqi wine.
14.23: Inxin giezhi ijiese zui jinjine. Xianxin giekughala ese ijiezho. Xianxin giekughala giesanni pushoshi man zui wo.

15.1: Matan khidun kunla indan goyane bu bayasughazhi khidun witu kunlai zholiennii danjikuni wo.
15.2: Matan alinie kunliuzhe kunlai haochude oluzhi bayasughazhi hhelai hendaghakuni wo.
15.3: Mexihaye goyane ese bayasughazho. Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Chii sugiesan kunlai sugieku man mii jiere irewo."
15.4: Eqighandei huaisan jinwunshi man matande oluzhi sughazhi huaisan wo. Hhe matai rennai gieghazhi sughazhi kieliedene matande xiwon ogizho.
15.5: Bi onxian giese rennai gieghazhi sughazhi kieliesan Huda tai sumuladanyi Mexiha Ersa i daghazhi nie gholughadene
15.6: dajiala man hhantu mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihani Ada Hudai kuai! Soyuji Minzula Hudade Doulane
15.7: Ingiese Mexiha tai jienlieku mutun taye nieniene jienliezhi Hudai kuai.
15.8: Bi kieliese Mexiha Hudai zhendaode oluzhi Yutai kunlade hoji danlazhi xienrenlade dain giesei chenjighawo,
15.9: pse niman kunlai Huda hhelade ubali xiisande kuaighazho. Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Ingiese bi niman kunlai dunda chii chenren giene. Bi donghala chii nierei doulane."
15.10: Pse kieliezho, "Niman kunla, ta Ezhanyi bexinlare hhantu bayasundu."
15.11: Pse, "Soyuji niman kunla, ta Ezhande doulandu. Soyuji minzula, hhende doulandu!"
15.12: Pse Isaiya kieliezho, "Jianlai Yexi ni houdei irene. Hhe khizhedene niman kunlai gonjine. Niman kunla hhei xiwon giene."
15.13: Xiwon ogisan Huda ta xianxin giekude yanyanji bayasukui, pinnanni tai zhughede durughazhi Shenlinni nenlighala xiwon olon ogi gie! Niman Kunlade Chonjiku Baoloni Wilie
15.14: Mii gaijiula, tande gouni, yanyanji agheli duruzhi ta nieniedene surugha shidakui bi kenjin mejiene.
15.15: Ingieliuzhe bi niezhan shiqin jiere tai sumula ireghane giezhi danzine fugiedaghazhi tande xin huaikushi Huda made ogisan nenjienghala
15.16: bi niman kunlade oluzhi Mexiha Ersa de wiliechi danlazho. Bi hhelade Hudai gouxioxii chonjise buwa niekielien wo. Shenlinyi tungo giezhi hhelai zhiguishighadene jienlieku mure mutun Hudade ogizho.
15.17: Ingiese Mexiha Ersa i miende bi Hudade oluzhi giesan shiqinde kuaikui wine.
15.18: Niman kunlai shunjighane giezhi Mexiha mii tungo giezhi giesan wiliese chugo bi psedulai yama ulie kieliene. Hheshi kielienji, giekughala giesan wo.
15.19: Ghudureqi, fugie shiqinyi nenlighala, pse Hudai Ruhheryi nenlighala giesan wo. Bi Mexihai gouxioxii Yelusalen se izhi Ililigu de man chonji kurughawo.
15.20: Ingiezhi bi Mexihani nierei chenliezhi ese daosan oronlade chonjine giezhi hende duralakushi kunlai jigun jiere gie ulie beighane giezho.
15.21: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Hhei xioxii mejie dasanla chanlane. Chenliezhi ese daosanla dunjirene." Baolo Lomade Echiku Jihua
15.22: Ene yenyin jiere bi tai hhende haojihui echine giezhoma, echi dazho.
15.23: Ede ene oronlade chonjiku oron widazho, pse haojinien bi tai hhende echiku duralazho.
15.24: Ingiese bi Xibenya de echikude tai ochira, xien nietan laiwon giezhi xianshou giedene ta mii khughose giezhi xiwon giezho.
15.25: Ingiezhoma, ede bi Yelusalen de echizhi shentulade banman giene giezho.
15.26: Maqidun , Yagaiya ni kunla Yelusalen ni nanxintu shentulade banman giene giezhi bayasuzhi baer khireighawo.
15.27: Hhela enei bayasuzhi giekushi shuhuajia shentulade chaizho. Niman kunla hhelase ruhher jieredu haochui ghughazhi echise hhela injikude banman giese indanji wo.
15.28: Ingiese bi kunla khireighasanni goude jiuizhi ogi ene shiqinyi onchen giedene tai hhense jingo giezhi Xibenya de echine.
15.29: Bi tai hhende irekude Mexihani olon nenjienni deilazhi irekui bi mejiene.
15.30: Gaijiula, bi matanyi Ezhan Ersa Mexiha, Shenlinni orekughala tande goude fenfulaye. Ta mare hhantu xiacha giezhi made oluzhi Hudase ingiezhi onxian gie,
15.31: "Mii Yudaya oronni xianxin ulie giechen kunlai khade bu oroghazhi bi Yelusalen de banman giesan shiqinde shentulai bayasuzhi jienliegha gie.
15.32: Pse mii Hudai isighala tai hhende bayasuzhi iregha tanre hhantu hhamuragha gie."
15.33: Pinnan ogisan Huda ta dajialare hhantu bi gie. Amine!

16.1: Bi Jiengeli ni jiohuide gonjia danlasan mai eghechijiu Feibi ni tande jieshao gieye.
16.2: Ta Ezhanni miende hhei shentula indan gieku mutun heshide jienlie. Hhe yan shiqinde banman kerese banman gie. Hhe olon kunlade banman giezho, madeye banman giezho.
16.3: Baijila , Yajila de kielien asa. Hhela Mexiha Ersa i miende mare hhantu wilie giezho.
16.4: Mii aminde oluzhi goya aminne ese kerewo. Zinie bi hhelade mafan kielieku pusho, niman kunlai jiohuila man hhelade mafan kieliezho.
16.5: Pse hhelai gieni jiohuii kunlade kielien asa. Bi oresan Ibainitu de kielien asa. Hheshi Yaxiya oronyi ji 1 gie Mexihai xianxin giesan kun wo.
16.6: Mereiyen de kielien asa. Hhe tande oluzhi hende khishulazho.
16.7: Mare hhantu bafanzi sousan mii qingu Andonigu , Yuniya de kielien asa. Hhela shitulai dunda minshen fugie wo, mase melie Mexihai xianxin giezho.
16.8: Ezhanyi miende bi oresan Anboli de kielien asa.
16.9: Mexihai miende matanre hhantu wilie giesan Erbanu , pse bi oresan Shidagu de kielien asa.
16.10: Mexihai miende olune giesan Yabili de kielien asa. Yalidobu i giei kunlade kielien asa.
16.11: Mii qingu Xiloqien de kielien asa. Naqishu giei Ezhanyi miendedu kunlade kielien asa.
16.12: Ezhanyi miende khishulasan Tufeina Tufusa ghualade kielien asa. Ezhanyi miende hende khishulasan oresan Bixi de kielien asa.
16.13: Ezhanyi miende sunghusan Lufu , hhei anadeni kielien asa. Hhei ana made ana danlazho.
16.14: Yaxinqitu , Fulegan , Xiermi , Baloba , Heima , pse hhelare hhantuku gaijiulade kielien asa.
16.15: Feilologu , Yuliya ghala, Niliya , hhei eghechijiughala, Alinba , pse hhelare hhantuku shentulade man kielien asa.
16.16: Ta zhughesene nieniedene kielien asa. Mexihani jiohuila man tande kielien asazho. Zuihoude Sughaku
16.17: Gaijiula, bi tai xiahua gieye, ta surusan daolini fandui giezhi tai khudoghozhi banjighachen hhezighan kunlase gholodo.
16.18: Imutu kunla mai Ezhan Mexihai ulie shunjizhi zinie goya shiqinne guizhi kuaiku seighan kielienghala loushi kunlai miine.
16.19: Tai shunjisan shiqinla gochude chonji kuruzho. Ingiese bi tande oluzhi bayasuzho. Mii duranshi ta gou shiqin jiere jienzhaghan, doghun shiqin jiere menghan.
16.20: Pinnan ogisan Huda Ibilisii kon douratai taizhi ireghaku ghujinlazho. Matanyi Ezhan Ersa Mexihani nenjien tanre hhantu bi gie!
16.21: Mare hhantu wilie giesan Qimotai , mii qingu Luqiu , Yaso , Soxibade enela tande kielien asazho.
16.22: Made xin deilazhi huaisan Deqi Ezhanyi miende tande kielien asazho.
16.23: Mii jienliezhi jiohuini kunlai man jienliesan Gaiyu tande kielien asazho. Chenshii baer gonjisan Iladu , mai gaijiu Kotu ghala tande kielien asazho. Doulaku
16.25: Hudade kuaikui ogi. Bi chonjisan Ersa Mexihai gouxioxighala, eqighanku gonyinni niuighasan mimii mejieghakughala Huda tai khiduzhegha shidane.
16.26: Ene mimi ede xienjizhi khizhezho. Chanqiku Hudai minlin mutun xienzhilai shuni tungo giezhi soyuji minzulade mejieghadene hhelai xianxin gieghazhi shunjighawo.
16.27: Ersa Mexihai tungo giezhi zi niekozi aghelitu Hudade chanqi kuaikui ogi. Amine!

1.1: Hudai isighala urudene Ersa Mexihade shitu danlasan Baolo Soqini gaijiughala
1.2: Gelindo ni Hudai jiohuide xin huaizho. Tai Mexiha Ersa i miende zhiguishighazho, gochude mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihai nierei xiahua giesan kunlare hhantu man shentu giezhi uruzho. Mexihashi hhelai Ezhan wo, mai Ezhanye enbene.
1.3: Mai Ada Huda, Ezhan Ersa Mexiha tande nenjien, pinnan ogi gie!
1.4: Huda Mexiha Ersa i miende tande nenjien ogise bi tande oluzhi bi zunjisan Hudade chan mafan kieliezho.
1.5: Ta hhei sudoro kielien kielieku, erlin, yanyanjilai jiere man hendazho.
1.6: Ingiezhi Mexihade beisan ganzhen tai dunda khiduzhezho.
1.7: Ta nenjien jiere yama ese chaizhi mai Ezhan Ersa Mexiha xienjikui sagheizho.
1.8: Huda tai zuihou kutula khiduzheghazhi mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihani udude ulie kheilaghane.
1.9: Hudashi kekaoni wo, hhe tai uruzhi goya kewonre, yeshijiu mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihare laiwon gieghazho. Gelindo Jiohuini Maodun
1.10: Gaijiula, mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihani niereghala bi tai goude fenfulaye, ta man xianlitu kielien kielie. Tai dunda maodun bu khizhezhi nie zhughe nie sumuladanghala goude heqishi.
1.11: Mii gaijiula, tai dunda maodun wine giezhi Gelai ni giededu kunla made kieliezho.
1.12: Mii isishi ta jien kunla, "Bishi Baolo nughun wo," "Bishi Yabolo nughun wo," "Bishi Jifa nughun wo," "Bishi Mexihanughun wo." giezhi kieliezho.
1.13: Mexihashi fenkai giesanni onu? Baolo tande oluzhi shizijia jiere fuguwu? Ta Baolo ni niereghala xili jienliewu?
1.14: Bi Jilisibu , Gaiyu ghalase chugo pse tai dunda kiemade xili ese gieghasande Hudade mafan kieliezho.
1.15: Pse ta mii niereghala xili jienliewo giezhi kunla kieliene.
1.16: Bi Siqifana i gieni kunladeye xili gieghazhi daozho, psedu kunlade xili gieghazhi daozhoyeshi bi matazho.
1.17: Mexiha mii peikushi xili gieghaku pusho, gouxioxii chonjighaku wo. Bi aghelitu kielienghala ese chonjizho, pse Mexihani shizijiai zoin widane. Mexihashi Hudai Nenli Agheli Wo
1.18: Shizijiani daoli hhezighan widachen kunladeshi ben wo, matan enezighan ji0 uisan kunladeshi Hudai nenli wo.
1.19: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Bi aghelitu kunlai aghelini widaghane, jienzhatu kunlai jienzhani bendane."
1.20: Aghelitu kun khala wo? Hanjia khala wo? Ene duyani erlintu kun khala wo? Huda ene duyai aghelini benni ese gholughazhou?
1.21: Duya goya aghelighalane Hudai ese taniwo. Ingiese Huda kunla benni wo giesan bijien chonjisan daolighala xianxin giesan kunlai jiuine giezhi jiejin giewo. Eneshi Hudai agheli wo.
1.22: Yutai kun ghudureqi kerezho, Xila kun agheli ereizhoma,
1.23: bijien chonjisanshi shizijia jiere ghadasan Mexiha wo. Eneshi Yutai kunde banjiku tashi wo, niman kunde benni woma,
1.24: bugon Yutai kun niman kun, Huda urusan kunde Mexihashi Hudai nenli, Hudai agheli wo.
1.25: Hudai benni kunni aghelise fama wo. Hudai zholienni kunni khidunnise khidun wo.
1.26: Gaijiula, tai urusanni nie sumula. Kunni isighala kieliese tai dunda aghelitu, nenlitu, zhiguitu kun choghon wo.
1.27: Huda duya jieredu bennilai sunghuzhi aghelitulai shizheghazho. Huda duya jieredu zholiennilai sunghuzhi khidunnilai shizheghazho.
1.28: Huda duya jieredu kunla uzhezhi xiniesan, henjisan, yama witu kunlai sunghuzhi winetulai widaghazho.
1.29: Ingiese kun kiemada Hudai melie goyane kuai dane.
1.30: Ingiezhoma, Huda tai Mexiha Ersa re hhantulaghazho. Hhe Hudase irezhi mai agheli, gundan, zhigui, shuiku gholuwo.
1.31: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Kien kuaise Ezhanyi kuai."

2.1: Gaijiula, eqighandei bi tai hhende echizhi Hudai mimii chonjikude seighan kielien, aghelighala ese giezho.
2.2: Bi tai dunda bikude zinie Ersa Mexiha, pse hhei shizijia jiere ghadasanse chugo psedulai ulie mejiene giezhi jiejin giewo.
2.3: Bi tai hhendeshi zholien, ayi, hende pugharazho.
2.4: Bi kieliezhi chonjikude seighan, aghelitu kielienghala ese giezhi Shenlinni nenlighala zhenmin giezho.
2.5: Ingiese tai xianxin gieku kunni aghelide ese kouizho, Hudai nenlide kouizho. Hudai Agheli
2.6: Ingiezhoma, xinyan jiere qiendasan kunlade bijien aghelini jianjizho. Eneshi duyai agheli pusho, duyai qienlini bareizhi widachen kunlai agheliye pusho.
2.7: Bijien jianjisanshi eqighandei niuighasan Hudai mimitu agheli wo. Eneshi Huda duyai zhayaghaku melie matande famai ogine giezhi jinjisan wo.
2.8: Ene aghelini duyani qienli bareichen kunla dunda mejiechen nieda uwo. Hhela mejiezhoshi famatu Ezhanyi shizijia jiere ulie ghadane.
2.9: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Hudade oresan kunlade Huda zhunbei giesanshi nudunghala uzhezhi ese daosan wo, chighinghala chenliezhi ese daosan wo, kunni zhugheye sumulazhi ese daosan wo."
2.10: Ingiezhoma, matande Huda Shenlinni tungo giezhi mejieghawo. Shenlin yanniliuzhe mejiene, lien Hudai chijia isiniye mejiene.
2.11: Kunni sudorodu ruhherse chugo kunni shiqinni kien mejiene? Niekielien wo, Hudai Ruhherse chugo Hudai shiqinni kiema mejie dane.
2.12: Matan jienliesanshi duya jieredu ruhher pusho, Hudase iresan ruhher wo, ingiese Huda matande ogisan nenjienlai matan mejiene.
2.13: Bijienye enelai jianjikude kunni agheli sughasan kielienghala ese giezho, Shenlin sughasanghala giezho. Ruhhertu shiqinlai ruhhertu kielienghala mejieghane.
2.14: Hudai Ruhher uwotu kunla Hudai ruhher ogisanlai jienlie dane. Hhela enei ben wo giezho, ye dunjire dane. Ene shiqinlai zinie ruhherghala uzhe khizhene.
2.15: Ruhhertu kunla yan shiqinniliuzhe uzhe khizhenema, kiema hhelai uzhezhi khizhe dane.
2.16: "Kien Ezhanyi zhughei mejiene? Kien hhende surughane?" Mai kieliese matande Mexihani zhughe wine.

3.1: Gaijiula, bi eqighandei tande kielien kieliekude tai ruhhernughun danlagha dazhi beyenughun danlaghazho. Mexihai miende tai yeliwa mutun uzhezho.
3.2: Bi tande budan ese qiezhezhi neizi qiezhekushi ta budanyi ijie dane, edeliuzhe ijie dane.
3.3: Tashi beyenughun wo. Tai sudoro dubilieku, jianjinduku wine. Eneshi beyenughun pushonu? Zhao duyani kunla giesan mutun ese giezhou?
3.4: Niezhan kunla kieliese bi Baolo ni daghazho. Niezhan kunla kieliese bi Yabolo i daghazho giezho. Ingiezhi ta duyai kunlare niekielien pushonu?
3.5: Yabolo shi kien wo? Baolo shi kien wo? Manshi wiliechi wo, zhao Ezhan nieniede ogisan renwughala tai xianxin gieghasan wo.
3.6: Bi tareiwo, Yabolo usu teiwo, osighasanshi Huda wo.
3.7: Ingiese tareisan, usu kiesan yama pusho, zinie osighasan Huda hen wo.
3.8: Tareisan, usu kiesanghala niekielien wo, zhao nieniede wilie giesan mutun gunzi ogine.
3.9: Bijienshi hhantu wilie giesan Hudai wiliechi wo. Tashi Hudai ghazha, mechi wo.
3.10: Zhao Huda made ogisan nenjienghala bi nie hen guntou mutun jichui daizho, psedu kun jiereni gie giezhoma, jien kun matugie giekui xioxin gie.
3.11: Ene dai goudaghasan jichushi Ersa Mexiha wo, psedu jichui kiemada dai dane.
3.12: Ene jichu jiere kienliuzhe antan, miengu, boushi, mutun, osun, ghuyughala gie giese
3.13: panjiku udude jien kunla giesei xienjizhi khizheghane, khanghala khizheghane. Goya giesanla matugiezho giezhi ene khan shiine.
3.14: Gie giesan kun hhe jichu jiere giesan bei shidase hhende jianli ogine.
3.15: Giesanni sidera widase hhe kuiine. Hhei jiuinema, jiuiku hoxian khan dundase holu khizheku niekielien wo.
3.16: Tashi Hudai dajien bikui, pse Hudai ruhher tai sudoro sousanyi ta ulie mejienu?
3.17: Kien Hudai dajienyi qida olughase Huda hhe kunyi qida olughane. Hudai dajienshi zhiguitu wo, tashi ene dajien wo.
3.18: Kienliuzhe goyane bu pienda. Tai dunda kun goyane ene duyade agheli wine giezhi sumulase benni gholu. Ingiese aghelitu gholune.
3.19: Ene duyani aghelii Huda uzhese benni wo. Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Ezhan aghelitu kunlai jienzhanii hhelai bareiku on gholughawo."
3.20: Pse huaizho, "Aghelitu kunlai sumulaku yama isi witui Ezhan mejiene."
3.21: Ingiese kienliuzhe kunni bu kuai, yanliuzhe manshi tanughun wo.
3.22: Baolo , Yabolo , Jifa , duya, amituku, fuguku, edeku shiqin, jianlaiku shiqin manshi tanughun wo.
3.23: Tashi Mexihanughun wo, Mexihashi Hudanughun wo.

4.1: Ingiese ta bijienyi Mexihani wiliechi, pse Hudai chijia daolini gonjia danlaghakui wo.
4.2: Gonjiade yoqiu giekushi shixinji giekui wo.
4.3: Ta mii kielie yehao kunla kielie yehao bi yamacha ulie teine. Bi goyane goya ulie kieliene.
4.4: Bi sumulase mii lianxinde yama ese chaizhoma, ingieliuzhe minughun man oluzho giezhi kielie dane. Mii kieliekushi Ezhan wo.
4.5: Ingiese shihou ese kuzhezhi Ezhan ese iretula ta kienyiliuzhe bu kielie. Hhe irese kharade niuighasanlai zhouizhi khizheghane, kunyi zhughei mujilai khizheghane. Hhe shihoude Huda jien kunlai kuaine.
4.6: Gaijiula, bi tande oluzhi ene shiqin jiere Yabolo ji goyane bilazhi yanzi uzheghazho. Ingiekushi jinwun jiere jilasanse bu daogha giesan isii ta bijiense suru giezho, pse tai dunda kienliuzhe goyane bu kondazhi ene niei fugiede uzhe, hhe niei meilade uzhe bu gie giezho.
4.7: Kien chii kunlare niekielien pusho giezho? Chii alinieshi chade ogisan pusho? Ogisan enbese ogisan pusho giezhi yale goyane kuaine?
4.8: Ta ijin chuduzho, ijin bayazhewo. Bijiense chugo ta honshan danlawo. Mii xiwonshi ta zhenzhenji honshan danlama, bijienye tanre hhantu danlaye!
4.9: Bi sumulase Huda bijien shitu danlasanlai zhan eghisanse barei ire sixin panjisan kun mutun zui khuina teizhi kunlade uzheghasanyi xianli. Bijienyi xi mutun duyani kunlade, qienxienlade uzheghazho.
4.10: Bijien Mexihani yenyinghala benni gholuzho, ta Mexihai miende jienzhani gholuzho. Bijien zholien wo, ta khidun wo, kunla tai kuaizho, bijienyi meilade uzhezho.
4.11: Eli kuliuzhe bijien oliesuzhi undasuzho, hulan muchughun wo, kunlase neizhi souku oron uwo.
4.12: Khishulazhi goyane khaghala wilie giezho. Kunla kharase bijien gounii kieliezho, kunla heise rennai giezho.
4.13: Kunla bijienyi sugiese bijien gou kielienghala khareizhi kieliezho. Edeliuzhe bijien duya jieredu zannanni, yanyanjilai dundadu laji gholuzho.
4.14: Bi enei huaise tai shizheghane ese giezho, goya oresan kesilane mutun tande jingao giezho.
4.15: Mexihai miende tande loushi olon no woma, ada olon uwo. Bi gouxioxii chonjizhi Mexiha Ersa i miende tande ada danlazho.
4.16: Ingiese bi tai goude fenfulaye, ta mii yanzii suru.
4.17: Ene yenyin jiere bi Qimotai ni peizhi tai hhende echighawo. Hheshi Ezhanyi miende bi oresan shixinji kewon wo. Hhe tai qixin giezhi bi Mexiha Ersa i sudoro matugie giesei, pse go oron, go jiohuilade matugie sughasei jilaghane.
4.18: Tai dunda niezhan kunla sumulase bi tai hhende ulie irene giezhi goyalane fugiede uzhezho.
4.19: Ingieliuzhe Ezhan duran bise bi tai hhende ghujighan echidene goyane fugiede uzhesanlai kielienni ulie uzhene, nenlii uzhene.
4.20: Hudai gojiashi kieliende uwo, nenlide wo.
4.21: Ta yan kerene? Bi banban bareizhi tai faile iremu, oreku, renyitu zhugheghala ire?

5.1: Bi chenliese shuhuajia tai dunda lon kijieku shiqin wine. Intu shiqin niman kunlai dundaliuzhe uwo. Nie kun goya khuitu anarene kijiezho.
5.2: Ta dou goyalane fugiede uzhene. Ta indan hende nango giekui wo. Ene shiqinni giesan kunni tai dundase tou khighakui wo!
5.3: Mii kun tanre hhantu uwoma, zhughemi tanre hhantu wo. Bi tai hhende bisan mutun intu shiqinyi giesan kunyi Ezhan Ersa i niereghala ijin zui jinjiwo.
5.4: Ta hhantulazhi mii zhughe tanre hhantu bikude mai Ezhan Ersa ni qienlighala
5.5: intu kunni Ibiliside jiuizhi beyeni huailugha gie, ingiese ruhheryini Ezhanni udude jiuine.
5.6: Ta goyalane kuaise ese oluzho. Goujinie kunieghe nie duizi ghurunni man faighakui ta ulie mejienu?
5.7: Tashi tanmien woshi khuichen kunieghei widaghadene shini ghurun gholu. Matanyi Jiulidaosan Jieni ghoni ghughan yeshijiu Mexihai ijin zharuzhi sidagha giewo.
5.8: Ingiese matan jieqi daoghase doghun, mouxientu khuichen kuniegheghala bu daoghadene ganjin, shixintu tanmienghala daoghaye.
5.9: Bi eqighandei tande xin huaizhi ta lon kijiechen kunlare laiwon bu gie giezhi kieliewo.
5.10: Mii isishi ene duyadedu lon kijiechen, tanxin giechen, piendachen, nigiedai beiichen kunlare jiedui laiwon bu gie giekui pusho. Qingiese ta ene duyase likai giese da gou wo.
5.11: Ede bi ene xinni tande huaikushi goyaneshi xianxin giesan gaijiu wo giedene lon kijiesan, tanxin giesan, nigiedai beiisan, kun sugiesan, jiu ochisan, piendasan intui giesan kunlare ta laiwon bu giezhi budanye hhantu bu ijie giezho.
5.12: Ghadanedu kunyi bi kheilaku pushoma, sudorodu kunyi ta kheilaku pushonu?
5.13: Ghadanedu kunyi Huda panjine. "Ta dundasene mouxien kunlai tou khigha."

6.1: Tai dunda jianjinduku shiqin bidene matugie shentulade ese zhazhi gou witu kunlade zhale echizho?
6.2: Shentula duyai panjikui ta ulie mejienu? Ta duyai panjise ene ga shiqinlai panji danu?
6.3: Matan qienxienlai panjikui ta ulie mejienu? Ingiese duyai shiqinni yan sanane?
6.4: Ingiese jiohuide intu shiqin bise matugie jiohui zunzhun ese giesan kunlai panjighane?
6.5: Bi ingiezhi kieliekushi tai shizheghane giezho. Tai dunda gaijiulai shiqinyi chuli gieku aghelitu kun nieda uwonu?
6.6: Tai dunda gaijiula gaijiulai zhazhi dou xianxin ulie giechen kunlai melie zhale echiwo.
6.7: Ta nieniene zhase tanughun fugiede codazho. Ta yale bixinde ulie beizhi kui ulie ijiene?
6.8: Ta khareidene kunlai bixindaghazhi kuighazho, hhelashi goyai gaijiu wo.
6.9: Gou witu kunla Hudai gojiai jienlie dakui ta ulie mejienu? Goyane bu pienda, lon kijiechen, nigiedai beiichen, piofen giechen, ere kun biozi danlachen, tunxinlien giechen,
6.10: ghulachen, tanxin giechen, sudochen, kunni sugiechen, piendachen enela Hudai gojiani jienlie dane.
6.11: Tai dunda niezhan kunla eqighandei intui giezhi daozhoma, ede Ezhan Ersa Mexihani niere, pse mai Hudai ruhherni tungo giezhi tai ijin waghazho, zhiguishighazho, gounide sanazho. Beyeghalane Hudai Kuai
6.12: Goyane yan shiqin gieliuzhe olune giezhi kunla kieliezhoma, man haochu bikui pusho. Bi yan shiqin gieliuzhe oluzhoma, alinie shiqinniliuzhe bi goyane kunzhi ulie gieghane.
6.13: Ijiuni kielide oluzho, kieli ijiunide oluzho giezhoma, Huda ene ghualai widaghane. Beyeshi lon kijiekude giesan pusho, Ezhande oluzhi giesan wo, Ezhan kunni beyede oluzho.
6.14: Huda Ezhanyi aminne olughazhi maiye goya nenlighalane aminne olughane.
6.15: Tai beyeshi Mexihani iyanzi bikui ta ulie mejienu? Bi Mexihani iyanzii biozini iyanzi gholughazhi olunu? Kenjin ulie olune!
6.16: Biozighala hhantulase hheghala nie beye gholukui ta ulie mejienu? Jinwun jiere kieliezho, "Ghuala nie beye gholune."
6.17: Ezhanghala hhantulasan kun Ezhanghala nie ruhher gholune.
6.18: Ta lon kijieku shiqinse pii. Kun yan zui fanjiliuzhe beye ghadane giezho, zinie lon kijiekushi goyai beye jiere giezho.
6.19: Tai beyeshi Huda tande ogisan Shenlin tai sudoro souku dajien bikui ta ulie mejienu? Tashi goyanughun pusho,
6.20: fugie jiageghala agizhi iresan wo. Ingiese ta beyeghalane Hudai kuai.

7.1: Xin jiere ta qiisan shiqinni kielieye. Ere kun eme kunni ulie shighase gou wo giezhoma,
7.2: lon kijieku shiqinlase ayizhi ere kunde bierei bise gou wo, eme kunde zhanguiji bise gou wo.
7.3: Zhanguiji biereidene zhanguiji danlaku zherenyi feii, biereiye zhanguijidene ingiezhi gie.
7.4: Bierei goya beyene gonjiku qienli uwo, qienli zhanguijide wo. Zhanguijiye goya beyene gonjiku qienli uwo, qienli biereide wo.
7.5: Ghuala nieniene bu kuigha. Zinie zhomen onxian giene giese ghuala tunyi bise zhanshi jiere danlin kijiese olune. Khuinashi ghuala hhantula, pse ta goyane kunzhi gie dakude Ibilisi miine.
7.6: Bi ingiezhi kieliese tande minlin ese xiaizho, ijien qilazho.
7.7: Mii xiwonshi kunla man bi mutun woshi giezhoma, jien kun Hudase jienliesan nenjien buxian wo. Niezhanla ingiezho, niezhanla qingiezho.
7.8: Jiehun ese giesan, pse guafulai kieliese hhela bi mutun jiehun ulie giese gou woma,
7.9: goyane kunzhi gie dase jiehun giekui wo. Zhughe tuliezhi bazilie datula jiehun giese gou wo.
7.10: Jiehun giesanlade bi fenfulaye. Eneshi bi fenfulasan pusho, Ezhan fenfulasan wo. Bierei zhanguijisene bu danxinra.
7.11: Danxinrase pse jiehun bu gie, yen zhanguijighalane gouda. Ere kunye biereine bu benda.
7.12: Psedu kunlade bi kielieye. Eneshi Ezhan kieliesan pusho, bi kieliesan wo. Xianxin giesan gaijiude xianxin ese giesan bierei bizhi hhe bierei hhere hhantu udu daoku duran bise hhei bu benda.
7.13: Biereide xianxin ese giesan zhanguiji bizhi hhe zhanguiji hhere hhantu udu daoku duran bise hhei bu benda.
7.14: Ese xianxin giesan zhanguiji biereini yenyinghala zhiguitu gholune. Ese xianxin giesan bierei zhanguijini yenyinghala zhiguitu gholune. Pse tai kesila ganjin uwoma, ede hhela zhiguitu wo.
7.15: Xianxin ese giesan kun danxinrane giese hhei danxinragha. Intu shiqinde xianxin giesan gaijiu eghechijiulade ziyu wine. Huda tai urukushi tai heqishighane giezho.
7.16: Bierei danlachen, chii tungo giezhi zhanguijiichii kenen jiui shidane. Zhanguiji danlachen, chii tungo giezhi biereinichii kenen jiui shidane. Urusan Mutun Udu Dao
7.17: Alinie kunliuzhe Ezhan nanpeilasan mutun, pse Huda hhei urusan mutun udu dao. Eneshi bi go jiohuilade jinjisan wo.
7.18: Niezhan kunlai hetoune giedene uruzhoshi jihaoni widaghaku biyo uwo. Niezhan kunlai hetoune ese giedene uruzhoshi hetoune gieku biyo uwo.
7.19: Hetoune gie, ulie gie zhunyo uwo. Zui zhunyonishi Hudai minlinyi goude zunji.
7.20: Jien kunyi urukude matui woshi qingiezhi bei.
7.21: Chii urukude chi hoji danlazhoshi munan bu gie. Ziyushiku jihui bise goude barei.
7.22: Hoji danlasei Ezhan uruse hheshi Ezhanni ziyutu kun wo. Ziyutu kunyi uruse hheshi Mexihani hoji wo.
7.23: Tashi fugie jiageghala agizhi iresan wo, kunde hoji bu danla.
7.24: Gaijiula, jien kunyi urukude matui woshi Hudai melie qingiezhi bei. Jiehun Ulie Gieku Unqi
7.25: Jiehun ese giesan kunni kieliese made Ezhanni yama minlin uwoma, Ezhan made ubali xiizhi mii nie kekaotu kun gholughase bi ijienne kielieye.
7.26: Edeku kunnan mutunshi bi uzhese ta qinkonne ulie bienjighase gou wo.
7.27: Chade bierei bise hhense danxinrane bu gie. Chade bierei wise bierei agine bu gie.
7.28: Bierei agise zui ese fanjizho, oqin jiehun gieseye zui ese fanjizhoma, jiehun giesan kunla udu daokude ku shouine, bi tai intu ku shouighaku duran uwo.
7.29: Gaijiula, bi tande kielieye, shihou oloncha widawo. Enedu khuinashi bierei bichenla bierei wichen mutun giekui wo.
7.30: Wilachenla ese wilachen mutun gie. Bayasuchenla ese bayasuchen mutun gie. Dunxi agichenla yama uwoku mutun gie.
7.31: Duya jieredulai xianshou giesanla xianshou ese giesan mutun gie. Edeku duyai yanzi widane.
7.32: Mii duranshi ta yamade munan ulie giesejiu. Bierei ese agisanla Ezhanni shiqinde munan giezhi matugie Ezhanni bayasughakui sumulazho.
7.33: Bierei agisanla duya jieredu shiqinde munan giezhi matugie biereine bayasughakui sumulazhi
7.34: zhugheni nie jiere uwo. Guafu, oqinla Hudai shiqinde munan giezhi beye, ruhherlani man zhiguishighane giezho. Biereila duyani shiqinde munan giezhi zhanguijine matugie bayasughakui sumulazho.
7.35: Bi ene kielienyi kieliekushi tai gonjine ese giezho, tai gounide oluzho. Tai olusan shiqin gieghazhi psedu shiqinde zhughe bu chilazhi zhomen Ezhanni shunji giezho.
7.36: Nie kun goyade bolusan oqinyi kuighawo giese pse hhe oqinye jiehun gieku nasunse daose hhe kun sumulase indan jiehun giene giese zhao goyane isighala gie, eneshi zui pusho. Hhelai jiehun giegha.
7.37: Jiaru hhe kun zhughedene jiexin xiaizhi kunzhi gie shidazhi yama biiku shiqin uwoshi ulie jiehun gieseye gou wo.
7.38: Ingiese jiehun gieseye gou woma, ulie jiehun giese genjia gou wo.
7.39: Zhanguiji bikude biereini gonjizho, zhanguiji fuguse bierei ziyude kiende khiku duranshi khireima, Ezhanyi xianxin giesan kunde khikui wo.
7.40: Hhe bierei loujide ulie khise genjia gou wine. Eneshi mii ijien woma, bi sumulase Hudai Ruhher mii jiereye wine.

8.1: Nigiedade ogisan ijiunii kieliese matande man ene fanmienni erlin bikui matan mejienema, erlin kunni fugiede uzheghane, oreku kunni hendaghane.
8.2: Goyane mejiene giesan kun indan mejiekune dou ulie mejienema,
8.4: Nigiedade ogisan ijiuni ijiekui kieliese nigieda duyade yama pusho bikui matan mejiene. Huda niekozi wo, pse Huda wikui matan mejiene.
8.5: Asiman, zemin jiere Huda, Ezhan giezhi urusan olon woma,
8.6: matande niekozi Huda Ada wo. Yanyanjila man hhense irezho, matanshiye hhenughun wo. Pse matande niekozi Ezhan wo, hheshi Ersa Mexiha wo. Yanyanjila hhei tungo giezhi wine, matanye hhei tungo giezhi wine.
8.7: Ingieliuzhe intu erlinni jien kunde ese ogizho. Niezhan kunla edeliuzhe nigiedai beiizhi gon oluzho. Ingiese hhela ijiekude nigiedade ogizhi daosan wo giezho. Hhelai lianxin zholienshi zannanshiwo.
8.8: Shijishan ijieku matan Hudaghalai chadashigha dane. Ulie ijiese yama sunshi uwo, ijieseye yama haochu uwo.
8.9: Ingiese ta xioxin gie, pse tai ziyu xianxin gieku zholientu kunlai zui fanjighane.
8.10: Chi intu erlintu kun nigiedai miode ijiesei lianxin zholientu kunla chanlase hhe danzine fugiedaghazhi nigiedade ogisan ijiuni ulie ijienu?
8.11: Zholientu kun chii erlinni yenyinghala widane. Hheshi Mexiha hhende oluzhi duya ijiesan gaijiu wo.
8.12: Ta ingiezhi gaijiulai reizhi hhelai zholientu lianxinyi shanjise Mexihani reiwo.
8.13: Ingiese ijieku gaijiulai zui fanjighase bi chanqi migha ulie ijiene, pse bi gaijiulane zui fanjighane.

9.1: Bishi ziyutu kun pushonu? Shitu pushonu? Bi mai Ezhan Ersa i chanlazhi ese daowu? Tashi bi Ezhanyi miende giesan wiliei jiego pushonu?
9.2: Bi kunlai shitu pusholiuzhe tai shitu enbene. Tashi bi Ezhanyi miende shitu danlasan zhenji wo.
9.3: Mii kieliesan kunlade bi goyane ingiezhi huine.
9.5: Bijiende psedu shitu, Ezhanni gaijiula, pse Jifa mutun xianxin giesan biereine uduruku qienli uwonu?
9.6: Zinie bi Banaba ghalade wilie ulie gieku qienli uwonu?
9.7: Budui danlachen kun kien ijiunine bareizho? Kien putou tareidene yenzini putoui ulie ijiene? Kien iman chezhedene neizii ulie ochine?
9.8: Bi ingiezhi kieliekushi kunni kieliedanghala kieliezhou? Guijin jiereye ingiezhi ese kieliezhou?
9.9: Musa ni guijin jiere, 'Fughe tughon yanchikude zuilun bu zhogha.' giezhi huaizho. Huda fughereide zhughe chilazhou?
9.10: Enei man matande kieliesan pushonu? Kenjinshi matande oluzhi huaizho. Tareichen kun ghurane giezhi panjizhi tareizho, yanchichen kun ghughane giezhi panjizhi yanchizho.
9.11: Bijien tai dunda ruhher fanmienni fureni tareidene tanse beye fanmienni injikui ghurase gofen onu?
9.12: Psedu kunlade tai jierese intu xianshou gieku qienli bise bijiende genjia uwonu? Ingieliuzhe bijien ene qienlini ese injiwo. Khareidene Mexihani gouxioxii duikuse ayizhi soyujilai rennai giewo.
9.13: Mechide wilie giesan kun mechii dunxii ijiesei, pse sidagha gieku teizi konde ushilasan kun sidagha gieku teizi jieredu dunxii ghughasei ta ulie mejienu?
9.14: Qingiezhi Ezhanye fenfulazho. Gouxioxini chonjisan kunla gouxioxide kouizhi udu dao giezho.
9.15: Ingieliuzhe intu qienlini bi goujida injizhi ese daozho. Bi ede xin huaikushi made ingiezhi gie ese giezho. Bi fuguliuzhe bi kuaikune kunlade qianlazhi ulie echighane.
9.16: Bi gouxioxii chonjise yama kuaikui uwo. Bi ulie chonjise banfa uwo. Ulie chonjise made gou widawo!
9.17: Bi duralazhi enei giese made gunzi wine. Duran wiliuzhe ene zherenni made ogizho.
9.18: Ingiese mii gunzishi yan wo? Jiushi gouxioxii kunlade belien chonjizhi indan kereku baerni ese kerekui wo.
9.19: Made ziyu wine, kiema mii gonji danema, bi soyuji kunlade yenyizhe hoji danlakushi jinlianji olon kunyi jiuighane giezho.
9.20: Bi Yutai kunlade Yutai kun danlakushi Yutai kunlai jiuighane giezho. Bi guijin doura uwoliuzhe guijin douradu kunlade guijin douradu kun danlakushi guijin douradu kunlai jiuighane giezho.
9.21: Bi guijin witu kunlade guijin witu kun danlakushi guijin witu kunlai jiuighane giezho. Shijishan made Hudai guijin uwoku pusho, bi Mexihani guijin doura wo.
9.22: Bi zholien kunlade zholien kun danlakushi zholien kunlai jiuighane giezho. Bi yan kunde yan kun danlakushi matugieliuzhe ezighan kunyi jiuighane.
9.23: Bi gouxioxini yenyinghala man giekushi kunlare hhantu gouxioxii haochui xianshou giene giezho.
9.24: Bisai giekude kunla man holuliuzhe zi niekozi kun jianli linlakui ta ulie mejienu? Taye ingiezhi holuma, jianli linlane.
9.25: Bisai giechen kunla go fanmiende goyane gonjizho. Ingiezhi hhela widaku jianlini linlane giezhoma, matan ulie widaku jianlini linlane giezho.
9.26: Ingiese bi muji wizhi ese holuzho, chuidase ulie noughachen kun ulie gholune.
9.27: Bi beyene hende gonjizhi kunzhi giene, pse bi kunlade gouxioxii chonjizhi ogidene goyane baxi olune.

10.1: Gaijiula, matanyi xienrenla eqighandei olien dourase haise daosan ene shiqinyi bi tai goude jilaghane giezho.
10.2: Manla olien dourase haise xili jienliezhi Musa i daghawo.
10.4: Manla niekielienji ruhhertu usui ochiwo. Ochisanshi hhelare yosan ruhhertu tashise khizhesan wo. Ene tashishi Mexiha wo.
10.5: Ingieliuzhe hhelai dundadu fugie olie kunlade Huda xiqi wise hhelai hontande alawo.
10.6: Fashen giesan ene shiqinla matande jingao giezhi hhela mutun doghun shiqinni bu neii giezho.
10.7: Ye hhelai dundadu kunla mutun nigiedalai bu beii giezho. Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Bexinla sousenu ochizhi ijiene, bosizhese nadune."
10.8: Hhela kunlare lon kijiezhi niudude 23000 kun fuguwo. Matan hhela mutun bu gieye.
10.9: Hhelai dundadu kunla Ezhanni shiidene moghei zhou alawo. Matan hhela mutun Ezhanni bu shiiye.
10.10: Hhela boxin kieliedene azaraili qienxien hhelai aminni agiwo. Ta hhela mutun boxin bu kielie.
10.11: Enezighan shiqinla hhelai jiere fashen giezhi kunlade jingao giezho. Matan enezighan duya baraku kunlade surughane giezhi huaizho.
10.12: Ingiese goyane beizhi undanlawo giesanla indan xioxin gie, pse banjine.
10.13: Tande iresan shiiku kunlade man wine. Hudashi kekaoni wo, Hhe tande danji daku shiikui ulie ireghane. Shiikude tande nie piiku mo keighazhi tai danji shidaghane. Nigiedalai Beiikuse Gholodo
10.14: Ingiese mii orentula, ta nigiedalai beiikuse gholodo.
10.15: Bi minbaitu kunlade kieliezho, bi kieliesanlai ta goyalane uzhezhi gie.
10.16: Matan onxian giedene ochisan fuqitu beizishi Mexihani chusunde hhantulasan pushonu? Matan ginan ghuluzhi ijiekude Mexihani beyede hhantulasan pushonu?
10.17: Ginan niekozi wo, matan kun olon woma, nie beye wo. Matan man nie ginande hhantulazho.
10.18: Ta Isilie bexinlai sumula, sidagha gieku teizi jieredu dunxii ijiesanlashi sidagha gieku teizide hhantulasan pushonu?
10.19: Bi kieliesanshi yan isi wo? Nigieda, pse nigiedade ogisan ijiunishi yan wo? Yamada pusho!
10.20: Bi kieliesanshi niman kunla ogise Hudade ese ogizho, sheitande ogizho. Bi tai sheitanre hhantulaghaku duran uwo.
10.21: Ta Ezhanni beizii ochidene sheitanni beizii ochise jiedui ulie olune. Ezhanni xii soudene sheitanni xii souse jiedui ulie olune.
10.22: Matan Ezhanni reizhi hokughanu? Matan hhense fama onu? Yan gieliuzhe Hudai Kuaine Giezhi Gie
10.23: Yanniliuzhe giese olune giezhi kunla kieliezhoma, man haochu wineku pusho. Yanniliuzhe giese olune giezhoma, man kunlai hendaghakui pusho.
10.24: Kienliuzhe goyane haochude bu olu, kunlai haochude olu.
10.25: Shichande huisan mighalai ta man ijie, lianxinni yenyinghala yama bu asadene ijie.
10.26: Zemin, zemin jiere durusanlashi man Ezhannughun wo.
10.27: Niezhan xianxin ulie giesan kunla tai xinlazhi ijieghase ta duran bizhi echise tai melie beilasanlai ijie, lianxinni yenyinghala yama bu asa.
10.28: Bifan "eneshi nigiedade xienji giesan ijiuni wo" giezhi kunla tande kieliese, hhe kunde oluzhi, lianxinni yenyinghala bu ijie.
10.29: Bi kieliesanshi tai lianxin pusho, hhe kunyi lianxin wo. Mii ziyuni yangiezhi kunlai lianxinghala kieliene?
10.30: Bi mafan kieliedene ijiese yangiezhi bi mafan kieliesan ijiunii yenyinghala mii sugiene?
10.31: Ingiese ta ijie, ochi yan gieliuzhe Hudai kuaine giezhi gie.
10.32: Bugon Yutai kun, Xila kun, Hudai jiohuiliuzhe ta hhelai bu banjigha.
10.33: Bi giesan mutun yan shiqindeliuzhe kunlai bayasugha. Goyane haochude bu oludene kunlai haochude oluzhi hhelai jiuigha.

11.1: Bi Mexihase surusan mutun ta mase suru. Libai Giekude Qiorunni Huighaku
11.2: Ta yandeliuzhe mii jilazhi da bi tande chonjizhi ogisei goude bareizho, ingiese bi tai kuaizho.
11.3: Jien ere kunlai qiorunshi Mexiha wo, biereilai qiorunshi ere kun wo, Mexihai qiorunshi Huda bikui bi tande mejieghaku duran wine.
11.4: Ere kun onxian giekude, Hudai kielienyi kieliekude qiorunne huighase qiorunne shizheghazho.
11.5: Biereila onxian giekude Hudai kielienyi kieliekude qiorunne ulie huighase qiorunne shizheghazho. Qingiese qiorunne dulisan niekielien wo.
11.6: Biereila qiorunne ulie huighase usunne ghigha. Usunne ghigha, dulidene shizhese qiorunne huigha.
11.7: Ere kun indan qiorunne ulie huighakuni wo, hheshi Hudai yanzi, kuaikui wo. Biereishi ere kunyi kuaiku wo.
11.8: Ere kunshi biereise khizhesan pusho, biereishi ere kunse khizhesan wo.
11.9: Da ere kunshi biereide oluzhi zhayaghasan pusho, biereishi ere kunde oluzhi zhayaghasan wo.
11.10: Ingiese biereila qienxienni yenyinghala qiorun jierene indan jihao giekuni wo. Ene jihaoshi qienli dourashiku isi wo.
11.11: Ingieliuzhe Ezhanni miende ere kun uwoshi ulie olune, bierei kun uwoshiye ulie olune.
11.12: Bierei ere kunse khizhesan mutun ere kunye biereii tungo giezhi khizhezho. Soyujila man Hudase khizhezho.
11.13: Ta goyalane sumula, biereila Hudase onxian giekude qiorunne ulie huighase heshi winu?
11.14: Ere kunla fudu usun liuise shizhekui ta yenlai ulie mejienu?
11.15: Biereila fudu usun liuise kuaine. Usunshi biereii qiorunni huighakude ogizho.
11.16: Niezhan kunla jianjindune giese bijiende intu xigon uwo, Hudai jiohuiladeye intu xigon uwo. Ezhanni Heifan
11.17: Ede bi tai fenfulane giesande tai ulie kuaine. Ta hhantulase haochu uwo, zinie huaichu wo.
11.18: Ji 1 gieshi bi chenliese ta nie jiohuinughunla libai giene giezhi hhantulakude tai dunda danlinraku shiqin wine. Ene kielienyi bi gouji xianxin giezho.
11.19: Tai dunda danlinraku shiqin kenjin khizhene, ingiekude caigie hhezighan shixinji giesan kunlai uzhezhi khizhene.
11.20: Ta hhantulakude ijiesanni Ezhanni heifande ulie sanane.
11.21: Ta ijiekude man qianlazhi xien ijiezho. Niezhan kunla ijiezhi chudu dazho, niezhan kunla ochi sudozho.
11.22: Tande ijiezhi ochiku gie uwonu? Pse ta Hudai jiohuii meilade uzhezhi yama witu kunlai shizheghanu? Bi tai matugie kieliene? Tai kuaimu? Intu shiqin jiere bi tai ulie kuaine!
11.23: Bi Ezhanse jienliesanni tande chonjizhi ogiwo. Ezhan Ersa ni ghudandusan hhe xii ginanni barei
11.24: mafan kieliedene ghulu kieliewo, "Eneshi tande oluzhi ogisan mii beye wo. Ta mii jilazhi enei gie."
11.25: Ijie baludene qingiezhi beizii barei kieliewo, "Ene beizishi mii chusunghala shini yenjisan kielien wo. Ta niefanie ochikude mii jilazhi enei gie."
11.26: Ta niefanie ene ginanyi ijiezhi ene beizii ochikude Ezhan iretula Ezhan duya ijiesan shiqinni kunlade man mejieghazho.
11.27: Ingiese yan kunliuzhe Ezhanni ginan, beizii lon ijiezhi ochise Ezhanni beye, chusunyi kuighazho.
11.28: Kun indan goyade zui winu uwo giezhi goyane goude sumuladene ene ginanyi ijie, ene beizii ochikuni wo.
11.29: Kun Ezhani beyeshi yan isi bikui ulie mejiedene ijiezhi ochise goyadene zui jinjizho.
11.30: Ene yenyin jiere tai dunda olon kunla zholierezhi gien kuwo, da fugusanye olon wo.
11.31: Matan goyalane goude jiencha giese ulie panjine.
11.32: Matanni panjikude Ezhan matanyi gonjizho, pse matanyi duyai kunlare hhantu zui jinjine.
11.33: Ingiese mii gaijiula, ta hhantulazhi ijiekude nieniene saghei.
11.34: Kien oliesuse xien giedene ijie, pse hhantulasanni man panjine. Psedu shiqinlani bi iredene nanpei gieye.

12.1: Gaijiula, Shenlin fanmienni shiqinni kieliese bi tande ulie mejieghaku duran uwo.
12.2: Taye mejiene, ta niman kun bikude tai miizhi kielien kielie daku nigiedalai hhende uduruzho.
12.3: Ingiese bi tande mejieghaye. Hudai Ruhher udurusan kunla Ersa ni kharakuni wo giezhi kiema ulie kieliene. Shenlin ulie uduruse Ersa shi Ezhan wo giezhi kiema kielie dane.
12.4: Ogisan nenlila buxian woma, manshi nie Shenlin ogisan wo.
12.5: Ushilaku wiliela buxian woma, manshi nie Ezhande oluzhi giezho.
12.6: Zoinye buxian woma, manshi nie Huda soyuji kunlai tungo giezhi khizheghasan wo.
12.7: Shenlin jien kunlai jiere xienjighakushi dajialade haochu ireghane giezho.
12.8: Niezhan kunlade Shenlinyi tungo giezhi tebieji aghelitu kielienyi ogizho. Niezhan kunlade nie Shenlinyi tungo giezhi tebieji erlin kielieku nenli ogizho.
12.9: Niezhan kunlade nie Shenlinyi tungo giezhi xianxin gieku ogizho. Niezhan kunlade niekozi Shenlinyi tungo giezhi gien goudaghaku nenli ogizho.
12.10: Niezhan kunlade nenlitu shiqin gieku, niezhan kunlade Hudai kielienyi kielieku, niezhan kunlade ruhherlani fenjiku, niezhan kunlade psedu kielien kielieku, niezhan kunlade psedu kielienyi fanyi gieku nenli ogizho.
12.11: Enelashi man hhe niekozi Shenlin giesan wo, hhe goya isighalane buxiantu nenlini jien kunlade fenjizhi ogizho. Nie Beye Jiere Iyanzi Olon Wo
12.12: Niekozi beye jiere iyanzi olon wine, beyede iyanzi olonliuzhe beyeshi nie wo. Mexihaye niekielien wo.
12.13: Matan bugon Yutai kun, Xila kun, hoji danlasan, ziyutu kunliuzhe hhe niekozi Shenlinse xili jienliezhi nie beye gholudene niekozi Shenlinni xianshou giezho.
12.14: Beyeshi niekozi iyanzi pusho, olon iyanzi wo.
12.15: Kon kieliezhi bishi kha pusho, ingiese bi beyenughun pusho gieliuzhe beyenughun pusho bikui pusho.
12.16: Chighin kieliezhi bishi nudun pusho, ingiese bi beyenughun pusho gieliuzhe beyenughun pusho bikui pusho.
12.17: Beyede gon nudunshi matugie chenliene? Beyede gon chighinshi matugie funqiene?
12.18: Huda goya isighalane buxiantu iyanzii nienieji beye jiere teiwo.
12.19: Soyujila man niekozi iyanzishi matugie beye sanane?
12.20: Iyanzi olon woma, beye niekozi wo.
12.21: Nudun khade "Bi chii ulie kerene." giezhi kielie dane. Qiorunye konde "Bi chii ulie kerene." giezhi kielie dane.
12.22: Khareidene beye jieredu uzhese zholien wo giesan iyanzila chaizhi genjia ulie olune.
12.23: Matan sumulase beye jieredu zhunyo uwo giesan iyanzilai genjia zhunyoni gholughazhi uzhezhi bixinnilai genjia goude dabalaghazhoma,
12.24: hennilai qingiezhi gieku biyo uwo. Huda genjia fugie mienzii hhezighan bixin iyanzilade ogizhi beyeni nanpei giekushi
12.25: beyei iyanzilai ulie danlinraghazhi nieniei zhaogu gieghane giezho.
12.26: Nie iyanzi ku shouise man hhantu ku shouine. Nie iyanzide famani irese man hhantu bayasune.
12.27: Tashi Mexihani beye wo, jien kunshi beyeni iyanzi wo.
12.28: Huda jiohuide nanpei giesan ji 1 gieshi shitu, ji 2 gieshi xienzhi, ji 3 gieshi loushi wo, pse nenlitu shiqin gieku, gien goudaghaku nenli, banman gieku, gonjiku, yanyanji psedu kielien kielieku wo.
12.29: Manshi shitu onu? Manshi xienzhi onu? Manshi loushi onu? Man nenlitu shiqin gienu?
12.30: Jien kunlade gien goudaghaku nenli winu? Man psedu kielien kielie shidanu? Man psedu kielienyi fanyi gie shidanu?
12.31: Ta genjia fugie nenlii hende onxian gie. Oreku Bi zui gou moi tande uzheghaye.

13.1: Bi kunni buxiantu kielienyi kieliezhi qienxienyi kielienyi kielieliuzhe oreku wise tunguliesan laba, gu niekielien wo.
13.2: Made Hudai kielienyi kielieku nenli bizhi yanyanji chijia daoliji erlinni mejiezhi ulai noighaku fugie xianxin gieku biliuzhe oreku wise bi yama pusho.
13.3: Bi baerlane man nanxin kunde ogizhi beyene kunlade oluzhi tulieghaliuzhe oreku wise made yama haochu uwo.
13.4: Oreku izhi rennai giene, renyi wo, ulie dubiliene, goyane ulie kuaizhi zishi ulie shuaine,
13.5: limao witui ulie giene. Zi goyadene oluzhi ulie giene, suibiende ho ulie kuruzhi kunlai chouni ulie bareine.
13.6: Gou winide xiqi uwo, zhendaode xiqi wo.
13.7: Yandeliuzhe aghuide sumulane, soyujilai man xianxin giene, soyujilai man xiwon giene, soyujilai man rennai giene.
13.8: Hudai kielienyi kielieku, psedu kielienyi kielieku, erlin enela jianlai man baranema, oreku chanqi ulie barane.
13.9: Matan mejiesanshi ezighan wo, Hudai kielien kieliesanshi ezighan woma,
13.11: Bi ga shihoude kielieku, sumulaku, jiejin giekula man ga kunyi xianli, fugiedase ga kunnughunyi man widaghawo.
13.12: Matan ede belijide uzhesan mutun qinchude ese uzhezhoma, hhe xienzi kuse mienduimien uzhene. Bi ede mejiesanshi ezighan woma, hhe xienzi kuse Ezhan mii man mejiesan mutun bi man mejiene.
13.13: Xianxin gieku, xiwon gieku, oreku chan wine. Ene ghuron dundase orekushi zui fugieni wo.

14.1: Ta orekui dagha. Pse Shenlin ogisan nenli, tebieshi Hudai kielienyi kielieku nenlini hende onxian gie.
14.2: Psedu kielienyi kieliesanshi kunlade ese kieliezho, Hudade kieliezho. Kunla dunjire dane, hhe ruhherghalane yanyanji mimii kieliezho.

14.6: Gaijiula, bi tai hhende echidene zinie psedu kielienyi kieliezhi Huda mejieghasan, erlin, Hudai kielienyi kielieku, surughasanlai ulie injise tande yan haochu wo?

1.1: Hudai isighala Mexiha Ersa de shitu danlasan Baolo Qimotai gaijiughala Gelindo ni Hudai jiohui, pse Yagaiya ni shentulade man xin huaizho.
1.2: Mai ada Huda, Ezhan Ersa Mexiha tande nenjien, pinnan ogi gie! Sidaghazhi Kieliechen Hudade Mafan Kieliezho
1.3: Mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihani ada Hudade doula. Hheshi ubali xiichen ada wo, shiheni sidaghazhi kieliechen Huda wo.
1.4: Hhe olon kunnan dunda matai sidaghazhi kieliezhi hhe ogisan sidaghaku kieliesanghala matan psedu kunnan shouisan kunlai sidaghazhi kielie shidane.
1.5: Matan Mexihai kui olon shouisan mutun Mexihai tungo giezhi sidaghaku kielienye olon wo.
1.6: Bijien kunnan shouise tai sidaghazhi jiuikude oluzho. Bijienyi sidaghazhi kieliese tai sidaghazhi kieliekude oluzho. Ene sidaghazhi kielieku bijien shouisan xianlitu kunnanni ta shouikude tai rennai gieghane.
1.7: Ta bijien mutun ku shouise sidaghaku kielienyiye jienliekui bijien mejiene, ingiese bijien tande xiwon giesan goujida ulie bienjine.
1.8: Gaijiula, bijien Yaxiya de shouisan kunnanni tande ulie mejieghaku duran uwo. Hhe shihoude bijien danjisan achanshi bijien danji dakui wo, lien amituraku xiwon da widazho.
1.9: Bijien sumulase bijienyi ijin sixin panjiwo giezho. Ingiekushi bijienyi goyadene ese kouighazhi fugusan kunyi aminne olughasan Hudade kouighane giezho.
1.10: -11 Huda bijienyi fuguku wixiense jiuiwo, da izhi jiuine. Taye onxian giezhi bijiende banman giema, hhe pse bijienyi jiuikui bijien hende xiwon giezho. Ingiezhi olon kunla bijiende onxian giedene Huda dain giese olon kunla bijienyi yenyin jiere Hudade mafan kieliene. Baolo Jihuane Bienjighawo
1.12: Bijien duyade giekude, tebieshi tanre laiwon giekude Huda ogisan zhijieji shixinji zhugheghala giezho. Kunni jienzhaghala ese giezhi Hudai nenjienghala giezho. Enende bijienyi lianxin ganzhen beine. Ingiezhi giesande bijien goyane kuaine.
1.13: Bijien ede tande huaisanshi zhao ta onshizhi dunjireku mutun huaizho. Ta ede bijienyi man dunjire dazhoma, bi xiwon giese man dunjire.
1.14: Ingiese Ezhan Ersa i udude bijien tai kuaiku mutun taye bijienyi kuaine.

1.19: Bi, Seila , Qimotai ghuralie tai dunda chonjisan Hudai kewon, Ersa Mexihashi enbene giekude pusho giekui pusho. Hhende zinie enbekui wine.
1.20: Hudai dain giesanla giedughanliuzhe Mexihai sudoro man enbekui wo. Ingiese matan Mexihai tungo giezhi amine kieliezhi Hudai kuaine.
1.21: Mexihai miende bijienyi tanre hhantu khiduzheghazhi teshu wiliede oluzhi matanyi sunghusanshi Huda wo.
1.22: Hhe matai jiere zhanzi taizhi Shenlinni mai zhughede ogizhi yajin daruwo.
1.23: Bi Gelindo de pse ese irekushi tande oluzho. Enende Huda made ganzhen bei giezhi bi kielie shidane.
1.24: Bijien tai xinyanni gonjine gieku pusho, tai bayasughane giezhi tanre hhantu wilie giezho. Ta xinyan jierene beizhi undanlazho.

2.1: Bi tai hhende echise pse nangoni deilazhi ulie echine giezhi jiejin giewo.
2.2: Bi tai nango gieghazhoshi bi nango gieghasan tanse chugo kien mii bayasughane?
2.3: Bi eqighandei xinni huaikushi bi irekude indan mii bayasughaku kunla khareidene mii nango gieghakuse ayizho. Bi bayasuse ta dajialaye bayasukui bi xianxin giezho.
2.4: Bi eqighandei zhughedemi otuzhi yuchou giezhi wilazhi tande xin huaikushi tai nango gieghane ese giezho, bi tande matugie oresei mejieghane giezho. Zui Fanjisan Kunni Mienlie
2.5: Kunni nango gieghasan hhe kun zinie mii nango gieghakui pusho, ta dajialaiye man ezighan nango gieghazho. Bi ingiezhi kieliese hende gofen uwo.
2.6: Intu kunyi ta olon kunla qingie faise kuruwo,
2.7: ede khareidene hhei rouliezhi sughazhi kielie, pse nango olon giese bazilie dane.
2.8: Ingiese bi tai xiahua gieye, ta hhe kunde oreku zhughene goude mejiegha.
2.9: Bi eqighandei xinni huaikushi ta yan shiqindeliuzhe shunjinu ulie shunjikui shiizhi mejiene giezho.
2.10: Ta kienyi mienliese bi kienyi mienliene. Bi kienyi mienliese Mexihai melie tande oluzhi mienliezho,
2.11: pse Ibilisi matanyi pienyi zhanjine. Matan hhei mujii ulie mejiekui pusho. Baolo Teloyade Munan Giezho
2.12: Bi Mexihani gouxioxide oluzhi Teloya de echise Ezhan made gouxioxi chonjiku wijienni niewoma,
2.13: bi oresan gaijiu Qido i chanla dase zhughedemi nanran uwo. Ingie hhendedu kunlade salan gie Maqidun de echiwo. Mexihai Tungo Giezhi Injine
2.14: Hudade mafan kielieye, hhe Mexihare hhantu matanyi chan uduruzhi zhan eghizhi injighazho. Pse matai tungo giezhi Mexihai taniku andatui gochude funqieghazho.
2.15: Bugon jiuisan kun, widachen kun dunda matanshi Hudade ogiku Mexihani andatu widao wo.
2.16: Ene widao widachen kunlade fugughaku fumughei wo, jiuisan kunlade aminni andatui wo. Kien intu renwuni gie shidane?
2.17: Bijien olon kunla mutun Hudai daolii baer huiku dunxi ese danlaghazho. Bijien jianjise Huda peisan mutun Hudai melie Mexihai kouizhi shixinji giezho.

3.1: Bijien pse goyane jieshao gie qiiwu? Bijien niezhan kunla wo giezhi bijienyi jieshao xinni tande oginu? Tanse jieshao xin keredene kunlade oginu?
3.2: Tashijiu bijienyi jieshao xin wo, bijienyi zhughede huaizhi kunla man tanizhi onshizho.
3.3: Ta minminjishi Mexihani xin wo, bijienyi tungo giezhi huaisan wo. Meshuighala huaisan pusho, chanqiku Hudai Ruhherghala huaisan wo. Tashi jiere ese huaizho, kunni zhughe jiere huaizho.
3.4: Bijien Mexihani tungo giezhi Hudai melie qingiezhi xianxin giezho.
3.5: Ingiezhi kieliese bijien goya nengandene kouizho giesan pusho. Bijienni nenganshi Hudase iresan wo.
3.6: Huda bijiende shini yenjisan kieliende gonjia danlaku nengou ogizho. Ene yenjisan kielienshi uroughala giesan pusho, ruhherghala giesan wo. Urou kunni fugughane, ruhher kunde amin ogine.
3.7: Tashi jiere uroughala huaisan fuguku wilie irekude fama bizhi Isilie kunla Musa i khizha jieredu widaku gonni uzhe dazhoma,
3.8: Shenlinni wiliei famani genjia fugie uwonu?
3.9: Kunde zui jinjiku wiliede fama bise kunni gounide sanaku wiliede fama genjia fugie wo.
3.10: Ene tebieji fugie famani yenyinghala eqighanku fama widawo.
3.11: Hhe zhanshi jiere bidene widakude fama bise hhe chanqikude fama genjia olon wo.
3.12: Ingiese matande intu xiwon bise fugie danzighala kieliene.
3.13: Matan Musa wo giezhi shoujinghala khizhane huighazhi Isilie kunlai hhe niechaku famani widakui ulie chanlaghane gie ese giezho.
3.14: Ingieliuzhe hhelai zhughe khiduzhezhi eli kutula khuichen yenjisan kielienni onshikude ene shoujinni da ese agizho. Ene shoujinni Mexihare hhantulase agi widaghane.
3.15: Eli kutula niefanie Musa i shuni onshikude shoujin hhelai zhughede wo.
3.16: Hhelani zhughe giezhe Ezhande shunjise shoujin giezhe widane.
3.17: Ezhanshi hhe ruhher wo, Ezhanni ruhher khalashi khala ziyu wine.
3.18: Matan man shoujin ese khaghasan khizhaghala Ezhanni famani uzhezhi, Ezhanyi yanzi mutun bienjizhi yebeiseye fugie famatu gholuzho. Ene Ezhanyi ruhherse irezho.

4.1: Ingiese Huda bijiende ubali xiizhi ene renwui ogise bijien zhughe ulie widane.
4.2: Khareidene niuighazhi giesan shizheku shiqinyi bendawo. Piendaku shiqin ulie giezhi Hudai daolii ulie wirulaghane. Zhendaoni qinchude kieliezhi Hudai melie jien lianxintu kunlade goyane jieshao giene.
4.3: Bijien chonjisan gouxioxii khaghazhoshi widachen kunlade khaghazho.
4.4: Ene duyai Ibilisi enezighan xianxin ulie giechen kunlai nudunyi sugho gholughazhi gouxioxii gonni ese chanlaghazho. Ene gouxioxide Mexihai famani kieliezho. Mexihashi Hudai yanzi wo.
4.5: Bijien chonjisanshi goyane pusho. Ersa Mexihashi Ezhan bikui, pse Ersa de oluzhi tande hoji danlasanni chonjizho.
4.6: "Kharanise gon khizhe" giezhi kieliesan Huda Ersa Mexihai khizha jieredu goya famane mejieghaku gonni mai zhughede zhouighazho.
4.7: Bijiende ene boubei winema, bijienshi zinie boubei teiku wagangan wo. Ingiekushi tebieji fugie nenlishi bijiennughun pusho Hudanughun bikui mejieghane giezho.
4.8: Bijienyi simiense daruzhoma, daruzhi yama giegha dazho. Zhughede kunnan winema, xiwon ese widazho.
4.9: Heizhoma, Huda bijienyi ese bendazho. Eghi unaghazhoma, eghizhi ala dazho.
4.10: Bijien beye jierene Ersa ni duya ijiekui chan deilakushi Ersa ni aminni bijienyi jiereye xienjizhi khizheghane giezho.
4.11: Bijien amitukude Ersa ni yenyinghala chan fuguku wixien dunda wo. Ingiekushi Ersa ni aminyi bijienyi fuguku beye jiere xienjizhi khizheghane giezho.
4.12: Ingie uzhese fuguku bijienyi jiere ochirazho, amin tai jiere ochirazho.
4.13: Jinwun jiere, "Bi xianxin giezho, ingiese bi kieliezho." giezhi huaisan mutun bijiendeye xianxianji xianxin gieku wine, ingiese bijien xianxin giedene kieliezho.
4.14: Ezhan Ersa i aminne olughasan hhe bijienyiye Ersa re hhantu aminne olughazhi bijienyi tanre hhantu hhei melie beighakui bijien mejiene.
4.15: Enelashi man tande oluzhi giezho. Ingiese nenjien yebeiseye olon kunlade echizhi mafan gieku zhughe olodozhi kuaikui Hudade ogine. Xianxin Giekui Kouizhi Udu Dao
4.16: Ingiese bijien zhughe ulie widane. Bijienyi beye goujijia qida olunema, zhughe niudunie shinishizho.
4.17: Bijienyi zhanshi jieredu gongien kunnan jianlai ireku hashu witu chanqiku fugie famani chenjighane.
4.18: Bijien gonxin giekushi chanlaku pusho, chanla daku wo. Chanlakushi niechaku wo, chanla dakushi chanqiku wo.

5.1: Mai zemin jieredu zhanfanyi chei widaghase Hudai hhense ireku gie matande winekui matan mejiene. Kunni khaghala giesan pusho, asiman jieredu chanqiku gie wo.
5.2: Matan ene zhanfande shonholozhi asimanse iresan gieghala jien musiku mutun arunzhakui panjizho.
5.3: Qingie musise hulan muchughun ulie gholune.
5.4: Matan ene zhanfande gunduni beiliezhi shonholokushi teine ese giezho, musine giezho. Ingiezhi ene fuguku beyei amin yenji boughane.
5.5: Ene mujide oluzhi matai nanpeilasanshi Huda wo. Hhe matande Shenlinni yajin danlaghazhi ogiwo.
5.6: Ingiese, matan beyede bikude Ezhanse gholo bikui mejienema, matande chan fugie danzi wine.
5.7: Matan yan giese chanlakughala ese giezho, xianxin giekughala giezho.
5.8: Matande fugie danzi wine. Beyese likai giezhi Ezhanghala hhantu souku genjia duran wine.
5.9: Ingiese matan beyedeye olune beyese likai gieye olune matanyi mujishi hhei bayasughane.
5.10: Matan man bixi Mexihani shenpantai melie xienjizhi khizheghadene zhao jien kun giesan gouni, doghunni mutun kharulune. Kunlai Hudaghala Goudaghaku Renwu
5.11: Ezhanshi indan zunjikui bijien mejiese kunlade sughazhi kieliene. Huda bijienyi mejiene, bi xiwon giese taye zhughedene bijienyi mejie.
5.12: Bijien pse tande goyalane jieshao ese giezho, bijienyi kuaiku jihuini tande ogine giezho. Ingiese hhezighan zhughei ulie uzhedene mienzii uzhezhi kuaisan kunlai melie kieliekui wine.
5.13: Bijien fenjiulise Hudade oluzho, zhenchanshi tande oluzho.
5.14: Ingiekushi Mexihani oreku bijienyi biizho. Nie kun soyuji kunlade oluzhi duya ijiese soyuji kunla duya ijiesanyi bijien mejiene.
5.15: Mexiha soyuji kunlade oluzhi duya ijiekushi amitu kunla pse goyadene oluzhi ulie amiturazhi hhelade oluzhi duya ijiedene aminne olusan Ezhande oluzhi amituraghane giezho.
5.16: Ingiese enedu khuinase matan kienniliuzhe kunni uzhedanghala ulie uzhene. Eqighandei Mexihaniye kunni uzhedanghala uzhewoma, ede pse qingiezhi ulie uzhene.
5.17: Kien Mexihai miende bise hheshi shini giesan kun wo, khuichennila daozhi man shinii gholuwo.
5.18: Enelashi man Hudase iresan wo. Hhe Ersa Mexihai tungo giezhi matanyi goyarene goudaghazhi pse kun Hudaghala goudaghaku renwuni matande ogiwo.
5.19: Eneshijiu Huda duyai kunlai zuini ese asadene Mexihai tungo giezhi goyarene goudaghazho. Pse goudaghaku daolini matande jiuizhi ogiwo.
5.20: Ingiese matan Mexihai daibio giezho. Huda matai tungo giezhi kunlade sidaghazhi kieliezho. Matan Mexihai oronde ta Hudare gouda giezhi tai xiahua gieye.
5.21: Huda hhe zui wituni matande oluzhi zuitu gholughakushi matanyi hhei sudoro Hudai gouni gholughane giezho.

6.1: Hudare hhantu wilie giesan bijien tai xiahua gieye, Hudai nenjienni jienliezhi belienni bu gholugha.
6.2: Huda kieliezhi, "Heshitu shihoude bi chinughunyi chenliewo. Jiuiku udude bi chade banman giewo." giezho. Uzhe, ede zhen heshitu shihou wo, uzhe, ede zhen jiuiku udu wo!
6.3: Bijien giesan wiliene ulie sugieghane giezhi jinlianji kiendeliuzhe chijia ese teizho.
6.4: Khareidene goyaneshi Hudai hoji wo giezhi yanyanji shiqin jiere uzheghazho. Jiushi olon rennai gieku, kunnan, chijia shiqin, zeinan,
6.5: eghiku, khaku, nouiku, khishulaku, kijie daku, ijie daku dunda
6.6: bijien ganjinde giezhi erlin, rennai gieku, renyi, Shenlin, zhenzhenji oreku,
6.7: shuhua kielieku, Hudai nenlighala giezho. Borun soghei khade gundan uqi bareidene
6.8: bugon bijienyi zunjiye hao, shizheghaye hao, sugieye hao, kuaiye hao bijien ingiezhi giezho. Kunla kieliese piendachen wo giezhoma, bijien shuhua kieliezho.
6.9: Bijienyi kiema ulie mejiene giezhoma, niere fugie no wo. Fuguwo giezhoma, amitu wo. Bijienyi faizhoma, ese alazho.
6.10: Bijien yuchou giesanyi xianlima, chan bayasuzho. Nanxin wo giezhoma, olon kunlai bayazheghazho. Uzhese yama uwoma, yanliuzhe wine.
6.11: Gelindo kunlaya, bijien tande zhijie kieliezhi zhughene keighazho.
6.12: Bijien tai zhughei ese meilashighazho, ta goyalane meilashighazho.
6.13: Bi kewosidene kielieku mutun kielieye, bijien giesan mutun taye bijiende zhughene keigha. Chanqiku Mechi
6.14: Ta xianxin ulie giechen kunlare nie jiabanyi bu zho. Gouni mouxiennighala matugie hhantulane? Gon kharanighala matugie laiwon giene?
6.15: Mexiha Bilie ghala matugie heqishine? Xianxin giesan, ulie xianxin giesanghala matugie hhantu giene?
6.16: Mechi nigiedaghala matugie hhantulane? Matanshi chanqiku mechi wo. Zhen Huda kieliesan mutun, "Bi hhelai dunda souzhi hhelare laiwon giene. Bi hhelade Huda danlane. Hhela made bexin danlane."
6.17: Ezhan kieliezho, "Ingiese ta hhelai dundase khizhezhi hhelase danxinra. Zannan dunxilai bu shighama, bi tai jienliene.
6.18: Bi tande ada danlane. Ta made kewon oqin danlane. Eneshi nenlitu Ezhan kieliesan wo."

7.1: Ingiese mii orentula, matande enezighan dain giesan bise beye, zhughe jieredu zannannilane waghazhi man widaghadene Hudai zunjiku zhugheghala onqienji zhiguishighaye. Jiohuini Kunla Geise Baolo Bayasuzho
7.2: Ta aghui zhugheghala bijienyi jienlie. Bijien kiemai ese kuighazho, kiemai ese heizhi pienyi ese zhanjizho.
7.3: Bi ingiezhi kieliekushi tai kheilane ese giezho. Bi eqighandei kieliezhi daosan mutun ta chan bijienyi zhughede bizhi bijien tanre amiturazhi fuguliuzhe hhantulaku duran wine.
7.4: Bi tande xinxin fugie wo, tai ologhonni kuaizhi zhughedemi futan no wo. Bijien shouisan olon kunnan dunda bi hende bayasuzho.
7.5: Bijien Maqidun de kurudeneye hhamura dazhi gochuse kunnan shouizho. Ghadane maodun wo, sudoro ayizho.
7.6: Ingieliuzhe xiwon widasan kunlai sidaghazhi kieliesan Huda Qido i irekui tungo giezhi bijienyi sidaghazhi kieliewo.
7.7: Zinie hhei irekughala pusho, hhe tai hhense jienliesan sidaghazhi kieliekughala bijienyi sidaghazhi kieliewo. Ta mii sanasan, goya nango giesan, pse ta made rexinde giesei hhe made man kieliese bi genjia bayasuzho.
7.8: Bi tande hhe xinni huaizhi tai zhanshi jiere nango gieghasei mejiedene houhui giezhoma pse houhui ulie giene.
7.9: Ede bi bayasukushi tai nango gieghasande pusho, nango giedene geiikude echighasande wo. Ta Hudai isi mutun nango giedene bijien tai ese shanjizho.
7.10: Zhao Hudai isi mutun nango giese houhui ulie giezhi geidene jiuine. Duyai nango gieku kunyi fugughane.
7.11: Ta nie uzhe, ta zhao Hudai isi mutun nango giedene ede tai dunda imegheni rexinde gieku, goyane huiku, doghunnide hokuku, jinshen khizheku, mini sanaku, bayasuzhi gieku, codasanni faiku wine. Ene shiqin jiere go fanmiende ta goyalane gou bikui zhenmin giezho.
7.12: Ingiese bi tande hhe xinni huaise pienyi zhanjisan kunde ese huaizho, kuighasan kundeye ese huaizho. Khareidene ta bijiende rexin bisei Hudai melie tande zhenmin giene giezho.
7.13: Ingiese bijienyi sidaghazhi kieliewo. Ene sidaghasanse chugo ta olon kunla Qido ni zhughei futanshighazhi bayasughase bijien genjia bayasuzho.
7.14: Bi Qido de tai kuaizhi daozhoma, ta mii ese shizheghazho. Bijien tande kieliesan kielienshi man zhenni bikui mutun bijien Qido de tai kuaisanshi zhenni bikui zhenmin giewo.
7.15: Ta manla hhei shunjizhi ayi pugharazhi goude jienliesei hhe sumula irese tande oreku zhughe genjia hhereizho.
7.16: Bi tande onqienji zhughene teise bayasuzho.

8.1: Gaijiula, Huda Maqidun jiohuilade ogisan nenjienni bi tande mejieghaye.
8.2: Kunnan dunda hhelai fugiede shiikude hende bayasuzhi tebieji nanxin bikude kunlade tebieji dafande ogizho.
8.3: Hhela banman giekude zhao nenlighalane, pse nenlisene chaogo giezhi goyalane ogisei bi ganzhen bei shidane.
8.4: Hhela bijienyi haojihui hende xiahua giezhi shentulade banman gieku shiqin jiere jihui ogizhi guzi beigha giezho.
8.5: Hhela giesan bijien sumulasanse olon chaogo giezho. Hhela goyane xien Ezhande ogizhi pse Hudai isighala bijiende ogizho.
8.6: Ingiese bijien Qido de ene gou shiqinyi chi kaishi giese tai dunda giezhi chengun olugha giezhi sughazhi kieliewo.
8.7: Ta xianxin gieku, kielien kielieku, erlin, rexin, bijien tande oreku jiere man kunlase zui goude giesan mutun nanxin kunlade banman gieku shiqin jiereye zui goude giekui bijien xiwon giezho.
8.8: Bi ingiezhi kieliese tande ese fenfulazho, kunlai rexinghala tai oreku zhugheshi shixinji enbenu pusho bikui uzhene giezho.
8.9: Mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihani nenjienyi ta mejiene. Hhe yenlai bayan wo, tande oluzhi nanxinshikushi hhei nanxinnighala tai bayazheghane giezho.
8.10: Kunlade ogiku shiqin jiere bi tande sumulakune kielieye. Ta ingiezhi giese gou wo. Ta udai honse ene shiqinyi zui melie giezho, zui melie duralazhoma,
8.11: giezhi qiikude bisan rexin mutun ede ene shiqinyi giezhi chengun olugha. Zhao nengou biku mutun gie.
8.12: Ta duranghalane ogise Huda jienliene. Uwokulane ogi ese giezho, winekulane ogi giezho.
8.13: Bi kunlai gongienshighazhi tande kunnan ireghane ese giezho, manlai izhishighane giezho.
8.14: Edeku tai bayan hhelai chaisande banman gie shidaku mutun hhelai bayan jianlai tai chaisande banman giene, ingiese izhishiwo.
8.15: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Olon ghurasanlade feiliekui uwo, choghon ghurasanlade chaikui uwo." Qido Lienshoularene
8.16: Bi tande oluzhi rexintu zhughei Qido i zhughede teisan Hudade mafan kielieye.
8.17: Qido bijien fenfulasei chenliezhoma, goyane genjia rexin bizhi yenyizhe tai hhende echiwo.
8.18: Bijien da nie gaijiui peizhi hhere hhantu echighawo. Ene kunyi gouxioxi chonjiku jiere olon jiohuila man kuaizho.
8.19: Zinie ene pusho, jiohuila hhei sunghudene peizhi bijienre hhantu echighazhi bijiende jiuizhi ogisan baerni khughoghazho. Bijien ene gou shiqinyi giese Ezhanni famade oluzho, bijien gou zhughene mejieghazho.
8.20: Bijien ingiezhi giekushi ene olon baerni gonjikude kunlai ulie sugieghane giezho.
8.21: Bijien gou shiqin giese zinie Ezhanni melie gieku pusho, kunlai melieye ingiezho.
8.22: Bijien pse nie gaijiui peizhi hhelare hhantu echighawo. Bijien olon shiqin jiere hhei kaoyen olon giedene hhende rexin bikui mejiewo. Ede hhe tai hende xianxin giedene genjia rexinshizho.
8.23: Qido i kieliese hheshi mii nokie wo, tande oluzhi mare lienshou gholuzho. Pse hhe ghua gaijiushi jiohuila peisan wo, Mexihani fama wo.
8.24: Ingiese ta jiohuilai melie oreku zhughene, pse bijien tai kuaisei hhelade zhenmin gie.

9.1: Shentulade banman gieku shiqinyi kieliese bi tande xin huaiku biyo uwo.
9.2: Tande gou zhughe bikui bi mejiene. Bi Maqidun kunlade Yagaiya kunla udai honse zhunbei giezho giezhi tai kuaizho. Tai rexin olon kunlai zhughei gojiolughazho.
9.3: Ede bi hhe giedun gaijiulai peizhi echighakushi zhao mii kielienzhe tai zhunbei gie goudaghane giezho. Pse bijien ene shiqin jiere tai kuaisan belienni gholune.
9.4: Babuchu Maqidun kunla mare hhantu echizhi ta ese zhunbei giesei chanlase ta shizhekui pse bu kielieye, bijien tai xianxin giesan shizhekui gholune.
9.5: Ingiese bi sumulase hhe giedun gaijiui xien peizhi tai hhende echighazhi ta dain giesan olon mureni zhunbei gie goudagha giezhi goude kielieku biyo wine. Ingiezhi giese ta khireighasanshi biisan pusho, duranzhe giesan wo.
9.6: Eneshijiu choghon tareisan choghon ghurane, olon tareisan olon ghurane giesan wo.
9.7: Jien kun zhughedene jiejin giesan mutun ogikuni wo. Chijia bu tei, ye bu bii. Duranzhe khireighasan kunlade Huda xiqi wo.
9.8: Huda yanyanji nenjienlai tande olon ogizhi yandeliuzhe chan kurughazhi yanyanji gou shiqinni tai olon gieghane.
9.9: Jinwun jiere jilasan mutun, "Hhe dafande nanxin kunlade ogizho, hhei gundan chanqi wine."
9.10: Tareisan kunde fure ogisan, kunde ijiuni ogisan Huda tareiku fureni tande ogizhi olodoghane, ta giesan gundan wiliede jiego olon khizheghane.
9.11: Tai gofanmiende bayazheghazhi suishisui dafande kunlade ogighane. Ingiezhi bijien giesan wiliei tungo giezhi Hudade mafan kielieghane.
9.12: Ene banman gieku shiqinyi giezhi zinie shentulade chaisei buisan pusho, olon kunlai Hudade mafan kielieku tebie olodoghazho.
9.13: Ta Mexihai gouxioxii chenren giezhi shunjizhi hhelade, pse olon kunlade dafande ogiku wiliei hhela kaoyen giedene Hudai kuaizho.
9.14: Huda tande tebieji fugie nenjien ogizho. Ingiese hhela tande oluzhi onxian giezhi tai sanazho.
9.15: Nenjienyini kieliezhi baragha daku Hudade mafan kielieye!

10.1: Bi Baolo qinsi Mexihani renyi, gou zhugheghala tande goude kielieye. Kunla kieliese bi tai chujieghekude goyane meilade uzhezho, tai hhende uwokude wizha wo giezho.
10.2: Bi xiahua gieye, bijien duyani banfaghala giezho giezhi sumulasanlade bi wizhade gienema, bi tai hhende echikude mii biizhi wizhade bu giegha.
10.3: Bijien duyade udu daozhoma, duyani banfaghala zhan ese eghinduzho.
10.4: Bijien eghinduku uqishi duyanughun pusho, Hudai nenlitu wo, khidun chenqianni unaghane.
10.5: Bijien kun zhenjindusan, pse kunni danlazhi Hudai ulie tanighazhi goyane fugiede uzhesan yanyanjilai man widaghane. Yanyanji sumuladanlai man barei iredene Mexihade shunjighane.
10.6: Ta onqienji shunjikude soyuji ese shunjisan kunlai faikui bijien zhunbei gie goudaghazho.
10.7: Ta shiqin uzhese zinie mienzii uzhene. Niezhan kun goyaneshi Mexihanughun wo giese hhe goude sumulakui wo, hheshi Mexihanughun mutun bijienshiye Mexihanughun wo.
10.8: Ezhan bijiende qienli ogikushi tai qida olugha ese giezho, hendagha giezho. Bijienyi qienlii bi goujinie gofende kuaise shizhene ulie giene.
10.9: Bi ingiezhi kieliekushi bi xin huaizhi tai ayighane giezhi tai ulie sumulaghane giezho.
10.10: Niezhan kun kieliese hhei xin yenge wo, khidun wo, kunni chujieghese zholien wo. Hhe jianjisan yama jiazhi uwo giezho.
10.11: Intu kunla indan mejiekui wo. Bijien tai hhende uwokude xin jiere matugie kieliezhoshi chujieghese matugie giene.
10.12: Bijien hhezighan goyane jieshao giesan kunghala ulie bilane. Hhela goyane goya nanjizho, goyane goya bilazho, hhela men no wo.
10.13: Bijienyi kieliese bijien kuaise kamasene ulie daone. Zhao Huda bijiende nanjizhi ogisan kamaghala giene. Ene kama tai hhendeye kuruzho.
10.14: Bijien tai hhende echise kamasene daoku pusho. Shijishan bijien Mexihani gouxioxii lien tai hhendeye echizhi chonjizho.
10.15: Bijien kamasene ese daozhi kunlai khishulasanghala ese kuaizho. Bijien xiwon giese tai xianxin gieku fugiedakude tai dundadu bijienyi kamaye daghazhi hende fugiedase giezho.
10.16: Ingiese kunlai oronde kunla giesan wiliede ulie kuaizhi gouxioxini tanse chugo psedu oronlade chonjine giezho.
10.18: Kaoyen giedene olusan kunshi goyane jieshao giesan pusho, Ezhan jieshao giesan wo.

11.1: Bi goujinie ben kun danlayema, ta rennai gie. Bi xiwon giese ta rennai gie.
11.2: Hudai dubilieku zhugheghala bi tande hende orezho. Bi tai nie zhanguijide boluwo. Ganjin oqin wo giezhi Mexihade ogiwo.
11.3: Moghei jienzhaghala Hhawa i piendasan mutun ta Mexihade olusan zhenzhenji oreku zhughe widakuse bi ayizho.
11.4: Niezhan kunla irezhi bijien ese chonjisan da nie Ersa i tande chonjise, pse ta jienliezhi ese daosan buxiantu ruhherni jienliezhi ta jieshou giezhi ese daosan buxiantu gouxioxii jieshou gieghase ta jienliezho!
11.5: Bi sumulase bi hhezighan famatu shitu wo giesanlase goujida bixin uwo.
11.6: Mii koucai hen uwoma, unhua boghoni uwo. Enei bijien gofanmiende olon banfaghala tande zhenmin giewo.
11.7: Bi tai undudaghane giezhi goyane boghonidaghazhi Hudai gouxioxii tande belien chonjise zui fanjizhou?
11.8: Bi psedu jiohuilase gunzi bareidene tande lilian khighase qianlakughala niekielien wo.
11.9: Bi tai hhende bikude made chaikude kiemade chijia ese teizho. Maqidun se iresan gaijiula made chaisei ogizhi kughazho. Bi gofanmiende goyane tande achan ese gholuzho, jianlaiye ulie gholune.
11.10: Yagaiya oronde bi ingiezhi kuaikui kiemada danla dane. Mii sudoro bisan Mexihai zhendaoi zhiizhi bi ingiezhi kielie shidane.
