1.9: Guijinni gou kunde ese jinjizho. Mouxien kun, kielienyi ulie chenliechen, zhigui witu, zui fanjichen, zannanni giechen, hharamu giechen, ana adane alachen, kun alachen,
1.10: lon kijiechen, tunxinlien giechen, kun huichen, ghudan kieliechen, jiani fayen giechen, pse olusan daolini duizhi yanyanji giechen kunlade jinjizho.
1.11: Ene olusan daolishi famatu gouxioxise iresan wo. Enei indan doulaku Huda made jiuizhi ogiwo. Hudai Ubali Xiikude Mafan Kieliezho
1.12: Made nenli ogisan mai Ezhan Mexiha Ersa de bi mafan kieliezho. Hhe mii xianxin giedene nanpei giezhi goyadene wilie gieghazho.
1.13: Eqighandei bishi Mexihai sugiechen, heichen, qifulachen wo. Ingieliuzhe Huda made ubali xiikushi bi xianxin ese giekude mejie dazhi giezho.
1.14: Mai Ezhan made nenjien texien olon ogizho. Ingiese Mexiha Ersa i miende made xinyan, oreku olodozhi moizho.
1.15: Mexiha Ersa duyade zuirenlani jiuile irewo giesan ene kielienyi xianxin giezhi man jienliekughon wine. Bishi zuiren dunda zui mouxienni wo.
1.16: Eneshi Ezhan made ubali xiisan yenyin wo. Mexiha Ersa bi ene zui mouxien kunni jiere hende rennai giezhi yanzi uzheghakushi khuinashi xianxin giechen kunlade chanqiku amin ogine.
1.17: Hhe chanqiku Honshan, ulie fuguku, chanla daku, zi niekozi Hudade zhigui, kuaikui chanqi izhi ogi. Amine!
1.18: Mii kewon Qimotai ya, zhao melieshida kunla Hudai kielienyi deilazhi chade kieliesan mutun bi ene minlinni chade ogiye. Hhe kielienghala gou zhan eghi.
1.19: Xinyanne goude bareizhi lianxin bu ghudanduzhi zhan eghi. Niezhan kunla lianxinne ghudandudene xinyanni ghaluwo.
1.20: Hhelai dunda Ximinai , Yalishanda wo. Bi hhelai ijin Ibiliside jiuiwo. Ingiese hhelai kufurei ulie fanjikuni surughane giezho.

2.1: Ingiese bi chade sughazhi kielieye. Xien soyuji kunlade oluzhi xiahua giezhi onxian gie. Deilazhi kunlade qitao giezhi Hudade mafan kielie.
2.2: Honshanlade, qienli bichen kunlade ingiezhi gie. Ingiese matan xienliande donzhende giezhi nanran pinnande udu dao shidane.
2.3: Eneshi gouni wo. Mai jiuichen Huda bayasune.
2.4: Hhe kunlai man jiuizhi zhendaoi mejieghaku duran wine.
2.5: Hudashi nie wo. Huda, kunghalai dundaye zinie dundadu kun wo. Hheshijiu Mexiha Ersa wo, kunye enbene.
2.6: Hhe soyuji kunlade oluzhi goyane shuiku jiage danlawo. Heshini shihou kuzhese ene shiqinde zhenmin giewo.
2.7: Ene shiqinde oluzhi mii nanpei giezhi chonjichen kun, shitu danlaghazho. Niman kunlade loushi danlaghazhi xinyan, zhendaoni surughazho. Eneshi ghudan pusho, shuhua wo.
2.8: Ingiese mii xiwonshi ere kunla hokuzhi bu jianjindudene zhiguitu khane zhadeighazhi alinie orondeliuzhe onxian gie.
2.9: Oqitu kunlaye heshighan dabala. Shizherezhi jinchende musi. Usunne bienjizhi antan, zhubaoghala, fugie jiagetu jienghala bu dabala.
2.10: Goyane gouni giekughala dabala. Ingiezhi giese goyane Hudai zunjine giezhi kieliesan oqitu kunlade heshi wo.
2.11: Oqitu kunla indan goude shunjizhi nanrande surukuni wo.
2.12: Oqitu kunla surughane, ere kunyi gonjine giese bi tunyi uwo. Oqitu kunla indan nanranshigha.
2.13: Bi ingiezhi kieliekushi Huda xien Adan yi zhayaghadene Hhawa i zhayaghawo.
2.14: Miisanshi Adan pusho, biereini miidene zui dunda oroghawo.
2.15: Ingieliuzhe oqitu kunla goyane guizhi xianxin gieku, oreku, zhiguini izhi giese kewosi laizhi jiuine.

3.1: "Kien jiohuini lindao danlaku duralase gou wilieni neiizho." Ene kielien oluzho.
3.2: Lindao danlachen kun goyane kunlai yama ulie kielieghane, zi niekozi biereide zhanguiji danlane, goyane kunzhi giene, jinxin giene, kunla man zunzhun giene, zhochenlai goude jienliene, kunlade goude surughane,
3.3: jiugui ulie danlane, kun ulie eghine, renyi wo, kunlaghala ulie zhenjindune, baerni ulie neiine,
3.4: giene goude gonjizhi kesilane yan shiqindeliuzhe goude zunzhun gieghazhi shunjighane.
3.5: Nie kun giene gonji ulie mejiese Hudai jiohuini matugie guine?
3.6: Munie xianxin giesan kun lindao danlase ulie olukushi goyane fugiede uzhedene Ibilisini faiku dunda orokuse ayizho.
3.7: Lindao danlase ghadaneshiku kun dundaseye gou minshen kerene. Ingiese kunlai ulie sugieghane, Ibilisini onde ulie oroghane.
3.8: Jiohuide gonjia danlane giechen kunye niekielien wo. Hhei kunla zunjine, ghudan ulie kieliene, jiu hende ulie ochine, baerni tanxin ulie giene,
3.9: gou lianxinghala xinyanni mimii goude bareine.
3.10: Ene kunlai xien shiizhi uzhene. Kunla yama kieliekui uwoshi cai gonjia danlaghane.
3.11: Biereilaye niekielien wo. Hhelai kunla zunjine, hhela xienhua ulie kieliene, goyane kunzhi giene, yan shiqindeliuzhe shixinde giene.
3.12: Gonjia danlachen kun nie biereide zhanguiji danlazhi kesilane, gielane goude gonjikuni wo.
3.13: Gonjiani wiliei goude giesan kun gou minshende khireine. Pse Mexiha Ersa ni xianxin gieku xinyan jiere danzi fugiedane. Mai Xinyanni Mimi Chijia Wo
3.14: Bi chii hhende eqighan ireku duran winema, ene xinni chade huaise
3.15: bi udazhi ireliuzhe Hudai giede matugie giekui mejiene. Ene gieshi chanqiku Hudai jiohui, zhendaoni tuhua, jichu wo.
3.16: Matanyi xinyanni mimi chijia wo. Enende yama kieliekuni uwo. Hhe kunni beyeghala khizhewo. Shenlin ganzhen beizhi hheshi gundanni wo giezho. Qienxienla hhei chanlawo. Hhei olon minzulade chonjidene Duyani kunla xianxin giewo. Famani dunda jienlie khireiwo.

4.1: Ihou kuse kunla miiku ruhherni, sheitan surughakuni daghazhi xinyanse likai giene giezhi Shenlin mindamin kieliezho.
4.2: Ene sughakushi ghudanchii jianise irezho. Ene izhun kunlai lianxinshi qiemughala shirasan niekielien wo.
4.3: Hhela bierei bu agi, oqin bu dafala giezho. Niezhan ijiekulai bu ijie giezhoma, ijiunishi Huda zhayaghasan wo. Zhendaoni xianxin giezhi minbai olusan kunla Hudade mafan kieliedene ijiekuni wo.
4.4: Huda zhayaghasanshi man gouni wo, Hudade mafan kieliedene jienliese ulie kerekuni nieda uwo.
4.5: Hudai kielienji onxian giekughala zhiguishizho. Mexihani Gou Hoji
4.6: Chi ene shiqinlai gaijiulade surughase xinyanni daoli jiere, chi daghasan gou daoli jiere fugiedazhi Mexiha Ersa i gou hoji gholune.
4.7: Duyani bixin kielien, yama ibari witu chonjisan kielienlase pii. Hudai miende zhughene donlien gie.
4.8: Beyedene donlien giese haochu choghon woma, Hudai miende donlien giese gofanmiende haochu olon wo. Duyade gouni ogine, houshideye gouni ogine giesan
4.9: ene kielienshi shuhua wo, ashighala jienliekughan wine.
4.10: Enende oluzhi matan khishulazhi xiacha giezho. Ingiekushi mai xiwon chanqiku Hudade wo. Hheshi soyuji kunlai jiuichen, tebieshi xianxin giesan kunlai jiuichen wo.
4.11: Chi enezighan shiqinlai kunlade fenfulazhi surugha.
4.12: Chi nasunchighanshi kunlai meilade bu uzhegha. Kielien kielieku, gieku, oreku, xinyan, ganjin fanmiende xianxin giechen kunlade yanzi uzhegha.
4.13: Bi iretula chi libai giekude jinwunni kunlade onshiku, jianjiku, surughakuni xiacha gie.
4.14: Huda chade ogisan nenjienni suibiende bu uzhe. Ene mureshi zhanlaola chii jiere khane teizhi onxian giekude Hudai kielienyi deilazhi ogisan wo.
4.15: Enezighan shiqinlade zhughene teizhi goughande giedene goyane hendasanyi ashighalade uzhegha.
4.16: Chi goyane xioxin gie, kunlade surughakuniye xioxin gie. Chi enelai izhi zhazhen giezhi giese chi, chii kielienyi chenliesan kunlai man jiuine.

5.1: Oqio kunlai hende bu kielie. Goya adane wo giezhi goude kielie. Nasuchighan kunlai goya jiune mutun kielie.
5.2: Oqiolusan biereilai anane mutun kielie. Nasunchighan oqitu kunlai eghechijiune mutun zhughene ganjinde teizhi goude kielie.
5.3: Yama witu guafulai laba giezhi zhaogu gie.
5.4: Guafude kewon sunzi bise xien giedene xioshun olukui sughazhi ada anane qinni beigha. Eneshi Hudai bayasughakui wo.
5.5: Yama witu guafula Hudade kouizhi xieni udu onxian gienema,
5.6: hhe zhonmun xianshou giesan guafula amitu woma, fugusan niekielien wo.
5.7: Chi ene shiqinlai hhelade fenfulazhi hhelade yama kielieku witui gholugha.
5.8: Kun qingune ulie gonjizhi tebieshi giene ulie gonjise xinyanni bendazho, xianxin ulie giesan kunde dou ulie kune.
5.9: Guafui denji giese nasunni bixishi 60 olune, nie ere kunde bierei danlasanni sanane.
5.10: Pse gou wilieni giesan zhenji kerene. Bilazhi kieliese, kesilai laizhi fugiedaghawo, zhochenlai jienliewo, Hudai xianxin giesan kunlai konni waghazhi ushilawo, kunnan penjisan kunlade banman giewo, yanyanji gou wiliede lilian khighawo.
5.11: Nasunchighan guafulade denji giezhi bu ogi. Enelade nefuxin Mexihade orekuse olodose loujide khireine giene.
5.12: Ingiese hhelade zui jinjikushi deiqikude yenjisan kielienne bendazho.
5.13: Pse hhela go gielade han toreizhi langan xigon gholuwo. Zinie langanraku pusho, da xienhua kieliezhi ulie gonjiku shiqinyi gonjine, ulie kielieku kielienlaiye kieliene.
5.14: Ingiese mii duranshi nasuchighan biereila jiehun giedene kewosi oluzhi gie lai. Duitou matai sugiekuni ereizhi bu olu gie.
5.15: Ede niezhan guafula ijin guidaose khireidene Ibilisini daghawo.
5.16: Xianxin giesan biereilani jiawude guafu bise jiohuide achan bu ogi. Ingiese yama wiku guafude jiohui banman gie shidane.
5.17: Jiohuini goude gonjisan zhanlaoni indan shonpeide zunjikuni wo. Yuqishi xinku giezhi daoli jianjisanlade, sughasanlade genjia giekuni wo.
5.18: Enei jinwun jiere kieliezho, "Fughe tughon yanchikude zuilun bu zhogha." Pse kieliezho, "Wiliechi gunzi bareise indanji wo."
5.19: Zhanlaoni zhase ghua ghuran kunni zhenjii kere, pse bu jienlie.
5.20: Kien zui fanjise dajialai melie kheila. Ingiese psedu kunlaye ayine.
5.21: Bi Huda, Mexiha Ersa , sunghusan qienxienlai melie tai goude fenfulaye. Enezighan kielienlai pienxin bu giezhi goude zunji. Yan shiqin giese gundande gie.
5.22: Khane teidene onxian giezhi zhanlao xienjikude suibiende bu gie. Kunla fanzui giekude bu hhantula. Goyane ganjinde bei.
5.23: Chii wide oluzhi pse chan giemerekude oluzhi gon usu bu ochidene jiuye gouji ochi.
5.24: Niezhan kunlai zui minxien wo, xien panjine. Niezhan kunlai zui khuinashi cai xienjighazhi khizhene.
5.25: Niekielien wo. Gou wilielaye minxien wo. Minxien uwoliuzhe niuigha dane.

6.1: Hoji danlasan kunla man loubanne zhughesene goude zunjikuni wo. Pse Hudai nierei, matan sughasan daolii kunla sugiene.
6.2: Hhei loubanshi xianxin giesei enbese gaijiu wo giezhi meilade uzhese ulie olune. Khareizhi genjia goude zunji. Qingiezhi goude giese xianxin giesan kunlade, oresan gaijiulade haochu wine. Baerde Bu Ore Enezighanni chi kunlade goude kieliezhi sugha.
6.3: Kien mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihani gou kielienni, xienliantu daolini ulie jienliezhi pseshiku daolini chonjise
6.4: hhe goyane fugiede uzhezhi yama ulie mejiene, zhonmun uroui asazhi jianjindukude xiqi wo. Ingiese dubiliene, jianjindune, beimiende sugiene, hu inxin giene.
6.5: Hhelai zhughe fuzhi sudoroni zhendao uwo, izhi ulie beidene onghonodune. Hhela jiomunni baer zhenjiku banfa danlaghazho.
6.6: Ingiezhoma, kun zhigan giese jiomunshi haochu fugieni wo.
6.7: Matan duyade yama agizhi ese irezho, fuguseye yama agizhi echi dane.
6.8: Matande ijieku musikui bise indan zhigan giekuni wo.
6.9: Facailane giesan kunlai miizhi onde orone. Yanyanji bixin, heiku duranla hhelai miidene qida oluku, barakude anda bouwo.
6.10: Baerni tanxin giekushi shiheni doghunni genzi wo. Kunla baerde oluzhi xinyanse likai giedene yanyanjide munan giezhi zhugheni hende otuzho. Xinyande Oluzhi Gou Zhanni Eghi
6.11: Ingiezhoma, chishi Hudai kun wo, enezighan shiqinlase piidene gouni, xienlian, xinyan, oreku, rennai, renyini dagha.
6.12: Chi xinyandene gou zhan eghizhi goyadene chanqiku aminni barei. Chii zhen enende urusei wo. Chi olon ganzhen beisan kunlai melie ene xinyanni goude chenren giewo.
6.13: Bi soyujilade amin ogisan Hudai melie, Benjiu-Bilado de goude ganzhen beisan Mexiha Ersa i melie chii fenfulaye.
6.14: Chi mai Ezhan Ersa Mexiha pse xienjighatula ene minlinyi onqiende zunjizhi yama kheilaku witui gholugha.
6.15: Heshini shihou kuzhese hhe indan doulakuni, zinie qienli winetu, honshan dundadu Honshan, ezhan dundadu Ezhan Mexiha Ersa i xienjighazhi uzheghane.
6.16: Zinie hhe ibeizi ulie fugune, kun shigha daku gon dunda souzho. Kiema hhei chujieghezhi ese daozho, ye chujieghe dane. Zunzhun gieku, pse chanqiku qienlini hhende ogi. Amine!
6.17: Chi ene duya jieredu bayan kunlai fenfulazhi goyane fugiede bu uzhe gie. Undan witu baerni bu koui, zinie shihenii zhengiejia olonde ogizhi mai xianshou gieghasan Hudade koui gie.
6.18: Pse hhelai gouni giegha. Gou shiqinyi olon giegha. Dafande giezhi chan kunlade ogi gie.
6.19: Ingiese goyadene oluzhi jianlaide boubei sunjizhi undan jichu daidene zhenzhenji aminyi barei shidane.
6.20: Qimotai ya, chade kouisanlai chi goude baohu gie. Pse duyani ibari witu kielienlase, goyane zhendaoi mejiene giezhi jianjindukulase pii.
6.21: Niezhan kunla imutui daghadene xinyanse wirulawo. Hudai nenjien tanre hhantu bi gie!

1.1: Hudai isighala Mexiha Ersa de shitu danladene Mexiha Ersa dain giesan aminde oluzhi wilie giesan Baolo
1.2: oresan Qimotai kewondene xin huaizho. Ada Huda, mai Ezhan Mexiha Ersa chade nenjien, ubali xiiku, pinnan, ogi gie! Gouxioxide Oluzhi Shouku Gieye
1.3: Bi xieni udu onxian giekude ese beidene chii sumulazhi Hudade mafan kieliezho. Hheshi bi xienrenlane mutun gou lianxinghala beiisan Huda wo.
1.4: Chi wilasan nughusunyi bi sumula irese hende chii chujiegheku duran wo. Ingiese bi hende bayasune.
1.5: Chii zhenzhenji xinyanni bi jila irezho. Ene xinyanshi chii wineinei Loi , anachii Yuniji ni zhughenughun wo, chii zhughede bikui bi hende xianxin giezho.
1.6: Ene yenyin jiere bi chii qixin gieye. Bi khane chii jiere teizhi onxian giekude Huda ogisan nenjienni khan mutun ondagha.
1.7: Ingiekushi Huda matande ayiku zhughe ese ogizho, nenli, oreku, goyane gonjiku zhughe ogizho.
1.8: Ingiese chi mai Ezhande ganzhen beizhi bi Ezhanyi yenyin jiere fanren gholuse shizhene bu gie. Matan Hudai nenlighala gouxioxide hhantu shouku gieye.
1.9: Huda mai jiuizhi zhiguide urukushi matan giesanghala pusho, hhe goya jihua, nenjienghalane giesan wo. Ene nenjienshi Mexiha Ersa i tungo giezhi duyai zhayaghasanse melie matande ogisan wo,
1.10: ede mai jiuichen Mexiha Ersa irese man mejieghawo. Hhe fugukui widaghazhi gouxioxighala ulie fuku aminni qinchude mejieghawo.
1.11: Ene gouxioxide oluzhi mii peizhi chonjichen, shitu, loushi danlaghawo.
1.12: Ene yenyin jiere bi enezighan kui shouizhoma, shizhene ulie giene. Ingiekushi bi kiende kouisanne mejiene. Pse hhe niudu kurutula bi hhende jiuizhi ogisei hhe baohu gie shidakui bi hende xianxin giezho.
1.13: Chi Mexiha Ersa i tungo giezhi iresan xinyan, oreku zhugheghala mase chenliesan olusan daolini yanzi mutun gie.
1.14: Chi mai sudoro sousan Shenlinghala chade jiuizhi ogisan boubeini ghurazhi goudagha.
1.15: Yaxiya kunla man mii benda jiesei chi mejiene. Hhelai dunda Feijilu , Heimoqini wine.
1.16: Ezhan Anisefu i nie gie kunde ubali xii gie. Hhe mii zhughei chan bayasughazho. Mii jieliughala sozilase ye ese shizhezho.
1.17: Da Loma de bikude mii hende ereidene ereizhi oluwo.
1.18: Ezhan hhe udude hhende ubali xii gie. Hhe Ifuso de matugiezhi mii ologhonni ushilasei chi qinchu wo.

2.1: Ingiese mii kewonya, chi Mexiha Ersa i nenjien jiere khiduzhe.
2.2: Chi olon ganzhen beisan kunlai melie mase chenliesanlai kekaoji kunlade jiuizhi ogizhi pse hhela kunlade surugha gie.
2.3: Chi Mexiha Ersa de hen budui danlazhi mare hhantu ku shoui.
2.4: Kien budui danlase goya shiqinghalane jiohoro ulie gieghazhi hhei budui danlaghasan kunyi bayasughane.
2.5: Kien bisai giekude zhao guijinzhe ulie giese ji 1 min danla dane.
2.6: Khishulasan zhonjia kun indan xien taranni ghurane.
2.7: Bi kieliesan kielienlai goude sumula. Ezhan chade yan shiqindeliuzhe agheli ogine.
2.8: Ersa Mexihai jila. Hheshi fugusan kun dundase aminne olusan wo, Dawude ni houdei wo. Eneshi bi chonjisan gouxioxi wo.
2.9: Bi ene gouxioxide oluzhi fanren mutun mii banlazhi ku shouiwo. Ingieliuzhe Hudai daolii banla dane.
2.10: Ingiese Huda sunghusan kunlade Ersa Mexihase iresan jiuiku, chanqiku famai ireghane giese bi yandeliuzhe rennai giezho.
2.11: Ene kielienshi zhenzhenji xianxin giekuni wo, "Matan hhere hhantu fuguse hhere hhantu aminne olune.
2.12: Matan rennai giese hhere hhantu honshan danlane. Matan hhei ulie tanise hheye mai ulie tanine.
2.13: Matan kekao uwoliuzhe hhe dou kekao wo. Hhe goyane ghudandu dane." Huda Chenren Giesan Wiliechi
2.14: Chi enezighan shiqinlai hhelade qixin gie. Kielien jiere bu jianjindu giezhi Hudai melie hhelade fenfula. Ene yama haochu uwo, zi chenliesan kunlai qida olughane.
2.15: Chi xiacha giezhi yama shizhekui wizhi Huda chenren giesan wiliechi gholu. Zhendaoni ulie codaghazhi goude jianji.
2.16: Yama genzi witu duyani kielienlase gholodo. Ene izhun kielien kunlai yebeiseye Hudase gholodoghane.
2.17: Hhelai kielien neizhen niekielien wo, yefuseye fugiedane. Hhelai dunda Ximinai , Feilitu wine.
2.18: Hhela aminne olusan shiqin daowo giezhi kieliedene zhendaose wirulawo. Ingiezhi ezighan kunlai xianxin giesei qida olughawo.
2.19: Ingieliuzhe Hudai khidun jichu tashi undan wo. Jiereni, "Ezhan kienshi hhenughun bikui mejiene." pse, "Kien Ezhanyi nierei waradase gou winise likai gie." giezhi huaizho.
2.20: Bayan giede injisan ighalashi gon antan, miengughala giesan pusho, muzha, wazhaghala gieseiye wine. Niezhanlai zhunyonide injine, niezhanlai ibannide injine.
2.21: Kien goyane ganjinrazhi enezighan doghunnilase likai giese guizhunni igha gholune. Zhiguitu gholughazhi danxin jiese Ezhan injise heshi wo, yanyanji gou shiqin giekude zhunbei giene.
2.22: Chi nasuchighan kunni nefuxinni piizhi ganjin zhugheghala Ezhanse waradachen kunlare hhantu gundanni, xinyanni, orekuni, heqini dagha.
2.23: Yama ulie mejieku benni jianjindukuse gholodo. Ene zinen kunni jianjinduzhi hendaghane.
2.24: Ezhanni hojila ulie jianjindukuni wo. Indan jien kunlade renyide duidai giezhi goude surughazhi rennai giekuni wo.
2.25: Fandui giesan kunde renyide sughakuni wo. Ingiese kenen Huda hhelade geizhen gieku zhughe ogise zhendaoni mejiene.
2.26: Ibilisi bareidene Ibilisini kielienyi chenliesan hhela xiereidene Ibilisini onse andane.

3.1: Duya barakude chijia shihou kuzhekui chi mejie.
3.2: Hhe shihoude kunla zi goyane guine, baerni neiine, goyane kuaizhi fugiede uzhene, suibiende sugiene, ana adane kielienyi ulie chenliene, kunlai gouni matane, xienlian witui giene,
3.3: zhughede orekui uwo, kunlai ulie rouliene, doghun kielienghala beimiende kieliene, goyane kunzhi ulie giene, yedou no wo, gouni giekude xiqi uwo,
3.4: kunlai ghudandune, ulie sumulazhi hu giene, goyane bi wo giezhi undude uzhene, hu nadukude Hudase olon orene,
3.5: jiomunni gieku yanzi winema, jiomunni nenlii chenren ulie giene. Chi imutu kunlase gholodo.
3.6: Hhelai dunda kunlai giede zhomuji oro naozi witu biereilai shunjighachen kun wine. Ene izhun biereila zuini beiliezhi yanyanji nefuxin hhelai miizho.
3.7: Hhela chan suruzhoma, izhi zhendaoni minbai olu dane.
3.8: Eqighandei Yani , Yanbi ghala matugiezhi Musa i duiku mutun enezighan kunlaye qingiezhi zhendaoni duizho. Hhelai zhughe qida oluwo, xinyannishiye jiani wo.
3.9: Ingieliuzhe hhelanughun chenji dane. Hhelai benni hhe ghua kun mutun olon kunlai melie khizhene. Qimotaide Zuihou Fenfulazho
3.10: Ede bi surughasan, bi gieku yanzi, mii ibeiku fanxian, xinyan, rennai gieku, oreku, khidunde beiku,
3.11: da bi Anqiya , Igenien , Luside de shouisan kui, mii heisan shiqinlai chi man uzhezhi mejiewo. Mii heisan zhenzhenji fugie wo! Ingieliuzhe Ezhan mii enelase jiuizhi likai gieghawo!
3.12: Shijishan Mexiha Ersa i sudoro xienliande udu daone giesan kunla man heikuni shouine.
3.13: Doghun kun, piendachen kun yebeiseye doghunshine. Hhela kunlai piendazho, kunlaye hhelai piendane.
3.14: Ingieliuzhe chi surusanne, xianxin giesanne goude barei. Chade surughasan kunlai chi qinchu wo,
3.15: pse chi gaxienzise zhiguitu jinwunni mejiene. Ene jinwun chi Mexiha Ersa i xianxin giese jiuiku hhe aghelii ogine.
3.16: Jinwunshi man Huda kunyi zhughei gojiolughazhi gieghasan wo. Kunlade surughakude, kheilakude, geizhen gieghakude, olusanyi gieghakude zoin wine.
3.17: Ingiezhi giese Hudai kunni hen kun gholughazhi yanyanji gou wilie giekude zhunbei gieghane.

4.1: Hudai melie, jianlai amitu kun, fugusan kunyi panjiku Mexiha Ersa i melie, pin Ersa xienjiku, pse hhei qienlighala chade hende fenfulaye.
4.2: Chi Hudai kielienyi chonji. Shihou heshi winu uwoliuzhe izhigie gie. Kunlade sughakude hende rennai giezhi geizhen giegha, kheila, pse sughazhi kielie.
4.3: Ingiezhi kieliekushi hhe shihou kuzhese kunla olusan daolini ulie chenliedene duranghalane goya chenlieku xiqi bitu kielienyi jianjiku loushilai ereizhi olodoghane.
4.4: Dou zhendaoi ulie chenliezhi kharei hu kieliesan guhuani daghane.
4.5: Ingieliuzhe chi yandeliuzhe jinshenshighan, ku shouikuse bu ayi, gouxioxii chonjichen kunyi wiliei giezhi goya renwune onchen gie.
4.6: Ede mii Hudade khughone giezhi zhunbei giezho, duyase likai gieku ghujinlazho.
4.7: Bi nie gou zhan ijin eghiwo, holuku moni holu baraghawo, xinyanniye izhi bareizho.
4.8: Ede gundanni jianlii made liuizho. Gundanghala panjiku Ezhan hhe udude made ogine. Zinie made ogikui pusho, Hhe pse xienjikui panjichen kunladeye ogine. Goyane Shiqinyi Fenfulazho
4.9: Chi jinlianji ghujighan mii enende ire.
4.10: Jima duyani shei dazhi mii benda jiedene Qiesalonijia de echiwo. Geleshi Jialatai de echiwo. Qido Damatai de echiwo.
4.11: Zinie Lujia bighala hhantu wo. Chi irekude Make i uduru ire. Hhe bi chonjiku wiliede zoin wine.
4.12: Bi Tuijigu i peizhi Ifuso de echighawo.
4.13: Chi irekude Teloya ni Jiabu ni giede bi jiesan jienyimi, pse hhezighan shu, tebieshi hhe ghoni arasun shulai agidei ire.
4.14: Tun giesan kun Yalishanda olon doghun shiqin giezhi mii heiwo. Ezhan zhao hhe giesan mutun hhende bouin giene.
4.15: Chiye hhei xioxin gie. Hhe matanyi kielienyi hende fandui giezho.
4.16: Mii ji 1 hui shenwun giekude kiema made banman ese giezhi da mii bendawo. Bi xiwon giese ene zuini Huda hhelade bu ogi gie.
4.17: Ingieliuzhe Ezhan mii kanzide beizhi made lilian ogiwo. Mii gouxioxii chonji baraghadene niman kunlade man chenlieghawo. Hhe dou mii shizii amanse jiui khizhewo.
4.18: Ezhan mii yanyanji doghun shiqinlase jiui khizhezhi asiman jieredu hhei gojiade pinnan oroghane. Kuaikui chanqi izhi hhende ogi. Amine! Zuihoude Asazho
4.19: Baijila , Yajila , pse Anisefu i nie gie kunlade kielien asa.
4.20: Iladu Gelindo de souwo. Telofeimo gienmerese bi hhei Milidu de feilieghawo.
4.21: Chi uncha orotula ghujighan mii enende ire. Yubulo , Buqien , Linu , Gelaojiya pse gaijiula man chade kielien asazho.
4.22: Ezhan chighala hhantu bi gie. Hhei nenjienye tanre hhantu bi gie!

1.1: Bishi Hudai hoji, Ersa Mexihani shitu Baolo wo. Huda sunghusan kunlai xinyande, pse kunyi xienlian gholughaku zhendaoni mejieghakude mii peizho.
1.2: Ene zhendaode chanqiku aminni xiwon wine. Eneshi ghudan ulie kieliechen Huda duyai zhayaghaku melie matande dain giesan wo,
1.3: heshiji shihou kuzhese gouxioxi chonjikude hhei daolini xienji khizheghawo. Mai jiuichen Huda ene chonjiku wiliei minlin xiaizhi made ogiwo.
1.4: Bi niekielienji xinyan jiere made zhenzhenji kewon danlasan Qido de xin huaizho. Ada Huda, pse mai jiuichen Mexiha Ersa chade nenjien, pinnan ogi gie! Qido Kelitedaode Giesan Wilie
1.5: Bi chii Kelitedao de feilieghaku mujishi giezhi baragha dasan shiqinni gie goudaghazhi pse bi chade fenfulasan mutun go chenshide zhanlao tei giezho.
1.6: Teisan kunde kunla yama kieliekui uwo, zi niekozi bierei agine, kesilani Ezhanyi xianxin giene, kesilani hu giene, pse kielien ulie chenliene giezhi kunla ulie kieliene.
1.7: Jiohuini uzhechenshi mechii gonjichen wo, indan kunla hhei yama kieliekui uwo. Kunlai meilade ulie uzhene, suibiende ho ulie kune, jiugui ulie danlane, kun ulie eghine, baerni tanxin ulie giene.
1.8: Bayasuzhi zhochen jienliene. Gounide xiqi wo. Goude, gundande, zhiguide giene. Goyane kunzhi giene.
1.9: Surusan zhendaolini goude bareine. Ingiese olusan daolighala kunlade sugha shidane, fandui giesan kunlade kielie shidane.
1.10: Ingiekushi kielien ulie chenliezhi ibari witu kielien kieliezhi piendachen kun olon wo, tebieshi hhe ijinyo hetoune gie giesan Yutai ni Mexihai xianxin giesan kunla wo.
1.11: Hhezighan kunlai amanyi duighakuni wo. Hhela ulie shizhedene baerde oluzhi kunlade ulie surughakui surughazhi olon giei kunlai man qida olughazho.
1.12: Kelitedao goya oronni nie xienzhi kieliezhi daowo, " Kelite kunla chan ghudan kieliene, doghun chushen wo, jin ijiekure wo, langan no wo."
1.13: Ene kielienshi shuhua wo. Ingiese chi hhelai hende kheilazhi hhelai xinyanni khiduzhegha.
1.14: Yutai kunni guhua, pse zhendaose likai giesan kunni minlinyi bu chenliegha.
1.15: Zhigui kunde yanliuzhe ganjin wo. Ganjin witu, xianxin ulie giechen kunde yanliuzhe ganjin uwo, hhelai sumulaku, lianxinlani man zannan wo.
1.16: Hhela kieliekude Hudai tanine giezhoma, giekude tani dazho. Hhela kunlai hokughane, kielien ulie chenliene, yama gounii gie dane.

2.1: Chii kieliese chi olusan daolide heshini jianji.
2.2: Oqio loujigalade goyane kunzhi gie, kunla zunzhun gieku mutun gie, xioxinde gie giezhi surugha. Xinyande, orekude, rennai giekude goude giegha.
2.3: Oqio biereilaye niekielien wo. Hhelade xienliande gie, kunlai beimiende bu kielie, jiude hoji bu danla, kunlade gouni sugha giezhi surugha.
2.4: Ingiese hhela nasuchighan biereilade sughazhi zhanguiji, kesiladene ore,
2.5: xioxinde, undande bei, giene gui, kunlade goude gie, zhanguijine shunji giezhi surugha. Pse Hudai kielienni kunla sugiene.
2.6: Nasuchighan ere kunladeye xioxinde gie giezhi sughazhi kielie.
2.7: Chi yan shiqindeliuzhe goyane gouni giezhi yanzi uzhegha. Chi sughakude loushide, renzhende sugha.
2.8: Yama moubin erei daku gou kielienghala kielie. Ingiese mai fandui giesan kunla shizhedene yama kielie dane.
2.9: Hojila ezhanne shunjikuni wo. Yan shiqindeliuzhe ezhanne bayasugha, yama huida bu gie.
2.10: Dunxi bu ghula. Kunlai zhenzhen xinren giegha. Ingiese yandeliuzhe mai jiuichen Hudai daolide kuaikui irene.
2.11: Hudai jiuiku nenjien jien kunlade man xienjizhi khizhewo.
2.12: Ene nenjien mai donlien giezhi xienlian witu zhugheni, duyani nefuxinni widaghazhi ene duyade xioxinde, gundande, xienliande udu daoghazho.
2.13: Pse matan panjisan futanni udu irekui sagheizho. Hhe shihoude nenlitu Huda, mai jiuichen Ersa Mexihani famani xienjighane.
2.14: Hhe matande oluzhi goyane duya ijiekushi soyuji uhunnise mai shuizhi ganjinraghadene goyadene bexin danlaghazhi rexinde gouni gieghane giezho.
2.15: Enelai chi kunlade sugha. Qienline bareidene kunlade sughazhi kheilazhi kielie. Kunlai goyane gajide bu uzhegha.

3.1: Chi kunlade qixin giezhi gonjisan, qienli bareisan kunlai shunjizhi minlinyi zunji gie. Pse suishi zhunbei giezhi yanyanji gouni gie gie.
3.2: Kunlai bu sugiezhi bu zhenjindu gie. Go kunlade renyide giezhi goyane meilade uzhe gie.
3.3: Yenlai matanye men wo, kielien ulie chenliene, miizho, yanyanji nefuxin, xianshou giekude hoji danlawo. Mouxien, dubilieku dunda udu daozho, chou bareizhi nieniene henjizho.
3.4: "Ingiekude mai jiuichen Huda nenjien, orekui xienjighazhi
3.5: mai jiuiwo. Matan goyane giesan gou wilieghala jiuisan pusho, hhe ubali xiizhi Shenlinghala jiuiwo. Shenlin matanyi waghazhi erchan olughawo, shinishighawo.
3.6: Huda mai jiuichen Ersa Mexihaghala Shenlinyi matanyi jiere zhengiejia olon kiewo.
3.7: Ingiese hhei nenjienghala matan zui wituni gholudene Hudai houdei gholuzhi chanqiku aminni panjizho."
3.8: Ene kielien oluzho. Bi xiwonshi chi enezighan shiqinlai izhigie bu beidene giezhi Hudai xianxin giesan kunlai zeixin giezhi gouni giegha. Eneshi man gou shiqin wo, kunlade haochu wine.
3.9: Chi hu zhenjindukuse pii. Xienrenlani niere jilasan shu jiere, pse Yutai kunni guijin jiere jianjiduzhi sugiendukuse pii. Enela yama haochu uwo, yama isi uwo.
3.10: Zhomen ghughachen kun bise 1 lianhui jingao giedene hhelare laiwon bu gie.
3.11: Ene izhun kunla daolini bendadene chan zui giezhi goyadene zui jinjiwo. Enei chi mejiene. Zuihoude Fenfulazho
3.12: Bi Yaqima i onu Tuijigu i chii hhende peizhi echighakude chi ghujighan Nigepoli de mii ochirale ire. Bi jiejin giezhi hhende uncha daoghane giezho.
3.13: Chi Xina lishi, Yabolo ghalade jinlianji banman giezhi goude dafala. Hhelade yama bu chaigha.
3.14: Mai kunla yama gou jiego ulie khizheghaku udu daose ulie olune. Kunla xiyo bikude banman giezhi gouni giekude surugha.
3.15: Mare hhantuku kunla chade kielien asazho. Xinyan jiere matande oresan kunlade bi asazho gie. Hudai nenjien ta manlade hhantu bi gie!

1.1: Mexiha Ersa de oluzhi bafanzi sousan Baolo , gaijiu Qimotai ghala bijien oresan hhantu wilie giesan Feilimen ,
1.2: oqinjiu Yafeiya , bijienre hhantu budui danlasan Yajibu , pse chii giede hhantulasan jiohuini kunlade xin huaizho.
1.3: Mai ada Huda, Ezhan Ersa Mexiha tande nenjien, pinnan ogi gie! Feilimenni Oreku, Xianxin Gieku
1.4: Bi niefanie bi zunjisan chanqiku Hudade chii qiizhi mafan kieliekushi
1.5: bi chenliese chi soyuji shentulade orezhi Ezhan Ersa i xianxin giezho.
1.6: Bi onxian giese chi xianxin giekughala laiwon giesanlai zoin khizheghadene Mexihai sudoro matande bisan gounilai man goude mejie giezho.
1.7: Gaijiu, chi orezhi shentulai futanshighase biye hende bayasuzhi zhughene teiwo. Aniximude Oluzhi Xiahua Giezho
1.8: Ingiese bi Mexihai miende danzine fugiedaghazhi chii fenfulazhi indan giekui giegha shidanema,
1.9: bi oreku zhugheghala chii xiahua gieye. Bi oqio kun, Mexiha Ersa de oluzhi bafanzi soudene
1.10: Aniximu de oluzhi chii xiahua gieye. Bi bafanzide bikude bi hhende xinyan jiere ada danlazho.
1.11: Melieshi hhe chade yama zoin uwoma, ede matan ghualade zoin wine.
1.12: Bi ede hhei peizhi chii hhende khareizhi echighaye. Hheshi mii zhughe jieredu kun wo.
1.13: Benlai bi hhei enende feilieghazhi bi gouxioxide oluzhi bafanzi soukude chii oronde goyane ushilaghane giezhoma,
1.14: chi tunyi wise bi ingiezhi gieku duran uwo. Chi gouni giese mienqian ulie giezhi goya duralazhi gie giezho.
1.15: Hhei zhanshi jiere chase likai gieghakushi kenen chighala chanqi hhantulaghane giezho.
1.16: Ede hheshi zinie hoji pusho, oresan gaijiu wo. Kunni fanmien, Ezhanni fanmiende uzhese made oluzhi ingiezho, chade oluzhi genjia qingiene.
1.17: Ingiese chi mii lienshou danlaghazhoshi mii jienlieku mutun hhei jienlie.
1.18: Hhe chade yan kuighazhi chade yan chaizhoshi man mii zhan jiere jila.
1.19: Bi honjiye. Eneshi bi qinsi huaisan wo. Chi made yan chaisei bu kielieye. Chii aminshi bi ogisan wo.
1.20: Gaijiuya, Ezhanyi miende made banman nie gie. Mexihai miende mii zhughede futanshigha!
1.21: Chi mii kielienyi chenliekui bi hende xianxin giezhi xin huaizho. Chi bi kieliesanse da olon giekui bi mejiene.
1.22: Pse chi made souku oron nie zhunbei gie. Huda tai onxian giesanyi dain giezhi mii tai hhende echighakui bi xiwon giezho. Zuihoude Kielien Asazho
1.23: Mexiha Ersa de oluzhi bighala hhantu bafanzi sousan Ibafu chade kielien asazho.
1.24: Bighala hhantu wilie giesan Make , Yalidagu , Jima , Lujia man chade kielien asazho.
1.25: Ezhan Ersa Mexihai nenjien tanre hhantu bi gie. Amine!

1.1: Gushihoude Huda xienzhilai tungo giezhi mai xienrenlade haojihui, olon banfaghala kieliewo.
1.2: Duya baraku ene xienzide kewonne tungo giezhi matande kieliewo. Huda hhei soyujilai jienliechen kun danlaghawo. Da hhei tungo giezhi alanni zhayaghawo.
1.3: Hheshi Hudai famatui faighachen gon wo. Hudai xinbinni onqiende daibio giezho. Nenlitu kielienghalane yanyanjilai gonjizho. Mai zuini ganjinraghadene undu, fugietu Hudai borun miende souzho.
1.4: Hhe jienliesan niere qienxienlani nierese fama wo. Ingiezhi qienxienlase undudawo. Hudai Kewon Qienxienlase Hen Wo
1.5: Huda alinie qienxiende, "Chishi mii kewon wo. Enedu bi chade ada danlawo." giezhi kieliezhi daozho? Pse, "Bi hhende ada danlane. Hhe made kewon danlane." giezhi kieliezhi daozho?
1.6: Pse Huda fugie kewonne duyade ireghakude, "Hudai qienxienla, man hhei beii." giezhi kieliezho.
1.7: Huda qienxienlani kieliese, "Huda qienxienlane kei gholughazho, hojilane khan gholughazho." giezhi kieliezhoma,
1.8: kewonne kieliese, "Huda, chii baozoshi chanqi izhiku wo. Chi gundannighala goyane gojiani gonjizho.
1.9: Chi gundannide xiqi wo, doghunnii henjizho. Ingiese Huda, yeshijiu chii Huda chade bayasukui ogizhi hhantu kunlase daoghawo." giezho.
1.10: Pse kieliezho, "Ezhan, dei qiikude chi zeminde jichu giewo. Asimanyiye chi khaghalane giewo.
1.11: Zemin, asiman widanema, chi izhi wine. Hhela man jien mutun khuichenrane.
1.12: Chi hhelai jien mutun horo agine. Hhela jien mutun bienjinema, Zinie chi niekielien wo. Chanqi amiturane."
1.13: Huda alinie qienxiende, "Bi duitoulaichii kon dourachii teitula chi mii borun miende sou." giezhi kieliezhi daozho?
1.14: Qienxienlashi man zinie ushilachen ruhher wo. Huda peidene jiuikuni jienliene giesan kunlai ushilaghachen wo.

2.1: Ingiese matan chenliesan daolini ijinyo genjia goude jilakuni wo. Pse daolise wirulane.
2.2: Qienxienlai tungo giezhi kieliesan kielien xiogo wine. Jien zui fanjizhi ese shunjisanlai man gundande faiwo.
2.3: Ingiese matan imekie fugie jiuikui yamacha ulie teise matugie faikuse andane? Ene jiuikushi Ezhan xien qinsi kieliesan wo, khuinashi Ezhanse chenliesan kunla matande zhenmin giewo.
2.4: Hudaye ghudureqi, fugie shiqin, yanyanji nenlitu shiqinghala, pse duranghalane kunlade ghughazhi ogisan Shenlinni nenjienghala hhantu ganzhen beiwo. Mai Jiuichen Ersa Kun Gholuwo
2.5: Matan ede kieliesan jianlaiku duyani Huda qienxienlade jiuizhi ese gonjighazhoma,
2.6: jinwun jieredu nie oronde ganzhen beizhi kieliezho. "Kunshi yan wo, chi dou hhende zhughe chilane? Kunshi yan wo, chi dou hhei zhaogu giene?
2.7: Chi hhei zhanshi jiere qienxienlase boghonidaghawo. Hhende fama, zhiguitu maghalai zhoghawo.
2.8: Soyujilai hhei kon doura shunjighawo." Hhende soyujilai shunjighawo giese hhei uye shunjikui nieda uwoma, ede soyujila hhei shunjisei matan dou chanla dazho.
2.9: Matan chanlasanshi qienxienlase zhanshi jiere boghonidasan Ersa wo. Hhe fuguku kui shouidene fama, zhiguitu maghalai zhowo. Hudai nenjienghala jien kunlade oluzhi fuguzhi daozho.
2.10: Soyujilashi Hudade oluzhi, Hudai tungo giezhi bisan wo. Hhe olon kesilane famade udurukude shouku giekughala hhelai jiuiku touzi Ersa i hulunshighase heshi wo.
2.11: Kunlai zhiguishighasan Ersa , pse hhezighan zhiguishisan kunla man nie Adase irezho. Ingiese hhe hhelai gaijiu giezhi uruse shizhekui uwo.
2.12: Hhe kieliezho, "Bi gaijiuladene chii nierei chonjine. Bi hhantulasan kunlai dunda chii doulane."
2.13: Pse kieliezho, "Bi hhei kouine." Pse kieliezho, "Uzhe, bi, pse Huda made ogisan kesilare enende wine."
2.14: Ingiese kesilade beye biku mutun hhe goyaneye kunni beye gholuzhi fugukui tungo giedene fugukuni qienlii bareisan Ibilisii widaghawo,
2.15: pse hhezighan fugukuse ayizhi ibeizi hoji danlasan kunlai andaghawo.
2.16: Hhe shuhua qienxienlade banman ese giedene Iburaheimu ni houdeilade banman giewo.
2.17: Ingiese hhe gofanmiende gaijiularene xianlitui gholuse indanji wo. Ingiekushi Hudai melie ubali xiichen, shixinji giechen zui fugie buwa gholudene kunlai zuini shuine giezho.
2.18: Hhei shouku giekughala shiizhi daozho. Ingiese hhe hhezighan shiisan kunlade banman gie shidane.

3.1: Ingiese Huda hhantu urusan zhiguitu gaijiula, matan xianxin giesan Huda peisan, zui fugie buwa Ersa ni goude sumula.
3.2: Hhe hhei peisan Hudade gieku Musa mechide shixinji giekughala niekielien wo.
3.3: Gie giesan kunde giese kuaikui olon mutun Ersa de Musa se kuaikui olon wo.
3.4: Gielade man giesan kun winema, soyujilai zhayaghasanshi Huda wo.
3.5: Musa Hudai gieni soyuji kunlade hoji danladene shixinde giezhi jianlai kielieku shiqinde ganzhen beizhoma,
3.6: Mexiha Hudai giede kewon danlazhi shixinde giezho. Matan danzine fugiedaghazhi panjisanne goude bareise matanshi mechi wo. Hudai Bexinla Hhamuraku
3.7: Ingiese Shenlin kieliezho, "Enedu ta Hudai shenqini sonosuse
3.8: hhe xienzide bexinla hontande Hudai shiizhi Zodui gieku mutun zhughene bu khiduzhegha.
3.9: Tai xienrenla bi 40 nien giesei uzhewoma, yen hhende mii shiizhi kaoyen giewo.
3.10: Ingiese bi hhe idai kunlade hokuzhi kieliewo, 'Hhelai zhugheni chan miizhi mii moni tani dane.'
3.11: Bi hokudene hhela mii hhamurakude ibeizi oro dane giezhi fayen giewo."
3.12: Gaijiula, ta xioxin gie, pse tai dunda niezhan kunla doghun zhugheghala xianxin ulie giedene chanqiku Hudase likai giene.
3.13: Shijienni enedu giezhi urukude niudunie nieniene surughazhi kielie, pse tai dunda niezhan kunlai zui miidene zhugheini khiduzheghane.
3.14: Matan dei qiikude xianxin giesanne zuihou kutula izhi xiacha giese Mexihare hhantu nexian jienliene.
3.15: Jinwun jiere kieliezho, "Enedu ta Hudai shenqii sonosuse hhela zodui gieku mutun zhughene bu khiduzhegha."
3.16: Hudai shenqii sonosudene hhere zodui giesanshi kien wo? Musa Aiji se uduruzhi khizhesan soyuji kunla pushonu?
3.17: Huda 40 niende kiende hokuzho? Hhezighan zui fanjidene fugusan beyeni hontande feiliesan kunlade pushonu?
3.18: Mii hhamurakude oro dane giezhi Huda kiende fayen giewo? Hhezighan ese shunjisan kunlade pushonu?
3.19: Matan uzhese hhela hhamurakude oro dakushi xianxin ese giezho.

4.1: Ingiese Hudai hhamurakude oroku dain giesan winema, matanyi dunda niezhanla hhamurakude oro dakuse matan ayikui wo.
4.2: Hhelade gouxioxii chonjiku mutun matandeye chonjizhoma, hhela daolini chenliekude xianxin giekughala ese jienliezho. Ingiese chenliesan hhelade yama oronde uwo.
4.3: Matan xianxin giesan kun hhamurakude orozho. Huda kieliesan mutun, "Bi hokudene hhela mii hhamurakude ibeizi oro dane giezhi fayen giewo." Ingiezhoma, Hudai wilie duyai zhayaghasanse gholuzho.
4.4: Jinwun jieredu nie oronde ji 7 qienni ingiezhi kieliezho, "ji 7 qiende Huda soyuji wilielasene hhamurawo."
4.5: Pse enezighande kieliezho, "Hhela mii hhamurakude ibeizi oro dane!"
4.6: Hhamurakude ezighan kunla oronema, eqighandei gouxioxii chenliedene ese shunjisan kunla oro dawo.
4.7: Huda pse niekozi udui enedu giezhi jinjidene khuinashi Dawude i tungo giezhi ene udui kieliezho. Eneshi jiere injisan jinwun wo, "Enedu ta Hudai shenqii sonosuse zhughene bu khiduzhegha."
4.8: Yeshuya hhelade hhamurakui ogizhoshi Huda khuinashi psedu udui ulie kieliene.
4.9: Ingiese Hudai bexinlade da nie hhamuraku wine.
4.10: Huda wilielane ese giedene hhamuraku mutun Hudai hhamurakude orochen kunla wilielane ese giedene hhamurazho.
4.11: Ingiese matan hhe hhamurakude ijinyo xiacha giezhi orokui wo. Pse ese shunjisan hhelai yanzii daghazhi furane.
4.12: Hudai kielienshi amitu, zoin bitui wo, yanyanji ghua renzitu khudoghose da xidu wo. Lien kunni jinshen ruhherji mouzi gusuide orozhi ghua gholughane. Zhugheni sumulaku zhuyiniliuzhe fenji shidane.
4.13: Zhayaghasan yanliuzhe Hhei melie niuighakui uwo. Man Hhei melie khizhene. Matan hhende ijinyo zhan jiuine. Zui Fugie Buwa Ersa
4.14: Matande asimande khisan famatu niekozi zui fugie buwa wine. Hheshi Hudai kewon Ersa wo. Ingiese matan xianxin giesanne xiacha gieye.
4.15: Matanyi zui fugie buwa matanyi zholienni ulie mejiekui uwo. Hhei yandeliuzhe matan mutun shiizhi daozhoma, zui ese fanjizho.
4.16: Ingiese matan danzine fugiedaghadene nenjientu baozo melie echiye. Hhende matande ubali xiizhi kerekude banman giene.

5.1: Alinie zui fugie buwaliuzhe kun dundase sunghudene kunni oronde Hudai shiqinyi gonjighazho. Hhela Hudade mure ogizhi zuini shuiku sidagha giezho.
5.2: Hheladeye gofanmiende zholienni wine. Ingiese yama ulie mejiezhi codasan kunlade renyide giene.
5.3: Hhelade zholienni bise bexinlai zuide oluzhi sidagha gieku mutun goya zuideneye indan sidagha giene.
5.4: Kiema zui fugie buwani minshenyi goyadene iregha dane, zinie Hharune mutun Huda sunghuse olune.
5.5: Niekielien wo. Mexihaye zui fugie buwa danlaku kuaikui goyadene ese ireghazho. Zinie chishi mii kewon wo. Enedu bi chade ada danlawo giesan Huda hhende kuaikui ogizho.
5.6: Jinwun jiere pse nie oronde Huda pse kieliezho, "Chishi Maijixide mutun chanqiku buwa wo."
5.7: Ersa duyade bikude baratazhi wilazhi onxian giezhi goyai fugukuse jiui shidaku Hudai xiahua giezho. Huda hhei xienlian mutun dain giewo.
5.8: Hheshi Hudai Kewon woma, ku shouikughala shunjikui suruwo.
5.9: Hhe ingiezhi hulunshidene hhei shunjisan soyuji kunlade oluzhi chanqiku jiuiku genzi gholuwo.
5.10: Ingie Huda hhei Maijixide mutun zui fugie buwa danlaghawo. Jiomun Jiere Khiduzhe
5.11: Ene shiqinlai kieliese bijiende kielieku kielien olon woma, ta menshi kieliezhi qinchu olugha dane.
5.12: Imegheichade ta loushi danlakui woma, dou Hudai daolini jichui kunla tande sughaku biyo wine. Ta zinie neizi ijiene, khidunni ijie dazho.
5.13: Jien neizi ijiechenshi yeliwa wo, yanshi gou daoli bikui ulie mejiene.
5.14: Zinie fugiedasanla khidunni ijiene. Hhelai lienjizhi daose gouni, roni fenji shidane.

6.1: -2 Ingiese matan Mexihani daolii kaishi giekui khuinane jiedene, fugughaku wilielai geizhen gieku, Hudai xianxin gieku, xilini surughaku, kha teizhi onxian gieku, fugusan kun aminne oluku, zuihou shenpan gieku enezighan jichulai pse bu daidene hulunshikude daiye.
6.3: Huda dain giese matan hulunshikude daine.
6.4: Hhezighan gon zhouidene niefa giegherezhi, asimanni nenjienni jingo giezhi, Shenlinni xianshou giezhi,
6.5: Hudai kielien gou biku, houshini famani jingo giezhi daosan kunla
6.6: zhendaoni bendase hhela erchan shinishizhi geizhen gie dane. Qinsi Hudai kewonyi pse shizijia jiere ghadazhi minminji shizheghazho.
6.7: Nie ghazha chan bousan ghurai xiidene cai osizhi tareisan kunde zoin bise Hudase fuqi irene.
6.8: Ghazhade eghesun, osun osise yama zoin widazho, kharaku ghujinlazhi zuihoude siderane.
6.9: Bijienyi orentula, ingiezhi kieliezhoma, tai qinkonla goudazhi jiuikuse chadashisei bijien hende xianxin giezho.
6.10: Hudashi gundan wituni pusho. Ta giesan wilie, pse hhei nierede oluzhi oresanlai ese matazho. Eneshi ta eqighandei shentulai zhaogu giezhi edeliuzhe ushilazho.
6.11: Bijien xiwon giese ta kienliuzhe panjisanla man gholutula niekielienji rexinde giezhi zuihoude kuru.
6.12: Ingiese ta ulie langanshizhi hhezighan xianxin giedene rennai giezhi dain giesanyi jienliesan kunlanughunyi surune. Hudai Dain
6.13: Huda Iburaheimu de dain giekude goyasene fugienii zhiizhi fayen giekui uwoshi goyane zhiizhi fayen giezhi kieliewo,
6.14: "Bi ijinyo chade fuqi olon ogizhi houdeilaichii hende olodoghane."
6.15: Ingiese Iburaheimu oloncha rennai giedene dain giesei jienliewo.
6.16: Kun fayen giekude goyasene fugienii zhiizhi fayen giene. Ene fayenyi ganzhen beighazhi soyuji zhenjindusei widaghane.
6.17: Hhezighan dain giesei jienliesan kunlade Huda goya isine ibeizi ulie bienjighakui pse qinchude mejieghane giezhi dain giedene pse fayen giezhi bouzhen giewo.
6.18: Ene ghua shiqin ulie bienjine. Huda ghudan ulie kieliene. Ingiese matan Hudai miende piile iresan kunla hende bayasuzhi melie beilasan xiwonni goude barei shidane.
6.19: Matande bisan ene xiwon hoxian matanyi ruhherde olusan chon beighaku gougoui xianli, khidunji undan wo. Dajienyi sudorodu menlienzi sudoro matanyi oroghane.
6.20: Ersa Maijixide mutun chanqiku zui fugie buwa gholudene matande oluzhi tou 1 giede sudorodu menlienzi sudoro orowo.

7.1: Ene Maijixide shi Salen ni honshan wo, pse Zui Undu Hudai buwa wo. Iburaheimu honshanlai eghi injidene khareizhi irekude Maijixide hhei jienliezhi gouni kieliezho.
7.2: Iburaheimu eghinduzhi zhanjisan soyujilasene ushireini hhende ogizho. Maijixide i niereni tou 1 gie isishi gundan honshan wo, pse Salen honshan wo, jiushi pinnantu honshan wo.
7.3: Hhende ada, ana jiawu uwo. Hhei aminde qiorun, uzhu uwo. Hhe Hudai kewonyi xianli, chanqi buwa danlazho.
7.4: Ta nie sumula, ene kun matu fama wo! Famatu xienren Iburaheimu qianlazhi iresanne ushireini hhende ogiwo.
7.5: Liwi ni houdei dunda buwa danlachen kunla bexinlase ushirei ghura giezhi guijinde minlin ogizho. Ene bexinshi Iburaheimu se khizhesan hhelai gaijiuliuzhe buwala hhelase yen qingiezhi ghurazhoma,
7.6: Maijixide shi hhelare nie jiawu pusho, khareidene Iburaheimu se ushirei ghurazhi Hudai dainni jienliesan Iburaheimu de onxian giezho.
7.7: Fugieni ganide onxian giese yama kieliekui uwo.
7.8: Ushirei ghurasan buwala fugunema, Maijixide jinwun jiere kieliesan mutun chanqi ulie fugune.
7.9: Ingiezhi kielieseye olune. Ushirei ghurasan Liwi goyane Iburaheimu i tungo giezhi ushirei ogizho.
7.10: Ingiekushi Maijixide Iburaheimu i jienliekude Liwi xienrenne yasunde wo.
7.11: Isilie kunla Liwi paini buwai zhidui doura guijinni jienliewo. Ene zhiduni tungo giezhi hulunshise yale Hharune ni zhidui ese daghadene Maijixide i zhidui daghasan da nie buwai khizheghazho?
7.12: Buwani zhidui geise guijinniye ijinyo geine.
7.13: Ede kieliesan hheshi da nie painughun wo. Hhe paini kunla sidagha gieku teizi shida wilie giezhi nieda ese daozho.
7.14: Matanyi Ezhan Yuda paise khizhesanyi man mejiene. Ene paini kieliekude Musa buwai shiqinyi qiizhi ese daozho.
7.15: Maijixide mutun pse nie buwa khizhese ene shiqinla genjia qinchu oluwo.
7.16: Hhe buwa danlakushi Liwi paise khizhene giesan guijinghala pusho, ulie widaku aminni nenlighala wo.
7.17: Jinwun jiere hhende ganzhen beizhi kieliezho, "Chishi Maijixide mutun chanqiku buwa wo."
7.18: Niemande kieliese melieshidaku minlin zholien, yama zoin wise widaghawo.
7.19: Guijin yamai ese hulunshighawo. Pse niemande kieliese matande gou xiwon irezho. Ene xiwonyi tungo giezhi matan Hudai shigha shidane.
7.20: Pseshi Ersa buwa danlakude Huda fayen giezhi danlaghazho. Psedu buwalashi fayen giezhi danlaghasan pusho,
7.21: zinie Ersa shi fayen giezhi danlaghasan wo. Huda hhende kieliezho, "Ezhan fayen giezho, pse ulie bienjine. Chishi chanqiku buwa wo."
7.22: Ersa ni fayen giezhi buwa danlaghase hheshi genjia gou yenjisanni baoran gholuwo.
7.23: Eqighandei buwa danlasan shuzi olon bikushi hhela man fugune. Ingiese izhigie buwa danla dazho.
7.24: Zinie Ersa chanqi wine. Ingiese hhei buwai wiliei chanqi ulie arunzhane.
7.25: Hhe chanqi amiturazhi hhelade oluzhi xiahua giezho. Ingiese jien hhei tungo giezhi Hudai melie iresanlai hhe jiuizhi uzhu kurugha shidane.
7.26: Intu zhiguitu, doghunnii wiku, zannannii wiku, zuirense ghugha keisan, asimanlase undudasan zui fugie buwa matande jian heshi wo.
7.27: Hhe psedu buwala mutun niudunie goyane zuide sidagha giedene khuinashi bexinlani zuide sidagha gieku biyo uwo. Hhe goyane 1 huide sidagha giedene enei man chenjighawo.
7.28: Guijinghala zui fugie buwa danlasanlade man zholienni winema, guijinni khuina Huda fayen giezhi chanqi hulunni gholusan Kewonne buwa danlaghawo.

8.1: Ede kieliesan zhunyonishi matande intu nie zui fugie buwa wine. Hhe asiman jieredu famatu Hudai baozoi borun miende souzho.
8.2: Ganjin oronde, yeshijiu zhenzhenji zhanfande wilie giezho. Ene zhanfanshi kun daisan pusho, Ezhan daisan wo.
8.3: Jien zui fugie buwalashi mure ogizhi sidagha gieghane giezhi danlaghasan wo. Ingiese matanyi ene nie zui fugie buwaye yama ogiku dunxi kerene.
8.4: Hhe zemin jiere bise buwa ulie danlakushi guijin mutun sidagha giechen buwala wine.
8.5: Enezighan buwala giesan wilieshi asiman jieredu shiqinni yanzi wo, xiujie wo. Musa ganjin zhanfanni daine giekude Huda jingao giezhi kieliesan mutun, "Chi xioxin giezhi yanyanji giekulai bi chade ulade uzheghasan yanzi mutun gie."
8.6: Ersa ede genjia zhiguitu wiliei jienliewo. Hheshi genjia gou yenjisanyi dundadu kun wo. Eneshi genjia gou dain jiere jinjisan wo.
8.7: Ji 1 gie yenjisande yama ese chaizhoshi ji 2 gie yenjisanyi kereku biyo uwo.
8.8: Huda hhelai kheilazhi kieliezho, "Uzhe, bi Isilie kun, Yuda kunlare shini yenjisanyi jinjiku udu khuzhene. Eneshi Ezhan kieliesan wo.
8.9: Ene yenjisanshi bi hhelai xienrenlaini khai laizhi Aiji se uduruzhi khizhekude Hhelare jinjizhi yenjisanghala buxian wo. Hhela mii yenjisanyi izhi ese zunjizho. Ingiese biye hhelai ese gonjiwo. Eneshi Ezhan kieliesan wo.
8.10: Hhezighan udu daose bi Isilie kunlare jinjiku yenjisanshi ingiezho. Bi guijinne hhelai sumulakude teizhi zhughedeni huaine. Bi hhelade Huda danlane. Hhela made bexin danlane. Eneshi Ezhan kieliesan wo.
8.11: Jien kunla giebeizi, gaijiuladene chi ezhanni tani giezhi surughaku biyo uwo. Zui ganise zui fugienide kurutula man mii tanine.
8.12: Bi hhelai codasanyi rouliene. Hhelai zuini pse ulie jilane."
8.13: "Shini yenjisan" giezhi kieliese melieshiku khuichenrazho. Khuichenrazhi bixindasanla deigo man widane.

9.1: Tou 1 gie yenjisan kieliende beiiku guijin, duya jiereshiku beiiku zhiguitu oron wine.
9.2: Nie dai goudaghasan ganjin zhanfanni tou 1 gie giei zhiguitu oron giezhi uruzho. Sudoro zhula teizi, shire, Hudade ogiku ginan wine.
9.3: Ji 2 gie menlienzi khuina nie gie wine, zui zhiguitu oron giezhi uruzho.
9.4: Sudoro antanghala giesan xianlu shire, pse antanghala man bouisan yenjisan kielienni xianzi wine. Xianzi sudoro mana ginan zhonlosan antan gongon, Hharune ni niazi faizhi daosan zhugun, ghua yenjisan tashi banzi wine.
9.5: Xianzi jiere famatu ghua Jilubo wine. Zui widaghaku teizii huizho. Ede enelai nienieji kielie dane.
9.6: Enelai ingiezhi zhunbei gie goudaghazho. Buwala ganjin zhanfanni tou 1 gie giede chan orozhi libai gieku wilie giezho.
9.7: Ji 2 gie giede zinie zui fugie buwa niehon 1 hui orozhi chusun bareidene goyai zuide oluzhi, pse bexinla mejie dazhi fanjisan zuide oluzhi sidagha giene.
9.8: Enelai tungo giezhi Shenlin mejieghakushi tou 1 gie gie bikude zui zhiguitu oronde echiku moni da ese keighazho.
9.9: Eneshi edeku yanzi wo. Mure ogizhi sidagha giese libai giesan kunyi lianxinni hulunshigha dane.
9.10: Hhezighan ijieku, ochiku, yanyanji waghakulashi mienzide jinjisan guijin wo, arunzhazhi shinishighaku shihou kurune.
9.11: Mexiha iredene ireku gou shiqinni zui fugie buwa danlazhi genjia fugie, genjia hulunshiku ganjin zhanfanni tungo giezho. Ene ganjin zhanfanshi kunni khaghala daisan pusho, ene zhayaghasan duyanughunye pusho.
9.12: Hhe iman, fughe tughuchai chusunyi ulie injizhi goya chusunne injidene 1 huide zui zhiguitu oronde orozhi chanqi zui shuikui chenjighawo.
9.13: Iman, jieniui chusun, pse siniu tughuchai funiesunyi ganjin witu kunyi jiere xireighazhi beyei arughazhi ganjinraghase
9.14: Mexiha chanqiku Ruhherni tungo giezhi goyane goujida zannan wizhi Hudade ogise hhei chusun fugughaku shiqinse tai lianxinni zhiguishighazhi tai chanqiku Hudai genjia ulie shunjighanu?
9.15: Ene yenyin jiere hhe shini yenjisei dundadu kun danlazho. Hhe fuguzhi kunla tou 1 giede yenjisan doura fanjisan zuini shuiwo. Ingiedene hhezighan uruzhi iresan kunlade dain giesan chanqiku jiachanni jienlieghawo.
9.16: Kiende fugukude kielieku kielien bise bixi kielien liuisan kun fugusei kunla zhenmin gie.
9.17: Kun fuguse yenjisan kielien caigie zoin wine. Yenjisan kun amitushi yenjisan kielien yama zoin uwo.
9.18: Ingiese tou 1 gie yenjisanniye chusunghala jinjizho.
9.19: Musa guijin mutun bexinlade soyuji minlinni jianjidene hulan noghosun, osun ganganni bareizhi fughe tughucha, imanni chusun, usui guijinshu, pse bexinlai jiere xireighazhi
9.20: "Ene chusunshi Huda tanre jinjisan yenjisan kielienyi zhenji wo." giezhi kieliezho.
9.21: Niekielien wo. Chusunni ganjin zhanfan, yanyanji libai giekude injiku dunxi jiere xireighazho.
9.22: Guijin mutun chabudu soyujilai chusunghala ganjinraghazho. Chusun ese usuruzhoshi zuini mienlie dane. Mexiha Fuguzhi Kunlani Zuini Widaghawo
9.23: Ingiese asiman jieredu yanzi mutun giesan dunxilai bixi ingiezhi ganjinraghazhoma, asiman jieredu dunxilai genjia gou sidagha giekughala ganjinraghane.
9.24: Mexiha zhenzhenji zhiguitu oronni xiujie, yejiushi kun khaghala giesan zhiguitu oronde ese orodene asimande orozhi ede mai oronde Hudai melie khizhezho.
9.25: Hhe goyane izhigie sidagha gieku biyo uwo. Zui fugie buwa niehonnie goyane chusunyi ese bareizhi psedu chusunyi bareizhi zui zhiguitu oronde orokughala buxian wo.
9.26: Qingiese hhe duyai zhayaghasanse bixi izhigie ku shouinema, ede goyane 1 huide sidagha giezhi zuini widaghane giezhi duyai zuihoukude xienjizhi khizhewo.
9.27: Jien kunla 1 hui fugukushi jinjisan wo. Fuguse panjine.
9.28: Mexihaye olon kunlai zuini danjine giezhi goyane niefade sidagha giewo. Jianlai ji 2 hui xienjizhi khizhezhi zuini danjikughala gonxi widene hhei hende sagheisan kunlai jiuine.

10.1: Guijinshi jianlai ireku gounii xiujie wo, zhenzhenji yanzi pusho. Ingiese niehonnie niekielienji sidagha giekughala Hudai melie iresan kunlai jiedui hulunshigha dane.
10.2: Hulunshigha shidase libai giesan kunlai 1 huide ganjinraghazhi pse lianxinni zui wine giezhi ulie giene. Ingiese sidagha gieku eqighan ulie beinu?
10.3: Ingieliuzhe enezighan sidagha gieku niehonnie kunni zuini jila ireghane.
10.4: Jieniu, imanni chusun zuini widagha dane.
10.5: Ingiese Mexiha duyade irekude Hudade kieliezho, "Sidagha gieku dunxi, murelai chi ese keredene mii beyeni mure danlaghane giezhi zhunbei giewo.
10.6: Sideraghaku sidagha, shuiku sidaghade chi xiqi uwo.
10.7: Ingiekude bi kieliewo, 'Huda, jinwun jiere mii zhiizhi huaisan mutun bi chii isii giele irezho.'"
10.8: Jiere Mexiha kieliezhi "Sidagha gieku, mure, sideraghaku sidagha, shuiku sidaghani chi ese kerezho, xiqiye uwo." giezho. Enezighanshi guijin mutun ogisan wo.
10.9: Ingiedene kieliezho, "Uzhe, bi chii isii giele irezho." Ingiekushi hhe melieshikui widaghazhi khuinashikui chenjighane giezho.
10.10: Ene isi mutun Ersa Mexiha beyene 1 huide sidagha giezhi matanyi zhiguishighawo.
10.11: Jien buwala niudunie beidene wilie giezhi niekielienji sidagha giezhoma, eneghala zuini ibeizi widagha dane.
10.12: Zinie Mexiha 1 huide zui shuiku sidagha giezhi chanqi zoin khizheghazho. Ingiedene Hudai borun miende souzhi
10.13: hhei duitoulai hhei kon doura teitula sagheizho.
10.14: Hhe 1 hui sidagha giedene zhiguishisan kunlai chanqi hulunshighawo.
10.16: "Ezhan kieliezho, Hhezighan udu daose bi hhelare jinjiku yenjisanshi ingiezho, Bi guijinne hhelai zhughede teizhi sumulakudeni huaine."
10.17: Pse kieliezho, "Hhelai zuini, mouxiennilai pse ulie jilane."
10.18: Enezighan zuini mienliese pse zuide sidagha gieku biyo uwo. Hudai Melie Echiye
10.19: Ingiese gaijiula, matan Ersa ni chusunyi tungo giezhi fugie danzighala zui zhiguitu oronde oro shidane.
10.20: Hhe matande nie shini, amitu moni keighazhi sudorodu menlienzighun daoghawo. Ene sudorodu menlienzishi hhei beye wo.
10.21: Matande Hudai giede gonjisan nie famatu buwa wineshi
10.22: matai doghun lianxinni Ersa i chusunghala arughazhi zhughei ganjinraghadene beyeni ganjin usughala waghase matan shixinji zhughe, khidunde xianxin giekughala Hudai melie echiye.
10.23: Matande dain giesan hheshi kekaotui wo. Ingiese matan chenren giezhi xiwon giesei ulie gojiolughazhi goude bareiye.
10.24: Matan nieniene dahoshen giezhi oreku, gounii giekui sumulaye.
10.25: Hhezighan ulie hhantulazhi gon olusan kunlai bu daghadene nieniedene surughazhi kieliezhi hhantulaye. Hhe udu chadashisei mejiese genjia ingiezhi gieye.
10.26: Matan zhendaoi mejiekui jienliesenu nanxighan zui fanjise pse shuiku sidagha uwo,
10.27: zinie ayizhi panjiku, pse duitoulai sideraghaku fugie khanni sagheizho.
10.28: Musa i guijinyi fanjisan kunlai ghua, ghuran kun ganzhen beise ubali ulie xiizhi fugughanema,
10.29: Hudai kewonyi taizhi goyai zhiguishighasan yenjisan chusunyi yamacha ese teizhi nenjienni ogisan Shenlinni uru giesan kunlai, ta nie sumula, hhelai genjia gundude ulie fainu?
10.30: "Bouchoushi bi giekui wo, bi kharulune." Pse, "Ezhan bexinlane panjine." Enei kien kieliesei matan mejiene.
10.32: Tai eqighandei gon zhouidene jiurezhi olon ku shouizhi rennai giesei sumula.
10.33: Niezheifa tai dajialai melie shizheghazhi heizho. Niezheifa qimutu kunnan shouisan kunlare lienshou gholuzho.
10.34: Hhezighan khasan kunlade ta ubali xiizho. Tai caichanlai kunla qianlakude ta bayasuzhi shouikushi goyade genjia gouni, chanqiku caichan bikui mejiene.
10.35: Ingiese ta fugie danzine bu benda. Intu zhughede fugie jianli ogine.
10.36: Ta Hudai isii gie baraghazhi dain giesei jienliene giese rennai gieku biyo wine.
10.37: Jinwun jiere, "Pse goujicha beise irene giesan hhe irene, ulie udane.
10.38: Gou kunmi xianxin giekughala amiturane. Khuina tuise bi hhende xiqi uwo." giezhi kieliezho.
10.39: Matanshi khuina tuidene widachen kun pusho, xianxin gieku bizhi jiuisan kun wo.

11.1: Xianxin giekushi xiwon giesan shiqinni bawo wo, chanla daku shiqinni ghanghanaghakui wo.
11.3: Xianxin giekughala matan alanshi Hudai kielienyi tungo giezhi zhayaghasei mejiene. Ingiezhi chanlasanshi chanla dakuse zhayaghasan wo.
11.4: Xianxin giekughala Hhabi Hudade sidagha giesan Jiabi giesanse gou wo. Hhei xianxin giekughala Huda mureini jienliezhi Hhabi shi gou kun wo giezhi renjiwo. Hhe fuguzhoma, xianxin giekughala edeliuzhe kielien kieliezho.
11.5: Xianxin giekughala Idileisi i jienlie echise hhe fugukui jingo ese giewo. Kunla hhei ereizhi olu dakushi Huda hhei jienlie echizho. Hhei jienlie echiku melie hhe Hudai bayasughase gou minshenyi jienliewo.
11.6: Xianxin gieku wise Hudai bayasugha dane. Hudai melie irechen kun ijinyo Huda winekui xianxin giezhi hhei ereisan kunlade jianli ogikui xianxin giekui wo.
11.7: Xianxin giekughala Nuhha chanla dasan shiqinni Huda jingao giese zunjizhi fugie chonni zhunbei giedene giei kunlaini man jiuiwo. Xianxin giekughala Nuhha hhe idai kunlai zuini jinjiwo, goyai Hudai melie gounide sanawo.
11.8: Huda Iburaheimu i urukude hhe xianxin giekughala minlinyi zunjizhi jianlai caichan gieku oronde khizhewoma, echikude khala echikui ulie mejiene.
11.9: Hhe xianxin giekughala dain giesan oronde soukude kunlai oronde souku mutun zhanfande souzho. Niekielienji dain giesei jienliesan Isaghei , Yagebu ye qingiezho.
11.10: Eneshi hhe Huda jihua giezhi beighasan jichutu chenshii sagheizho.
11.11: Xianxin giekughala Sare kewosi laiku nasunse daoliuzhe kewosi laizho. Hhe sumulase hhende dain giesan hhe kekao wo giezho.
11.12: Ingiese hoxian nie fugusan kunse houdei oluzhi asiman jieredu hodun, haibienzini shazi mutun shuzi uwo.
11.13: Enezighan kunlade man xianxin gieku bizhi fuguwoma, dain giesei jienlie dazho. Gholose dain giesei chanladene bayasuzhi jienliene giezho. Pse goyalane duya jieredu toreichen, zhanshi sousan kun wo giezhi chenren giezho.
11.14: Intui kieliechen kunshi minminji goyadene nie gojia ereizho.
11.15: Hhela likai giesan oronne sumulazhoshi khareizhi echiku jihui winema,
11.16: hhela hende xiwon giesanshi nie genjia gou gojia, jiushi asiman jieredu wo. Hhela Hudai Huda giese Huda shizhene ulie giedene hhelade nie chenshini zhunbei giezho.
11.17: Xianxin giekughala Iburaheimu i Huda shiikude Isaghei ni khughozhi ogiwo. Dain giesei jienliesan kun goya niekozi kewonneliuzhe khughozhi ogiwo.
11.18: Ene kewonni kieliese Huda kieliezhi daozho, "Zinie Isaghei se olusei chii houdei giezhi urune."
11.19: Hhe sumulase Huda kunni fugusan kun dundase aminne olughane giezho. Hoxian hhe fugusan kun dundase kewonne uduru irewo.
11.20: Xianxin giekughala Isaghei jianlaiku shiqinde oluzhi Yagebu , Isao de onxian giewo.
11.21: Xianxin giekughala Yagebu fugukude Yusufu ni kewonlade nienieji onxian giezhi zhugun tuludene Hudai beiiwo.
11.22: Xianxin giekughala Yusufu fugukude Isilie kunla jianlai Aiji se khizhekui kieliezhi pse goya yasunyi matui chuli giekui fenfulawo.
11.23: Musa i oluse ada, anani uzhese nie seighan kewosi wo. Xianxin giekughala honshanni minlinse ese ayizhi ghuran sara niuighawo.
11.24: Xianxin giekughala Musa fugiedadene Falao ni oqinde kewon ulie danlane giezho.
11.25: Khareidene Hudai bexinlare hhantu shouku gieliuzhe zui dunda zhanshi xianshou ulie giene.
11.26: Hhe Mexihade oluzhi uru giesei uzhedan Aiji ni boubeise gundude uzhezho. Hhe jianlaiku jianlini sagheizho.
11.27: Xianxin giekughala hhe honshan hokukuse ese ayizhi Aiji se likai giewo. Chanla daku Ezhanyi hoxian chanlaku mutun rennai giezho.
11.28: Xianxin giekughala hhe Jiulidaosan Jie, chusun xireighaku kuichenni jinjiwo. Ingiezhi hhe alachen irese Isilie kunlai fugie kewonlai ese alaghazho.
11.29: Xianxin giekughala Isilie kunla Hunhai ni daokude khosun oron daoku niekielien wo. Aiji kunla qingiezhi shiizhi daokude yenji alawo.
11.30: Xianxin giekughala Isilie kunla Yelige chenshini doludu rouise chenqian furawo.
11.31: Xianxin giekughala biozi Lahe tewulai goude jienliedene hhezighan ese shunjisan kunlare hhantu ese fuguwo.
11.32: Bi pse yan kieliene? Jijien , Balake , Cansun , Yefuta , Dawude , Samuer , pse xienzhilai shiqinni nienieji kieliese shijie ulie kune.
11.33: Xianxin giekughala hhela gojialai hanshiliewo, gundanni giewo, dain giesei jienliewo, shizini amanyi duighawo,
11.34: fugie khanni tuliekui widaghawo, khudogho renzise holu andawo, zholiennise khidunnii gholuwo, zhan eghikude lihaishiwo, niman kunlai buduilai man eghi tuighawo.
11.35: Biereila fugusan dundase aminne olusan giene kunyi jienliewo. Niezhan kunla genjia gou fuhoni jienliene giezhi hende tendun shouizhi andaku duran uwo.
11.36: Niezhan kunlai xilun gie, mabienzida, banla, kha,
11.37: tashida ala, qiroujie ala, khudoghoghala alawo. Ghoni, iman arasunyi zhozhi gochude holu, nanxin duru, heikui shoui, zayala,
11.38: hontan, ula, dun, nokiende liulan giezho. Ene duya hhelai pei dane.
11.39: Enezighan kunla xianxin giekui tungo giezhi gou minshenyi jienliewoma, dain giesei jienlie dawo.
11.40: Eneshi Huda matande genjia gou shiqin zhunbei giezho. Matan uwoshi hhela hulunshi dane.

12.1: Olien matai wiqiku mutun matande imegheni ganzhen beisan kun wine. Ingiese yanyanji achan, matai chigharade jiohoro giesan zuini xieidene rennai giezhi matai melie beilasan holukui bisai gieye.
12.2: Mai xianxin giekuni kaishi gieghazhi onchen gieghasan Ersa ni goude uzheye. Hhei melie beilasan bayasukude oluzhi hhe shizijiani kui shouizhi shizheghakui meilade uzhedene Hudai baozoi borun miende souzho.
12.3: Ta zuirenla fandui giesei rennai giesan Ersa i ta goude sumula. Ingiese ta ulie hhechezhi zhughe ulie widane.
12.4: Ta zuighala eghinduzhoma, chusun usuruku chendude ese kuruzho.
12.5: Kewosiladene surughazhi kieliesan mutun Huda tande surughazhi kieliesan kielienyi ta matawu? Kieliezho, "Mii kewon, Ezhan gonjizhi surughasei chi meilade bu uzhe. Hhe kheilakude zhughene bu widagha.
12.6: Ezhan oresandene gonjizhi surughane. Jienliesan kesilane eghine."
12.7: Tai gonjizhi surughakude rennai gie. Huda tai kewonne mutun uzhezho. Alinie kewonde ada gonjizhi ulie surughane?
12.8: Kewon danlasanla man gonjizhi surughasei jienliezho. Tande gonjizhi surughasan uwoshi kewon pusho, zagieda wo.
12.9: Pse matanyi gonjizhi surughasan beyeni adai matan zunjizho. Matan ruhherni Adai genjia shunjizhi ulie amituranu?
12.10: Beyeni ada zhanshi jiere goyane isighala mai gonjizhi surughazho. Zinie ruhherni Ada mai gonjizhi surughakushi matande haochu ireghazhi hhei zhiguinide guzi beighane giezho.
12.11: Jien gonjizhi surughasanlashi danshi ese bayasudene nango giezhoma, khuinashi lienjizhi daosan kunlade pinnantu jiego irene, gundande udu daone.
12.12: Ingiese ta lilian witu kha, zholieresan shigharane zhidagha.
12.13: Kondene oluzhi moni giezhi zhidagha, ingiese dogholosan shighara ulie banjizhi goudane. Nenjien Ogisan Hudai Bu Benda
12.14: Ta soyuji kunlare heqishizhi zhiguide udu daokui xiacha gie. Zhigui uwoshi kiema Ezhanni chanla dane.
12.15: Ta xioxin gie, pse niezhan kunla Hudai nenjiense likai giene, pse du winetu genzi khizhedene tai jiohoro giezhi olon kunlai zannanshighane.
12.16: Lon kijiezhi Isao mutun xienlian wizhi gouji idun ijiunide oluzhi fugie kewonni qienlii huine.
12.17: Ta mejiene. Hhe khuinashi adani onxian giesei jienliene giese adani dain ese giezho. Wilazhi xiahua gieliuzhe adane zhughei khareighaku banfa widazho.
12.18: Ta maqi shidaku, khan sidera, olien khi, kharani, honfen kei,
12.19: laba shenqi, kielien kieliesan shenqitu ulade ese irezho. Hhe shenqii sonosusan kunla pse kielien bu kielie giezhi Hudade xiahua giezho.
12.20: Ene ulani shighasanlai yewoiliuzhe tashida ala giesan minlinni hhela danji dazho.
12.21: Chanlasan zhenzhenji ayighase Musa liuzhe, "Bi hende ayizhi pugharazho." giezhi kieliezho.
12.22: Ingiezhoma, ta Xiwunshan , chanqiku Hudai chenshide irezho. Hheshijiu asiman jieredu Yelusalen wo, shuzi witu qienxienla bayasuzhi hhantulasan hhende wo.
12.23: Ta asiman jiere nierei jilasan fugie kewonlai jiohui, soyujilai panjichen Hudai hhende irezho. Hulunshighasan gou kunni ruhherlai hhende wo.
12.24: Ta shini yenjisei dundadu kun Ersa i hhende, xireighasan chusunyi hhende irezho. Ene chusun kieliesan Hhabi ni chusun kieliesanse genjia gou wo.
12.25: Ta xioxin giezhi tande kielien kieliesan hhei fandui bu gie. Eqighandei Isilie kunla zemin jiere goyalai jingao giesei fandui giedene zuise anda dazho, asiman jierese matanyi jingao giesei fandui giese matan zuise matugie andane?
12.26: Hhe xienzide hhei shenqi zeminyi gojiolughazho. Ede hhe dain giezhi kieliezho, "Bi pse niefa zeminyi gojiolughazhi asimanyiye gojiolughane."
12.27: Pse niefa giesan ene kielienni isishi gojiolughasanlai, yejiushi zhayaghasanlai noighazhi ulie gojiolusanlai feilieghane giezho.
12.28: Ingiese matan ulie gojioluku gojiani jienliese mafan gieye. Xienlian, zunjiku zhugheghala Hudai bayasughazhi beiiye.
12.29: Matai Hudashi sidera widaghaku khan wo.

13.1: Ta gaijiudene mutun chan nieniedene ore.
13.2: Mo yosan zhochenlai goude jienliekui bu mata. Niezhan kunla ingiezhi giezhi mejie dakude qienxienlai jienliezhi daozho.
13.3: Bafanzide khasan kunlai goyalarene hhantu khasan mutun jila. Heisan kunlai goyai heisan mutun jila.
13.4: Jien kunla hunyenni zunzhun giezhi bu ghudandu. Lon kijiezhi piofen giesanlai Huda panjine.
13.5: Ta udu daokude baerlai tanxin bu gie. Goyade bisanlashi kurusanni wo gie. Huda kieliezhi daozho, "Bi chii jiedui ulie jiezhi ulie bendane."
13.6: Ingiese matan danzine fugiedaghazhi kieliene, "Ezhanshi made banman giesan wo. Bi ulie ayine. Kun mii yan giene?"
13.7: Tande Hudai kielienyi jianjizhi tai udurusanlai jila. Hhela zuihou kurutula giesanlaini goude uzhezhi xianxin gieseini daghazhi gie.
13.8: Ersa Mexiha uchughudu, enedu, chanqi niekielien wo.
13.9: Ta goyalane yanyanji ghudureku sughasande bu echigha. Kunni zhughe ijiuni xigonde ulie kouidene nenjiende kouizhi khiduzhese gou wo. Hhezighan ijiuni xigonyi daghasanlade yama haochu uwo.
13.10: Matande nie sidagha gieku teizi wine, jieredu sidagha giesan dunxilai ganjin zhanfande wilie giesan buwala ijieku qienli uwo.
13.11: Chushenni chusunyi zui fugie buwa deilazhi zhiguitu oronde orodene zuini shuiku sidagha giezho. Chushenni beyei kunla sousan oronni ghadane sideraghazho.
13.12: Ene yenyin jiere Ersa ye goya chusunghalane bexinlai zhiguishighane giezhi chenmen ghadane ku shouizho.
13.13: Ingiese matan kunla sousan oronni ghadanedu hhei hhende echizhi uru giesanyini danjiye.
13.14: Matande chanqiku chenshi enende uwo, matan jianlai ireku chenshini sagheizho.
13.15: Ingiese matan Ersa i tungo giezhi doulakughala Hudade chan sidagha gieye. Eneshijiu Ezhanni nierei chenren giesan kunni amanse khizhekuni wo.
13.16: Gouni gieku, nieniedene ogikui bu mata. Imutu xienjide Huda xiqi wo.
13.17: Tai udurusan kunlai ta chenliezhi shunji. Hhela Hudai melie zhan jiuine giezhi tai ruhherde oluzhi chan zhughe chilazho. Hhela ingiekude ta munan bu gieghadene bayasughazhi giegha. Hhelai munan gieghase tande yama haochu uwo.
13.18: Bijiende oluzhi onxian gie. Bijienyi lianxinde ese chaisei bijien xianxin giene. Bijien yan shiqindeliuzhe gundande giene giezho.
13.19: Bi tande goude kielieye, ta hende onxian gie, ingiese bi ghujighande tai hhende khareizhi echine. Gounii Kieliezhi Asazho
13.20: Ghoni adulasan fugie yanbashi mai Ezhan Ersa Mexihai chanqi yenjisan chusunghala fugusan kun dundase aminne olughasan pinnantu Huda
13.21: yanyanji gounighala tai hulunshighazhi goyane isii giegha gie! Ersa Mexihani tungo giezhi mai dunda goyane bayasughaku shiqinyi giegha gie. Kuaikui chanqi izhi hhende ogi. Amine!
13.22: Gaijiula, bi jiendanghan tande xin huaizhi sughazhi kieliesei ta goude chenlie.
13.23: Matai gaijiu Qimotai ni andaghasei ta mejie. Hhe eqie irese bi hhere hhantu tai uzhele ireye.
13.24: Tai udurusan soyuji kun, shentulade man kielien asa. Idali se iresan kunla tai asazho.
13.25: Nenjien tanre man hhantu bi gie!

1.1: Huda, Ezhan Ersa Mexihani hoji Yagebu xin huaizho. Gochude sandazhi sousan 12 gie paini kunlade kielien asazho.
1.2: Mii gaijiula, tande yanyanji chijia shiqinyi penjise hende bayasundu.
1.3: Tai xianxin giekui shiizhi daose rennai irekui ta mejiene.
1.4: Ta rennaini xiogoni man khizhegha. Ingiese ta fugiedazhi hulunshidene yama ulie chaine.
1.5: Tai dunda kiende agheli chaizhoshi soyuji kunlade dafande ogizhi ulie kheilaku Hudase xiahua gie, tande ogine.
1.6: Ta xiahua giekude xianxin giezhi goujida inxin bu gie. Inxin giechen kun haini lan mutun kei matugie feiliese qingie furane.
1.7: Intu kunla Ezhan yan ogine giezhi bu sumula.
1.8: Soyuji shiqin jiere zhuyine barei dazhi undanla dazho.
1.9: Boghoni gaijiula goya undunine kuai.
1.10: Bayan kunla goya boghonine kuai. Bayan kunla banche jieredu chizhe mutun widane.
1.11: Naran khizhe nie shase osun ghone, chizheni xiniezhi seighanni widane. Bayan kunye giesan dundane ingiezhi widane.
1.12: Chijia shiqinyi shoui shidachen kunlade fuqi wine. Shiizhi daosan kunde jianli wo giezhi aminni maghalai ogine. Eneshi Hudade oresan kunlade ogine giezhi dain giesan wo.
1.13: Kunyi shiise, "Mii Huda shiizho." giezhi bu kielie. Doghunni Hudai shii dane. Hheye kienmai ulie shiine.
1.14: Kunyi shiise goyani nefuxin miidene miighazho.
1.15: Nefuxinghala kieli fugiedase zui olune, zui fugiedase fugukui olune.
1.16: Bi oresan gaijiula, shandan bu gie.
1.17: Yanyanji gouni, onqienni nenjienlashi man jierese iresan wo. Gonqini Adai hhense irezho. Hhe goujida ulie bienjine, izhi niekielien wo.
1.18: Hhe goyane isighala zhendaoi tungo giezhi matande ada danlawo. Ingiedene matanyi hhe zhayaghasanla dundadu zui zhunyoni gholughawo.
1.19: Bi oresan gaijiula, enei mejie, kienliuzhe chenliekude ghujighan, kieliekude lalaghan, hokukude lalaghan.
1.20: Kunni hokuku Hudai gundanni khizhegha dane.
1.21: Ingiese yanyanji zannanni, olodosan doghunnilai man benda. Tai zhughede Huda zeilasan kielienni renyide jienlie. Ene kielien tai ruhherni jiui shidane.
1.22: Ta goyane piendazhi kielienyi zinie chenliechen bu gholudene zunjichen gholu.
1.23: Kun kielienyi zinie chenliedene ulie zunjise belijide goya uxinne uzheku niekielien wo.
1.24: Uzhedene yo daose goya yanzine deigo matawo.
1.25: Zinie kunlade ziyu ogisan onqientu guijinni xianxide uzhedene chenliesei uye matazhi zunjizhi giesan kunlade yan shiqin gieliuzhe fuqi wine.
1.26: Kun goyane xienlian wo giedene kielienne gonji dase goyane goya piendazho. Ene kunni xienlian yama oronde uwo.
1.27: Ada Hudai melie ganjin, zannan witu xienlianshi oliechen, guafulade kunnan bikude hhelai zhaogu giezhi da goyane baohu giezhi duyani zannanyi ulie cheiqighakui wo.

2.1: Mii gaijiula, ta mai famatu Ezhan Ersa Mexihai xianxin giese kunlade pienxin bu gie.
2.2: Bilase nie kun antan geizhi zhozhi huaralasan jien musidene tai huitande orowo. Pse nie nanxin kun po jien musidene ye orowo.
2.3: Ingiese ta hhe huaralasan jien musisan kunde kieliene, "Ene gou wizhi jiere sou." Pse nanxin kunde kieliene, "Chi hhetoro bei, pse mii kon shida sou."
2.4: Eneshi ta goya kunne pienxin giezhi doghun mujighala pandon gieku pushonu?
2.5: Bi oresan gaijiula, chenlie. Huda duya jieredu nanxin kunlai sunghudene xinyan jiere ese bayazheghawu? Da Hudade oresan kunlade dain giesan hhe gojiani hhelade ese jienlieghawu?
2.6: Ta dou nanxin kunlai jiuren gieghazho. Tai qifulazhi fayende lai echisanshi baertu kunla pushonu?
2.7: Hhelashi ta jienliesan zhiguitu nierei sugiesanla pushonu?
2.8: Jinwun jiere goyadene mutun giebeidene ore giesan ene nie zui zhunyo guijinni ta zunjizhoshi oluzhoma,
2.9: kunlade pienxin giese zui fanjizho, guijin ta fanjisande zui jinjine.
2.10: Kien guijinni man zunjidene niei fanjise soyujilai man fanjizho.
2.11: "Piofen bu gie." giezhi kieliesan Huda "Kun bu ala." giezhi ye kieliezho. Ingiese piofen ese giedene kun alase guijinni fanjizho.
2.12: Ingiese ta yan kielie, yan giene giese ziyushighaku guijinghala panjiku mutun gie.
2.13: Ubali ulie xiichen kunyi ubali ulie xiikughala panjine. Ubali xiiku panjikuse injiwo. Gieku Uwoshi Xianxin Giekushi Fugusanni Wo
2.14: Mii gaijiula, kunde xianxin gieku wine giezhi kieliedene yama giekui uwoshi yan zoin wo? Ene xianxin gieku hhei jiui shidanu?
2.15: Tai dunda gaijiu eghechijiulade niudunie musiku, ijiuni uwokude
2.16: ta hhelade, "Pinnande echi, musizhi khalun, ijiezhi chudu." giezhi kieliedene beyede injikui ulie ogise yan zoin wo?
2.17: Niekielien wo. Gieku witu zinie xianxin giekushi fugusei wo.
2.18: Ingiese niezhan kunla kieliene, "Chade xianxin gieku wine, made gieku wine." Chi gieku witu xianxin giekune made uzhegha. Bi giekughalane xianxin giekune chade uzheghaye!
2.19: Huda niekozi wo giezhi chi xianxin giese oluzho. Sheitanlaye hhei xianxin giedene ayizhi pugharazho.
2.20: Chi ene men kun, gieku witu xianxin giekushi yama zoin wituni chi mejieku duran winu?
2.21: Matanyi xienren Iburaheimu Isaghei kewonne sidagha gieku teizi jiere teikude giekughala gounide sanasan pushonu?
2.22: Chi uzhe, hhei xianxin gieku hhei giekughala hhantu wilie giezho. Giekughala xianxin giekui hulunshighawo.
2.23: Ingiese jinwun jiere "Iburaheimu Hudai xianxin giedene Huda hhei gounide sanazho." giezhi kieliesan mutun gholuwo. Pse hhei Hudai zhanlien wo giezhi uruzho.
2.24: Ingie uzhese kunni gounide sanase giekughala wo, zinie xianxin giekughala pusho.
2.25: Niekielien wo, biozi Lahe peizhi ireghasan kunlai jienliedene psedu mo jierese echighawo. Eneshi giekughala gounide sanasan pushonu?
2.26: Ingiese ruhher witu beye fugusan mutun gieku witu xianxin giekushiye fugusan wo.

3.1: Mii gaijiulaya, ta olon kunla man loushi danlane bu gie. Loushi danlasan kunyi psedu kunlase gundude panjikui ta mejiene.
3.2: Matan dajiala go fanmiende cowu fanjine. Nie kun kielien jiere yama cowu ulie fanjise hheshi hulun kun wo. Goya hunshenne man kunzhi gie shidane.
3.3: Matan moreii amande ghada teizhi hhei hanshiliese hunshenyini kunzhi giene.
3.4: Pse chonni nie sumula, hhe fugie woma, honfen kei eghizhi chonni gojiolughaliuzhe siji niekozi ga banbaghala fanxianyi goyane isighala suibiende zhanwo giene.
3.5: Kielienye niekielien wo. Beye jieredu nie ga iyanzi woma, fugie kielien kielie shidane. Uzhe, zui gaji khanliuzhe nie linkoni sideragha shidane.
3.6: Kielienshi khan wo. Nie gou witu duya wo. Mai beye jiere teidene hunshenni zannanshighane. Dozoheini khanghala mai shenholai man sideraghane.
3.7: Kun yanyanji yewo, bunzhu, ghughei, zhaghasunlai hanshilie shidane, ede ijin hanshiliezho.
3.8: Zinie goya kielienne hanshilie dane. Kielienshi ulie beiku doghunni wo, alaku du duruzho.
3.9: Hheghala matan Ezhan, Adani doulazho. Pse hheghala Hudai yanzighala zhayaghasan kunyi kharazho.
3.10: Doulaku, kharaku nie amanse khizhezho. Mii gaijiula, ene ese oluzho.
3.11: Nie bula nudunse qien usu, kou usu khizhe shidanu?
3.12: Mii gaijiula, uhuago mutun jiere ganlan alima sou shidanu? Putou mutun jiere uhuago sou shidanu? Sou dane, kou bulase qien usu khizhe daku niekielien wo. Hudase Iresan Agheli
3.13: Tai dunda kiende agheli, jienzha wine? Hhe kun aghelise iresan renyitu zhugheghala goude giezhi kunlade zhenmin gie.
3.14: Tai zhughede hende dubilieku, zisitu zhughe bise goyane bu tungulie. Ghudanghala zhendaoni fandui bu gie.
3.15: Ene aghelishi asiman jierese iresan pusho. Duya, nefuxin, sheitanse iresan wo.
3.16: Jien dubilieku sunsigheilieku winetu oronde londaku, yanyanji doghunni gieku shiqin wine.
3.17: Zinie asiman jierese iresan aghelishi xien ganjinni wo. Pse heqi, renyi, ranji, olon ubali xiizhi gounii gie, pienxin ulie gie, jiani wikui wo.
3.18: Heqishighachen kunla heqini tareidene gundanni ghurane.

4.1: Tai dundadu sugienduku eghinduku khalase irezho? Tai sudorodu nefuxin khudoghozhi khizhesan pushonu?
4.2: Ta tanxin giesanne kerezhi echi dase kunlai alane. Dubiliezhi yama kerezhi echi dase eghinduzhi sugiendune. Ta kerezhi echi dakushi xiahua ese giezho.
4.3: Xiahua giedene kerezhi echi dakushi tai muji ese oluzho. Ta keresanne goya nefuxin jiere injine giezho.
4.4: Ta ene piofen giechen kunla, ta duyaghala zhanlien gholuse Hudaghala duitou gholusei ulie mejienu? Kienliuzhe duyaghala zhanlien gholune giese Hudaghala duitou gholuzho.
4.5: Pse ta sumulase Huda matai sudoro teisan ruhherde neiizhi dubiliekude kuruzho giesan jinwunni kielien yama isi uwonu?
4.6: Ingieliuzhe Huda ogisan nenjien genjia olon wo. Jinwun jiere kieliesan mutun, "Huda goyane undude uzhesan kunlai fandui giene. Goyane meilade uzhesan kunlade nenjien ogine."
4.7: Ingiese ta Hudai shunji. Ibilisii danla. Ibilisi tanse piine.
4.8: Ta Hudai shigha. Huda tai shighane. Zuirenla, khane ganjinragha. Zhuine barei dasan kunla, zhughene ganjinragha.
4.9: Ta yuchou giezhi nango giezhi wila. Tai xiniedunyi nango gholugha. Bayasukui yuchou gholugha.
4.10: Ta Ezhanyi melie goyane boghonide uzhe, ingiese hhe tai undudaghane. Kunlai Bu Kielie
4.11: Gaijiula, ta nieniene bu sugie. Kien gaijiune sugiezhi kieliese guijinni sugiezhi kieliezho. Ta guijinni kieliese guijinni zunjisan kun pusho, panjiku noyen gholuwo.
4.12: Guijinni jinjichen, panjichen zi niekozi wo. Hheshi kunni jiui shidaku, widagha shidaku Huda wo. Kunlai kieliezhi chishi kien wo? Goyane Bu Kuaizhi Hudade Kouizhi Gie
4.13: "Enedu, maghashijie matan khalakhala chenshide echi, niehon souzhi meimei giezhi baer zhenjiye." giezhi kieliesan kunla, chenliendu.
4.14: Ta maghashijie matui gholukui ulie mejiene. Tai aminshi yan wo? Khizhese deigo widaku tuman wo.
4.15: Ta indan ingiezhi kieliekuni wo, "Ezhan duran bise matan aminne olune, enei giene, hheiye giene."
4.16: Ingieliuzhe ta goyane undude uzhezhi kuaine. Qingiezhi kuaikushi man doghunni wo.
4.17: Ingiese kun gouni giekui mejiedene ulie giese zui fanjizho.

5.1: Ta bayan kunla chenliendu. Tai jiere bouzheku zeinande tunku giezhi fugiede wila.
5.2: Tai boubeila qida oluwo, tai jienlai ghughei ijiewo.
5.3: Tai antan, miengu xiuqirawo. Ene xiuqi tai zhaku zhenji gholune. Khan mutun tai beyeni sidera widaghane. Ta duya baraku xienzide boubei sunjizho.
5.4: Uzhe, kunla tai ghazhade wilie giesan gunzini ta ese ogizho. Ene gunzi waradazhi boxin kieliezho. Hhezighan zhonjia ghurasan kunlai boxin giesan shenqi waradazhi Qienwon Buduini Ezhanni chighinde orowo.
5.5: Ta duyade futande udu daozhi zhomen xianshou giezho. Goyane ijiezhi taghulaghadene alane giesan hhe udude zhunbei giezho.
5.6: Ta gou kunyi zui jinjizhi alawoma, hhe fandui ese giezho. Rennai Giezhi Onxian Gie
5.7: Ingiese gaijiula, Ezhan iretula ta rennai gie. Uzhe, zhonjia kun rennai giezhi eqie udan ghurai panjizhi ghazhase gou taran khizhekui sagheizho.
5.8: Taye rennai giezhi zhughene khiduzhegha. Ezhan ireku udu ghujinlazho.
5.9: Gaijiula, ta nieniedene boxin bu kielie. Pse ta panjikui shouine. Uzhe, panjiku Ezhan wijien konde beizho.
5.10: Gaijiula, ta Ezhanni niereghala kielien kieliesan xienzhilai shouku giezhi rennai giesan yanzii suru.
5.11: Uzhe, rennai giesan kunlade matan fuqi wine giezho. Eibu rennai giesei ta chenliezhi daozho. Ezhan hhende zuihoude ogisei taye mejiene. Ezhande ubali xiiku, unbasaku olon wo.
5.12: Mii gaijiula, zui zhunyonishi fayen bu gie. Asiman, zemin, yanniliuzhe zhiizhi fayen bu gie. Ta kielien kieliekude enbeneshi enbene gie, pushoshi pusho gie. Ingiese tai ulie panjine.
5.13: Tai dunda kien chijia shiqin penjise onxian gie. Kien bayasuse zanmeishi doula.
5.14: Tai dunda kien giemerese jiohuini zhanlaolani uruzhi Ezhanni niereghala hhende oluzhi tosun moizhi onxian gie.
5.15: Xianxin giezhi onxian giekughala giemeresan kunyi goudaghane. Ezhan hhei bosizheghane. Hhe zui fanjizhoshi mienliene.
5.16: Ingiese ta nieniene zuini renjizhi nieniedene oluzhi onxian giema, tai gien goudane. Gou kun onxian giese zoin fugiede wine.
5.17: Iliya shi matanre niekielienji kun woma, hhe hende onxian giezhi ghura bu bou giese 3 nienban zemin jiere ghura ese bouwo.
5.18: Khuina pse onxian giese asiman jierese ghura bouzhezhi zemin jiere zhonjia osiwo.
5.19: Mii gaijiula, tai dunda nie kun zhendaose likai giese kien hhei khareighazhoshi
5.20: zuirenyi miisan mo jierese khareighachen hhe kun hhe nie kunni fugukuse jiuizhi olon zuini kha widaghasei mejiekui wo.

1.1: Ersa Mexihade shitu danlasan Beduru Bendu , Jialatai , Jiapadojia , Yaxiya , Bituini de sandazhi zhanshi jiere souzhi Huda sunghusan kunlade xin huaizho.
