17.5: Manlou jiereni fugie Babilun wo, zeminni biozila, yanyanji hanzhan gieghakulani Ana wo giezhi mimitu niere huaizho.
17.6: Bi pse chanlase hhe bierei shentulani chusun, Ersa de oluzhi ganzhen beisan kunlai chusunyi ochi sudozho. Bi hhei chanlase hende ghanirazho.
17.7: Qienxien made kieliezho, "Chi yale ghanirazho? Bi ene biereini, pse hhei achisan dolon qiorun hharan gochatu yewoni mimii chade kielieye.
17.8: Chi chanlasan yewo eqighandei wine, ede uwo, jianlai jizi witu nokiense khizhezhi widakude echine. Jien zemin jiere sousanla, jiushi niereini duyai zhayaghasanse aminni jilasan benzi jiere ese jilasanla hhe eqighandei wine, ede uwo, jianlai ireku yewoni chanlase ghanirane.
17.9: Enende aghelitu zhughe kerene. Hhe dolon qiorunshi bierei sousan dolon ula wo, dolon honshan wo.
17.10: Tawulie ijin furawo, niekozi da wine, da nie dou ese irezhoma, irese goujicha beine.
17.11: Eqighandei biku, ede uwoku yewoshi ji 8 gie honshan wo, yeshi dololie mutun nie wo, widakude echine.
17.12: Chi chanlasan hharan gochashi hharan honshan wo. Hhela dou gojiani sou dazhoma, niecha jiere yewore hhantu honshan danlaku qienli bareine.
17.13: Hhela nie zhugheghala goya nenli, qienline yewode ogizho.
17.14: Hhela ghoni ghughanre eghindune. Ghoni ghughan hhelase injikushi ghoni ghughanshi ezhan dundadu Ezhan wo, honshan dundadu Honshan wo. Hhezighan urusan, sunghusan, shixinji giesan kunlaye ghoni ghughanre hhantu injine."
17.15: Qienxien pse made kieliezho, "Chi chanlasan biozi sousan usushi olon minzu, bexin, gojia, kielien wo.
17.16: Chi chanlasan hharan gocha, yewo hhe biozini henjine. Hhei yanyanjilai qianlazhi hulan muchughun gholughadene mighaini ijiezhi khanghala sidera widaghane.
17.17: Ingiekushi Huda hhelai zhughede goyane isii gieghakui teizho. Hhela nie zhugheghala goya gojialane yewode ogizhi Hudai kielien man gholuku shihou kune.
17.18: Chi chanlasan biereishi zemin jieredu honshanlani gonjisan fugie chenshi wo."

18.1: Enense khuinashi bi chanlase nie fugie nenlitu qienxien asimanse bouzhezho, hhei fama zemin jiere gon zhouizho.
18.2: Hhe fugie shenqighala waradazhi kieliezho, " Babilun fugie chenshi furawo, furawo! Sheitan souku oron gholuwo. Yanyanji zannan ruhherni ho, yanyanji zannan bunzhuni galun, yanyanji zannan, hanzhan gieghaku yewoni oron gholuwo.
18.3: Soyuji gojiala hhei lon kijieku fugie nefuxinde sudozho. Zemin jieredu honshanla hhere kijiezhi daozho. Hhe gofenji baer lon huaise zemin jieredu meimei giechen kunla facai giewo."
18.4: Bi pse sonosuse asimanse da nie shenqi kieliezho, "Mii bexinla, hhe chenshise khizhe! Pse hhere hhantu zui bizhi hhe shouiku zeinanni shouine.
18.5: Hhei zui zemin jiere duruzhi Huda hhei codasanyi ese matazho.
18.6: Hhe kunlade matugie giese hhendeye qingiezhi gie. Zhao hhe giesande shonbeide kharulu. Hhe huighasan jiuni beizide shonbeide huighadene hhende ogizhi chenfa gie.
18.7: Hhe goyane matugie kuaizhi matugie gofende baerni lon huaizhoshi hheiye qingiezhi tendun shouighazhi nango giegha. Hhe zhughedene kieliezhi bi honshan mutun wizide souzhi guafu pusho. Zhughede yama nango gieku uwo giezho.
18.8: Ingiese hhei zeinanla man niudude irene. Jiushi fuguku, nango gieku, oliesuku wo. Hhei khanghala sidera widaghane. Hhei panjiku Ezhan Hudade fugie nenli wine."
18.9: Hhere hhantu lon kijiezhi gofende lon baer huaisan zemin jieredu honshanla hhei tuliesan funii chanladene hhende oluzhi hende wilane.
18.10: Hhela hhe tendun shouisanse ayizhi gholode beidene, "Gou widawo! Gou widawo! Babilun fugie, famatu chenshiya, Niecha jiere chii faiku irewo." giezhi kieliene.
18.11: Zemin jieredu meimei giesan kunla hhende oluzhi hende wilakushi hhelai dunxilai agichen kun pse widawo.
18.12: Ene dunxilashi antan, miengu, boushi, zhenzhu, gou bosi, zisheini seiliu, donzi, dahunseni seiliu, yanyanji xian winetu mutun, daxianni shidunghala giesan yanyanji dunxi, guizhuntu mutun, tun, qiemu, guizhuntu tashighala giesan yanyanji dunxi,
18.13: rougui, doukou, xian, xianshui, andatu osun, jiu, tosun, ghurun, boudei, fughe, ghoni, morei, mache, pse hoji wo.
18.14: Meimei giesan kunla kieliezho. " Babilun ya, chi oresan dunxila man widawo. Chii yanyanji seighan, gou dunxila chii dundase widazhi pse chanla dane!"
18.15: Hhe chenshide meimei giezhi facai giesan kunla hhe tendun shouisanse ayizhi gholode beidene hende wilazhi kieliezho,
18.16: "Gou widawo! Gou widawo! Ene fugie chenshiya, Yenlai zishei, dahunni gou jienni musizhi antan, boushi, zhenzhughala dabalazho.
18.17: Niecha jiere imekie bayannila wida khiwo!" Jien chonzhan, chon sousan kun, chon jiere wilie giesan, soyuji haini kouizhi udu daosanla gholode beizhi
18.18: hhei tuliesan funii chanladene waradazhi kieliezho, "Yan chenshi ene chenshise fama wo?"
18.19: Hhela pse turani qiorun jierene teidene hende wilazhi waradazhi kieliezho, "Gou widawo! Gou widawo! Ene fugie chenshiya, Jien hai jiere yosan chonla hhei bayanni kouizhi bayazhezho! Hhe niecha jiere hontan gholuwo.
18.20: Asimanya, shentu, shitu, xienzhilaya, ta man hhei yenyinzhe bayasundu! Huda tande oluzhi hhei panjiwo!"
18.21: Nie fugie liliantu qienxien nie fugie qiemansha mutun tashini qila haide bendadene kieliezho, " Babilun fugie chenshini ingiezhi hende benda boughase pse chanla dane.
18.22: Qin tanjisan, don doulasan, xiu feiliesan, laba feiliesan shenqini chii dunda pse sonosu dane. Yanyanji mujianlai chii dunda ereizhi olu dane. Qieman sidasan shenqini chii dunda sonosu dane.
18.23: Zhulani gon chii dunda pse ulie zhouine. Shini khughon, shini biereini shenqii pse chii dunda sonosu dane. Chare meimei giesan kunla yenlaishi duya jieredu zui henni wo. Soyuji gojialai chii fashu miizhi daozho.
18.24: Xienzhi, shentu, da zemin jieredu soyuji alasan kunlai chusunni ene chenshise ereizhi oluwo."

19.1: Enense khuinashi bi sonosuse hoxian olon kunla asiman jiere fugie shenqighala kieliezho, "Haliluya ! Jiuiku, kuaiku, nenlishi mai Hudanughun wo.
19.2: Hhei panjiku zhenni wo, gundan wo! Lon kijiezhi duyani qida olughasan fugie biozini panjiwo. Hojilaini chusunni usurughasan biozini panjizhi hhelade bouchou giewo!"
19.3: Pse kieliezho, "Haliluya! Biozini tuliesan funi chanqi izhi mouizho."
19.4: 24 gie zhanlao, jieran amitu ojienla baozo sousan Hudade papaladene beiizhi kieliezho, "Amine! Haliluya!" Ghoni Ghughanni Ghurun
19.5: Pse shenqi baozose khizhezhi kieliezho, "Hudai hojila, jien hhei zunjisan fugiei, gajii, man mai Hudade doula!"
19.6: Bi pse sonosuse hoxian olon kunlai shenqi, olon usuni shenqi, fugie olien tunguliesan shenqi kieliezho, "Haliluya! Ezhan mai Huda Hhe Fugie Nenlitu manlai gonjizho.
19.7: Matan hende bayasuzhi kuaikui hhende ogiye. Ghoni ghughan ghurun ijieku shihou kuzhewo, Shini biereini zhunbei gie goudawo.
19.8: Gieghan, ganjintu gou jienni hhende ogizhi musighawo. Ene gou jienshi shentula giesan gou wilie wo."
19.9: Qienxien made kieliezho, "Chi ingiezhi huai, 'Ghoni ghughanyi ghurunde xinlazhi iresan kunlade fuqi wine.'" Pse made kieliezho, "Eneshi Hudai shuhuajia kielien wo."
19.10: Ingie bi hhei kon konde papaladene hhei beiine giese hhe kieliezho, "Ulie olune! Biye chighala, pse chii hhezighan Ersade ganzhen beisan gaijiulare hhantu hoji danlasan wo. Chi Hudai beii. Hudai kielienyi jianjiku dunda zui zhunyonishi Ersa de ganzhen beiku wo." Chighan Morei Unuchen
19.11: Bi pse chanlase asiman keizhi nie chighan morei wo! Jiereni unusei Kekao, Zhenni giezhi uruzho. Hhe panjizhi eghinduse gundanghala giezho.
19.12: Nudunni khan giedai xianli, qiorun jierene honshan zhoku ga maghala olon zhozho. Jiereni hhense chugo kiema ulie mejieku niere huaizho.
19.13: Hhe chusun xireighasan jienni musizho, niereini Hudai Kielien giene.
19.14: Asiman jieredu buduila chighan, ganjintu gou jien musidene chighan morei unuzhi hhei daghazho.
19.15: Amanseni xidu khudogho khizhezhi gojialani eghizhi beiighane. Qiemu zhugunghala hhelai gonjine, putou chizide jiu daruku mutun Fugie Nenlitu Hudai hokukui ireghane.
19.16: Hhei fudu jien jiere, datui jiere honshan dundadu Honshan, ezhan dundadu Ezhan giezhi niere huaizho.
19.17: Bi pse chanlase nie qienxien naran nudun dunda beizhi asiman jiere musisan soyuji bunzhulade fugie shenqighala waradazhi kieliezho, "Ta hhantuladene Hudai fugie xini soule ire.
19.18: Honshan, jianjin, lilian fugietu, morei, morei unusan, pse soyuji ziyutu, hoji danlasan, fugie, meilani kunlai mighai ijie."
19.19: Bi pse chanlase yewo, zemin jieredu honshanla, pse hhelai buduila hhantuladene chighan morei unusan, da hhei buduilare eghindune giezho.
19.20: Yewoni bareiwo. Pse yewore hhantuku jia xienzhiiye bareiwo. Jia xienzhi eqighandei yewoni melie ghudureqi giedene hhezighan yewoni zhanzii taizhi yewoni nigiedai beiisan kunlai miizho. Hhe ghualai amitu siderasan liuhonni khantu haide bendawo.
19.21: Psedulai morei unusei amanse khizhesan khudogho alawo. Soyuji bunzhula hhelai mighai ijie chuduwo.

20.1: Bi pse chanlase nie qienxien asimanse bouzhezhi khadeni jizi witu nokienni yeshi, fugie qielien wine.
20.2: Qienxien lunni bareiwo. Hheshi gushihouni moghei, sheitan, Ibilisi wo. Hhei 1000 nien banladene
20.3: jizi witu nokiende bendazhi nokienyi khadene fenjizhi 1000 nien kurutula gojialai pse ulie miighane. Ene shiqinla daose hhei bixi zhanshi jiere andaghane.
20.4: Bi pse ezighan baozo, baozo jiere sousanlai chanlawo. Hhelade panjiku qienlii ogizho. Bi pse hhezighan Ersa de ganzhen beizhi Hudai kieliende oluzhi qiorunni pienjisan kunlai ruhherni chanlawo. Hhelashi yewo, yewoni nigiedai ese beiizhi manlou kha jiereni zhanzi ese taisan kunla wo. Hhela aminne oluzhi Mexihare hhantu 1000 nien honshan danlawo.
20.5: Eneshi tou 1 hui fuho wo. Psedu kunla 1000 nien olutula aminne ese oluzho.
20.6: Tou 1 hui fuhode guzi bichen kunlade fuqi bizhi zhiguitu wo. Ji 2 hui fuguku hhelai gonji dane. Hhela Huda, Mexihaghalade buwa danlazhi Mexihare hhantu 1000 nien honshan danlane. Ibilisini Eghi Beiighaku
20.8: khizhedene zemin jieredu simienni gojialai miine. Ene gojialashi Gaoge , Mage wo. Hhelai hhantulaghazhi eghindughane giezho. Hhelai shuzi olonde haini shazi niekielien wo.
20.9: Hhela khizhezhi nie zemin jiere dudene shentulani zhanfan, Huda oresan chenshini wiqise khan asimanse bouzhezhi hhelai sidera widaghawo.
20.10: Hhelai miisan sheitanni liuhontu khantu haide bendawo. Hhende yewo, jia xienzhi wine. Hhela xieni uduji chanqi izhi tendun shouine. Zuihou Panjiku
20.11: Bi pse nie chighan fugie baozo, baozo jiere sousanyi chanlawo. Hhei meliese asiman, zemin piizhi hhelai pse chanla dawo.
20.12: Bi pse chanlase fugusan kun gajii fugieiji baozo melie beizho. Shulani man keighawo. Da nie shuniye keighawo, hheshijiu aminni jilasan benzi wo. Fugusan kunlai zhao hhela giesanzhe shu jiere jilasan mutun panjine.
20.13: Pse hai haide fugusan kunlai ogiwo. Fuguku, pse dozohei hhelai hhende fugusan kunlaiye ogiwo. Hhelai zhao hhelai giesan mutun panjine.
20.14: Fuguku pse dozoheini khantu hude bendawo. Ene khantu hushi ji 2 hui fuguku wo.
20.15: Kienyi niere aminni benzi jiere uwoshi hhei khantu hude bendawo.

21.1: Bi pse shini asiman, zemin chanlawo. Eqighanku asiman, zemin widawo, haiye widawo.
21.2: Bi pse chanlase zhiguitu chenshi shini Yelusalen asimanyi Hudai hhense bouzhezho. Hoxian shini bierei zhanguijidene oluzhi dabala goudasei xianli.
21.3: Bi pse sonosuse fugie shenqi baozose khizhezhi kieliezho, "Uzhe, Hudai zhanfan kun dunda wo! Huda kunlare hhantu soune. Hhela hhende bexin danlane. Huda qinsi hhelare hhantu wine.
21.4: Hhelai nughunsunyi man saine. Pse fuguku uwo, pse nango gieku, wilaku, tendun uwo. Melieshidaku shiqinla daowo."
21.5: Baozo sousan kieliewo, "Uzhe, bi soyujilai shinishighazho." Pse kieliewo, "Chi huai, enezighan kielienshi kekao, zhenni wo."
21.6: Hhe made pse kieliewo, "Chenjiwo! Bishi Alafa wo, Emeiga wo, jiushi keitou wo, baraku wo. Bi aminni bula usuni undasusan kunde belien ughane.
21.7: Injisan kunla enezighanyi jienliezhi caichan giene. Bi hhende Huda danlane, hhe made kewon danlane.
21.8: Danzi meilatu, xianxin ulie giechen, hanzhan gieghachen, kun alachen, lon kijiechen, fashu shuaichen, nigieda beiichen, da soyuji ghudan kieliechen kunlai guzi siderasan liuhontu khantu hude wo. Eneshi ji 2 hui fuguku wo." Shini Yelusalen
21.9: Zuihouku dolon zeinanni zhonlo durughasan dolon antan ighani bareisan dolon qienxien dundadu nie made kieliewo, "Chi ire, bi chade shini biereii uzheghaye, ghoni ghughanyi bierei wo."
21.10: Shenlin mii zhughei gojiolughazhi qienxien mii uduruzhi nie undu fugie ulade echi, asimanni Hudai hhense bouzhesan zhiguitu chenshi Yelusalen ni made uzheghawo.
21.11: Chenshide Hudai fama wine. Faisan gon guizhuntu boushi, ishini xianli, gieghantu shuijin niekielien wo.
21.12: Hhende fugie undu dan wine, 12 gie wijien wo. Wijien jiere 12 gie qienxien wine. Wijien jiere Isilie ni 12 gie paini nierei huaizho.
21.13: Dunmiende ghuran wijien, beimiende ghuran wijien, nanmiende ghuran wijien, ximiende ghuran wijien wo.
21.14: Chenshini dande 12 gie jichu wo, jichu jiere ghoni ghughanyi 12 gie shituni niere wine.
21.15: Made kielien kieliesan qienxien antanni ghulusunyi bareizhi chenshi, wijien, danni nanjine giezho.
21.16: Chenshishi jieran mien wo, fudu, aghui niekielien wo. Qienxien ghulusunghala chenshini nanjise man 12000 sitaji wo. Fudu, aghui, unduni niekielien wo.
21.17: Hhe zhao kunni chicun, yeshijiu qienxienni chicunghala danni nanjise 144 zhou wo.
21.18: Danshi ishighala giesan wo, chenshishi gou antanghala giesan wo, gieghande boli niekielien wo.
21.19: Danni jichui yanyanji boushighala dabalaghazho. Ji 1 gie jichushi ishi wo, ji 2 gieshi kugie boushi wo, ji 3 gieshi noghon manou wo, ji 4 gieshi noghon boushi wo,
21.20: ji 5 gieshi hulan manou wo, ji 6 gieshi hulan boushi wo, ji 7 gieshi shira boushi wo, ji 8 gieshi noghon ishi wo, ji 9 gieshi shira ishi wo, ji 10 gieshi feicui wo, ji 11 gieshi zishei manou wo, ji 12 gieshi zishei shuijin wo.
21.21: 12 gie wijienshi 12 gie zhenzhughala giesan wo, nie wijienshi nie zhenzhu wo. Chenshini geidoushi gou antanghala giesan wo, gieghande boli niekielien wo.
21.22: Bi chenshi sudoro dajien chanla dakushi Fugie Nenlitu Ezhan Hudaji ghoni ghughanshi chenshini dajien wo.
21.23: Chenshide naran, sarani gonni ulie kerekushi Hudai fama zhouizho, ghoni ghughanshi chenshini zhula wo.
21.24: Gojiala hhe gon dunda yone. Zemin jieredu honshanla famanine deilazhi hhe chenshide echine.
21.25: Chenshini wijienyi izhi ulie khane, hhende xieni uwo.
21.26: Kunla gojialani fama, zhiguini deilazhi hhende echine.
21.27: Jien ganjin witu, pse hanzhan gieghachen, ghudan kieliechenlai hhende ulie oroghane. Zinie ghoni ghughanyi aminni jilasan benzi jiere nierei jilasanlai oroghane.

22.1: Qienxien pse made nie amin winetu moronni uzheghazho, gieghande shuijinni xianli. Huda, ghoni ghughanyi baozose usuru khizhezhi
22.2: chenshini geidou dundase daozho. Moron lianmiende aminni mutun wine. 12 yan alima soune, nie sara 1 hui soune. Mutun lachen gojialai goudaghane.
22.3: Kharasanla pse uwo. Chenshide Huda, ghoni ghughanyi baozo wine. Hhei hojila hhei beii
22.4: hhei ungiei chanlane. Hhei niere hhelai manlou jiere wine.
22.5: Pse xieni uwo, zhula, naranyi gonyi ulie kerene. Ezhan Hudai gon hhelai zhouizho. Hhela chanqi izhi honshan danlane. Ersa Ireku
22.6: Qienxien pse made kieliewo, "Enezighan kielienshi kekao, zhenni wo. Ruhherghala xienzhilai zhughei gojiolughasan Ezhan Huda qienxienne peizhi deigo fashen giene giesan shiqinni hojiladene mejieghawo."
22.7: "Uzhe, bi deigo irene. Jien ene shude melieshi kieliesei zunjisanlade fuqi wine!"
22.8: Enezighan shiqinshi bi, Yaheiya sonosuzhi chanlasan wo. Bi sonosuzhi chanlase enezighanni made uzheghasan qienxienni kon konde papaladene hhei beiine giese
22.9: hhe made kieliewo, "Ulie olune! Chi Hudai beii. Bishi chi, xienzhila, jiushi chii gaijiula, pse ene shude melieshi kieliesei zunjisanlare hhantu hoji danlasan wo."
22.10: Hhe pse made kieliewo, "Ene shude melieshi kieliesei bu fenji. Shihou chadashiwo.
22.11: Gou witu kun gou wini giegha, zannantu kun zannanni giegha, gou kun gouni giegha, zhiguitu kun zhiguini giegha."
22.12: Ersa kieliewo, "Uzhe, bi deigo irene! Jianli ogiku, faiku made wo, jien kun giesanzhe bi kharulune.
22.13: Bishi Alafa wo, Emeiga wo. Bishi zui melieshiku wo, zui kuinashiku wo, keitou wo, baraku wo."
22.14: Goya jienne waghazhi arughasanlade fuqi wine. Qienli bizhi aminni mutunyi hhende echine, wijiense chenshideye oro shidane.
22.15: Nogheila, fashu shuaichen, lon kijiechen, kun alachen, nigiedai beiichen, pse soyuji ghudan kieliekude xiqi bichen, jiani giechenla man chenshi ghadane wo.
22.16: "Bi, Ersa jiohuilade oluzhi qienxienne peizhi enezighan shiqinyi tande ganzhen beighane. Bishi Dawude ni houdei wo, eqiemaghaku gieghan hodun wo."
22.17: Shenlin shini biereighala, "Ire." giezhi kieliezho. Sonosusanlaye, "Ire." giezhi kielie. Undasusan kunla man ire. Duran bichen kunla man aminni usui belien jienlie.
22.18: Bi ene shude melieshi kieliesei soyuji sonosusanlade jingao gieye. Kien ene melieshi kieliesande jiaise Huda ene shude huaisan zeinanni hhei jiere ireghane.
22.19: Ene shude melieshi kieliesei kien widaghase Huda ene shude huaisan aminni mutun, pse zhiguitu chenshide hhei bisan guzini widaghane.
22.20: Ene shiqinlade ganzhen beisan kieliezho, "Enbene, bi deigo irene." Amine! Ezhan Ersa ya, ire!
22.21: Ezhan Ersa ni nenjien shentulare man hhantu bi gie. Amine!
